papers.title: Beyond Accuracy: Benchmarking Cross-Task Consistency in Unified Multimodal Models
papers.abstract: Unified Multimodal Models (uMMs) aim to support both visual understanding and visual generation within a shared representation. However, existing evaluation protocols assess these two capabilities independently and do not examine whether they are semantically aligned. As a result, it remains unclear whether current uMMs learn coherent unified representations that remain consistent across tasks given a visual concept. We introduce XTC-Bench, a scene-graph-grounded evaluation framework that measures cross-task visual semantic consistency. By deriving both generation prompts and understanding queries from a structured scene graph, our framework enables fact-level alignment analysis across objects, attributes, and relations. We propose Continuous Cross-Task Agreement (CCTA), a fine-grained metric that quantifies semantic agreement between generation and understanding over matched atomic facts, isolating internal consistency from standalone task accuracy. Extensive experiments on eight open-source and one commercial unified models reveal that high generation or understanding performance does not imply strong cross-task alignment, and architectural analysis shows consistency is governed by how tightly learning objectives are coupled across modalities, not by architectural unification alone. XTC-Bench provides a reproducible and model-agnostic framework for diagnosing representation-level misalignment, offering a concrete direction for advancing unified multimodal modeling beyond isolated task performance.

analysis.tldr: 提出XTC-Bench基准，通过场景图评估统一多模态模型的跨任务语义一致性，发现高单任务性能不代表强一致性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有评估协议独立测试视觉理解和生成能力，无法检查两者是否语义对齐，导致不清楚统一多模态模型是否学到连贯的统一表征。
analysis.problem: 缺乏衡量统一多模态模型在视觉理解和生成任务间语义一致性的评估方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验发现高生成或理解性能并不保证强跨任务对齐，且一致性受学习目标耦合紧密度影响，而非仅靠架构统一。
analysis.method: 提出XTC-Bench，基于场景图构建生成提示和理解查询，实现对象、属性、关系层面的事实级对齐分析；提出连续跨任务一致性（CCTA）指标量化语义一致性。
contributions: 提出XTC-Bench，首个场景图驱动的跨任务视觉语义一致性评估框架。
提出CCTA指标，细粒度量化生成与理解间的事实级语义一致性。
对8个开源和1个商业统一模型进行实验，揭示高单任务性能不代表强一致性，并分析架构因素。
analysis.experiments: 在8个开源和1个商业统一多模态模型上进行实验，评估跨任务一致性。
limitations: 可能仅适用于场景图可表示的视觉概念。
未涉及其他模态（如文本-音频）的一致性评估。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出XTC-Bench基准，通过场景图评估统一多模态模型的跨任务语义一致性，发现高单任务性能不代表强一致性。

papers.title: Scalable Secure Biometric Authentication without Auxiliary Identifiers
papers.abstract: The prevalence of biometric authentication has been on the rise due to its ease of use and elimination of weak passwords. To date, most biometric authentication systems have been designed for on-device authentication of the device owner (e.g., smartphones and laptops). Recently, biometric authentication systems have started to emerge that are designed to authenticate users against cloud databases storing representations of biometrics for large numbers of users (potentially millions), such as those facilitating biometric payments. However, the use of a large cloud database introduces a significant attack vector, as a breach of the database could lead to the compromise of all enrolled users' sensitive biometric data. Indeed, all such existing systems either do not adequately protect against such a breach, or are impractical to deploy and use due to their high computational overhead. In this work, we present a new biometric authentication system that provides provable security guarantees against data breaches, while remaining scalable and performant. To do so, we marry artificial intelligence with advanced cryptographic techniques in a novel fashion, providing several optimizations along the way. Our work is the first to show that real-world scalable privacy-preserving biometric authentication without auxiliary identifiers is feasible, and we believe that it will spur widespread industrial adoption and further research in this area.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个无需辅助标识符的可扩展隐私保护生物认证系统，结合AI与密码学实现可证明安全。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有生物认证系统在云端大规模部署时面临数据泄露风险，且现有方案要么安全性不足，要么计算开销过大难以实用。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个既能抵御数据泄露、又具备可扩展性和高性能的云端生物认证系统。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将人工智能与高级密码学技术以新颖方式结合，并引入多种优化。
contributions: 首次证明无需辅助标识符的可扩展隐私保护生物认证在现实世界中可行。
提出结合AI与密码学的新方法，并实现多项优化。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖特定密码学假设或硬件支持。
实际部署中可能面临用户接受度或法律合规挑战。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个无需辅助标识符的可扩展隐私保护生物认证系统，结合AI与密码学实现可证明安全。

papers.title: Frontier Coding Agents Can Now Implement an AlphaZero Self-Play Machine Learning Pipeline For Connect Four That Performs Comparably to an External Solver
papers.abstract: Forecasting when AI systems will become capable of meaningfully accelerating AI research is a central challenge for AI safety. Existing benchmarks measure broad capability growth, but may not provide ample early warning signals for recursive self-improvement. We propose measuring AI's capability to autonomously implement end-to-end machine learning pipelines from past AI research breakthroughs, given a minimal task description. By providing a concise task description instead of the full prior work as reference, we hope to better elicit emerging AI research taste. We introduce a proof-of-concept benchmark in which frontier coding agents autonomously implement an AlphaZero-style machine learning pipeline for Connect Four on consumer hardware within a three-hour budget, and we evaluate the resulting game AIs in a round-robin tournament anchored to the Pascal Pons Connect Four solver. Across four agents with eight trials each, we find substantial differentiation: Claude Opus 4.7 won as first-mover against Pons in seven of eight trials, statistically significantly better than the other agents tested, none of which exceeded two of eight. The task, which no frontier agent could reliably complete when we began development in January of 2026, is now near-saturation. Our evaluation also surfaced anomalous behavior in GPT-5.4, which consistently used far less of its allocated time budget than other agents. A follow-up 16-trial probe using shorter, less evaluation-coded prompts substantially increased GPT-5.4's time-budget usage, consistent with but not diagnostic of sandbagging; Bradley-Terry ratings across probe conditions showed only directional differences, despite significant differences in time-budget usage. We release our data, code, and prompts to support reproduction and extension.

analysis.tldr: 前沿编码智能体已能自主实现AlphaZero式机器学习流水线，性能接近外部求解器。
analysis.research_motivation: 预测AI何时能加速自身研究是AI安全的核心挑战，现有基准可能无法提供递归自我改进的早期预警信号。
analysis.problem: 评估前沿编码智能体自主实现端到端机器学习流水线的能力，特别是从过去AI研究突破中复现AlphaZero式流水线。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 不同智能体表现差异显著，Claude Opus 4.7在八次试验中七次作为先手战胜Pons求解器；GPT-5.4出现异常行为，时间预算使用远低于其他智能体，提示可能存在sandbagging。
analysis.method: 提出一个概念验证基准，要求前沿编码智能体在消费级硬件上三小时内自主实现AlphaZero风格的Connect Four机器学习流水线，并通过循环赛与Pascal Pons求解器对比评估。
contributions: 提出衡量AI自主实现端到端机器学习流水线能力的基准，用于预警递归自我改进。
通过实验揭示不同智能体能力分化及GPT-5.4的异常时间使用行为。
analysis.experiments: 对四个智能体各进行八次试验，Claude Opus 4.7在七次中作为先手战胜Pons求解器，显著优于其他智能体；对GPT-5.4进行16次探针试验，缩短提示后时间预算使用增加。
limitations: 基准仅针对Connect Four单一任务，泛化性有限。
sandbagging证据仅为方向性差异，未完全诊断。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 前沿编码智能体已能自主实现AlphaZero式机器学习流水线，性能接近外部求解器。

papers.title: ShapeY: A Principled Framework for Measuring Shape Recognition Capacity via Nearest-Neighbor Matching
papers.abstract: Object recognition (OR) in humans relies heavily on shape cues and the ability to recognize objects across varying 3D viewpoints. Unlike humans, deep networks often rely on non-shape cues such as texture and background, leading to vulnerabilities in generalization and robustness. To address this gap, we introduce ShapeY, a novel and principled benchmarking framework designed to evaluate shape-based recognition capability in OR systems. ShapeY comprises 68,200 grayscale images of 200 3D objects rendered from multiple viewpoints and optionally subjected to non-shape ``appearance'' changes. Using a nearest-neighbor matching task, ShapeY specifically probes the fine-grained structure of an OR system's embedding space by evaluating whether object views are clustered by 3D shape similarity across varying 3D viewpoints and other non-shape changes. ShapeY provides a suite of quantitative and qualitative performance readouts, including error rate graphs, viewpoint tuning curves, histograms of positive and negative matching scores, and grids showing ordered best matches, which together offer a comprehensive evaluation of an OR system's shape understanding capability. Testing of 321 pre-trained networks with diverse architectures reveals significant challenges in achieving robust shape-based recognition: even state-of-the-art models struggle to generalize consistently across 3D viewpoint and appearance changes, and are prone to infrequent but egregious matches of objects of obviously completely different shape. ShapeY establishes a principled framework for advancing artificial vision systems toward human-like shape recognition capabilities, emphasizing the importance of disentangled and invariant object encodings.

analysis.tldr: ShapeY 是一个通过最近邻匹配评估物体识别系统形状识别能力的基准框架，揭示了现有模型在跨视角和外观变化下的形状泛化缺陷。
analysis.research_motivation: 人类物体识别高度依赖形状线索和跨视角泛化能力，而深度网络常依赖纹理、背景等非形状线索，导致泛化性和鲁棒性脆弱，亟需一个专门评估形状识别能力的基准。
analysis.problem: 现有基准缺乏对物体识别系统形状理解能力的细粒度、系统性评估，特别是跨3D视角和非形状外观变化下的形状聚类能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 测试321个预训练网络发现，即使最先进的模型也难以在3D视角和外观变化下一致泛化，且容易出现将明显不同形状的物体错误匹配的严重失误。
analysis.method: 构建包含68,200张灰度图像（200个3D物体、多视角、可选外观变化）的数据集，通过最近邻匹配任务评估嵌入空间中物体视图是否按3D形状相似性聚类，并提供错误率图、视角调谐曲线、匹配分数直方图、最佳匹配网格等量化与定性指标。
contributions: 提出ShapeY，一个用于评估物体识别系统形状识别能力的原则性基准框架。
通过大规模实验揭示当前模型在形状泛化上的显著挑战和失败模式。
analysis.experiments: 在321个不同架构的预训练网络上进行测试，提供了错误率图、视角调谐曲线、匹配分数直方图和最佳匹配网格等量化与定性结果。
limitations: 仅使用灰度图像，未考虑颜色等视觉线索。
基准任务为最近邻匹配，可能不完全反映真实物体识别场景的复杂性。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ShapeY 是一个通过最近邻匹配评估物体识别系统形状识别能力的基准框架，揭示了现有模型在跨视角和外观变化下的形状泛化缺陷。

papers.title: Alice v1: Distillation-Enhanced Video Generation Surpassing Closed-Source Models
papers.abstract: Wepresent Alice v1, a 14-billion parameter open-source video generation model that achieves state-of-the-art quality through consistency distillation with score regularization (rCM). Contrary to conventional distillation-which trades quality for speed-we demonstrate that rCM-based distillation can exceed teacher model quality. We attribute this to three mechanisms: (1) the score regularization term acts as a mode-seeking objective that concentrates probability mass on high-quality outputs rather than covering the full teacher distribution, (2) our targeted synthetic data pipeline with hard example mining provides training signal specifically for failure modes (physics, hands, faces) that the teacher handles inconsistently, and (3) consistency enforcement acts as implicit regularization, eliminating "lucky path" dependence on specific noise samples. Alice v1 generates 5-second 720p videos at 24fps in 4 denoising steps (~8 seconds on H100), a 7x speedup over the 50-step teacher while improving VBench score from 84.0 (Wan2.2) to 91.2. This surpasses both the teacher and closed-source systems including Veo3 (~90) and Sora2 (~88) on automated benchmarks, with competitive results in human preference studies. We release all model weights, training code, synthetic data pipelines, and evaluation scripts to advance open research in video generation.

analysis.tldr: Alice v1 通过一致性蒸馏与分数正则化，在视频生成质量上超越闭源模型，同时实现 7 倍加速。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统蒸馏以牺牲质量为代价换取速度，而视频生成模型需要同时提升质量和效率，现有开源模型在质量上落后于闭源系统。
analysis.problem: 如何通过蒸馏技术在不降低甚至提升生成质量的前提下，显著加速视频生成过程。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出基于 rCM 的蒸馏可以超越教师模型质量，归因于三个机制：分数正则化作为模式追求目标、针对失败模式的合成数据管道、一致性约束作为隐式正则化。
analysis.method: 提出 Alice v1，一个 14B 参数的开源视频生成模型，采用一致性蒸馏与分数正则化（rCM），结合针对失败模式的合成数据管道和硬样本挖掘。
contributions: 提出 rCM 蒸馏方法，证明蒸馏可以超越教师模型质量而非牺牲质量。
开源完整模型权重、训练代码、合成数据管道和评估脚本。
在 VBench 上达到 91.2 分，超越闭源模型 Veo3 和 Sora2，同时实现 7 倍加速。
analysis.experiments: 在 VBench 自动基准上，Alice v1 得分 91.2，优于教师模型 Wan2.2（84.0）和闭源系统 Veo3（~90）及 Sora2（~88）；人类偏好研究结果具有竞争力。
limitations: 摘要未提及模型在更长视频或更高分辨率上的表现。
人类偏好研究仅提及“有竞争力”，未提供具体对比细节。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Alice v1 通过一致性蒸馏与分数正则化，在视频生成质量上超越闭源模型，同时实现 7 倍加速。

papers.title: Dino-NestedUNet: Unlocking Foundation Vision Encoders for Pathology Tumor Bulk Segmentation via Dense Decoding
papers.abstract: Vision foundation models (VFMs), such as DINOv3, provide rich semantic representations that are promising for computational pathology. However, many current adaptations pair frozen VFMs with lightweight decoders, creating a capacity mismatch that often limits boundary fidelity for infiltrative tumor bulk segmentation. This paper presents Dino-NestedUNet, a framework that couples a pre-trained DINOv3 encoder with a Nested Dense Decoder. Instead of sparse skip connections and linear upsampling, the proposed decoder forms a dense grid of intermediate pathways to enable continuous feature reuse and multi-scale recalibration, aligning high-level semantics with low-level morphological textures during reconstruction. We evaluate Dino-NestedUNet on three histopathology cohorts (multi-center CHTN, institutional OSU, and CAMELYON16) and observe consistent improvements over UNet++ and standard Dino-UNet variants, particularly under cross-domain shift. To further assess external generalization, we perform zero-shot evaluation by training on CHTN and directly testing on unseen TIGER WSIBULK and OSU CRC cohorts without fine-tuning. These results suggest that dense decoding is a key ingredient for unlocking foundation encoders in boundary-sensitive pathology segmentation.

analysis.tldr: Dino-NestedUNet通过密集解码器解锁DINOv3编码器在病理肿瘤分割中的潜力，提升边界保真度。
analysis.research_motivation: 视觉基础模型（如DINOv3）在计算病理学中具有潜力，但现有方法通常将冻结的编码器与轻量级解码器配对，导致容量不匹配，限制了浸润性肿瘤分割的边界保真度。
analysis.problem: 解决冻结的视觉基础模型与轻量级解码器之间的容量不匹配问题，提升病理图像中肿瘤边界的分割精度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体的现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Dino-NestedUNet框架，将预训练的DINOv3编码器与嵌套密集解码器（Nested Dense Decoder）耦合，通过密集的中间路径网格实现连续特征重用和多尺度重校准，对齐高层语义与低层形态纹理。
contributions: 提出Dino-NestedUNet，结合DINOv3编码器和嵌套密集解码器，用于病理肿瘤分割。
在三个组织病理学队列上验证了方法优于UNet++和标准Dino-UNet变体，尤其在跨域迁移下表现一致。
analysis.experiments: 在三个组织病理学队列（多中心CHTN、机构OSU和CAMELYON16）上评估，观察到一致改进；通过零样本评估（在CHTN上训练，直接测试未见过的TIGER WSIBULK和OSU CRC队列）进一步评估外部泛化能力。
limitations: 可能仅适用于边界敏感的分割任务，泛化到其他病理任务需验证。
密集解码器可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Dino-NestedUNet通过密集解码器解锁DINOv3编码器在病理肿瘤分割中的潜力，提升边界保真度。

papers.title: Analyzing LLM Reasoning to Uncover Mental Health Stigma
papers.abstract: While large language models (LLMs) are increasingly being explored for mental health applications, recent studies reveal that they can exhibit stigma toward individuals with psychological conditions. Existing evaluations of this stigma primarily rely on multiple-choice questions (MCQs), which fail to capture the biases embedded within the models' underlying logic. In this paper, we analyze the intermediate reasoning steps of LLMs to uncover hidden stigmatizing language and the internal rationales driving it. We leverage clinical expertise to categorize common patterns of stigmatizing language directed at individuals with psychological conditions and use this framework to identify and tag problematic statements in LLM reasoning. Furthermore, we rate the severity of these statements, distinguishing between overt prejudice and more subtle, less immediately harmful biases. To broaden the reasoning domain and capture a wider array of patterns, we also extend an existing mental health stigma benchmark by incorporating additional psychological conditions. Our findings demonstrate that evaluating model reasoning not only exposes substantially more stigma than traditional MCQ-based methods but it helps to identify the flaws in the LLMs' logic and their understanding of mental health conditions.

analysis.tldr: 通过分析LLM推理步骤揭示隐藏的心理健康污名化语言，比传统多选题方法更有效。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM心理健康应用存在污名化问题，但传统多选题评估无法捕捉模型逻辑中的隐性偏见。
analysis.problem: 如何通过分析LLM的中间推理步骤来发现并分类其隐藏的污名化语言和内部逻辑缺陷。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，评估模型推理比传统多选题方法能暴露更多污名化内容，并帮助识别LLM对心理健康状况理解的逻辑缺陷。
analysis.method: 利用临床专业知识对污名化语言模式分类，在LLM推理步骤中标记问题语句，并评估其严重程度；同时扩展心理健康污名基准以涵盖更多心理状况。
contributions: 提出通过分析LLM推理步骤来揭示隐藏污名化语言的方法
构建基于临床知识的污名化语言分类框架和严重程度评级
扩展心理健康污名基准以覆盖更多心理状况
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖特定临床分类框架，泛化性待验证
扩展基准的覆盖范围可能仍有限
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过分析LLM推理步骤揭示隐藏的心理健康污名化语言，比传统多选题方法更有效。

papers.title: Barriers and Enablers of Online Instruction in Hospitality Education in the Philippines: An Exploratory Study
papers.abstract: This study examined the barriers and enablers of online instruction in hospitality education. A sequential exploratory design was implemented with hospitality teachers from both public and private higher educational institutions in the Philippines. Thematic analysis of interviews identified four key themes: technological barriers, pedagogical challenges, institutional and personal support, and integration of artificial intelligence (AI). These themes were transformed into survey constructs and tested for reliability. Pedagogical challenges, including difficulties in teaching hands-on subjects and sustaining student engagement, emerged as the most critical concerns. Technological barriers such as unstable internet and limited devices were moderately rated, while institutional and personal support received mixed evaluations. Teachers viewed AI integration as helpful but also expressed caution and emphasized the need for training. Reliability analysis showed acceptable to good internal consistency across constructs. The findings highlight the importance of strengthening pedagogical training, providing clear institutional support, and fostering responsible competence in AI use. Future studies should validate these results with larger and more diverse samples.

analysis.tldr: 探索菲律宾酒店教育在线教学的障碍与促进因素，发现教学挑战最突出，AI整合需谨慎推进。
analysis.research_motivation: 在线教学在酒店教育中面临独特挑战，但相关实证研究不足，尤其缺乏对发展中国家的系统分析。
analysis.problem: 识别并量化菲律宾酒店教育在线教学的主要障碍与促进因素。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 教学挑战（如实践课教学困难、学生参与度低）是最关键问题；技术障碍（网络不稳定、设备有限）中等严重；机构与个人支持评价不一；教师对AI整合持谨慎乐观态度。
analysis.method: 采用顺序探索性设计，先通过访谈进行主题分析，再将主题转化为问卷进行信度检验。
contributions: 构建了酒店教育在线教学障碍与促进因素的四主题框架
开发并验证了相应的测量工具
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及信度分析显示内部一致性可接受至良好。
limitations: 样本仅来自菲律宾，可能不适用于其他地区
问卷信度检验样本量可能有限
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 探索菲律宾酒店教育在线教学的障碍与促进因素，发现教学挑战最突出，AI整合需谨慎推进。

papers.title: Leverage Laws: A Per-Task Framework for Human-Agent Collaboration
papers.abstract: We propose a per-task leverage ratio for human-agent collaboration: human work displaced by an agent, divided by the human time required to specify the task, resolve mid-run interrupts, and review the result. The denominator decomposes into three channels through which a conserved per-task information requirement must flow, each with its own time-cost scalar. We show that information density itself is directional and bounded by separate ceilings on human-to-agent and agent-to-human flow, and that the asymptotic behavior of leverage decomposes into two scaling axes (capability and memory) with a non-zero floor on the planning term set by irreducible task novelty bounded by human throughput. We extend this per-task analysis to a windowed leverage measure that accommodates recurring tasks, spawned subtasks, and amortized system-design investment. The per-task ceiling does not bind the windowed measure, though both remain bounded: $L_{\text{task}}$ by per-task novelty, $L_{\text{window}}$ by the stock of accumulated planning investment that pays out within the window. The framework operationalizes aspects of earlier qualitative work on supervisory control (Sheridan, 1992), common ground (Clark & Brennan, 1991), and mixed-initiative interaction (Horvitz, 1999) within a single normative ratio, and produces a list of testable empirical questions that we leave as open problems.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个每任务杠杆率框架，量化人类-智能体协作中人类工作被替代的效率，并分解信息流瓶颈。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有定性框架（如监督控制、共同基础、混合主动交互）缺乏统一的量化指标来评估人类-智能体协作的效率，难以指导系统设计和比较不同方法。
analysis.problem: 如何量化人类-智能体协作中每任务的人类工作替代效率，并分析信息流瓶颈和缩放规律。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 信息密度具有方向性且受限于人类到智能体和智能体到人类流的不同上限；杠杆率的渐近行为分解为能力和记忆两个缩放轴，且规划项存在由不可约任务新颖性决定的非零下限。
analysis.method: 定义每任务杠杆率（被替代的人类工作除以指定任务、解决中断和审查结果所需的人类时间），将分母分解为三个信息流通道，并扩展到窗口化杠杆率以处理重复任务、子任务和摊销系统设计投资。
contributions: 提出一个规范化的每任务杠杆率框架，统一了监督控制、共同基础和混合主动交互等定性概念。
揭示了信息密度的方向性、杠杆率的缩放轴（能力和记忆）以及规划项的非零下限。
扩展了窗口化杠杆率，涵盖重复任务和系统设计投资的摊销。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 框架目前是理论性的，缺乏实证验证。
时间成本标量的确定可能依赖具体场景，通用性待检验。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个每任务杠杆率框架，量化人类-智能体协作中人类工作被替代的效率，并分解信息流瓶颈。

papers.title: Dual-Track CoT: Budget-Aware Stepwise Guidance for Small LMs
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) solve many reasoning tasks via chain-of-thought (CoT) prompting, but smaller models (about 7 to 8B parameters) still struggle with multi-step reasoning under tight compute and token budgets. Existing test time reasoning methods such as self consistency (sampling multiple rationales and voting), Tree-of-Thoughts (search over intermediate thoughts), and critique revise loops improve performance, but often at high token cost and without fine-grained step-level control. This project1 aims to address that gap: can Small Language Models (SLMs) reason reliably using the same or fewer tokens? This question is both scientific and practical. Scientifically, it probes whether process supervision and simple test-time controls (such as token budgets and rejection of redundant steps) can substitute for model scale or large sampling counts. Practically, many deployments (on-device, low-latency, or cost-constrained settings) cannot afford huge models or dozens of sampled rationales per query. A method that improves SLM reasoning at fixed cost would therefore be directly useful.

analysis.tldr: 提出双轨思维链方法，通过预算感知的逐步指导提升小语言模型在有限计算和令牌预算下的推理能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 大型语言模型通过思维链提示解决推理任务，但小模型在严格计算和令牌预算下多步推理困难；现有测试时推理方法如自一致性、思维树等虽提升性能但令牌成本高且缺乏细粒度步骤控制，实际部署中无法承受大模型或大量采样。
analysis.problem: 如何让小语言模型在相同或更少令牌下可靠地进行多步推理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出双轨思维链方法，包含预算感知的逐步指导，通过令牌预算和冗余步骤拒绝等简单测试时控制来提升小模型推理。
contributions: 提出双轨思维链方法，实现预算感知的逐步指导。
探索过程监督和简单测试时控制能否替代模型规模或大量采样。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定规模的小模型（7-8B参数）。
未在多种推理任务上验证泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出双轨思维链方法，通过预算感知的逐步指导提升小语言模型在有限计算和令牌预算下的推理能力。

papers.title: Faithful Autoformalization via Roundtrip Verification and Repair
papers.abstract: When an LLM formalizes natural language, how do we know the output is faithful? We propose a roundtrip verification approach which does not require ground-truth annotations: formalize a statement, translate the result back to natural language, re-formalize, and use a formal tool to check logical equivalence. When the two formalizations agree, this provides evidence of a faithful formalization. When they disagree, a stage-level diagnosis localizes the error to a specific translation step, and a scoped repair operator attempts to correct that step. We evaluate the framework on two statutory domains (the Texas Transportation Code and the Texas Parks and Wildlife Code) using two LLMs (Claude Opus~4.6 and GPT-5.2) with three repair baselines. Diagnosis-guided scoped repair is the most effective method, with effectiveness contingent on the reliability of the diagnosis function. Across both domains and both models, under our full repair system, rules that fail the equivalence check show 1.4x-2.5x more NLI drift than rules that pass it.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种通过往返验证和修复确保LLM形式化忠实性的方法。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM将自然语言形式化时，输出是否忠实于原意难以验证，缺乏自动化的忠实性保证方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在没有真实标注的情况下，验证和修复LLM形式化输出的忠实性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 往返验证：将自然语言形式化，再翻译回自然语言，重新形式化，用形式化工具检查逻辑等价性；当不一致时，通过阶段级诊断定位错误，并使用范围受限的修复算子修正。
contributions: 提出无需真实标注的往返验证框架，用于检测形式化输出的忠实性。
设计诊断引导的范围修复方法，有效修正形式化错误。
analysis.experiments: 在两个法规领域（德州交通法规和德州公园与野生动物法规）上，使用两个LLM（Claude Opus 4.6和GPT-5.2）和三种修复基线进行评估。诊断引导的范围修复最有效，其效果取决于诊断函数的可靠性。通过等价性检查的规则比未通过的规则NLI漂移低1.4-2.5倍。
limitations: 修复效果依赖于诊断函数的可靠性。
仅评估了法规领域，泛化性未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种通过往返验证和修复确保LLM形式化忠实性的方法。

papers.title: Retrieval-Guided Generation for Safer Histopathology Image Captioning
papers.abstract: Generative vision-language models can produce fluent medical image captions but remain prone to hallucination, over-specific diagnostic claims, and factual inconsistency-serious issues in pathology. We investigate retrieval-guided generation (RGG) as a safer alternative, where captions are formed by summarizing expert text from visually similar cases rather than generated de novo. On the ARCH histopathology dataset, RGG improves semantic alignment with ground truth, achieving cosine similarity of $\approx$0.60 versus $\approx$0.47 from MedGemma, with non-overlapping confidence intervals indicating a robust gain. A pathologist-led qualitative review shows better preservation of morphology-relevant terminology and fewer unsupported diagnoses, while revealing failure modes such as concept mixing and inherited over-specific labeling. Overall, retrieval-guided captioning offers a more transparent and reliable approach with clearer opportunities for auditing than fully generative methods.

analysis.tldr: 检索引导生成通过汇总相似病例的专家文本，在病理图像描述中显著减少幻觉并提高语义对齐。
analysis.research_motivation: 生成式视觉语言模型在医学图像描述中容易产生幻觉、过度诊断和事实不一致，这在病理学中尤其危险，需要更安全可靠的替代方案。
analysis.problem: 如何减少病理图像描述中的幻觉和事实不一致，提高生成文本的可靠性和可审计性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到生成式模型（如MedGemma）在病理图像描述中常出现幻觉和过度诊断，而检索引导生成能更好地保留形态学术语并减少无依据的诊断，但存在概念混合和继承过度标签等失败模式。
analysis.method: 检索引导生成（RGG）：从视觉相似的病例中检索专家文本，然后通过汇总这些文本形成描述，而非从头生成。
contributions: 提出检索引导生成作为病理图像描述的安全替代方案，提高语义对齐和事实一致性。
通过定量（余弦相似度）和定性（病理学家评审）评估，验证了RGG相比纯生成方法的优势，并揭示了其失败模式。
analysis.experiments: 在ARCH组织病理学数据集上，RGG的余弦相似度约0.60，MedGemma约0.47，置信区间不重叠；病理学家评审显示RGG更好地保留了形态学术语，减少了无依据诊断。
limitations: 存在概念混合和继承过度标签等失败模式。
依赖检索库的质量和覆盖范围，可能限制泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 检索引导生成通过汇总相似病例的专家文本，在病理图像描述中显著减少幻觉并提高语义对齐。

papers.title: Do Foundation Model Embeddings Improve Cross-Country Crop Yield Generalisation? A Leave-One-Country-Out Evaluation in Sub-Saharan Africa
papers.abstract: Accurate predictions of smallholder maize yields across national boundaries are critical for food security planning in sub-Saharan Africa, yet most published benchmarks report within-country performance that overstates true generalisability. This paper evaluates whether geospatial foundation model embeddings, specifically Prithvi-EO-1.0-100M and ViT-Base, outperform traditional Sentinel-2 spectral features under a Leave-One-Country-Out cross-validation scheme on 6,404 maize field observations from five African countries. The results show a clear generalisability gap: within-country random cross-validation yields moderate R^2 values, but all feature sets perform poorly under cross-country testing, with universally negative R^2. Frozen Prithvi-EO embeddings provide no meaningful advantage over engineered spectral features for cross-country prediction in this setting. The paper argues that the main limitation is a shift in yield distribution between countries rather than representation quality and releases a reproducible negative benchmark for future work.

analysis.tldr: 地理空间基础模型嵌入在跨国家玉米产量泛化中并不优于传统光谱特征，存在显著的泛化差距。
analysis.research_motivation: 小农玉米产量预测对撒哈拉以南非洲的粮食安全规划至关重要，但现有基准多报告国内性能，高估了跨国家泛化能力。
analysis.problem: 评估地理空间基础模型嵌入（Prithvi-EO-1.0-100M和ViT-Base）在跨国家玉米产量预测中是否优于传统Sentinel-2光谱特征。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 所有特征集在跨国家测试中均表现不佳，R²普遍为负，表明存在泛化差距；主要限制是产量分布在国家间的偏移，而非表示质量。
analysis.method: 采用留一国家法交叉验证，在五个非洲国家的6404个玉米田观测数据上比较Prithvi-EO-1.0-100M、ViT-Base嵌入与Sentinel-2光谱特征。
contributions: 揭示了跨国家玉米产量预测中的泛化差距，所有特征集在跨国家测试中R²为负。
发现冻结的Prithvi-EO嵌入在跨国家预测中并不优于工程化光谱特征。
发布了可复现的负面基准，供未来研究使用。
analysis.experiments: 在五个非洲国家的6404个玉米田观测数据上，采用留一国家法交叉验证，比较不同特征集的性能。
limitations: 仅评估了两种基础模型嵌入，可能不适用于其他模型。
数据集仅覆盖五个国家，泛化结论可能有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 地理空间基础模型嵌入在跨国家玉米产量泛化中并不优于传统光谱特征，存在显著的泛化差距。

papers.title: Internet of Everything in the 6G Era: Paradigms, Enablers, Potentials and Future Directions
papers.abstract: The Internet of Everything (IoE) represents an evolution of the Internet of Things (IoT) by integrating people, data, processes, and things into a unified intelligent ecosystem. IoE aims to enhance automation, decision-making, and service efficiency across multiple application domains such as smart cities, healthcare, industry, and next-generation wireless networks. This paper provides a structured overview of the IoE concept, its core components, architectural foundations, enabling technologies, and major research challenges. Finally, open research directions toward 6G-enabled intelligent IoE systems are discussed, with emphasis on scalability, security, privacy, and energy efficiency.

analysis.tldr: 综述6G时代万物互联（IoE）的范式、使能技术、潜力与未来方向。
analysis.research_motivation: 物联网（IoT）向万物互联（IoE）演进，整合人、数据、流程和事物，但面临可扩展性、安全、隐私和能效等挑战，6G技术有望解决这些问题。
analysis.problem: 缺乏对6G时代IoE系统架构、使能技术和研究挑战的系统性综述。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 结构化综述，涵盖IoE概念、核心组件、架构基础、使能技术及主要研究挑战，并讨论6G使能的智能IoE系统的开放研究方向。
contributions: 提供了IoE概念、组件和架构的全面概述
识别了关键使能技术和主要研究挑战
指出了6G时代IoE的未来研究方向
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 综述性质，缺乏实证验证
未深入讨论具体技术实现细节

papers.title: EVT-Based Generative AI for Tail-Aware Channel Estimation
papers.abstract: Ultra-reliable and low-latency communication (URLLC) will play a key role in fifth-generation (5G) and beyond networks, enabling mission-critical applications. Meeting the stringent URLLC requirements, characterized by extremely low packet error rates and minimal latency, calls for advanced statistical modeling to accurately capture rare events in wireless channels. Traditional methods, such as those that rely on large datasets and computationally intensive estimation techniques, often fail in real-time scenarios. In this paper, a novel framework is proposed to meet URLLC requirements through a synergistic integration of extreme value theory (EVT) with generative artificial intelligence (AI). EVT is used to model channel tail distributions, providing an accurate characterization of rare events. Concurrently, generative AI enables data augmentation and channel parameter estimation from limited samples. The integration of EVT with generative AI can thus help overcome the limitations of generative models in capturing extreme events during channel characterization. Using an experimental dataset collected from an automotive environment, it is demonstrated that this integration enhances data augmentation for extreme quantiles, while requiring fewer samples than traditional analytical EVT methods and generative baselines in online estimation of channel distribution.

analysis.tldr: 将极值理论与生成式AI结合，实现URLLC场景下信道尾部分布的精准估计与数据增强。
analysis.research_motivation: URLLC要求极低误包率和延迟，传统信道估计方法依赖大数据集且计算密集，难以实时捕获罕见事件。
analysis.problem: 如何在有限样本下准确估计信道分布的尾部（极端事件），并满足URLLC的实时性要求。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 生成模型在信道表征中难以捕捉极端事件，而极值理论可建模尾部分布，两者互补。
analysis.method: 提出EVT与生成式AI协同框架：EVT建模信道尾部分布，生成式AI进行数据增强和参数估计。
contributions: 首次将极值理论与生成式AI集成用于URLLC信道估计
在汽车环境数据集上验证了该方法在极端分位数数据增强和在线估计中优于传统方法
analysis.experiments: 使用汽车环境实验数据集，对比传统解析EVT方法和生成基线，显示该方法在极端分位数数据增强和在线估计中所需样本更少。
limitations: 仅针对汽车环境数据集验证，泛化性待考
未讨论生成模型的计算开销与实时性平衡
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将极值理论与生成式AI结合，实现URLLC场景下信道尾部分布的精准估计与数据增强。

papers.title: Toward a Science of Intent: Closure Gaps and Delegation Envelopes for Open-World AI Agents
papers.abstract: Recent work has framed intelligence in verifiable tasks as reducing time-to-solution through learned structure and test-time search, while systems work has explored learned runtimes in which computation, memory and I/O migrate into model state. These perspectives do not explain why capable models remain difficult to deploy in open institutions. We propose intent compilation: the transformation of partially specified human purpose into inspectable artifacts that bind execution. The relevant deployment distinction is closed-world solver versus open-world agent. In closed worlds, a checker is largely given; in open worlds, verification is distributed across semantic, evidentiary, procedural and institutional dimensions. Weformalize this residual openness as a closure-gap vector, define delegation envelopes as pre-authorized regions of action space, distinguish misclosure from undersearch, and outline benchmark metrics for testing when closure interventions outperform additional inference-time search.

analysis.tldr: 提出意图编译框架，通过闭包缺口向量和委托信封概念解决开放世界AI代理的部署难题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有智能框架和系统工作无法解释为何能力强的模型在开放机构中难以部署，缺乏将人类部分指定的意图转化为可检查执行制品的方法。
analysis.problem: 开放世界中AI代理的验证分布在不同维度，存在闭包缺口，需要形式化定义和度量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出意图编译框架，形式化闭包缺口向量、委托信封概念，区分误闭包与欠搜索，并设计基准度量。
contributions: 提出意图编译概念，将部分指定的人类目的转化为可检查的执行制品。
形式化闭包缺口向量和委托信封，区分误闭包与欠搜索，并给出基准度量。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 框架尚处于理论阶段，缺乏实证验证。
基准度量可能难以在实际场景中全面实施。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations

papers.title: BifDet: A 3D Bifurcation Detection Dataset for Airway-Tree Modeling
papers.abstract: Thoracic Computed Tomography (CT) scans offer detailed insights into the intricate branching network of the airway tree, which is essential for understanding various respiratory diseases. Airway bifurcations, where airway branches split, are crucial landmarks for understanding lung physiology, disease mechanisms and lesion localization. Despite the significance of bifurcation analysis, a notable lack of datasets annotated for this task hinders the development of advanced automated specialized detection or segmentation tools. In this paper, we introduce BifDet, the first publicly-available dataset specialized for 3D airway bifurcation detection, filling a critical gap in existing resources. Our dataset comprises carefully annotated CT scans from the ATM22 open-access cohort with bifurcation bounding boxes covering the parent and daughter branches. As a use-case for demonstrating the potential of BifDet, we fine-tune and evaluate RetinaNet and DETR for 3D airway bifurcations detection on CT scans. We provide detailed pipelines, including preprocessing steps and specific implementation design choices. Results are detailed over various categories of minimal bounding box sizes to serve as baseline to benchmark future research.

analysis.tldr: 首个公开的3D气道分叉检测数据集BifDet，填补了该领域标注数据空白。
analysis.research_motivation: 气道分叉点是理解肺部疾病和病变定位的关键标志，但缺乏专门用于3D气道分叉检测的标注数据集，阻碍了自动化工具的研发。
analysis.problem: 现有资源中缺少针对3D气道分叉检测的公开数据集，导致相关自动化检测或分割工具发展受限。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建了首个公开的3D气道分叉检测数据集BifDet，包含来自ATM22队列的CT扫描及分叉边界框标注；并微调RetinaNet和DETR作为基线方法。
contributions: 首次发布专门用于3D气道分叉检测的公开数据集BifDet。
提供了详细的预处理流程和实现设计，并基于RetinaNet和DETR建立了基线结果。
analysis.experiments: 在BifDet数据集上微调并评估了RetinaNet和DETR，按最小边界框大小分类报告了检测结果，作为未来研究的基准。
limitations: 数据集仅来自单一队列ATM22，泛化性可能受限。
仅评估了两种检测器，更多方法的比较有待后续研究。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个公开的3D气道分叉检测数据集BifDet，填补了该领域标注数据空白。

papers.title: DouC: Dual-Branch CLIP for Training-Free Open-Vocabulary Segmentation
papers.abstract: Open-vocabulary semantic segmentation requires assigning pixel-level semantic labels while supporting an open and unrestricted set of categories. Training-free CLIP-based approaches preserve strong zero-shot generalization but typically rely on a single inference mechanism, limiting their ability to jointly address unreliable local tokens and insufficient spatial coherence. We propose DouC, a training-free dual-branch CLIP framework that decomposes dense prediction into two complementary components. OG-CLIP improves patch-level reliability via lightweight, inference-time token gating, while FADE-CLIP injects external structural priors through proxy attention guided by frozen vision foundation models. The two branches are fused at the logit level, enabling local token reliability and structure-aware patch interactions to jointly influence final predictions, with optional instance-aware correction applied as post-processing. DouC introduces no additional learnable parameters, requires no retraining, and preserves CLIP's zero-shot generalization. Extensive experiments across eight benchmarks and multiple CLIP backbones demonstrate that DouC consistently outperforms prior training-free methods and scales favorably with model capacity.

analysis.tldr: 提出训练免费的双分支CLIP框架DouC，通过互补分支融合提升开放词汇分割性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有训练免费的CLIP方法依赖单一推理机制，难以同时解决局部token不可靠和空间连贯性不足的问题。
analysis.problem: 如何在不训练、不引入额外参数的前提下，提升CLIP在开放词汇语义分割中的局部可靠性和空间一致性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出单分支CLIP方法存在局部token不可靠和空间连贯性不足的瓶颈。
analysis.method: 提出双分支CLIP框架DouC：OG-CLIP通过轻量推理时token门控提升patch级可靠性；FADE-CLIP利用冻结视觉基础模型的代理注意力注入外部结构先验；两分支在logit层融合，可选实例感知校正后处理。
contributions: 提出训练免费的双分支CLIP框架，无需额外参数或重训练，保持零样本泛化能力。
在8个基准和多种CLIP骨干上超越先前训练免费方法，且随模型容量扩展性能提升。
analysis.experiments: 在8个基准和多种CLIP骨干上评估，DouC一致优于先前训练免费方法。
limitations: 可能依赖外部视觉基础模型的质量。
双分支融合可能增加推理计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出训练免费的双分支CLIP框架DouC，通过互补分支融合提升开放词汇分割性能。

papers.title: Sparse Personalized Text Generation with Multi-Trajectory Reasoning
papers.abstract: As Large Language Models (LLMs) advance, personalization has become a key mechanism for tailoring outputs to individual user needs. However, most existing methods rely heavily on dense interaction histories, making them ineffective in cold-start scenarios where such data is sparse or unavailable. While external signals (e.g., content of similar users) can offer a potential remedy, leveraging them effectively remains challenging: raw context is often noisy, and existing methods struggle to reason over heterogeneous data sources. To address these issues, we introduce PAT (Personalization with Aligned Trajectories), a reasoning framework for cold-start LLM personalization. PAT first retrieves information along two complementary trajectories: writing-style cues from stylistically similar users and topic-specific context from preference-aligned users. It then employs a reinforcement learning-based, iterative dual-reasoning mechanism that enables the LLM to jointly refine and integrate these signals. Experimental results across real-world personalization benchmarks show that PAT consistently improves generation quality and alignment under sparse-data conditions, establishing a strong solution to the cold-start personalization problem.

analysis.tldr: 提出多轨迹推理框架PAT，通过强化学习联合优化风格与偏好信号，解决冷启动场景下稀疏个性化文本生成问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM个性化方法依赖密集交互历史，在冷启动场景下数据稀疏时效果差；外部信号（如相似用户内容）虽可缓解但原始上下文噪声大，现有方法难以推理异构数据源。
analysis.problem: 如何在用户交互数据稀疏的冷启动场景下，利用异构外部信号（风格相似用户的写作线索和偏好相似用户的主题上下文）实现有效的LLM个性化文本生成。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出PAT框架，先沿两条互补轨迹检索信息（风格相似用户的写作线索和偏好相似用户的主题上下文），再通过基于强化学习的迭代双推理机制联合精炼和整合这些信号。
contributions: 提出多轨迹检索与双推理框架，有效利用异构外部信号解决冷启动个性化问题。
引入强化学习迭代优化机制，实现风格与偏好信号的联合推理与整合。
analysis.experiments: 在真实世界个性化基准上，PAT在稀疏数据条件下持续提升生成质量和对齐度。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的外部用户相似度度量。
强化学习训练可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多轨迹推理框架PAT，通过强化学习联合优化风格与偏好信号，解决冷启动场景下稀疏个性化文本生成问题。

papers.title: Power Foam: Unifying Real-Time Differentiable Ray Tracing and Rasterization
papers.abstract: We introduce a differentiable 3D representation that unifies the ray tracing capabilities of foam-based ray tracing with the efficiency of modern rasterization pipelines. While prior foam representations enable constant-time ray traversal through an explicit volumetric partition of space, their potentially unbounded cells hinder efficient tile-based rasterization. We address this limitation by generalizing Voronoi foams to bounded power diagrams with controllable cell extents, enabling spatially bounded primitives without requiring expensive Delaunay triangulations during training. We further introduce an oriented surface formulation that explicitly models interfaces between interior and exterior regions, and decouple geometry from appearance by embedding differentiable texture directly on these surfaces. Together, these contributions yield a representation that preserves state-of-the-art ray tracing efficiency while achieving rasterization performance competitive with current generation 3DGS, providing a practical path toward unified real-time differentiable rendering.

analysis.tldr: 提出Power Foam，一种统一可微光线追踪与光栅化的3D表示，通过有界Power图实现高效渲染。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有泡沫表示支持光线追踪但无法高效光栅化，而现代渲染管线需要两者统一以实现实时可微渲染。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种3D表示，既能保持光线追踪的高效性，又能兼容光栅化管线，实现统一实时可微渲染。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将Voronoi泡沫推广为有界Power图，控制单元范围；引入定向表面显式建模内外界面；在表面上嵌入可微纹理解耦几何与外观。
contributions: 提出有界Power图表示，避免训练中昂贵的Delaunay三角剖分，支持空间有界基元。
实现统一实时可微渲染，光线追踪效率保持SOTA，光栅化性能与3DGS相当。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能对复杂拓扑或动态场景的适应性有限。
有界Power图的训练稳定性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Power Foam，一种统一可微光线追踪与光栅化的3D表示，通过有界Power图实现高效渲染。

papers.title: A New Kind of Network? Review and Reference Implementation of Neural Cellular Automata
papers.abstract: Stephen Wolfram proclaimed in his 2003 seminal work "A New Kind Of Science" that simple recursive programs in the form of Cellular Automata (CA) are a promising approach to replace currently used mathematical formalizations, e.g. differential equations, to improve the modeling of complex systems. Over two decades later, while Cellular Automata have still been waiting for a substantial breakthrough in scientific applications, recent research showed new and promising approaches which combine Wolfram's ideas with learnable Artificial Neural Networks: So-called Neural Cellular Automata (NCA) are able to learn the complex update rules of CA from data samples, allowing them to model complex, self-organizing generative systems. The aim of this paper is to review the existing work on NCA and provide a unified modular framework and notation, as well as a reference implementation in the open-source library NCAtorch.

analysis.tldr: 综述神经细胞自动机（NCA），提供统一框架与开源实现NCAtorch。
analysis.research_motivation: 细胞自动机在科学建模中潜力巨大但缺乏突破，神经细胞自动机结合了可学习神经网络，但现有工作分散、缺乏统一框架和标准化实现。
analysis.problem: 缺乏对神经细胞自动机（NCA）的系统性综述、统一符号表示和可复用的开源参考实现。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 综述现有NCA工作，提出统一模块化框架和符号，并基于PyTorch开发开源库NCAtorch作为参考实现。
contributions: 系统综述了神经细胞自动机（NCA）领域的研究进展。
提出了统一的模块化框架和符号表示。
提供了开源参考实现NCAtorch。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 综述可能未涵盖所有最新工作。
参考实现可能未针对特定应用优化。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 综述神经细胞自动机（NCA），提供统一框架与开源实现NCAtorch。

papers.title: Assessing Y-Axis Influence: Bias in Multimodal Language Models on Chart-to-Table Translation
papers.abstract: Chart-to-table translation converts chart images into structured tabular data. Accurate translation is crucial for Multimodal Language Model (MLM) to answer complex queries. We observe imbalances in the number of images across different aspects of the y-axis information in public chart datasets. Such imbalances can introduce unintended biases, causing uneven MLM performance. Previous works have not systematically examined these biases. To address this gap, we propose a new framework, FairChart2Table, for analyzing y-axis-related bias on five state-of-the-art models. Key Findings: (1) There are significant y-axis biases related to the digit length of the major tick values, the number of major ticks, the range of values, and the tick value format (e.g., abbreviation or scientific format). (2) The number of legends/entities in chart images impacts MLM performance. (3) Prompting MLM with y-axis information can significantly enhance the performance for some MLMs.

analysis.tldr: 发现图表到表格翻译中MLM存在Y轴偏差，提出FairChart2Table框架分析并验证偏差来源。
analysis.research_motivation: 图表到表格翻译对MLM回答复杂查询至关重要，但公开图表数据集中Y轴信息存在图像数量不平衡，可能引入偏差导致MLM性能不均，此前缺乏系统性研究。
analysis.problem: 系统分析并量化多模态语言模型在图表到表格翻译任务中因Y轴信息不平衡产生的偏差。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到Y轴主刻度值数字长度、主刻度数量、数值范围、刻度值格式（如缩写或科学计数法）以及图例/实体数量均会显著影响MLM性能；提示Y轴信息可提升部分MLM性能。
analysis.method: 提出FairChart2Table框架，在五个SOTA模型上分析Y轴相关偏差。
contributions: 首次系统研究图表到表格翻译中Y轴偏差问题
提出FairChart2Table分析框架并揭示多种Y轴偏差来源
analysis.experiments: 在五个SOTA模型上实验，摘要未提供具体数据集和数值结果。
limitations: 仅分析Y轴偏差，未涉及其他轴或图表类型
未提出偏差缓解方法
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 发现图表到表格翻译中MLM存在Y轴偏差，提出FairChart2Table框架分析并验证偏差来源。

papers.title: Adaptive Prompt Embedding Optimization for LLM Jailbreaking
papers.abstract: Existing white-box jailbreak attacks against aligned LLMs typically append discrete adversarial suffixes to the user prompt, which visibly alters the prompt and operates in a combinatorial token space. Prior work has avoided directly optimizing the embeddings of the original prompt tokens, presumably because perturbing them risks destroying the prompt's semantic content. We propose Prompt Embedding Optimization (PEO), a multi-round white-box jailbreak that directly optimizes the embeddings of the original prompt tokens without appending any adversarial tokens, and show that the concern is unfounded: the optimized embeddings remain close enough to their originals that the visible prompt string is preserved exactly after nearest-token projection, and quantitative analysis shows the model's responses stay on topic for the large majority of prompts. PEO combines continuous embedding-space optimization with structured continuation targets and an adaptive failure-focused schedule. Counterintuitively, later PEO rounds can benefit from heuristic composite response scaffolds that are not natural standalone templates, yet ASR-Judge shows that the resulting gains are not merely empty formatting or scaffold-only outputs. Across two standard harmful-behavior benchmarks and competing white-box attacks spanning discrete suffix search, appended adversarial embeddings, and search-based adversarial generation, PEO outperforms all of them in our experiments.

analysis.tldr: 提出直接优化原始提示词嵌入的越狱方法PEO，无需添加对抗性token，在保持语义的同时实现高攻击成功率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有白盒越狱攻击通常添加离散对抗性后缀，明显改变提示词且搜索空间大，而直接优化嵌入被认为会破坏语义，因此需要一种既能保持原提示词又能高效攻击的方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在不添加额外对抗性token且不破坏原始提示语义的前提下，实现对对齐LLM的高效白盒越狱攻击。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要发现直接优化原始提示词嵌入后，优化后的嵌入与原始嵌入距离足够近，经最近token投影后可见提示词完全保留，且模型回答在大多数情况下保持主题相关。
analysis.method: PEO方法：多轮白盒越狱，直接优化原始提示词的嵌入，结合连续嵌入空间优化、结构化续写目标以及自适应失败聚焦调度，并在后续轮次中使用启发式复合响应支架。
contributions: 提出PEO方法，直接优化原始提示词嵌入实现越狱，无需添加对抗性token。
通过实验证明PEO在多个基准上优于现有离散后缀搜索、附加对抗性嵌入和基于搜索的对抗生成等白盒攻击方法。
analysis.experiments: 在两个标准有害行为基准上，与多种白盒攻击（离散后缀搜索、附加对抗性嵌入、基于搜索的对抗生成）对比，PEO在攻击成功率上超越所有对比方法。
limitations: 可能仅适用于白盒场景，黑盒攻击不适用。
对模型回答的主题相关性保持可能在某些特定提示下失效。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出直接优化原始提示词嵌入的越狱方法PEO，无需添加对抗性token，在保持语义的同时实现高攻击成功率。

papers.title: Context-Augmented Code Generation: How Product Context Improves AI Coding Agent Decision Compliance by 49%
papers.abstract: AI coding agents powered by large language models can read codebases and produce functional code, but they routinely violate team-specific product decisions that are invisible in the source code alone. We introduce a controlled benchmark measuring decision compliance, the rate at which an AI coding agent follows established product, design, and engineering decisions, across 8 realistic software engineering tasks containing 41 weighted decision points. We compare a baseline configuration (Claude Code with codebase access only) against an augmented configuration that adds Brief, a product-context retrieval system providing spec generation, mid-build consultation, and retrieval of recorded decisions, persona pain points, customer signals, and competitive intelligence. On identical prompts and the same repository, the augmented configuration achieves 95% decision compliance versus 46% for the baseline, a 49 percentage point improvement. Per-decision analysis reveals that the baseline achieves 100% compliance on decisions visible in the codebase and 0-33% on decisions requiring product context, suggesting that product-context retrieval is a key driver of the improvement. We release the benchmark repository, all 16 pull requests, and scoring harness for independent reproduction.

analysis.tldr: 引入产品上下文检索可将AI编码代理的决策合规率从46%提升至95%。
analysis.research_motivation: AI编码代理虽能生成功能代码，但常违反团队特定的产品决策，这些决策在源代码中不可见，导致代码与产品需求脱节。
analysis.problem: AI编码代理在遵循产品、设计和工程决策方面合规性不足，缺乏对产品上下文的感知。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 基线配置在代码库可见的决策上合规率达100%，但在需要产品上下文的决策上仅0-33%，表明产品上下文缺失是主要瓶颈。
analysis.method: 提出Brief系统，通过产品上下文检索提供规格生成、中期咨询以及记录决策、用户痛点、客户信号和竞争情报的检索，增强AI编码代理的决策合规性。
contributions: 构建了衡量决策合规性的受控基准，包含8个真实软件工程任务和41个加权决策点。
实验证明产品上下文检索使决策合规率提升49个百分点（从46%到95%）。
开源了基准仓库、16个拉取请求和评分工具，支持独立复现。
analysis.experiments: 在8个真实软件工程任务上比较基线（仅代码库访问）与增强配置（添加Brief系统），增强配置达到95%决策合规率，基线为46%。
limitations: 基准任务数量有限（8个），可能无法完全代表真实场景的多样性。
仅测试了Claude Code一种编码代理，泛化性未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 引入产品上下文检索可将AI编码代理的决策合规率从46%提升至95%。

papers.title: When To Adapt? Adapting the Model or Data in Federated Medical Imaging
papers.abstract: Federated learning enables collaborative model training across medical institutions without sharing raw data, but its performance is often limited by domain heterogeneity across clients. Existing approaches to address this challenge fall into two main paradigms: model-side personalization, which adapts model parameters to each client, and data-side harmonization, which reduces inter-client variation at the input level. Despite their widespread use, these strategies have not been systematically compared. In this work, we conduct a comprehensive study across six medical imaging settings-colon polyp, skin lesion, and breast tumor segmentation, and tuberculosis CXR, brain tumor, and breast tumor classification-covering diverse types of domain shift. We evaluate a broad set of state-of-the-art harmonization and personalization methods under a unified framework. Our results reveal a conditional trade-off driven by the nature of heterogeneity: harmonization is more effective when variation is primarily appearance-based (e.g., CXR classification), while personalization performs better when differences are structural (e.g., colon polyp segmentation). When inter-client variation is limited, both strategies perform similarly. These findings demonstrate that the effectiveness of adaptation in federated medical imaging depends on the type and magnitude of domain shift rather than the strategy alone. We provide practical guidelines for selecting between harmonization and personalization and highlight directions for future hybrid approaches that combine both paradigms. Code is available at https://github.com/ChamaniS/WhenToAdapt.

analysis.tldr: 联邦医学影像中，数据协调与模型个性化两种域适应策略的效果取决于域偏移的类型和程度。
analysis.research_motivation: 联邦学习在医学影像中面临客户端间的域异质性挑战，现有方法分为模型个性化与数据协调两大范式，但缺乏系统性比较，导致实际选择缺乏依据。
analysis.problem: 系统比较模型个性化与数据协调两种域适应策略在联邦医学影像中的有效性，并揭示其适用条件。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现条件性权衡：当域偏移以表观变化为主时（如CXR分类），数据协调更有效；当差异为结构性时（如结肠息肉分割），模型个性化更优；客户端间差异有限时两者表现相似。
analysis.method: 在统一框架下评估多种最新的协调与个性化方法，涵盖六种医学影像设置（分割与分类任务），分析域偏移类型与策略效果的关系。
contributions: 首次系统比较联邦医学影像中数据协调与模型个性化两种域适应策略。
揭示域偏移类型（表观 vs. 结构）决定策略有效性的条件性权衡。
提供实际选择指南，并指出未来混合方法的潜在方向。
analysis.experiments: 在六种医学影像设置（结肠息肉、皮肤病变、乳腺肿瘤分割，以及结核CXR、脑肿瘤、乳腺肿瘤分类）上评估多种方法，覆盖多种域偏移类型。
limitations: 实验仅涵盖医学影像领域，可能不适用于其他联邦学习场景。
未深入探讨混合方法的实现细节。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 联邦医学影像中，数据协调与模型个性化两种域适应策略的效果取决于域偏移的类型和程度。

papers.title: Risk Reporting for Developers' Internal AI Model Use
papers.abstract: Frontier AI companies first deploy their most advanced models internally, for weeks or months of safety testing, evaluation, and iteration, before a possible public release. For example, Anthropic recently developed a new class of model with advanced cyberoffense-relevant capabilities, Mythos Preview, which was available internally for at least six weeks before it was publicly announced. This internal use creates risks that external deployment frameworks may fail to address. Legal frameworks, notably California's Transparency in Frontier Artificial Intelligence Act (SB 53), New York's Responsible AI Safety And Education (RAISE) Act, and the EU's General-Purpose AI Code of Practice, all discuss risks from internal AI use. They require frontier developers to make and implement plans for how to manage risks from internal use, and to produce internal use risk reports describing their safeguards and any residual risks. This guide provides a harmonized standard for companies to produce internal use risk reports suitable for all three regulatory frameworks. It is addressed primarily to evaluation and safety teams at frontier AI developers, and secondarily to regulators and auditors seeking to understand what good reporting looks like. Given the pace of AI R&D automation and the limited external visibility into how companies use their most capable models internally, regular and detailed risk reporting may be one of the few mechanisms available to ensure that the risks from internal AI use are identified and managed before they materialize. Whenever a substantially more capable or riskier model is deployed internally, the developer should create a risk report and argue why the model is safe to deploy. We structure the reporting framework around two threat vectors -- autonomous AI misbehavior and insider threats -- and three risk factors for each: means, motive, and opportunity.

analysis.tldr: 为前沿AI公司内部使用模型提供风险报告标准，以应对监管要求。
analysis.research_motivation: 前沿AI公司内部使用最先进模型存在安全风险，现有外部部署框架无法覆盖，且监管法规要求内部风险报告，但缺乏统一标准。
analysis.problem: 如何为AI开发者内部模型使用制定统一的风险报告框架，以满足不同监管要求并有效识别和管理风险。

contributions: 为前沿AI公司内部模型使用风险报告提供统一标准，兼容加州SB 53、纽约RAISE法案和欧盟AI实践准则。
提出基于威胁向量和风险因素的结构化报告框架，指导开发者识别和管理内部使用风险。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 框架可能未涵盖所有潜在风险类型。
依赖开发者自我报告，可能存在隐瞒或低估风险的情况。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations

papers.title: Compute Aligned Training: Optimizing for Test Time Inference
papers.abstract: Scaling test-time compute has emerged as a powerful mechanism for enhancing Large Language Model (LLM) performance. However, standard post-training paradigms, Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT) and Reinforcement Learning (RL), optimize the likelihood of individual samples under a base policy, creating a misalignment with test time procedures that rely on aggregated or filtered outputs. In this work, we propose Compute Aligned Training, which aligns training objectives with test-time strategies. By conceptualizing inference strategies as operators on the base policy, we derive new loss functions that maximize performance when said strategies are applied. We instantiate such loss functions for SFT and RL across common test time strategies. Finally, we provide empirical evidence that this training method substantially improves test time scaling over standard training.

analysis.tldr: 提出计算对齐训练，使训练目标与测试时推理策略对齐，显著提升测试时扩展效果。
analysis.research_motivation: 标准后训练范式（SFT和RL）优化单个样本的似然，与依赖聚合或过滤输出的测试时策略不匹配，导致测试时计算扩展效果受限。
analysis.problem: 训练目标与测试时推理策略之间的错位问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准训练方法在测试时计算扩展场景下性能不佳，因为训练时未考虑推理策略的聚合或过滤行为。
analysis.method: 将推理策略视为基础策略上的算子，推导新的损失函数，使SFT和RL的训练目标与常见测试时策略对齐。
contributions: 提出计算对齐训练框架，统一训练与测试时推理策略。
为SFT和RL分别实例化针对常见测试时策略的损失函数。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的测试时策略。
额外计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出计算对齐训练，使训练目标与测试时推理策略对齐，显著提升测试时扩展效果。

papers.title: BenchGuard: Who Guards the Benchmarks? Automated Auditing of LLM Agent Benchmarks
papers.abstract: As benchmarks grow in complexity, many apparent agent failures are not failures of the agent at all - they are failures of the benchmark itself: broken specifications, implicit assumptions, and rigid evaluation scripts that penalize valid alternative approaches. We propose employing frontier LLMs as systematic auditors of evaluation infrastructure, and realize this vision through BenchGuard, the first automated auditing framework for task-oriented, execution-based agent benchmarks. BenchGuard cross-verifies all benchmark artifacts via structured LLM protocols, optionally incorporating agent solutions or execution traces as additional diagnostic evidence. Deployed on two prominent scientific benchmarks, BenchGuard identified 12 author-confirmed issues in ScienceAgentBench - including fatal errors rendering tasks unsolvable - and exactly matched 83.3% of expert-identified issues on the BIXBench Verified-50 subset, catching defects that prior human review missed entirely. A full audit of 50 complex bioinformatics tasks costs under USD 15, making automated benchmark auditing a practical and valuable complement to human review. These findings point toward AI-assisted benchmark development, where frontier models serve not only as subjects of evaluation but as active participants in validating the evaluation infrastructure itself.

analysis.tldr: 提出BenchGuard，首个自动化审计框架，用于检测LLM Agent基准测试中的缺陷。
analysis.research_motivation: 随着基准测试日益复杂，许多Agent失败实际源于基准本身的问题（如错误规范、隐含假设、僵化评估脚本），而非Agent能力不足。
analysis.problem: 缺乏自动化工具系统审计面向任务的、基于执行的Agent基准测试的评估基础设施。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 基准测试中存在大量隐藏缺陷，如不可解任务、错误规范，且人工审查可能遗漏。
analysis.method: 利用前沿LLM作为审计员，通过结构化协议交叉验证基准测试的所有组件，并可选集成Agent解决方案或执行轨迹作为诊断证据。
contributions: 提出首个自动化审计框架BenchGuard，用于检测LLM Agent基准测试中的缺陷。
在ScienceAgentBench和BIXBench上验证有效性，发现12个作者确认的问题，并匹配83.3%专家识别的问题。
analysis.experiments: 在ScienceAgentBench和BIXBench上测试，发现12个作者确认的问题（包括致命错误），在BIXBench Verified-50子集上精确匹配83.3%专家识别的问题，且全审计50个复杂任务成本低于15美元。
limitations: 依赖LLM审计能力，可能受限于LLM自身缺陷。
仅针对科学领域基准测试，泛化性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出BenchGuard，首个自动化审计框架，用于检测LLM Agent基准测试中的缺陷。

papers.title: Nemotron 3 Nano Omni: Efficient and Open Multimodal Intelligence
papers.abstract: We introduce Nemotron 3 Nano Omni, the latest model in the Nemotron multimodal series and the first to natively support audio inputs alongside text, images, and video. Nemotron 3 Nano Omni delivers consistent accuracy improvements over its predecessor, Nemotron Nano V2 VL, across all modalities, enabled by advances in architecture, training data and recipes. In particular, Nemotron 3 delivers leading results in real-world document understanding, long audio-video comprehension, and agentic computer use. Built on the highly efficient Nemotron 3 Nano 30B-A3B backbone, Nemotron 3 Nano Omni further incorporates innovative multimodal token-reduction techniques to deliver substantially lower inference latency and higher throughput than other models of similar size. We are releasing model checkpoints in BF16, FP8, and FP4 formats, along with portions of the training data and codebase to facilitate further research and development.

analysis.tldr: Nemotron 3 Nano Omni 是一个高效、开源的多模态模型，原生支持音频、文本、图像和视频，在文档理解、长音视频理解和智能体计算机使用上表现领先。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有开源多模态模型在效率、多模态覆盖和推理速度上存在不足，需要更高效且开放的解决方案。
analysis.problem: 构建一个高效、开源、原生支持多种模态（包括音频）的多模态模型，并降低推理延迟。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于 Nemotron 3 Nano 30B-A3B 高效骨干网络，结合创新的多模态 token 缩减技术，并改进架构、训练数据和配方。
contributions: 首个原生支持音频输入的多模态模型 Nemotron 3 Nano Omni
引入多模态 token 缩减技术，显著降低推理延迟并提高吞吐量
开源 BF16、FP8、FP4 格式的模型检查点及部分训练数据和代码

analysis.one_sentence_summary: Nemotron 3 Nano Omni 是一个高效、开源的多模态模型，原生支持音频、文本、图像和视频，在文档理解、长音视频理解和智能体计算机使用上表现领先。

papers.title: ViPO: Visual Preference Optimization at Scale
papers.abstract: While preference optimization is crucial for improving visual generative models, how to effectively scale this paradigm remains largely unexplored. Current open-source preference datasets contain conflicting preference patterns, where winners excel in some dimensions but underperform in others. Naively optimizing on such noisy datasets fails to learn preferences, hindering effective scaling. To enhance robustness against noise, we propose Poly-DPO, which extends the DPO objective with an additional polynomial term that dynamically adjusts model confidence based on dataset characteristics, enabling effective learning across diverse data distributions. Beyond biased patterns, existing datasets suffer from low resolution, limited prompt diversity, and imbalanced distributions. To facilitate large-scale visual preference optimization by tackling data bottlenecks, we construct ViPO, a massive-scale preference dataset with 1M image pairs at 1024px across five categories and 300K video pairs at 720p+ across three categories. State-of-the-art generative models and diverse prompts ensure reliable preference signals with balanced distributions. Remarkably, when applying Poly-DPO to our high-quality dataset, the optimal configuration converges to standard DPO. This convergence validates dataset quality and Poly-DPO's adaptive nature: sophisticated optimization becomes unnecessary with sufficient data quality, yet remains valuable for imperfect datasets. We validate our approach across visual generation models. On noisy datasets like Pick-a-Pic V2, Poly-DPO achieves 6.87 and 2.32 gains over Diffusion-DPO on GenEval for SD1.5 and SDXL, respectively. For ViPO, models achieve performance far exceeding those trained on existing open-source preference datasets. These results confirm that addressing both algorithmic adaptability and data quality is essential for scaling visual preference optimization.

analysis.tldr: 提出大规模高质量偏好数据集ViPO和鲁棒偏好优化算法Poly-DPO，验证数据质量与算法适应性对视觉偏好优化规模化的关键作用。
analysis.research_motivation: 偏好优化对提升视觉生成模型至关重要，但现有开源偏好数据集存在冲突模式、低分辨率、提示多样性不足和分布不平衡等问题，且如何有效规模化偏好优化尚未充分探索。
analysis.problem: 现有偏好数据集噪声大、质量低，导致偏好优化难以有效规模化；需要同时解决算法对噪声的鲁棒性和数据瓶颈。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有开源偏好数据集中存在冲突的偏好模式（优胜者在某些维度优秀但在其他维度表现不佳），且数据集分辨率低、提示多样性有限、分布不平衡；在高质量数据集上，复杂优化算法（Poly-DPO）退化为标准DPO，表明数据质量足够时简单算法即可有效。
analysis.method: 提出Poly-DPO，在DPO目标中添加多项式项，根据数据集特征动态调整模型置信度以增强对噪声的鲁棒性；构建ViPO数据集，包含1M图像对（1024px，5类）和300K视频对（720p+，3类），使用SOTA生成模型和多样化提示确保可靠偏好信号和平衡分布。
contributions: 提出Poly-DPO算法，通过多项式项动态调整模型置信度，提升对噪声偏好数据的鲁棒性。
构建大规模高质量偏好数据集ViPO，包含1M图像对和300K视频对，覆盖多种类别和高分辨率。
实验验证数据质量与算法适应性对规模化视觉偏好优化的关键作用，高质量数据下标准DPO即可达到最优。
analysis.experiments: 在图像生成模型（SD1.5和SDXL）上评估，在噪声数据集Pick-a-Pic V2上Poly-DPO比Diffusion-DPO在GenEval上分别提升6.87和2.32；在ViPO数据集上训练模型性能远超现有开源偏好数据集。
limitations: 摘要未提及视频生成任务的定量实验结果。
Poly-DPO在高质量数据集上退化为标准DPO，其额外复杂度在数据质量足够时可能不必要。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出大规模高质量偏好数据集ViPO和鲁棒偏好优化算法Poly-DPO，验证数据质量与算法适应性对视觉偏好优化规模化的关键作用。

papers.title: Learning from Noisy Preferences: A Semi-Supervised Learning Approach to Direct Preference Optimization
papers.abstract: Human visual preferences are inherently multi-dimensional, encompassing aesthetics, detail fidelity, and semantic alignment. However, existing datasets provide only single, holistic annotations, resulting in severe label noise: images that excel in some dimensions but are deficient in others are simply marked as winner or loser. We theoretically demonstrate that compressing multi-dimensional preferences into binary labels generates conflicting gradient signals that misguide Diffusion Direct Preference Optimization (DPO). To address this, we propose Semi-DPO, a semi-supervised approach that treats consistent pairs as clean labeled data and conflicting ones as noisy unlabeled data. Our method starts by training on a consensus-filtered clean subset, then uses this model as an implicit classifier to generate pseudo-labels for the noisy set for iterative refinement. Experimental results demonstrate that Semi-DPO achieves state-of-the-art performance and significantly improves alignment with complex human preferences, without requiring additional human annotation or explicit reward models during training. We will release our code and models at: https://github.com/L-CodingSpace/semi-dpo

analysis.tldr: 提出半监督方法Semi-DPO，利用一致性过滤和伪标签迭代优化，解决多维度人类偏好压缩为二元标签导致的噪声问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 人类视觉偏好是多维的，但现有数据集仅提供单一整体标注，导致严重标签噪声，影响扩散DPO训练效果。
analysis.problem: 多维度人类偏好被压缩为二元标签时产生冲突梯度信号，误导扩散DPO优化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 理论证明多维度偏好压缩为二元标签会产生冲突梯度信号，导致模型优化方向错误。
analysis.method: Semi-DPO：先基于一致性过滤的干净子集训练初始模型，再将其作为隐式分类器为噪声集生成伪标签，迭代精炼。
contributions: 理论分析了多维度偏好压缩为二元标签导致的梯度冲突问题
提出半监督方法Semi-DPO，无需额外人工标注或显式奖励模型，显著提升与复杂人类偏好的对齐
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅声称达到SOTA性能。
limitations: 依赖一致性过滤的阈值选择
伪标签质量可能影响迭代效果
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出半监督方法Semi-DPO，利用一致性过滤和伪标签迭代优化，解决多维度人类偏好压缩为二元标签导致的噪声问题。

papers.title: TTCD:Transformer Integrated Temporal Causal Discovery from Non-Stationary Time Series Data
papers.abstract: The widespread availability of complex time series data in various domains such as environmental science, epidemiology, and economics demands robust causal discovery methods that can identify intricate contemporaneous and lagged relationships in non-stationary, nonlinear, and noisy settings. Existing constraint-based methods often rely heavily on conditional independence tests that degrade for limited data samples and complex distributions, while score-based methods impose strong statistical assumptions. Recent methods address special cases such as change point detection or distribution shifts, but struggle to provide a unified solution. We propose the Transformer Integrated Temporal Causal Discovery (TTCD) Framework, a novel end-to-end approach that learns contemporaneous and lagged causal relations from non-stationary time series. TTCD introduces a Non-Stationary Feature Learner integrating temporal and frequency-domain attention with dynamic non-stationarity profiling, and a custom Causal Structure Learner. A key innovation is reconstruction-guided causal signal distillation, to distill essential causal signals through the reconstruction process of the transformer decoder, which mitigates noise and spurious correlations while preserving meaningful dependencies. The Causal Structure Learner operates on distilled reconstructed signals to infer the underlying causal graph without restrictive assumptions on noise distributions or data generation processes. Experiments on synthetic, benchmark, and real world datasets show that TTCD consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in both accuracy and consistency with domain knowledge, demonstrating the approach's effectiveness for causal discovery in challenging real world contexts.

analysis.tldr: 提出TTCD框架，利用Transformer和非平稳特征学习从非平稳时间序列中端到端发现因果结构。
analysis.research_motivation: 复杂时间序列数据在环境、流行病学、经济学等领域广泛存在，现有因果发现方法在处理非平稳、非线性、噪声数据时依赖强假设或条件独立性检验，性能受限。
analysis.problem: 从非平稳、非线性、含噪声的时间序列数据中同时发现同期和滞后因果关系。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Transformer集成的时间因果发现框架，包含非平稳特征学习器（融合时域和频域注意力及动态非平稳性刻画）和因果结构学习器，通过重建引导的因果信号蒸馏去除噪声和虚假相关。
contributions: 提出端到端的TTCD框架，统一处理非平稳时间序列中的同期和滞后因果发现。
引入重建引导的因果信号蒸馏机制，利用Transformer解码器重建过程提取因果信号。
analysis.experiments: 在合成、基准和真实世界数据集上实验，TTCD在准确性和领域知识一致性上持续优于现有基线。
limitations: 可能对超参数敏感，如注意力机制和蒸馏权重。
计算复杂度可能较高，尤其是长序列场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: causal reasoning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出TTCD框架，利用Transformer和非平稳特征学习从非平稳时间序列中端到端发现因果结构。

papers.title: Subjective Portrait Region Cropping in Landscape Videos with Temporal Annotation Smoothing
papers.abstract: With the rise of mobile video consumption on diverse handheld display resolutions and orientation modes, altering videos to aspect ratios poses challenges. Static cropping and border padding often compromises visual quality, while warping may distort a video's intended meaning. Here we advocate for a more effective approach: cropping significant regions within video frames in a temporal manner, while minimizing distortion and preserving essential content. One barrier to solving this problem is the lack of sufficiently large-scale database devoted to informing these tasks. Towards filling this gap, we introduce the LIVE-YouTube Video Cropping (LIVE-YT VC) database, featuring 1800 videos, annotated by 90 human subjects. Using videos sourced from the YouTube-UGC and LSVQ Databases, this new resource is the largest publicly-available subjective video portrait region cropping database. We also introduce a post-processed version of the database, called LIVE-YT VC++, whereby a novel intra-frame temporal filter was deployed to smooth subjective annotations within each video. We demonstrate the usefulness of this new data resource using the SmartVidCrop algorithm and state-of-the-art video grounding models, in hopes of establishing our subjective dataset as a benchmark for future research. Our contributions offer a resource for advancing video aspect ratio transformation models towards ensuring that reshaped mobile-friendly video content retains its quality and meaning. Since our labels bear resemblances to video saliency annotations, we also conducted an additional analysis to explore the similarity between our labels and video saliency predictions. Finally, we repurposed state-of-the-art video grounding models for aspect ratio change tasks, and fine-tuned them on our dataset. As a service to the research community, we plan to open source the project.

analysis.tldr: 提出主观人像区域裁剪数据集LIVE-YT VC及时间平滑版本LIVE-YT VC++，用于提升视频横竖屏转换时的内容保留质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 移动设备上视频消费的多样化分辨率和方向模式导致传统裁剪、填充或扭曲方法损害视觉质量或内容含义，而现有数据集规模不足，限制了该问题的研究。
analysis.problem: 缺乏大规模主观标注的视频人像区域裁剪数据集，以及如何利用时间平滑处理提高标注一致性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建包含1800个视频、90名受试者主观标注的LIVE-YT VC数据集，并提出LIVE-YT VC++版本，通过帧内时间滤波器平滑标注。
contributions: 发布最大规模公开主观视频人像区域裁剪数据集LIVE-YT VC（1800视频，90受试者标注）。
提出时间平滑后处理版本LIVE-YT VC++，提升标注一致性。
通过SmartVidCrop和视频定位模型验证数据集有效性，并探索标注与视频显著性相似性。
analysis.experiments: 使用SmartVidCrop算法和SOTA视频定位模型进行实验，展示数据集的有用性，并分析标注与视频显著性的相似性。
limitations: 数据集仅针对人像区域裁剪，可能不适用于其他内容类型。
时间平滑方法可能过度平滑导致细节丢失。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出主观人像区域裁剪数据集LIVE-YT VC及时间平滑版本LIVE-YT VC++，用于提升视频横竖屏转换时的内容保留质量。

papers.title: ADE: Adaptive Dictionary Embeddings -- Scaling Multi-Anchor Representations to Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Word embeddings are fundamental to natural language processing, yet traditional approaches represent each word with a single vector, creating representational bottlenecks for polysemous words and limiting semantic expressiveness. While multi-anchor representations have shown promise by representing words as combinations of multiple vectors, they have been limited to small-scale models due to computational inefficiency and lack of integration with modern transformer architectures. We introduce Adaptive Dictionary Embeddings (ADE), a framework that successfully scales multi-anchor word representations to large language models. ADE makes three key contributions: (1) Vocabulary Projection (VP), which transforms the costly two-stage anchor lookup into a single efficient matrix operation; (2) Grouped Positional Encoding (GPE), a novel positional encoding scheme where anchors of the same word share positional information, preserving semantic coherence while enabling anchor-level variation; and (3) context-aware anchor reweighting, which leverages self-attention to dynamically compose anchor contributions based on sequence context. We integrate these components into the Segment-Aware Transformer (SAT), which provides context-aware reweighting of anchor contributions at inference time. We evaluate ADE on AG News and DBpedia-14 text classification benchmarks. With 98.7% fewer trainable parameters than DeBERTa-v3-base, ADE surpasses DeBERTa on DBpedia-14 (98.06% vs. 97.80%) and approaches it on AG News (90.64% vs. 94.50%), while compressing the embedding layer over 40x -- demonstrating that multi-anchor representations are a practical and parameter-efficient alternative to single-vector embeddings in modern transformer architectures.

analysis.tldr: 提出自适应字典嵌入（ADE），将多锚点词表示高效扩展到大型语言模型，在参数大幅减少的情况下接近或超越DeBERTa性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统单向量词嵌入对多义词存在表示瓶颈，而多锚点表示虽能提升语义表达力，但计算效率低且难以与现代Transformer架构集成，限制了其在大模型中的应用。
analysis.problem: 如何高效地将多锚点词表示扩展到大型语言模型，同时保持计算效率和参数效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出ADE框架，包含三个关键组件：词汇投影（VP）将两阶段锚点查找转化为单次矩阵运算；分组位置编码（GPE）使同一词的锚点共享位置信息；上下文感知锚点重加权利用自注意力动态组合锚点贡献。集成到分段感知Transformer（SAT）中。
contributions: 提出词汇投影（VP），将两阶段锚点查找简化为单次矩阵操作，提升计算效率。
提出分组位置编码（GPE），在保持语义连贯性的同时允许锚点级变化。
引入上下文感知锚点重加权，利用自注意力动态调整锚点贡献。
analysis.experiments: 在AG News和DBpedia-14文本分类基准上评估，ADE在参数减少98.7%的情况下，在DBpedia-14上超越DeBERTa（98.06% vs 97.80%），在AG News上接近DeBERTa（90.64% vs 94.50%），且嵌入层压缩超过40倍。
limitations: 仅在文本分类任务上评估，未在更广泛的语言理解任务上验证。
与DeBERTa相比，在AG News上仍有性能差距。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出自适应字典嵌入（ADE），将多锚点词表示高效扩展到大型语言模型，在参数大幅减少的情况下接近或超越DeBERTa性能。

papers.title: Rethinking Layer Redundancy in Large Language Models: Calibration Objectives and Search for Depth Pruning
papers.abstract: Depth pruning improves the inference efficiency of large language models by removing Transformer blocks. Prior work has largely treated layer redundancy as an inherent structural property of pretrained networks, emphasizing importance criteria and search algorithms for identifying removable layers. In contrast, we adopt a \emph{functional perspective}, where redundancy depends jointly on the model and the calibration objective, suggesting that a universal layer ranking may not exist. Through an empirical study across three LLM families, two calibration objectives, and seven search algorithms, we find that different objectives produce qualitatively different pruning patterns, while perplexity and downstream reasoning accuracy rankings often fail to align. In contrast, under a fixed objective, different search algorithms tend to converge to similar pruning solutions. Overall, our results suggest that the calibration objective may play a larger role than the particular search algorithm in determining which layers appear redundant.

analysis.tldr: 发现大模型深度剪枝中，校准目标比搜索算法更关键地决定哪些层冗余。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有深度剪枝方法将层冗余视为预训练网络的固有属性，忽略了校准目标的影响，导致剪枝策略可能不通用。
analysis.problem: 探究校准目标与搜索算法在大模型深度剪枝中各自的作用，以及是否存在通用的层冗余排序。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 不同校准目标产生定性不同的剪枝模式，且困惑度与下游推理准确率的排序常不一致；固定目标下不同搜索算法趋于收敛到相似解。
analysis.method: 在三个LLM家族、两个校准目标和七种搜索算法上进行实证研究，比较剪枝模式与性能。
contributions: 提出从功能视角看待层冗余，强调其依赖于模型和校准目标。
通过大规模实验揭示校准目标比搜索算法对剪枝结果影响更大。
analysis.experiments: 在三个LLM家族、两个校准目标和七种搜索算法上进行实验，比较困惑度和下游推理准确率。
limitations: 未涉及更大规模模型或更多校准目标。
未提供具体剪枝后的效率提升数据。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 发现大模型深度剪枝中，校准目标比搜索算法更关键地决定哪些层冗余。

papers.title: S-SONDO: Self-Supervised Knowledge Distillation for General Audio Foundation Models
papers.abstract: General audio foundation models have recently achieved remarkable progress, enabling strong performance across diverse tasks. However, state-of-the-art models remain extremely large, often with hundreds of millions of parameters, leading to high inference costs and limited deployability on edge devices. Knowledge distillation is a proven strategy for model compression, but prior work in audio has mostly focused on supervised settings, relying on class logits, intermediate features, or architecture-specific techniques. Such assumptions exclude models that output only embeddings, such as self-supervised or metric-learning models. We introduce S-SONDO (Self-Supervised KnOwledge DistillatioN for General AuDio FOundation Models), the first framework to distill general audio models using only their output embeddings. By avoiding the need for logits or layer-level alignment, S-SONDO is architecture-agnostic and broadly applicable to embedding-based teachers. We demonstrate its effectiveness by distilling two audio foundation models into three efficient students that are up to 61 times smaller while retaining up to 96% of teacher performance. We also provide practical insights on loss choice and clustering-based balanced data sampling. Code is available here: https://github.com/MedAliAdlouni/ssondo.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个仅利用输出嵌入进行通用音频基础模型知识蒸馏的框架S-SONDO，实现高达61倍压缩且保留96%性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 通用音频基础模型参数庞大（数亿），推理成本高，难以部署在边缘设备上。现有知识蒸馏方法多依赖监督设置下的logits或中间特征，不适用于仅输出嵌入的自监督或度量学习模型。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖logits或层级别对齐的情况下，对仅输出嵌入的通用音频基础模型进行有效的知识蒸馏。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出S-SONDO框架，仅利用教师模型的输出嵌入进行蒸馏，无需logits或中间层特征，架构无关。通过损失函数选择和基于聚类的平衡数据采样提升效果。
contributions: 首个仅利用输出嵌入蒸馏通用音频基础模型的框架，适用于自监督和度量学习模型。
在多个音频基础模型上验证，学生模型可缩小61倍，保留96%性能，并提供实用见解。
analysis.experiments: 在两个音频基础模型上蒸馏出三个高效学生模型，最大压缩61倍，性能保留96%。摘要未提供具体数据集或任务细节。
limitations: 可能仅在特定音频任务上验证，泛化性需进一步测试。
蒸馏性能保留上限可能受限于教师模型质量。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个仅利用输出嵌入进行通用音频基础模型知识蒸馏的框架S-SONDO，实现高达61倍压缩且保留96%性能。

papers.title: GAIA-v2-LILT: Multilingual Adaptation of Agent Benchmark beyond Translation
papers.abstract: Agent benchmarks remain largely English-centric, while their multilingual versions are often built with machine translation (MT) and limited post-editing. We argue that, for agentic tasks, this minimal workflow can easily break benchmark validity through query-answer misalignment or culturally off-target context. We propose a refined workflow for adapting English benchmarks into multiple languages with explicit functional alignment, cultural alignment, and difficulty calibration using both automated checks and human review. Using this workflow, we introduce GAIA-v2-LILT, a re-audited multilingual extension of GAIA covering five non-English languages. In experiments, our workflow improves agent success rates by up to 32.7% over minimally translated versions, bringing the closest audited setting to within 3.1% of English performance while substantial gaps remain in many other cases. This indicates that a substantial share of the multilingual performance gap is benchmark-induced measurement error, motivating task-level alignment when adapting English benchmarks across languages. The data is available as part of the MAPS package at https://huggingface.co/datasets/Fujitsu-FRE/MAPS/viewer/GAIA-v2-LILT. We also release the code used in our experiments at https://github.com/lilt/gaia-v2-lilt.

analysis.tldr: 提出GAIA-v2-LILT，通过功能对齐、文化对齐和难度校准的工作流，将英文Agent基准多语言适配，减少基准诱导的测量误差。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有Agent基准以英文为主，多语言版本通常仅依赖机器翻译和少量人工校对，导致查询-答案错位或文化背景不匹配，破坏基准有效性。
