analysis.problem: 如何系统性地将英文Agent基准适配为多语言版本，同时保持功能、文化和难度的一致性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，最小翻译工作流在多语言Agent任务中容易引入基准诱导的测量误差，导致性能差距被高估；通过功能和文化对齐可显著缩小差距。
analysis.method: 提出包含显式功能对齐、文化对齐和难度校准的适配工作流，结合自动检查和人工审核，构建GAIA-v2-LILT多语言扩展。
contributions: 提出一种超越机器翻译的多语言Agent基准适配工作流，包含功能、文化和难度对齐。
发布GAIA-v2-LILT，覆盖五种非英语语言的重新审计多语言扩展，并公开数据和代码。
analysis.experiments: 在GAIA-v2-LILT上评估，工作流相比最小翻译版本将Agent成功率提升高达32.7%，最佳审计设置与英文性能差距缩小至3.1%，但其他情况下仍存在显著差距。
limitations: 仅覆盖五种非英语语言，泛化性有限。
文化对齐依赖人工审核，成本较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出GAIA-v2-LILT，通过功能对齐、文化对齐和难度校准的工作流，将英文Agent基准多语言适配，减少基准诱导的测量误差。

papers.title: Large Language Models Explore by Latent Distilling
papers.abstract: Generating diverse responses is crucial for test-time scaling of large language models (LLMs), yet standard stochastic sampling mostly yields surface-level lexical variation, limiting semantic exploration. In this paper, we propose Exploratory Sampling (ESamp), a decoding approach that explicitly encourages semantic diversity during generation. ESamp is motivated by the well-known observation that neural networks tend to make lower-error predictions on inputs similar to those encountered before, and incur higher prediction error on novel ones. Building on this property, we train a lightweight Distiller at test time to predict deep-layer hidden representations of the LLM from its shallow-layer representations to model the LLM's depth-wise representation transitions. During decoding, the Distiller continuously adapts to the mappings induced by the current generation context. ESamp uses the prediction error as a novelty signal to reweight candidate token extensions conditioned on the current prefix, thereby biasing decoding toward less-explored semantic patterns. ESamp is implemented with an asynchronous training--inference pipeline, with less than 5% worst case overhead (1.2% in the optimized release). Empirical results show that ESamp significantly boosts the Pass@k efficiency of reasoning models, showing superior or comparable performance to strong stochastic and heuristic baselines. Notably, ESamp achieves robust generalization across mathematics, science, and code generation benchmarks and breaks the trade-off between diversity and coherence in creative writing. Our code has released at: https://github.com/LinesHogan/tLLM.

analysis.tldr: 提出探索性采样（ESamp），利用轻量级蒸馏器预测LLM深层表示误差作为新颖性信号，引导生成语义多样的文本。
analysis.research_motivation: 标准随机采样主要产生表面词汇变化，限制了语义探索，而生成多样化响应对于LLM的测试时扩展至关重要。
analysis.problem: 如何在大语言模型解码过程中显式鼓励语义多样性，同时保持生成质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 神经网络对相似输入预测误差低，对新颖输入预测误差高，利用这一性质可检测语义新颖性。
analysis.method: 训练轻量级Distiller在测试时从浅层表示预测深层隐藏表示，利用预测误差作为新颖性信号重新加权候选token，偏向未探索的语义模式。
contributions: 提出ESamp解码方法，通过蒸馏误差引导语义多样性生成。
实现异步训练-推理流水线，开销低于5%。
在数学、科学和代码生成基准上提升Pass@k效率，并在创意写作中打破多样性与连贯性的权衡。
analysis.experiments: 在数学、科学和代码生成基准上评估Pass@k效率，并与强随机和启发式基线比较；在创意写作中评估多样性与连贯性。
limitations: 可能依赖Distiller的预测质量，在极端分布外场景下效果未知。
异步流水线可能引入轻微延迟，尽管开销已优化。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出探索性采样（ESamp），利用轻量级蒸馏器预测LLM深层表示误差作为新颖性信号，引导生成语义多样的文本。

papers.title: Libra-VLA: Achieving Learning Equilibrium via Asynchronous Coarse-to-Fine Dual-System
papers.abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models are a promising paradigm for generalist robotic manipulation by grounding high-level semantic instructions into executable physical actions. However, prevailing approaches typically adopt a monolithic generation paradigm, directly mapping visual-linguistic features to high-frequency motor commands in a flat, non-hierarchical fashion. This strategy overlooks the inherent hierarchy of robotic manipulation, where complex actions can be naturally modeled in a Hybrid Action Space, decomposing into discrete macro-directional reaching and continuous micro-pose alignment, severely widening the semantic-actuation gap and imposing a heavy representational burden on grounding high-level semantics to continuous actions. To address this, we introduce Libra-VLA, a novel Coarse-to-Fine Dual-System VLA architecture. We explicitly decouple the learning complexity into a coarse-to-fine hierarchy to strike a training equilibrium, while simultaneously leveraging this structural modularity to implement an asynchronous execution strategy. The Semantic Planner predicts discrete action tokens capturing macro-directional intent, while the Action Refiner conditions on coarse intent to generate high-frequency continuous actions for precise alignment. Crucially, our empirical analysis reveals that performance follows an inverted-U curve relative to action decomposition granularity, peaking exactly when the learning difficulty is balanced between the two sub-systems. With the asynchronous design, our approach offers a scalable, robust, and responsive solution for open-world manipulation.

analysis.tldr: 提出Libra-VLA，通过异步粗到细双系统架构平衡VLA模型的学习难度，提升机器人操作性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有VLA模型采用扁平化生成范式，忽略机器人操作固有的层次结构，导致语义-执行差距大，难以将高层语义映射到连续动作。
analysis.problem: 如何设计VLA架构以显式解耦操作层次，平衡学习难度并实现异步执行，从而缩小语义-执行差距。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 性能随动作分解粒度呈倒U型曲线，当两个子系统学习难度平衡时达到峰值。
analysis.method: 提出粗到细双系统VLA架构：Semantic Planner预测离散动作令牌（宏观方向意图），Action Refiner基于粗意图生成高频连续动作（精确对齐），并采用异步执行策略。
contributions: 提出粗到细双系统VLA架构，显式解耦学习复杂度并实现训练平衡。
发现动作分解粒度与性能的倒U型关系，为设计提供指导。
异步执行策略提升可扩展性、鲁棒性和响应性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖特定动作分解粒度选择。
异步执行可能引入延迟或同步问题。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Libra-VLA，通过异步粗到细双系统架构平衡VLA模型的学习难度，提升机器人操作性能。

papers.title: SUDP: Secret-Use Delegation Protocol for Agentic Systems
papers.abstract: Agentic systems increasingly act with user secrets for APIs, messaging platforms, and cloud services. Today's bearer-secret interfaces implement authorization by exposure: enabling action often means placing a reusable secret, or a reusable artifact derived from it, within a model-steerable boundary, so a transient prompt-injection or tool-side compromise becomes durable account compromise. Existing defenses cover adjacent pieces such as secret storage, scoped delegation, sender-constrained tokens, and runtime monitoring, but leave the combined agentic obligation without a common specification: an untrusted autonomous requester should be able to cause a user-authorized secret-backed operation without exposing reusable authority to the requester. We formalize this problem as Agent Secret Use (ASU). From ASU we derive a security-property taxonomy that separates the problem's structural obligations from the realization-level robustness conditions any concrete construction must establish, enabling principled comparison of existing agentic-secret defenses against a problem-grounded specification. We propose the Secret-Use Delegation Protocol (SUDP), a three-role protocol realizing ASU: a requester proposes a canonical operation; the user authorizes it with a fresh authenticator-backed grant; and a custodian redeems the grant once to perform the bounded use, so reusable authority never crosses the requester boundary. We specialize SUDP for agentic deployments: agents propose operations; they do not retrieve secrets. Under explicit assumptions, we show that SUDP satisfies the ASU requirements: authorization is verifiable, operation-bound, and single-use. SUDP also provides storage confidentiality and wrapping-epoch key isolation under stated sealing and erasure assumptions; plaintext-level forward secrecy of the underlying secret additionally requires the environment to rotate and revoke it.

analysis.tldr: 提出SUDP协议，让不可信智能体在用户授权下执行单次秘密操作，但无法获取可重用秘密。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有智能体系统使用可重用秘密（如API密钥）实现授权，但一旦秘密落入模型可操控边界，提示注入或工具侧攻击就会导致持久账户泄露，缺乏统一规范来防止秘密暴露给不可信请求者。
analysis.problem: 如何让不可信自主请求者（智能体）在用户授权下执行秘密支持的操作，同时不向请求者暴露可重用授权凭证。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Secret-Use Delegation Protocol (SUDP)，一种三角色协议：请求者提出规范操作，用户用新鲜认证器授权，保管者单次兑换授权以执行有界操作，可重用授权从不跨越请求者边界。
contributions: 形式化定义了Agent Secret Use (ASU)问题，并推导出安全属性分类法，分离结构义务与实现级鲁棒性条件。
提出SUDP协议，满足ASU需求：授权可验证、操作有界、单次使用，并提供存储机密性和密钥隔离。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 协议依赖显式假设（如密封和擦除），实际部署中可能难以完全满足。
前向保密需要环境轮换和撤销底层秘密，增加了系统复杂性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SUDP协议，让不可信智能体在用户授权下执行单次秘密操作，但无法获取可重用秘密。

papers.title: Agentic AI for Remote Sensing: Technical Challenges and Research Directions
papers.abstract: Earth Observation (EO) is moving beyond static prediction toward multi-step analytical workflows that require coordinated reasoning over data, tools, and geospatial state. While foundation models and vision-language models have expanded representation learning and language-grounded interaction for remote sensing, and agentic AI has demonstrated long-horizon reasoning and external tool use, EO is not a straightforward extension of generic agentic AI. EO workflows operate over georeferenced, multi-modal, and temporally structured data, where operations such as reprojection, resampling, compositing, and aggregation actively transform the underlying state and can constrain subsequent analysis. As a result, errors may propagate silently across steps, and correctness depends not only on internal coherence, but also on geospatial consistency, temporally valid comparisons, and physical validity. This position paper argues that these challenges are structural rather than incidental. We identify the implicit assumptions commonly made in generic agentic models, analyze how they break in geospatial workflows, and characterize the resulting failure modes in multi-step EO pipelines. We then outline design principles for EO-native agents centered on structured geospatial state, tool-aware reasoning, verifier-guided execution, and learning objectives aligned with geospatial and physical validity. Finally, we present research directions spanning EO-specific benchmarks, hybrid supervised and reinforcement learning, constrained self-improvement, and trajectory-level evaluation beyond final-answer accuracy. Building reliable geospatial agents therefore requires rethinking agent design around the physical, geospatial, and workflow constraints that govern EO analysis.

analysis.tldr: 本文指出地球观测（EO）工作流因地理空间、多模态和时序数据的特性，导致通用智能体AI的隐式假设失效，并提出面向EO的原生智能体设计原则与研究方向。
analysis.research_motivation: 地球观测正从静态预测转向多步分析工作流，需要协调推理数据、工具和地理空间状态。通用智能体AI虽已展示长程推理和外部工具使用能力，但EO工作流涉及地理参考、多模态和时序数据，操作如重投影、重采样等会主动变换底层状态并约束后续分析，错误可能无声传播。因此，直接扩展通用智能体AI无法解决EO的结构性挑战。
analysis.problem: 通用智能体AI的隐式假设在地理空间工作流中失效，导致多步EO管道中出现错误传播、地理空间不一致、时间比较无效和物理有效性缺失等故障模式。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出EO工作流中操作（如重投影、重采样、合成、聚合）会主动变换底层状态并约束后续分析，错误可能无声传播，正确性不仅依赖内部一致性，还依赖地理空间一致性、时间有效比较和物理有效性。这些挑战是结构性的而非偶然的。
analysis.method: 本文为立场论文，未提出具体方法，而是识别通用智能体模型中的隐式假设，分析其在地理空间工作流中的失效方式，并设计面向EO的原生智能体设计原则：结构化地理空间状态、工具感知推理、验证器引导执行、以及面向地理空间和物理有效性的学习目标。
contributions: 识别并分析了通用智能体AI在地球观测工作流中的结构性挑战和故障模式
提出了面向EO的原生智能体设计原则，包括结构化地理空间状态、工具感知推理、验证器引导执行和面向地理空间/物理有效性的学习目标
提出了未来研究方向，涵盖EO专用基准、混合监督与强化学习、约束自改进以及轨迹级评估
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 本文为立场论文，未提供实证验证或实验结果
设计原则和方向较为宏观，缺乏具体实现细节
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 本文指出地球观测（EO）工作流因地理空间、多模态和时序数据的特性，导致通用智能体AI的隐式假设失效，并提出面向EO的原生智能体设计原则与研究方向。

papers.title: asRoBallet: Closing the Sim2Real Gap via Friction-Aware Reinforcement Learning for Underactuated Spherical Dynamics
papers.abstract: We introduce asRoBallet, to the best of our knowledge, the first end-to-end reinforcement learning (RL) locomotion policy deployed on a humanoid ballbot hardware platform. Historically, ballbots have served as a canonical benchmark for underactuated and nonholonomic control, which are characterized by a reality gap in complex friction models for wheel-ball-floor interactions. While current literature demonstrates successful handling of 3D balancing with LQR and MPC, transitioning to actual hardware for a humanoid ballbot using RL is currently hindered by critical gaps in contact modeling, actuator latency & jitter, and safe hardware exploration. This study proposes a high-fidelity MuJoCo simulation that explicitly models the discrete roller mechanics of ETH-type omni-wheels, thereby capturing parasitic vibrations and contact discontinuities that have previously been ignored. We also developed a Friction-Aware Reinforcement Learning framework that achieves zero-shot Sim2Real transfer by mastering the coupled rolling, lateral, and torsional friction channels at the wheel-ball and ball-floor interfaces. We designed asRoBallet through subtractive reconfiguration, repurposing key components from an overconstrained quadruped and integrating them into a newly designed structural frame to achieve a robust research platform at low cost. We also developed a generalized iOS ecosystem that transforms consumer electronics into a low-latency interface, enabling a single operator to orchestrate expressive humanoid maneuvers via intuitive natural motion.

analysis.tldr: 首个基于强化学习的人形球机器人运动策略，通过摩擦感知框架实现零样本Sim2Real迁移。
analysis.research_motivation: 球机器人作为欠驱动非完整控制基准，存在复杂摩擦模型导致的Sim2Real差距，现有RL方法因接触建模、执行器延迟和安全探索等问题难以迁移到真实硬件。
analysis.problem: 解决人形球机器人从仿真到真实硬件部署中的摩擦建模、接触不连续性和执行器延迟等关键差距。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出高保真MuJoCo仿真（显式建模ETH型全向轮离散滚子力学）和摩擦感知强化学习框架，通过耦合滚动、侧向和扭转摩擦通道实现零样本Sim2Real迁移；硬件上采用减法重构设计，并开发iOS生态系统实现低延迟控制。
contributions: 首个端到端RL运动策略部署在人形球机器人硬件平台。
提出摩擦感知RL框架，实现零样本Sim2Real迁移。
开发高保真仿真和低成本硬件平台。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型全向轮和球机器人结构。
零样本迁移的泛化性可能受限于仿真精度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个基于强化学习的人形球机器人运动策略，通过摩擦感知框架实现零样本Sim2Real迁移。

papers.title: Learning with Embedded Linear Equality Constraints via Variational Bayesian Inference
papers.abstract: Machine Learning is becoming more prevalent in science and engineering, but many approaches do not provide meaningful uncertainty estimates and predictions may also violate known physical knowledge. We propose a Bayesian framework to embed linear relationships across inputs and outputs into the learning process, whilst characterizing full predictive uncertainty over both the model parameters and the domain knowledge. We evaluated our method on learning the single particle battery model subject to voltage and energy balances, showing its ability to provide reduced credible intervals and constraint violations compared to standard Bayesian neural networks based on variational inference.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种变分贝叶斯框架，将线性等式约束嵌入学习过程，同时量化模型参数和领域知识的不确定性。
analysis.research_motivation: 机器学习在科学工程中应用广泛，但现有方法缺乏有意义的不确定性估计，且预测可能违反已知物理知识。
analysis.problem: 如何在机器学习中嵌入线性等式约束，同时提供完整的不确定性量化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准贝叶斯神经网络基于变分推断时，预测可能违反物理约束，且不确定性估计不足。
analysis.method: 提出贝叶斯框架，将输入输出间的线性关系嵌入学习过程，并对模型参数和领域知识都进行不确定性表征。
contributions: 提出一种嵌入线性等式约束的贝叶斯学习框架
同时量化模型参数和领域知识的不确定性
analysis.experiments: 在单粒子电池模型上评估，受电压和能量平衡约束，相比标准变分贝叶斯神经网络，该方法能提供更窄的置信区间并减少约束违反。
limitations: 仅针对线性等式约束，未扩展到非线性约束
实验仅在一个电池模型上验证，泛化性待考
analysis.primary_area_en: neurosymbolic & hybrid AI systems (physics-informed, logic & formal reasoning, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种变分贝叶斯框架，将线性等式约束嵌入学习过程，同时量化模型参数和领域知识的不确定性。

papers.title: MultiHedge: Adaptive Coordination via Retrieval-Augmented Control
papers.abstract: Decision-making under changing conditions remains a fundamental challenge in many real-world systems. Existing approaches often fail to generalize across shifting regimes and exhibit unstable behavior under uncertainty. This raises the research question: can retrieval-augmented LLM coordination improve the robustness of modular decision pipelines? We propose MultiHedge, a hybrid architecture where an LLM produces structured allocation decisions conditioned on retrieved historical precedents, and execution is grounded in canonical option strategies. In a controlled evaluation using U.S. equities, we compare MultiHedge to rule-based and learning-based baselines. The key result is that memory-augmented retrieval confers greater robustness and stability than increasing model scale alone. Our paper contributes a controlled computational study showing that memory and architectural design play a central role in robustness in modular decision systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出MultiHedge，一种通过检索增强LLM协调的模块化决策架构，在金融分配任务中比单纯扩大模型规模更鲁棒。
analysis.research_motivation: 现实系统在变化条件下决策困难，现有方法难以跨场景泛化且不稳定，需要更鲁棒的模块化决策方案。
analysis.problem: 如何利用检索增强的LLM协调提升模块化决策管线的鲁棒性和稳定性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，记忆增强的检索比单纯增加模型规模更能带来鲁棒性和稳定性。
analysis.method: MultiHedge混合架构：LLM基于检索的历史先例生成结构化分配决策，执行基于规范期权策略。
contributions: 提出MultiHedge，一种检索增强的LLM协调架构用于模块化决策。
通过美国权益市场的受控实验，证明记忆增强检索比扩大模型规模更有效。
analysis.experiments: 在美国权益市场进行受控评估，对比基于规则和基于学习的基线。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 仅在金融领域验证，泛化性未知。
未讨论检索库的构建和维护成本。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MultiHedge，一种通过检索增强LLM协调的模块化决策架构，在金融分配任务中比单纯扩大模型规模更鲁棒。

papers.title: VISION-SLS: Safe Perception-Based Control from Learned Visual Representations via System Level Synthesis
papers.abstract: We propose VISION-SLS, a method for nonlinear output-feedback control from high-resolution RGB images which provides robust constraint satisfaction guarantees under calibrated uncertainty bounds despite partial observability, sensor noise, and nonlinear dynamics. To enable scalability while retaining guarantees, we propose: (i) a learned low-dimensional observation map from pretrained visual features with state-dependent error bounds, and (ii) a causal affine time-varying output-feedback policy optimized via System Level Synthesis (SLS). We develop a scalable, novel solver for the resulting nonconvex program that leverages sequential convex programming coupled with efficient Riccati recursions. On two simulated visuomotor tasks (a 4D car and a 10D quadrotor) with >= 512 x 512 pixels and a 59D humanoid task with partial observability, our method enables safe, information-gathering behavior that reduces uncertainty while guaranteeing constraint satisfaction with empirically-calibrated error bounds. We also validate our method on hardware, safely controlling a ground vehicle from onboard images, outperforming baselines in safety rate and solve times. Together, these results show that learned visual abstractions coupled with an efficient solver make SLS-based safe visuomotor output-feedback practical at scale. The code implementation of our method is available at https://github.com/trustworthyrobotics/VISION-SLS.

analysis.tldr: 提出VISION-SLS方法，利用学习视觉表征和系统级合成实现安全视觉反馈控制，保证约束满足。
analysis.research_motivation: 高分辨率RGB图像下的非线性输出反馈控制面临部分可观测、传感器噪声和非线性动力学等挑战，现有方法难以同时保证可扩展性和鲁棒约束满足。
analysis.problem: 如何从高分辨率RGB图像中学习低维观测映射并设计输出反馈策略，以实现具有鲁棒约束满足保证的安全视觉运动控制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出VISION-SLS，包括：(i) 从预训练视觉特征学习低维观测映射，并附带状态依赖误差界；(ii) 通过系统级合成(SLS)优化因果仿射时变输出反馈策略；(iii) 开发基于序列凸规划和Riccati递归的可扩展求解器。
contributions: 提出一种结合学习视觉表征和SLS的安全视觉反馈控制框架，提供鲁棒约束满足保证。
开发可扩展的非凸规划求解器，利用序列凸规划和Riccati递归，使SLS方法在大规模视觉运动任务中实用。
在仿真和硬件上验证方法，在安全率和求解时间上优于基线。
analysis.experiments: 在4D小车、10D四旋翼（≥512x512像素）和59D人形机器人（部分可观测）仿真任务以及地面车辆硬件实验上评估，方法实现了安全、信息收集行为，减少了不确定性并保证约束满足，安全率和求解时间优于基线。
limitations: 依赖预训练视觉特征，可能对域偏移敏感。
状态依赖误差界的校准需要额外数据。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出VISION-SLS方法，利用学习视觉表征和系统级合成实现安全视觉反馈控制，保证约束满足。

papers.title: Interactive Episodic Memory with User Feedback
papers.abstract: In episodic memory with natural language queries (EM-NLQ), a user may ask a question (e.g., "Where did I place the mug?") that requires searching a long egocentric video, captured from the user's perspective, to find the moment that answers it. However, queries can be ambiguous or incomplete, leading to incorrect responses. Current methods ignore this key aspect and address EM-NLQ in a one-shot setup, limiting their applicability in real-world scenarios. In this work, we address this gap and introduce the Episodic Memory with Questions and Feedback task (EM-QnF). Here, the user can provide feedback on the model's initial prediction or add more information (e.g., "Before this. I'm looking for the big blue mug not the white one"), helping the model refine its predictions interactively. To this end, we collect datasets for feedback-based interaction and propose a lightweight training scheme that avoids expensive sequential optimization. We also introduce a plug-and-play Feedback ALignment Module (FALM) that enables existing EM-NLQ models to incorporate user feedback effectively. Our approach significantly improves over the state of the art on three challenging benchmarks and is better than or competitive with commercial large vision-language models while remaining efficient. Evaluation with human-generated feedback shows that it generalizes well to real-world scenarios.

analysis.tldr: 提出交互式情景记忆任务EM-QnF，通过用户反馈对齐模块FALM提升视频问答精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有情景记忆方法采用一次性查询，无法处理用户查询的歧义或不完整，限制了实际应用。
analysis.problem: 如何让模型在长视频情景记忆任务中利用用户反馈进行交互式预测修正。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 用户查询可能模糊或缺失信息，导致初始预测错误；通过交互反馈可逐步修正。
analysis.method: 提出EM-QnF任务，收集反馈数据集，设计轻量训练方案避免序列优化，并引入即插即用的反馈对齐模块FALM。
contributions: 提出交互式情景记忆任务EM-QnF及对应数据集。
设计轻量训练方案和FALM模块，使现有模型能有效利用用户反馈。
analysis.experiments: 在三个挑战性基准上显著超越现有方法，与商业大视觉语言模型相当或更优，且在人机反馈评估中泛化良好。
limitations: 可能依赖特定反馈格式。
未探索多轮复杂交互场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出交互式情景记忆任务EM-QnF，通过用户反馈对齐模块FALM提升视频问答精度。

papers.title: BaLoRA: Bayesian Low-Rank Adaptation of Large Scale Models
papers.abstract: Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) has become the standard for fine-tuning large pre-trained models at reduced computational cost. However, its low-rank point-estimate updates limit expressiveness, leave a persistent gap relative to full fine-tuning accuracy, and provide no built-in uncertainty quantification, limiting its applicability in settings where reliability matters as much as accuracy. We introduce BaLoRA, a Bayesian extension of LoRA with a novel input-adaptive Bayesian parameterization of LoRA matrices that adds minimal parameters and compute. Surprisingly, not only does the Bayesian extension yield well-calibrated uncertainty estimates, but the adaptive noise injection underlying our approach also significantly improves prediction accuracy, narrowing the gap with full fine-tuning across both natural language reasoning and vision tasks. When applied to band gap prediction in metal-organic frameworks, BaLoRA produces zero-shot test-time uncertainty estimates that correlate more strongly with model error than a trained ensemble of LoRA models, and improve monotonically with compute without sacrificing accuracy.

analysis.tldr: BaLoRA通过贝叶斯扩展和输入自适应参数化，在几乎不增加参数和计算的前提下，同时提升了LoRA的预测精度和不确定性校准能力。
analysis.research_motivation: LoRA虽能高效微调大模型，但其低秩点估计更新表达能力有限，与全微调存在精度差距，且缺乏不确定性量化，限制了在可靠性敏感场景的应用。
analysis.problem: 如何在不显著增加参数和计算开销的前提下，提升LoRA的预测精度并为其引入可靠的不确定性估计。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出BaLoRA，一种贝叶斯扩展的LoRA方法，核心是输入自适应的贝叶斯参数化，通过自适应噪声注入实现不确定性估计和精度提升。
contributions: 提出BaLoRA，一种贝叶斯低秩自适应方法，以极小参数和计算代价实现不确定性量化。
实验表明BaLoRA不仅提供校准良好的不确定性估计，还显著提升预测精度，缩小了与全微调的差距。
在金属有机框架带隙预测任务中，BaLoRA的零样本测试时不确定性估计与模型误差的相关性优于训练好的LoRA集成，且随计算量单调改善。
analysis.experiments: 在自然语言推理、视觉任务以及金属有机框架带隙预测上进行了实验，摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 可能仅在特定低秩设置下有效，对极高秩或极深网络需进一步验证。
输入自适应参数化可能引入额外设计选择，泛化性需更多分析。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: BaLoRA通过贝叶斯扩展和输入自适应参数化，在几乎不增加参数和计算的前提下，同时提升了LoRA的预测精度和不确定性校准能力。

papers.title: VibeToken: Scaling 1D Image Tokenizers and Autoregressive Models for Dynamic Resolution Generations
papers.abstract: We introduce an efficient, resolution-agnostic autoregressive (AR) image synthesis approach that generalizes to arbitrary resolutions and aspect ratios, narrowing the gap to diffusion models at scale. At its core is VibeToken, a novel resolution-agnostic 1D Transformer-based image tokenizer that encodes images into a dynamic, user-controllable sequence of 32-256 tokens, achieving a state-of-the-art efficiency and performance trade-off. Building on VibeToken, we present VibeToken-Gen, a class-conditioned AR generator with out-of-the-box support for arbitrary resolutions while requiring significantly fewer compute resources. Notably, VibeToken-Gen synthesizes 1024x1024 images using only 64 tokens and achieves 3.94 gFID; by comparison, a diffusion-based state-of-the-art alternative requires 1,024 tokens and attains 5.87 gFID. In contrast to fixed-resolution AR models such as LlamaGen -- whose inference FLOPs grow quadratically with resolution (11T FLOPs at 1024x1024) -- VibeToken-Gen maintains a constant 179G FLOPs (63.4x efficient) independent of resolution. We hope VibeToken can help unlock the wide adoption of AR visual generative models in production use cases.

analysis.tldr: 提出分辨率无关的1D图像分词器VibeToken和自回归生成模型VibeToken-Gen，实现动态分辨率图像生成，效率远超扩散模型和固定分辨率AR模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有自回归图像生成模型通常固定分辨率，推理计算量随分辨率二次增长，难以扩展到高分辨率；扩散模型虽效果好但计算成本高。需要一种高效、分辨率无关的AR方案。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个分辨率无关的1D图像分词器和自回归生成模型，在任意分辨率和宽高比下高效生成高质量图像。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出VibeToken，一种基于Transformer的1D图像分词器，将图像编码为32-256个token的动态序列，支持任意分辨率；基于VibeToken构建VibeToken-Gen，一个类条件自回归生成器，支持任意分辨率且计算量恒定。
contributions: 提出VibeToken，首个分辨率无关的1D Transformer图像分词器，实现效率与性能的最佳权衡。
提出VibeToken-Gen，类条件自回归生成器，在任意分辨率下保持恒定计算量，显著优于固定分辨率AR模型和扩散模型。
analysis.experiments: 在1024x1024分辨率下，VibeToken-Gen仅用64个token达到3.94 gFID，而扩散模型基线需1024个token且gFID为5.87；推理FLOPs恒定为179G，而LlamaGen在1024x1024下为11T FLOPs（效率提升63.4倍）。
limitations: 可能仅适用于类条件生成，未提及文本条件或无条件生成。
gFID指标可能未覆盖所有多样性或保真度维度。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出分辨率无关的1D图像分词器VibeToken和自回归生成模型VibeToken-Gen，实现动态分辨率图像生成，效率远超扩散模型和固定分辨率AR模型。

papers.title: Latent Agents: A Post-Training Procedure for Internalized Multi-Agent Debate
papers.abstract: Multi-agent debate has been shown to improve reasoning in large language models (LLMs). However, it is compute-intensive, requiring generation of long transcripts before answering questions. To address this inefficiency, we develop a framework that distills multi-agent debate into a single LLM through a two-stage fine-tuning pipeline combining debate structure learning with internalization via dynamic reward scheduling and length clipping. Across multiple models and benchmarks, our internalized models match or exceed explicit multi-agent debate performance using up to 93% fewer tokens. We then investigate the mechanistic basis of this capability through activation steering, finding that internalization creates agent-specific subspaces: interpretable directions in activation space corresponding to different agent perspectives. We further demonstrate a practical application: by instilling malicious agents into the LLM through internalized debate, then applying negative steering to suppress them, we show that distillation makes harmful behaviors easier to localize and control with smaller reductions in general performance compared to steering base models. Our findings offer a new perspective for understanding multi-agent capabilities in distilled models and provide practical guidelines for controlling internalized reasoning behaviors. Code available at https://github.com/johnsk95/latent_agents

analysis.tldr: 通过两阶段微调将多智能体辩论内化为单个LLM的隐式推理，大幅降低推理成本并揭示可解释的智能体子空间。
analysis.research_motivation: 多智能体辩论能提升LLM推理能力，但需要生成冗长对话，计算成本高，限制了实际应用。
analysis.problem: 如何将多智能体辩论的高计算成本降低，同时保持或提升推理性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 内化后的模型在激活空间中形成了对应不同智能体视角的可解释子空间，且通过负向激活操控可更有效地控制有害行为。
analysis.method: 两阶段微调流程：第一阶段学习辩论结构，第二阶段通过动态奖励调度和长度裁剪将辩论内化到单个LLM中。
contributions: 提出Latent Agents框架，通过两阶段微调将多智能体辩论内化为单个LLM，推理时无需生成辩论文本。
在多个模型和基准上，内化模型匹配或超越显式多智能体辩论性能，同时减少高达93%的token使用。
通过激活操控发现内化过程创建了对应不同智能体视角的可解释子空间，并展示了通过内化有害智能体再负向操控来更有效控制有害行为。
analysis.experiments: 在多个模型和基准上评估，内化模型匹配或超越显式多智能体辩论性能，token使用减少高达93%。摘要未提供具体基准名称和数值。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的推理任务，泛化性未充分验证。
内化过程可能引入额外的训练成本，且对有害行为的控制效果依赖于负向操控的强度。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过两阶段微调将多智能体辩论内化为单个LLM的隐式推理，大幅降低推理成本并揭示可解释的智能体子空间。

papers.title: Transformer Approximations from ReLUs
papers.abstract: We provide a systematic recipe for translating ReLU approximation results to softmax attention mechanism. This recipe covers many common approximation targets. Importantly, it yields target-specific, economic resource bounds beyond universal approximation statements. We showcase the recipe on multiplication, reciprocal computation, and min/max primitives. These results provide new analytical tools for analyzing softmax transformer models.

analysis.tldr: 提出将ReLU近似结果系统迁移到softmax注意力的方法，并给出乘法、倒数、min/max等原语的资源界限。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有ReLU神经网络近似理论丰富，但softmax注意力机制缺乏类似的系统性近似分析工具，难以精确刻画其表达能力。
analysis.problem: 如何将ReLU近似结果系统性地迁移到softmax注意力机制，并得到目标特定的经济资源界限。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出一个系统配方，将ReLU近似结果翻译为softmax注意力近似，覆盖常见近似目标，并给出目标特定的资源界限。
contributions: 提供将ReLU近似结果迁移到softmax注意力的系统方法。
给出乘法、倒数、min/max等原语的经济资源界限。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的近似目标。
资源界限的紧性有待进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出将ReLU近似结果系统迁移到softmax注意力的方法，并给出乘法、倒数、min/max等原语的资源界限。

papers.title: Learning Illumination Control in Diffusion Models
papers.abstract: Controlling illumination in images is essential for photography and visual content creation. While closed-source models have demonstrated impressive illumination control, open-source alternatives either require heavy control inputs like depth maps or do not release their data and code. We present a fully open-source and reproducible pipeline for learning illumination control in diffusion models. Our approach builds a data engine that transforms well-lit images into supervised training triplets consisting of a poorly-illuminated input image, a natural language lighting instruction, and a well-illuminated output image. We finetune a diffusion model on this data and demonstrate significant improvements over baseline SD 1.5, SDXL, and FLUX.1-dev models in perceptual similarity, structural similarity, and identity preservation. Our work provides a reproducible solution built entirely with open-source tools and publicly available data. We release all our code, data, and model weights publicly.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种完全开源的扩散模型光照控制方法，通过数据引擎生成训练三元组并微调模型，显著提升图像光照效果。
analysis.research_motivation: 光照控制对摄影和视觉内容创作至关重要，但现有开源方法要么需要深度图等复杂控制输入，要么未公开数据和代码，缺乏可复现的解决方案。
analysis.problem: 如何在扩散模型中实现高效、可复现的光照控制，且仅需自然语言指令作为输入。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建数据引擎，将良好光照图像转换为包含欠光照输入、自然语言光照指令和良好光照输出的三元组，然后微调扩散模型。
contributions: 提出完全开源且可复现的扩散模型光照控制流程。
构建数据引擎自动生成监督训练三元组。
在多个扩散模型上展示显著改进，并公开代码、数据和模型权重。
analysis.experiments: 在SD 1.5、SDXL和FLUX.1-dev上评估，在感知相似性、结构相似性和身份保持方面有显著提升。
limitations: 可能依赖数据引擎生成质量，极端光照场景效果未知。
仅针对图像光照，未涉及视频或其他模态。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种完全开源的扩散模型光照控制方法，通过数据引擎生成训练三元组并微调模型，显著提升图像光照效果。

papers.title: ESICA: A Scalable Framework for Text-Guided 3D Medical Image Segmentation
papers.abstract: Text guided 3D medical image segmentation offers a flexible alternative to class based and spatial prompt based models by allowing users to specify regions of interest directly in natural language. This paradigm avoids reliance on predefined label sets, reduces ambiguous outputs, and aligns more naturally with clinical workflows. However, existing text guided frameworks are often computationally expensive, exhibit weak text volume feature alignment, and fail to capture fine anatomical details. We propose ESICA, a lightweight and scalable framework that addresses these challenges through three innovations: (1) a similarity matrix based mask prediction formulation that enhances semantic alignment, (2) an efficient decomposed decoder with adapter modules for accurate volumetric decoding, and (3) a two pass refinement strategy that sharpens boundaries and resolves uncertain regions. To improve training stability and generalization, ESICA adopts a two stage scheme consisting of positive only pretraining followed by balanced fine tuning. On the CVPR BiomedSegFM benchmark spanning five imaging modalities (CT, MRI, PET, ultrasound, and microscopy), ESICA achieves state of the art segmentation accuracy, while the compact ESICA4 Lite variant attains similar segmentation performance with substantially fewer parameters, yielding a superior efficiency accuracy trade off. Our framework advances text guided segmentation toward efficient, scalable, and clinically deployable systems. Code will be made publicly available at https://github.com/mirthAI/ESICA.

analysis.tldr: ESICA 提出轻量级文本引导 3D 医学图像分割框架，通过相似矩阵掩码预测、高效解码器和两遍精化策略实现 SOTA 精度与效率平衡。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有文本引导 3D 医学图像分割框架计算成本高、文本-体素特征对齐弱、难以捕捉精细解剖细节，且依赖预定义标签集，限制了临床部署。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个轻量、可扩展的文本引导 3D 医学图像分割框架，实现高效语义对齐、准确体积解码和边界细化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 ESICA 框架，包含三个创新：(1) 基于相似矩阵的掩码预测增强语义对齐；(2) 带适配器模块的高效分解解码器；(3) 两遍精化策略锐化边界。采用两阶段训练：仅正样本预训练 + 平衡微调。
contributions: 提出 ESICA，一个轻量级可扩展的文本引导 3D 医学图像分割框架。
引入相似矩阵掩码预测、高效分解解码器和两遍精化策略。
在 CVPR BiomedSegFM 基准上跨五种模态取得 SOTA 分割精度，且轻量变体 ESICA4 Lite 以更少参数实现相近性能。
analysis.experiments: 在 CVPR BiomedSegFM 基准上评估，涵盖 CT、MRI、PET、超声和显微镜五种成像模态，ESICA 达到 SOTA 分割精度，ESICA4 Lite 在参数大幅减少的情况下保持相似性能。
limitations: 可能仅在特定基准上验证，泛化到其他数据集或临床场景需进一步测试。
两遍精化策略可能增加推理时间，实时性未明确讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ESICA 提出轻量级文本引导 3D 医学图像分割框架，通过相似矩阵掩码预测、高效解码器和两遍精化策略实现 SOTA 精度与效率平衡。

papers.title: Co-Director: Agentic Generative Video Storytelling
papers.abstract: While diffusion models generate high-fidelity video clips, transforming them into coherent storytelling engines remains challenging. Current agentic pipelines automate this via chained modules but suffer from semantic drift and cascading failures due to independent, handcrafted prompting. We present Co-Director, a hierarchical multi-agent framework formalizing video storytelling as a global optimization problem. To ensure semantic coherence, we introduce hierarchical parameterization: a multi-armed bandit globally identifies promising creative directions, while a local multimodal self-refinement loop mitigates identity drift and ensures sequence-level consistency. This balances the exploration of novel narrative strategies with the exploitation of effective creative configurations. For evaluation, we introduce GenAD-Bench, a 400-scenario dataset of fictional products for personalized advertising. Experiments demonstrate that Co-Director significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines, offering a principled approach that seamlessly generalizes to broader cinematic narratives. Project Page: https://co-director-agent.github.io/

analysis.tldr: Co-Director 通过分层多智能体框架将视频故事生成形式化为全局优化问题，缓解语义漂移和身份漂移。
analysis.research_motivation: 扩散模型虽能生成高质量视频片段，但将其转化为连贯的故事引擎仍具挑战；现有智能体流水线依赖独立的手工提示，导致语义漂移和级联失败。
analysis.problem: 如何实现长视频故事生成的语义连贯性和序列级一致性，避免身份漂移和级联错误。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出当前智能体流水线因独立手工提示导致语义漂移和级联失败，缺乏全局优化。
analysis.method: 提出分层多智能体框架 Co-Director：全局层使用多臂赌博机识别有前景的创意方向，局部层通过多模态自精炼循环缓解身份漂移并确保序列一致性，平衡探索与利用。
contributions: 提出 Co-Director，一个将视频故事生成形式化为全局优化问题的分层多智能体框架。
引入分层参数化方法，结合多臂赌博机全局探索与局部自精炼循环，保证语义和身份连贯性。
构建 GenAD-Bench 数据集，包含 400 个虚构产品场景，用于个性化广告评估。
analysis.experiments: 在 GenAD-Bench 上实验，Co-Director 显著优于现有基线，并泛化到更广泛的电影叙事。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量初始视频片段生成能力。
多智能体框架的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Co-Director 通过分层多智能体框架将视频故事生成形式化为全局优化问题，缓解语义漂移和身份漂移。

papers.title: spectroxide: A code package for computing cosmic microwave background spectral distortions
papers.abstract: We present spectroxide, a code package for computing cosmic microwave background spectral distortions in which all ${\sim}14{,}500$ lines of Rust code, Python interface, and ${\sim}400$ automated tests were written by an AI assistant (Claude Code) under human physicist supervision. The solver evolves the photon Boltzmann equation under Compton scattering, double Compton emission, and Bremsstrahlung from $z \sim 5 \times 10^6$ to the present, computing spectral distortions from arbitrary heat and photon injection within this redshift range. No fully open-source code of this kind is publicly available; we validate against analytic limits, published spectra, and publicly available precomputed Green's function tables. We document the development as a case study in AI-assisted scientific computing, highlighting how domain expertise caught physics bugs (incorrect dimensional prefactors, near-cancellation errors) that evaded the full automated test suite, and provide recommendations for best practices in human--AI collaborative development of scientific software. We make spectroxide publicly available on GitHub.

analysis.tldr: AI辅助开发的宇宙微波背景谱畸变计算开源软件包。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有CMB谱畸变计算代码缺乏完全开源实现，且AI辅助科学计算中领域知识如何发现并修复物理错误尚缺乏案例研究。
analysis.problem: 开发一个完全开源、经过验证的CMB谱畸变计算代码，并记录AI辅助开发过程中的经验教训。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: AI生成的代码通过了全部自动化测试，但仍存在物理错误（如量纲因子错误、近抵消误差），需要人类物理学家领域知识才能发现。
analysis.method: 使用AI助手（Claude Code）编写约14500行Rust代码、Python接口和约400个自动化测试，人类物理学家监督并修复物理错误。
contributions: 发布了首个完全开源的CMB谱畸变计算软件包spectroxide
提供了AI辅助科学计算的最佳实践案例研究
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提到通过与解析极限、已发表谱图和公开Green函数表进行验证。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定红移范围和物理过程
AI辅助开发方法可能不适用于所有科学计算场景
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AI辅助开发的宇宙微波背景谱畸变计算开源软件包。

papers.title: World-R1: Reinforcing 3D Constraints for Text-to-Video Generation
papers.abstract: Recent video foundation models demonstrate impressive visual synthesis but frequently suffer from geometric inconsistencies. While existing methods attempt to inject 3D priors via architectural modifications, they often incur high computational costs and limit scalability. We propose World-R1, a framework that aligns video generation with 3D constraints through reinforcement learning. To facilitate this alignment, we introduce a specialized pure text dataset tailored for world simulation. Utilizing Flow-GRPO, we optimize the model using feedback from pre-trained 3D foundation models and vision-language models to enforce structural coherence without altering the underlying architecture. We further employ a periodic decoupled training strategy to balance rigid geometric consistency with dynamic scene fluidity. Extensive evaluations reveal that our approach significantly enhances 3D consistency while preserving the original visual quality of the foundation model, effectively bridging the gap between video generation and scalable world simulation.

analysis.tldr: World-R1 通过强化学习将 3D 约束注入文本到视频生成，无需修改架构即可提升几何一致性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频基础模型在视觉合成中常出现几何不一致问题，而通过架构修改注入 3D 先验的方法计算成本高且可扩展性差。
analysis.problem: 如何在不修改模型架构的前提下，使文本到视频生成模型遵循 3D 约束，提升几何一致性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出视频生成模型存在几何不一致问题，现有架构修改方法成本高且限制可扩展性。
analysis.method: 提出 World-R1 框架，使用 Flow-GRPO 算法，结合预训练 3D 基础模型和视觉语言模型的反馈进行强化学习，并采用周期性解耦训练策略平衡刚体几何一致性与动态场景流畅性。
contributions: 提出 World-R1 框架，通过强化学习将 3D 约束对齐到视频生成，无需架构修改。
引入专门用于世界模拟的纯文本数据集。
采用 Flow-GRPO 和周期性解耦训练策略，有效提升 3D 一致性并保持视觉质量。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 依赖预训练 3D 基础模型和视觉语言模型的反馈质量。
周期性解耦训练策略可能增加训练复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: World-R1 通过强化学习将 3D 约束注入文本到视频生成，无需修改架构即可提升几何一致性。

papers.title: Tuna-2: Pixel Embeddings Beat Vision Encoders for Multimodal Understanding and Generation
papers.abstract: Unified multimodal models typically rely on pretrained vision encoders and use separate visual representations for understanding and generation, creating misalignment between the two tasks and preventing fully end-to-end optimization from raw pixels. We introduce Tuna-2, a native unified multimodal model that performs visual understanding and generation directly based on pixel embeddings. Tuna-2 drastically simplifies the model architecture by employing simple patch embedding layers to encode visual input, completely discarding the modular vision encoder designs such as the VAE or the representation encoder. Experiments show that Tuna-2 achieves state-of-the-art performance in multimodal benchmarks, demonstrating that unified pixel-space modelling can fully compete with latent-space approaches for high-quality image generation. Moreover, while the encoder-based variant converges faster in early pretraining, Tuna-2's encoder-free design achieves stronger multimodal understanding at scale, particularly on tasks requiring fine-grained visual perception. These results show that pretrained vision encoders are not necessary for multimodal modelling, and end-to-end pixel-space learning offers a scalable path toward stronger visual representations for both generation and perception.

analysis.tldr: Tuna-2 直接用像素嵌入替代预训练视觉编码器，实现统一的多模态理解与生成，并在基准测试中达到 SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有统一多模态模型依赖预训练视觉编码器，且为理解和生成任务使用分离的视觉表示，导致任务间不对齐，无法实现从原始像素到输出的完全端到端优化。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个无需预训练视觉编码器、直接从像素嵌入进行统一多模态理解与生成的模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 基于编码器的变体在早期预训练中收敛更快，但 Tuna-2 的无编码器设计在更大规模下实现了更强的多模态理解，尤其在需要细粒度视觉感知的任务上。
analysis.method: 采用简单的 patch embedding 层编码视觉输入，完全抛弃 VAE 或表示编码器等模块化视觉编码器设计，实现原生统一的像素空间建模。
contributions: 提出 Tuna-2，首个原生统一多模态模型，直接基于像素嵌入进行视觉理解和生成。
实验证明像素空间建模可与潜在空间方法在高质量图像生成上完全竞争，且无编码器设计在理解任务上更优。
analysis.experiments: 在多模态基准测试中达到 SOTA，并比较了编码器变体与无编码器设计的收敛速度和扩展性能。
limitations: 摘要未提及模型在极低分辨率或高噪声输入下的鲁棒性。
未讨论像素嵌入方法在计算效率上的具体开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Tuna-2 直接用像素嵌入替代预训练视觉编码器，实现统一的多模态理解与生成，并在基准测试中达到 SOTA。

papers.title: OmniShotCut: Holistic Relational Shot Boundary Detection with Shot-Query Transformer
papers.abstract: Shot Boundary Detection (SBD) aims to automatically identify shot changes and divide a video into coherent shots. While SBD was widely studied in the literature, existing state-of-the-art methods often produce non-interpretable boundaries on transitions, miss subtle yet harmful discontinuities, and rely on noisy, low-diversity annotations and outdated benchmarks. To alleviate these limitations, we propose OmniShotCut to formulate SBD as structured relational prediction, jointly estimating shot ranges with intra-shot relations and inter-shot relations, by a shot query-based dense video Transformer. To avoid imprecise manual labeling, we adopt a fully synthetic transition synthesis pipeline that automatically reproduces major transition families with precise boundaries and parameterized variants. We also introduce OmniShotCutBench, a modern wide-domain benchmark enabling holistic and diagnostic evaluation.

analysis.tldr: 提出OmniShotCut，将镜头边界检测建模为结构化关系预测，使用Shot-Query Transformer联合估计镜头范围与内部/间关系，并引入全合成过渡合成管道和现代基准。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有镜头边界检测方法在过渡上产生不可解释的边界，遗漏细微但有害的不连续性，且依赖噪声大、多样性低的标注和过时基准。
analysis.problem: 如何实现可解释、精确且全面的镜头边界检测，避免人工标注噪声并覆盖多样过渡类型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将SBD公式化为结构化关系预测，通过基于镜头查询的密集视频Transformer联合估计镜头范围、镜头内关系和镜头间关系；采用全合成过渡合成管道自动生成主要过渡族及其参数化变体。
contributions: 提出OmniShotCut，将SBD作为结构化关系预测，利用Shot-Query Transformer联合建模镜头内和镜头间关系。
引入全合成过渡合成管道，避免不精确的人工标注，自动生成精确边界和参数化变体的过渡。
构建OmniShotCutBench，一个现代宽域基准，支持整体和诊断性评估。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 合成数据与真实视频之间的域差异可能影响泛化。
基准覆盖范围虽广，但可能仍缺乏某些罕见过渡类型。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出OmniShotCut，将镜头边界检测建模为结构化关系预测，使用Shot-Query Transformer联合估计镜头范围与内部/间关系，并引入全合成过渡合成管道和现代基准。

papers.title: MotionBricks: Scalable Real-Time Motions with Modular Latent Generative Model and Smart Primitives
papers.abstract: Despite transformative advances in generative motion synthesis, real-time interactive motion control remains dominated by traditional techniques. In this work, we identify two key challenges in bridging research and production: 1) Real-time scalability: Industry applications demand real-time generation of a vast repertoire of motion skills, while generative methods exhibit significant degradation in quality and scalability under real-time computation constraints, and 2) Integration: Industry applications demand fine-grained multi-modal control involving velocity commands, style selection, and precise keyframes, a need largely unmet by existing text- or tag-driven models. To overcome these limitations, we introduce MotionBricks: a large-scale, real-time generative framework with a two-fold solution. First, we propose a large-scale modular latent generative backbone tailored for robust real-time motion generation, effectively modeling a dataset of over 350,000 motion clips with a single model. Second, we introduce smart primitives that provide a unified, robust, and intuitive interface for authoring both navigation and object interaction. Applications can be designed in a plug-and-play manner like assembling bricks without expert animation knowledge. Quantitatively, we show that MotionBricks produces state-of-the-art motion quality on open-source and proprietary datasets of various scales, while also achieving a real-time throughput of 15,000 FPS with 2ms latency. We demonstrate the flexibility and robustness of MotionBricks in a complete production-level animation demo, covering navigation and object-scene interaction across various styles with a unified model. To showcase our framework's application beyond animation, we deploy MotionBricks on the Unitree G1 humanoid robot to demonstrate its flexibility and generalization for real-time robotic control.

analysis.tldr: MotionBricks 提出模块化潜生成模型与智能原语，实现大规模实时运动生成与交互控制。
analysis.research_motivation: 实时交互运动控制仍依赖传统技术，生成方法在实时计算约束下质量和可扩展性显著下降，且现有模型难以满足细粒度多模态控制需求。
analysis.problem: 如何实现大规模、实时、高质量的运动生成，并提供统一的多模态控制接口。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 生成方法在实时约束下质量与可扩展性退化；现有文本/标签驱动模型无法支持速度、风格、关键帧等细粒度控制。
analysis.method: 提出 MotionBricks 框架，包含大规模模块化潜生成骨干（建模超35万运动片段）和智能原语（统一接口支持导航与物体交互），实现即插即用。
contributions: 提出模块化潜生成模型，实现单模型对超35万运动片段的高质量实时生成。
引入智能原语，提供统一、鲁棒、直观的交互控制接口。
在开源和专有数据集上达到SOTA运动质量，实时吞吐量15000 FPS，延迟2ms。
analysis.experiments: 在开源和专有数据集上评估运动质量，达到SOTA；实时吞吐量15000 FPS，延迟2ms；在完整生产级动画演示和Unitree G1人形机器人上验证。
limitations: 可能依赖大规模运动数据集，获取成本高。
智能原语对复杂场景的泛化能力有待进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: MotionBricks 提出模块化潜生成模型与智能原语，实现大规模实时运动生成与交互控制。

papers.title: Personalized Worked Example Generation from Student Code Submissions Using Pattern-based Knowledge Components
papers.abstract: Adaptive programming practice often relies on fixed libraries of worked examples and practice problems, which require substantial authoring effort and may not correspond well to the logical errors and partial solutions students produce while writing code. As a result, students may receive learning content that does not directly address the concepts they are working to understand, while instructors must either invest additional effort in expanding content libraries or accept a coarse level of personalization. We present an approach for knowledge-component (KC) guided educational content generation using pattern-based KCs extracted from student code. Given a problem statement and student submissions, our pipeline extracts recurring structural KC patterns from students' code through AST-based analysis and uses them to condition a generative model. In this study, we apply this approach to worked example generation, and compare baseline and KC-conditioned outputs through expert evaluation. Results suggest that KC-conditioned generation improves topical focus and relevance to students' underlying logical errors, providing evidence that KC-based steering of generative models can support personalized learning at scale.

analysis.tldr: 利用学生代码中的模式化知识组件引导生成模型，生成个性化编程示例，提升内容针对性和相关性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有自适应编程练习依赖固定示例库，需要大量人工编写且难以匹配学生的逻辑错误和部分解决方案，导致个性化不足。
analysis.problem: 如何自动生成与学生代码中逻辑错误和部分解决方案高度相关的个性化编程示例。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 从学生代码中通过AST分析提取模式化知识组件（KC），并用于条件化生成模型，生成个性化示例。
contributions: 提出基于模式化知识组件的教育内容生成方法，利用AST分析从学生代码中提取KC。
通过专家评估验证KC条件化生成能提升示例的主题聚焦度和对学生逻辑错误的相关性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖AST分析的质量和KC模式的覆盖度。
专家评估规模有限，泛化性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用学生代码中的模式化知识组件引导生成模型，生成个性化编程示例，提升内容针对性和相关性。

papers.title: On the Trainability of Masked Diffusion Language Models via Blockwise Locality
papers.abstract: Masked diffusion language models (MDMs) have recently emerged as a promising alternative to standard autoregressive large language models (AR-LLMs), yet their optimization can be substantially less stable. We study blockwise MDMs and compare them with AR-LLMs on three controlled tasks that stress different aspects of structured generation: in-context linear regression, graph path-finding, and Sudoku solving. We find that standard random-masking MDMs fail to reliably learn linear regression, exhibit high variance training dynamics on graph path-finding, while outperforming AR-LLMs on Sudoku. To mitigate these instabilities, we propose two locality aware blockwise models, namely Jigsaw and Scatter, that inject left-to-right inductive bias by enforcing autoregressive locality within blocks while preserving iterative refinement at the block level. Empirically, Jigsaw matches AR-LLM stability on linear regression and remains strong on Sudoku, while Scatter retains diffusion's planning advantage on path-finding. Our results indicate that standard random-masking MDMs, even with blockwise variants, may be a suboptimal instantiation of diffusion LMs for ordered generation, motivating models beyond random masking.

analysis.tldr: 提出两种局部性感知的块状掩码扩散语言模型，缓解训练不稳定问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 掩码扩散语言模型（MDM）作为自回归大语言模型（AR-LLM）的替代方案，其优化过程可能不稳定，需要研究其可训练性并改进。
analysis.problem: 标准随机掩码MDM在有序生成任务上训练不稳定，需要注入合适的归纳偏置来提升稳定性和性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准随机掩码MDM在线性回归任务上无法可靠学习，在图路径查找任务上训练动态方差高，但在数独任务上优于AR-LLM。
analysis.method: 提出两种局部性感知的块状模型Jigsaw和Scatter，通过在块内强制自回归局部性（从左到右的归纳偏置）同时保留块级迭代精炼。
contributions: 系统比较了块状MDM与AR-LLM在三个受控任务上的表现，揭示了MDM在不同结构化生成任务中的优势和不足。
提出了两种局部性感知的块状模型Jigsaw和Scatter，有效缓解了训练不稳定问题，并在不同任务上取得了平衡的性能。
analysis.experiments: 在三个受控任务（上下文线性回归、图路径查找、数独求解）上进行实验，比较了标准随机掩码MDM、AR-LLM以及提出的Jigsaw和Scatter模型。
limitations: 实验仅在受控任务上进行，未在真实大规模语言模型场景中验证。
方法可能对特定任务依赖较强，泛化性有待进一步研究。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出两种局部性感知的块状掩码扩散语言模型，缓解训练不稳定问题。

papers.title: Learning to Think from Multiple Thinkers
papers.abstract: We study learning with Chain-of-Thought (CoT) supervision from multiple thinkers, all of whom provide correct but possibly systematically different solutions, e.g., step-by-step solutions to math problems written by different thinkers, or step-by-step execution traces of different programs solving the same problem. We consider classes that are computationally easy to learn using CoT supervision from a single thinker, but hard to learn with only end-result supervision, i.e., without CoT (Joshi et al. 2025). We establish that, under cryptographic assumptions, learning can be hard from CoT supervision provided by two or a few different thinkers, in passive data-collection settings. On the other hand, we provide a generic computationally efficient active learning algorithm that learns with a small amount of CoT data per thinker that is completely independent of the target accuracy $\varepsilon$, a moderate number of thinkers that scales as $\log \frac{1}{\varepsilon}\log \log \frac{1}{\varepsilon}$, and sufficient passive end-result data that scales as $\frac{1}{\varepsilon}\cdot poly\log\frac{1}{\varepsilon}$.

analysis.tldr: 多思考者思维链监督学习在被动设置下可能困难，但主动学习可高效解决。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有CoT学习依赖单一思考者，但实际中可能有多位思考者提供不同但正确的推理过程，其学习难度未知。
analysis.problem: 研究从多个不同思考者提供的CoT监督中进行学习的问题，特别是被动与主动设置下的样本效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在密码学假设下，被动收集少量不同思考者的CoT数据可能导致学习困难。
analysis.method: 提出一种通用的计算高效主动学习算法，利用少量每思考者CoT数据（与精度无关）和中等数量思考者（对数依赖）以及大量被动端结果数据。
contributions: 证明在被动设置下，从多个不同思考者的CoT监督学习可能是困难的（基于密码学假设）。
提出一种主动学习算法，实现样本复杂度与精度ε的弱依赖关系。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 理论结果基于密码学假设，实际可行性未验证。
主动学习算法可能依赖特定查询策略，实际应用需进一步适配。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 多思考者思维链监督学习在被动设置下可能困难，但主动学习可高效解决。

papers.title: DiffuSAM: Diffusion-Based Prompt-Free SAM2 for Few-Shot and Source-Free Medical Image Segmentation
papers.abstract: Segmentation models such as Segment Anything Model (SAM) and SAM2 achieve strong prompt-driven zero-shot performance. However, their training on natural images limits domain transfer to medical data. Consequently, accurate segmentation typically requires extensive fine-tuning and expert-designed prompts. We propose DiffuSAM, a diffusion-based adaptation of SAM2 for prompt-free medical image segmentation. Our framework synthesizes SAM2-compatible segmentation mask-like embeddings via a lightweight diffusion-prior from off-the-shelf frozen SAM2 image features. The generated embeddings are integrated into SAM2's mask decoder to produce accurate segmentations, thereby eliminating the need for user prompts. The diffusion prior is further conditioned on previously segmented slices, enforcing spatial consistency across volumes. Evaluated on the BTCV and CHAOS datasets for CT and MRI under Source-Free Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (SF-UDA) and Few-Shot settings, DiffuSAM achieves competitive performance with efficient training and inference. Code is available upon request from the corresponding author.

analysis.tldr: DiffuSAM 利用扩散先验将 SAM2 适配到无提示的医学图像分割，在少样本和无源域适应场景下表现优异。
analysis.research_motivation: SAM/SAM2 在自然图像上训练，直接迁移到医学图像时域差异大，需要大量微调和专家设计的提示，成本高且不实用。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖用户提示和大量标注数据的情况下，将 SAM2 高效适配到医学图像分割任务。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 DiffuSAM，使用轻量扩散先验从冻结的 SAM2 图像特征生成与 SAM2 兼容的分割掩码嵌入，并利用先前分割切片进行条件生成以保持空间一致性，实现无提示分割。
contributions: 提出扩散先验方法将 SAM2 适配到无提示医学图像分割，消除对用户提示的依赖。
在少样本和无源域适应设置下，在 CT 和 MRI 数据集上验证了方法的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在 BTCV 和 CHAOS 数据集上评估了 CT 和 MRI 下的无源无监督域适应和少样本设置，取得了有竞争力的性能。
limitations: 可能对高度异质的医学图像域泛化能力有限。
扩散先验的生成质量可能受限于 SAM2 图像特征的表达能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: DiffuSAM 利用扩散先验将 SAM2 适配到无提示的医学图像分割，在少样本和无源域适应场景下表现优异。

papers.title: WildLIFT: Lifting monocular drone video to 3D for species-agnostic wildlife monitoring
papers.abstract: Monocular RGB cameras mounted on drones are widely used for wildlife monitoring, yet most analytical pipelines remain confined to two-dimensional image space, leaving geometric information in video underexploited. We present WildLIFT, a computational framework that integrates three-dimensional scene geometry from monocular drone video with open-vocabulary 2D instance segmentation to enable species-agnostic 3D detection and tracking. Oriented 3D bounding box labels with semantic face information enable quantitative assessment of viewpoint coverage and inter-animal occlusion, producing structured metadata for downstream ecological analyses. We validate the framework on 2,581 manually curated frames comprising over 6,700 3D detections across four large mammal species. WildLIFT maintains high identity consistency in multi-animal scenes and substantially reduces manual 3D annotation effort through keyframe-based refinement. By transforming standard drone footage into structured 3D and viewpoint-aware representations, WildLIFT extends the analytical utility of aerial wildlife datasets for behavioural research and population monitoring.

analysis.tldr: WildLIFT 将单目无人机视频提升为 3D 场景，实现物种无关的野生动物监测。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前无人机野生动物监测大多局限于 2D 图像分析，未充分利用视频中的几何信息，导致 3D 检测和跟踪能力不足。
analysis.problem: 如何从单目无人机视频中提取 3D 场景几何信息，实现物种无关的 3D 检测与跟踪。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 集成单目无人机视频的 3D 场景几何与开放词汇 2D 实例分割，生成带语义面的有向 3D 边界框，并通过关键帧标注减少人工 3D 标注工作量。
contributions: 提出 WildLIFT 框架，融合 3D 几何与开放词汇分割实现物种无关的 3D 检测与跟踪。
在 2,581 帧、6,700+ 3D 检测上验证，保持高身份一致性并显著减少人工标注。
analysis.experiments: 在 2,581 帧手动标注帧上验证，包含 6,700+ 个 3D 检测，覆盖四种大型哺乳动物。
limitations: 可能依赖单目深度估计的精度。
物种无关性可能受限于开放词汇分割的泛化能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: WildLIFT 将单目无人机视频提升为 3D 场景，实现物种无关的野生动物监测。

papers.title: Learning to Rotate: Temporal and Semantic Rotary Encoding for Sequential Modeling
papers.abstract: Every Transformer architecture dedicates enormous capacity to learning rich representations in semantic embedding space -- yet the rotation manifold acted upon by Rotary Positional Embeddings (RoPE) has been treated as a fixed, hand-crafted structure, populated only by discrete ordinal indices. We argue that this rotation space is a largely overlooked second dimension of expressivity in the attention mechanism, one whose systematic exploration may open a new door for attention-based architectures. The analogy to complex numbers is instructive: just as introducing the imaginary axis -- orthogonal to and independent of the real line -- unlocked new algebraic structure once believed impossible, treating the rotation manifold as a learnable, signal-conditioned space opens an orthogonal degree of freedom in attention. In this framing, the token embedding encodes the semantic (real) component of a representation -- what a token means -- while the rotation encodes its dynamic (imaginary) component -- how it relates to every other token across time, position, and context. We introduce SIREN-RoPE, a concrete instantiation of this idea, which populates the rotation dimension with heterogeneous signals -- continuous timestamps, cyclical temporal patterns, and categorical metadata -- via a dual-branch Sinusoidal Representation Network (SIREN). As a proof of concept, we evaluate on a production-scale news feed dataset from a major social network using a generative recommender as the ranking model, demonstrating that activating this hidden dimension yields consistent improvements across calibration and ranking objectives with negligible computational overhead. We invite the community to view the rotation space not as a solved positional-encoding detail, but as an untapped axis whose rich structure may prove as consequential for attention as the imaginary unit proved for algebra.

analysis.tldr: 提出SIREN-RoPE，将旋转位置编码的旋转空间从固定结构变为可学习的信号条件空间，提升注意力机制的表达能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有Transformer架构中，旋转位置编码（RoPE）的旋转空间被视为固定的手工结构，仅填充离散序数索引，忽略了其作为注意力机制中第二维表达能力的潜力。
analysis.problem: 如何将旋转空间从固定结构变为可学习的、信号条件化的空间，以编码时间、位置和上下文等动态信息。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 旋转空间是注意力机制中一个被忽视的表达维度，类似于复数中引入虚轴带来的代数结构突破。
analysis.method: 提出SIREN-RoPE，通过双分支正弦表示网络（SIREN）将连续时间戳、周期时间模式和分类元数据等异构信号填充到旋转维度中。
contributions: 提出将旋转空间视为可学习的信号条件空间，为注意力机制增加正交自由度。
设计SIREN-RoPE具体实现，利用SIREN编码异构时序和语义信号。
analysis.experiments: 在来自主要社交网络的生产级新闻推送数据集上，使用生成式推荐器作为排序模型进行评估，显示在校准和排序目标上有一致改进，且计算开销可忽略。
limitations: 仅在新闻推送推荐场景验证，泛化性待检验。
SIREN-RoPE的设计可能对特定信号类型敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SIREN-RoPE，将旋转位置编码的旋转空间从固定结构变为可学习的信号条件空间，提升注意力机制的表达能力。

papers.title: Case-Specific Rubrics for Clinical AI Evaluation: Methodology, Validation, and LLM-Clinician Agreement Across 823 Encounters
papers.abstract: Objective. Clinical AI documentation systems require evaluation methodologies that are clinically valid, economically viable, and sensitive to iterative changes. Methods requiring expert review per scoring instance are too slow and expensive for safe, iterative deployment. We present a case-specific, clinician-authored rubric methodology for clinical AI evaluation and examine whether LLM-generated rubrics can approximate clinician agreement. Materials and Methods. Twenty clinicians authored 1,646 rubrics for 823 clinical cases (736 real-world, 87 synthetic) across primary care, psychiatry, oncology, and behavioral health. Each rubric was validated by confirming that an LLM-based scoring agent consistently scored clinician-preferred outputs higher than rejected ones. Seven versions of an EHR-embedded AI agent for clinicians were evaluated across all cases. Results. Clinician-authored rubrics discriminated effectively between high- and low-quality outputs (median score gap: 82.9%) with high scoring stability (median range: 0.00%). Median scores improved from 84% to 95%. In later experiments, clinician-LLM ranking agreement (tau: 0.42-0.46) matched or exceeded clinician-clinician agreement (tau: 0.38-0.43), attributable to both ceiling compression and LLM rubric improvement. Discussion. This convergence supports incorporating LLM rubrics alongside clinician-authored ones. At roughly 1,000 times lower cost, LLM rubrics enable substantially greater evaluation coverage, while continued clinical authorship grounds evaluation in expert judgment. Ceiling compression poses a methodological challenge for future inter-rater agreement studies. Conclusion. Case-specific rubrics offer a path for clinical AI evaluation that preserves expert judgment while enabling automation at three orders lower cost. Clinician-authored rubrics establish the baseline against which LLM rubrics are validated.

analysis.tldr: 提出病例特异性评分标准用于临床AI评估，验证了LLM生成标准与临床医生的一致性，成本降低三个数量级。
analysis.research_motivation: 临床AI文档系统需要临床有效、经济可行且对迭代变化敏感的评估方法，但现有依赖专家逐例审查的方法速度慢、成本高，无法支持安全迭代部署。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种既保留专家判断又支持自动化、低成本的临床AI评估方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 由临床医生为每个病例撰写特异性评分标准，通过LLM评分代理验证标准有效性；随后比较LLM生成标准与临床医生标准在排序一致性上的差异。
contributions: 提出病例特异性评分标准方法论，并验证其区分高质量与低质量输出的有效性（中位分数差距82.9%，评分稳定性中位范围0.00%）。
发现LLM生成标准与临床医生的排序一致性（tau: 0.42-0.46）达到或超过临床医生之间的一致性（tau: 0.38-0.43），且成本降低约1000倍。
analysis.experiments: 20名临床医生为823个临床病例（736个真实，87个合成）撰写了1,646个评分标准，评估了7个版本的EHR嵌入式AI代理。
limitations: 天花板压缩效应可能影响评分者间一致性研究的有效性。
LLM生成标准仍需临床医生标准作为基线验证，完全自动化可能仍有风险。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出病例特异性评分标准用于临床AI评估，验证了LLM生成标准与临床医生的一致性，成本降低三个数量级。

papers.title: Scalable Hyperparameter-Divergent Ensemble Training with Automatic Learning Rate Exploration for Large Models
papers.abstract: Training large neural networks with data-parallel stochastic gradient descent allocates N GPU replicas to compute effectively identical updates -- a practice that leaves the rich space of learning rate configurations entirely unexplored during training. We propose Hyperparameter-Divergent Ensemble Training (HDET), a method that repurposes these replicas for simultaneous learning rate exploration at negligible communication overhead. HDET operates in alternating phases: a fan-out stage in which replicas train independently under a structured, symmetric spread of learning rates, and a converge stage in which parameters are averaged across all replicas via AllReduce every T steps. Building on this ensemble substrate, we further propose an automatic learning rate (auto-LR) controller that treats the relative training loss across replicas as a performance signal, updating the shared base schedule toward higher-performing configurations via a momentum-based gradient-free meta-update. The combined method produces a self-adapting learning rate schedule that improves both optimization quality and generalization without additional hyperparameter sweeps or training budget. Crucially, the framework generalizes beyond learning rate: any scalar hyperparameter that does not alter model architecture -- such as dropout rate, attention scale temperature, or weight-decay coefficient -- can be explored across replicas using the same fan-out/converge protocol, with inter-replica loss differences serving as zero-order hypergradients that guide the search direction. HDET is implemented as a drop-in replacement for PyTorch's OneCycleLR scheduler, requiring no changes to model architecture, optimizer, or data pipeline.

analysis.tldr: 提出HDET方法，利用数据并行训练中的GPU副本进行学习率探索，实现自动调参且无额外开销。
analysis.research_motivation: 数据并行SGD训练中，所有GPU副本使用相同学习率，浪费了探索超参数空间的机会。
analysis.problem: 如何在不增加训练预算和通信开销的前提下，利用现有并行副本自动探索并调整学习率等超参数。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: HDET交替进行扇出阶段（副本用不同学习率独立训练）和收敛阶段（AllReduce平均参数），并引入自动学习率控制器，基于副本间损失差异进行动量式无梯度元更新。
contributions: 提出HDET框架，将数据并行副本用于超参数探索，通信开销可忽略。
设计自动学习率控制器，无需额外调参即可自适应调整学习率。
框架可推广至其他标量超参数（如dropout率、温度系数、权重衰减）。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于可平均参数的模型架构。
自动控制器依赖副本间损失差异，可能受噪声影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出HDET方法，利用数据并行训练中的GPU副本进行学习率探索，实现自动调参且无额外开销。

papers.title: Defective Task Descriptions in LLM-Based Code Generation: Detection and Analysis
papers.abstract: Large language models are widely used for code generation, yet they rely on an implicit assumption that the task descriptions are sufficiently detailed and well-formed. However, in practice, users may provide defective descriptions, which can have a strong effect on code correctness. To address this issue, we develop SpecValidator, a lightweight classifier based on a small model that has been parameter-efficiently finetuned, to automatically detect task description defects. We evaluate SpecValidator on three types of defects, Lexical Vagueness, Under-Specification and Syntax-Formatting on 3 benchmarks with task descriptions of varying structure and complexity. Our results show that SpecValidator achieves defect detection of F1 = 0.804 and MCC = 0.745, significantly outperforming GPT-5-mini (F1 = 0.469 and MCC = 0.281) and Claude Sonnet 4 (F1 = 0.518 and MCC = 0.359). Perhaps more importantly, our analysis indicates that SpecValidator can generalize to unseen issues and detect unknown Under-Specification defects in the original (real) descriptions of the benchmarks used. Our results also show that the robustness of LLMs in task description defects depends primarily on the type of defect and the characteristics of the task description, rather than the capacity of the model, with Under-Specification defects being the most severe. We further found that benchmarks with richer contextual grounding, such as LiveCodeBench, exhibit substantially greater resilience, highlighting the importance of structured task descriptions for reliable LLM-based code generation.

analysis.tldr: 提出SpecValidator检测LLM代码生成中的任务描述缺陷，发现欠规格缺陷最严重，且上下文丰富的基准更具鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在代码生成中依赖详细且格式良好的任务描述，但用户常提供有缺陷的描述，严重影响代码正确性，现有方法缺乏自动检测手段。
analysis.problem: 如何自动检测LLM代码生成任务中任务描述的缺陷（词汇模糊、欠规格、语法格式问题）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 欠规格缺陷对代码正确性影响最大；LLM对缺陷的鲁棒性主要取决于缺陷类型和任务描述特征，而非模型容量；上下文丰富的基准（如LiveCodeBench）更具韧性。
analysis.method: 基于小型模型参数高效微调的轻量级分类器SpecValidator，检测三类任务描述缺陷。
contributions: 提出SpecValidator，一种轻量级任务描述缺陷检测方法，在三个基准上显著优于GPT-5-mini和Claude Sonnet 4。
系统分析缺陷类型对LLM代码生成的影响，揭示欠规格缺陷最严重，并发现上下文丰富的基准更具鲁棒性。
analysis.experiments: 在三个不同结构和复杂度的基准上评估，检测三类缺陷，SpecValidator达到F1=0.804、MCC=0.745，优于GPT-5-mini（F1=0.469）和Claude Sonnet 4（F1=0.518）。
limitations: 仅针对三类缺陷，可能无法覆盖所有任务描述问题。
未探讨缺陷检测后如何自动修复或改进任务描述。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SpecValidator检测LLM代码生成中的任务描述缺陷，发现欠规格缺陷最严重，且上下文丰富的基准更具鲁棒性。

papers.title: Green Shielding: A User-Centric Approach Towards Trustworthy AI
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed, yet their outputs can be highly sensitive to routine, non-adversarial variation in how users phrase queries, a gap not well addressed by existing red-teaming efforts. We propose Green Shielding, a user-centric agenda for building evidence-backed deployment guidance by characterizing how benign input variation shifts model behavior. We operationalize this agenda through the CUE criteria: benchmarks with authentic Context, reference standards and metrics that capture true Utility, and perturbations that reflect realistic variations in the Elicitation of model behavior. Guided by the PCS framework and developed with practicing physicians, we instantiate Green Shielding in medical diagnosis through HealthCareMagic-Diagnosis (HCM-Dx), a benchmark of patient-authored queries, together with structured reference diagnosis sets and clinically grounded metrics for evaluating differential diagnosis lists. We also study perturbation regimes that capture routine input variation and show that prompt-level factors shift model behavior along clinically meaningful dimensions. Across multiple frontier LLMs, these shifts trace out Pareto-like tradeoffs. In particular, neutralization, which removes common user-level factors while preserving clinical content, increases plausibility and yields more concise, clinician-like differentials, but reduces coverage of highly likely and safety-critical conditions. Together, these results show that interaction choices can systematically shift task-relevant properties of model outputs and support user-facing guidance for safer deployment in high-stakes domains. Although instantiated here in medical diagnosis, the agenda extends naturally to other decision-support settings and agentic AI systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出Green Shielding框架，通过CUE准则和PCS框架系统研究用户输入变化对LLM行为的影响，并在医疗诊断中验证。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有红队测试主要关注对抗性攻击，但忽略了日常非对抗性输入变化对LLM输出的显著影响，缺乏系统性的部署指导。
analysis.problem: 如何系统地表征和量化良性输入变化对LLM行为的影响，并为高风险领域（如医疗诊断）提供基于证据的部署指导。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到，提示层面的因素（如中性化处理）会沿临床有意义的维度改变模型行为，产生类似帕累托的权衡：中性化增加合理性和简洁性，但降低高可能性和安全关键条件的覆盖率。
analysis.method: 提出Green Shielding议程，包含CUE准则（真实上下文、真实效用的参考标准和指标、反映真实变化的扰动）和PCS框架；在医疗诊断中实例化为HCM-Dx基准，包含患者撰写的查询、结构化参考诊断集和临床指标。
contributions: 提出Green Shielding用户中心议程，用于构建基于证据的LLM部署指导。
定义CUE准则和PCS框架，系统评估输入变化对模型行为的影响。
构建医疗诊断基准HCM-Dx，包含患者撰写的查询和临床指标。
通过实验揭示提示因素与模型行为之间的帕累托权衡，支持用户端安全部署指导。
analysis.experiments: 摘要提到在多个前沿LLM上进行了实验，观察了提示因素（如中性化）对模型输出的影响，并展示了帕累托权衡。但未提供具体数值或对比结果。
limitations: 仅以医疗诊断为实例，其他领域的泛化性有待验证。
未详细说明PCS框架的具体实现细节。
实验仅涉及提示级因素，未考虑其他类型的输入变化。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Green Shielding框架，通过CUE准则和PCS框架系统研究用户输入变化对LLM行为的影响，并在医疗诊断中验证。

papers.title: Can Current Agents Close the Discovery-to-Application Gap? A Case Study in Minecraft
papers.abstract: Discovering causal regularities and applying them to build functional systems--the discovery-to-application loop--is a hallmark of general intelligence, yet evaluating this capacity has been hindered by the vast complexity gap between scientific discovery and real-world engineering. We introduce SciCrafter, a Minecraft-based benchmark that operationalizes this loop through parameterized redstone circuit tasks. Agents must ignite lamps in specified patterns (e.g., simultaneously or in timed sequences); scaling target parameters substantially increases construction complexity and required knowledge, forcing genuine discovery rather than reliance on memorized solutions. Evaluating frontier models including GPT-5.2, Gemini-3-Pro, and Claude-Opus-4.5 under a general-purpose code agent scaffold, we find that all plateau at approximately 26% success rate. To diagnose these failures, we decompose the loop into four capacities--knowledge gap identification, experimental discovery, knowledge consolidation, and knowledge application--and design targeted interventions whose marginal contributions serve as proxies for corresponding gaps. Our analysis reveals that although the general knowledge application capability still remains as the biggest gap across all models, for frontier models the knowledge gap identification starts to become a major hurdle--indicating the bottleneck is shifting from solving problems right to raising the right problems for current AI. We release SciCrafter as a diagnostic probe for future research on AI systems that navigate the full discovery-to-application loop.

analysis.tldr: 当前AI智能体在Minecraft红石电路任务中仅达26%成功率，瓶颈正从解决问题转向提出正确问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 评估AI从科学发现到实际应用的完整循环能力至关重要，但现有基准因复杂度差距难以衡量这一能力。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个可操作的基准来评估AI智能体在发现-应用循环中的表现，并诊断其失败原因。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 所有前沿模型在SciCrafter基准上成功率均停滞在约26%；通过分解能力发现，知识应用仍是最大缺口，但知识缺口识别正成为前沿模型的主要障碍。
analysis.method: 提出Minecraft红石电路基准SciCrafter，通过参数化任务控制复杂度；将发现-应用循环分解为四个能力并设计针对性干预，以边际贡献作为能力缺口代理。
contributions: 提出SciCrafter基准，用于评估AI智能体在发现-应用循环中的表现
通过能力分解和干预实验，揭示当前模型瓶颈从解决问题转向提出正确问题
analysis.experiments: 在GPT-5.2、Gemini-3-Pro、Claude-Opus-4.5等前沿模型上评估，所有模型成功率约26%。
limitations: 基准仅基于Minecraft单一环境，泛化性有限
能力分解和干预的代理度量可能不完全准确
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 当前AI智能体在Minecraft红石电路任务中仅达26%成功率，瓶颈正从解决问题转向提出正确问题。

papers.title: NeuroClaw Technical Report
papers.abstract: Agentic artificial intelligence systems promise to accelerate scientific workflows, but neuroimaging poses unique challenges: heterogeneous modalities (sMRI, fMRI, dMRI, EEG), long multi-stage pipelines, and persistent reproducibility risks. To address this gap, we present NeuroClaw, a domain-specialized multi-agent research assistant for executable and reproducible neuroimaging research. NeuroClaw operates directly on raw neuroimaging data across formats and modalities, grounding decisions in dataset semantics and BIDS metadata so users need not prepare curated inputs or bespoke model code. The platform combines harness engineering with end-to-end environment management, including pinned Python environments, Docker support, automated installers for common neuroimaging tools, and GPU configuration. In practice, this layer emphasizes checkpointing, post-execution verification, structured audit traces, and controlled runtime setup, making toolchains more transparent while improving reproducibility and auditability. A three-tier skill/agent hierarchy separates user-facing interaction, high-level orchestration, and low-level tool skills to decompose complex workflows into safe, reusable units. Alongside the NeuroClaw framework, we introduce NeuroBench, a system-level benchmark for executability, artifact validity, and reproducibility readiness. Across multiple multimodal LLMs, NeuroClaw-enabled runs yield consistent and substantial score improvements compared with direct agent invocation. Project homepage: https://cuhk-aim-group.github.io/NeuroClaw/index.html

analysis.tldr: NeuroClaw是一个面向神经影像学的多智能体研究助手，通过分层架构和端到端环境管理提升可执行性和可复现性。
analysis.research_motivation: 神经影像学分析涉及多种模态和长流程管道，现有AI系统难以处理异构数据格式和可复现性风险，亟需领域特化的自动化工具。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个能直接操作原始神经影像数据、支持多模态格式、并保证分析流程可执行和可复现的多智能体系统。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出NeuroClaw框架，包含三层技能/智能体层次结构（用户交互、高层编排、底层工具技能），结合端到端环境管理（固定Python环境、Docker、自动安装器、GPU配置）和检查点、验证、审计追踪等工程化手段。同时引入NeuroBench基准。
contributions: 提出NeuroClaw，一个面向神经影像学的多智能体研究助手，支持多种模态和格式的原始数据直接处理。
引入NeuroBench，一个系统级基准，用于评估可执行性、工件有效性和可复现性。
analysis.experiments: 在多个多模态大语言模型上，NeuroClaw相比直接智能体调用获得一致且显著的分数提升。
limitations: 可能依赖特定神经影像工具链的安装和配置。
基准测试可能未覆盖所有神经影像子领域。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: NeuroClaw是一个面向神经影像学的多智能体研究助手，通过分层架构和端到端环境管理提升可执行性和可复现性。

papers.title: Governing What You Cannot Observe: Adaptive Runtime Governance for Autonomous AI Agents
papers.abstract: Autonomous AI agents can remain fully authorized and still become unsafe as behavior drifts, adversaries adapt, and decision patterns shift without any code change. We propose the \textbf{Informational Viability Principle}: governing an agent reduces to estimating a bound on unobserved risk $\hat{B}(x) = U(x) + SB(x) + RG(x)$ and allowing an action only when its capacity $S(x)$ exceeds $\hat{B}(x)$ by a safety margin. The \textbf{Agent Viability Framework}, grounded in Aubin's viability theory, establishes three properties -- monitoring (P1), anticipation (P2), and monotonic restriction (P3) -- as individually necessary and collectively sufficient for documented failure modes. \textbf{RiskGate} instantiates the framework with dedicated statistical estimators (KL divergence, segment-vs-rest $z$-tests, sequential pattern matching), a fail-secure monotonic pipeline, and a closed-loop Autopilot formalised as an instance of Aubin's regulation map with kill-switch-as-last-resort; a scalar Viability Index $VI(t) \in [-1,+1]$ with first-order $t^*$ prediction transforms governance from reactive to predictive. Contributions are the theoretical framework, the reference implementation, and analytical coverage against published agent-failure taxonomies; quantitative empirical evaluation is scoped as follow-up work.

analysis.tldr: 提出信息可行性原则和Agent可行性框架，将自主AI Agent治理从被动响应转变为主动预测。
analysis.research_motivation: 自主AI Agent即使保持完全授权，也可能因行为漂移、对手适应和决策模式变化而变得不安全，现有治理方法缺乏理论保障和预测能力。
analysis.problem: 如何对自主AI Agent进行自适应运行时治理，使其在行为漂移和对抗适应下仍能保持安全。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出信息可行性原则（Informational Viability Principle）和Agent可行性框架（Agent Viability Framework），基于Aubin的生存理论，建立监控(P1)、预测(P2)和单调限制(P3)三个性质，并实例化为RiskGate系统，包含统计估计器、故障安全单调管道和闭环自动驾驶仪。
contributions: 提出信息可行性原则和Agent可行性框架，为自主Agent治理提供理论基础。
实现RiskGate参考系统，包含统计估计器和预测性治理机制。
对已发布的Agent故障分类法进行理论覆盖分析。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，定量实证评估被列为后续工作。
limitations: 缺乏定量实证评估，有效性尚未通过实验验证。
框架的通用性和可扩展性有待进一步检验。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出信息可行性原则和Agent可行性框架，将自主AI Agent治理从被动响应转变为主动预测。

papers.title: Aycromo: An Open-Source Platform for Automatic Chromosome Detection in Metaphase Images Based on Deep Learning
papers.abstract: Chromosome analysis is a fundamental step in the diagnosis of genetic diseases, but the manual karyotyping workflow is time-consuming and heavily dependent on expert specialists, often requiring several days per patient. Although Deep Learning models have achieved high performance in chromosome detection, most proposed solutions remain restricted to research prototypes or lack graphical interfaces suitable for clinical use. In this work, we present Aycromo, an open-source desktop platform for AI-assisted cytogenetic analysis. Built on Electron and ONNX Runtime, the tool allows cytogeneticists to load pre-trained models, compare architectures through an integrated benchmarking module, and manually correct detections via an interactive annotation interface, all without command-line interaction. Preliminary experiments on metaphase images from the CRCN-NE dataset demonstrate that YOLOv11 achieves 99.40% mAP@50, while the platform reduces per-slide analysis to seconds

analysis.tldr: Aycromo是一个基于深度学习的开源桌面平台，用于中期图像中染色体自动检测，支持模型加载、对比和手动校正。
analysis.research_motivation: 染色体分析是遗传病诊断的关键步骤，但手动核型分析耗时且依赖专家，现有深度学习方案多为研究原型，缺乏适合临床使用的图形界面。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个开源、易用、支持模型对比和手动校正的染色体自动检测平台，以加速临床细胞遗传学分析。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于Electron和ONNX Runtime构建桌面平台，集成预训练模型加载、架构对比基准测试模块和交互式注释界面，后端使用YOLOv11等深度学习模型进行染色体检测。
contributions: 提出了Aycromo，一个开源、跨平台的染色体检测桌面工具，无需命令行操作。
集成了模型比较和手动校正功能，便于临床使用。
analysis.experiments: 在CRCN-NE数据集的中期图像上，YOLOv11达到99.40% mAP@50，平台将每张切片分析时间缩短至秒级。
limitations: 仅基于单一数据集验证，泛化性需进一步测试。
平台功能可能局限于染色体检测，未涉及完整核型分析流程。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Aycromo是一个基于深度学习的开源桌面平台，用于中期图像中染色体自动检测，支持模型加载、对比和手动校正。

papers.title: Benchmarking Pathology Foundation Models for Breast Cancer Survival Prediction
