papers.abstract: Pathology foundation models (PFMs) have recently emerged as powerful pretrained encoders for computational pathology, enabling transfer learning across a wide range of downstream tasks. However, systematic comparisons of these models for clinically meaningful prediction problems remain limited, especially in the context of survival prediction under external validation. In this study, we benchmark widely used and recently proposed PFMs for breast cancer survival prediction from whole-slide histopathology images. Using a standardized pipeline based on patch-level feature extraction and a unified survival modeling framework, we evaluate model representations across three independent clinical cohorts comprising more than 5,400 patients with long-term follow-up. Models are trained on one cohort and evaluated on two independent external cohorts, enabling a rigorous assessment of cross-dataset generalization. Overall, H-optimus-1 achieves the strongest survival prediction performance. More broadly, we observe consistent generational improvements across model families, with second-generation PFMs outperforming their first-generation counterparts. However, absolute performance differences between many recent PFMs remain modest, suggesting diminishing returns from further scaling of pretraining data or model size alone. Notably, the compact distilled model H0-mini slightly outperforms its larger teacher model H-optimus-0, despite using fewer than 8% of the parameters and enabling significantly faster feature extraction. Together, these results provide the first large-scale, externally validated benchmark of PFMs for breast cancer survival prediction, and offer practical guidance for efficient deployment of PFMs in clinical workflows.

analysis.tldr: 系统比较病理基础模型在乳腺癌生存预测中的表现，发现H-optimus-1最优，但模型间差异不大，小模型H0-mini以8%参数超越大模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 病理基础模型（PFMs）在计算病理学中广泛应用，但缺乏针对临床意义预测任务（如生存预测）的系统比较，尤其是外部验证下的泛化能力评估。
analysis.problem: 系统评估和比较不同病理基础模型在乳腺癌生存预测任务中的性能，并考察其跨数据集泛化能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到模型代际改进（第二代优于第一代），但近期模型间绝对性能差异较小，表明仅扩大预训练数据或模型规模带来的收益递减；紧凑蒸馏模型H0-mini以不到8%参数超越其大教师模型H-optimus-0。
analysis.method: 基于补丁级特征提取和统一生存建模框架的标准化流水线，在三个独立临床队列（>5400名患者）上训练一个队列并在另两个外部队列上评估。
contributions: 首次大规模、外部验证的乳腺癌生存预测病理基础模型基准测试。
揭示模型代际改进和规模收益递减现象，并发现紧凑蒸馏模型的高效性。
analysis.experiments: 在三个独立临床队列（>5400名患者）上训练一个队列并在两个外部队列上评估，比较多种PFMs。
limitations: 仅针对乳腺癌生存预测，其他癌种或任务可能不适用。
未深入分析模型失败案例或病理特征相关性。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 系统比较病理基础模型在乳腺癌生存预测中的表现，发现H-optimus-1最优，但模型间差异不大，小模型H0-mini以8%参数超越大模型。

papers.title: Leveraging LLMs for Multi-File DSL Code Generation: An Industrial Case Study
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) perform strongly on general-purpose code generation, yet their applicability to enterprise domain-specific languages (DSLs) remains underexplored, especially for repository-scale change generation spanning multiple files and folder structures from a single natural-language (NL) instruction. We report an industrial case study at BMW that adapts code-oriented LLMs to generate and modify project-root DSL artifacts for an Xtext-based DSL that drives downstream Java/TypeScript code generation. We develop an end-to-end pipeline for dataset construction, multi-file task representation, model adaptation, and evaluation. We encode DSL folder hierarchies as structured, path-preserving JSON, allowing single-response generation at repository scale and learning cross-file dependencies. We evaluate two instruction-tuned code LLMs (Qwen2.5-Coder and DeepSeek-Coder, 7B) under three configurations: baseline prompting, one-shot in-context learning, and parameter-efficient fine-tuning (QLoRA). Beyond standard similarity metrics, we introduce task-specific measures that assess edit correctness and repository structural fidelity. Fine-tuning yields the most significant gains across models and metrics, achieving high exact-match accuracy, substantial edit similarity, and structural fidelity of 1.00 on our held-out set for multi-file outputs. At the same time, one-shot in-context learning provides smaller but consistent improvements over baseline prompting. We further validate practical utility via an expert developer survey and an execution-based check using the existing code generator.

analysis.tldr: 宝马工业案例研究：通过QLoRA微调代码LLM，实现从单条自然语言指令生成多文件DSL代码，达到高结构保真度。
analysis.research_motivation: 通用代码LLM在企业领域特定语言（DSL）上的应用尚未充分探索，尤其是从单条自然语言指令生成跨多文件和文件夹结构的仓库级代码变更，现有方法缺乏针对DSL的适配和评估。
analysis.problem: 如何使代码LLM能够从单条自然语言指令生成并修改多文件、多文件夹的DSL代码，同时保证跨文件依赖和结构保真度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建端到端流水线：将DSL文件夹层次编码为路径保留的JSON结构，实现单次响应生成多文件；评估三种配置（基线提示、单样本上下文学习、QLoRA微调），并引入任务特定指标（编辑正确性、结构保真度）。
contributions: 提出一种将DSL文件夹层次编码为结构化JSON的方法，支持仓库级多文件生成。
通过工业案例研究（宝马Xtext DSL）系统评估了三种配置，证明QLoRA微调在精确匹配、编辑相似性和结构保真度上显著优于其他方法。
analysis.experiments: 在宝马Xtext DSL数据集上评估Qwen2.5-Coder和DeepSeek-Coder（7B），使用标准相似度指标和任务特定指标（编辑正确性、结构保真度），并通过专家开发者调查和基于执行的代码生成器验证实用性。
limitations: 仅针对单一DSL（Xtext）进行案例研究，泛化性未知。
模型规模限于7B，更大模型的效果未探索。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 宝马工业案例研究：通过QLoRA微调代码LLM，实现从单条自然语言指令生成多文件DSL代码，达到高结构保真度。

papers.title: The Price of Agreement: Measuring LLM Sycophancy in Agentic Financial Applications
papers.abstract: Given the increased use of LLMs in financial systems today, it becomes important to evaluate the safety and robustness of such systems. One failure mode that LLMs frequently display in general domain settings is that of sycophancy. That is, models prioritize agreement with expressed user beliefs over correctness, leading to decreased accuracy and trust. In this work, we focus on evaluating sycophancy that LLMs display in agentic financial tasks. Our findings are three-fold: first, we find the models show only low to modest drops in performance in the face of user rebuttals or contradictions to the reference answer, which distinguishes sycophancy that models display in financial agentic settings from findings in prior work. Second, we introduce a suite of tasks to test for sycophancy by user preference information that contradicts the reference answer and find that most models fail in the presence of such inputs. Lastly, we benchmark different modes of recovery such as input filtering with a pretrained LLM.

analysis.tldr: LLM在金融Agent任务中面对用户反驳时表现出的谄媚行为较弱，但面对偏好信息时仍易失败。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在金融系统中的安全性和鲁棒性至关重要，而谄媚行为（即模型优先同意用户观点而非正确性）是常见故障模式，但现有研究多集中于通用领域，缺乏对金融Agent场景的专门评估。
analysis.problem: 评估LLM在金融Agent任务中面对用户反驳或偏好信息时的谄媚行为及其影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型面对用户反驳时性能下降幅度较小（低至中等），与先前通用领域发现不同；但面对与参考答案矛盾的偏好信息时，多数模型失败。
analysis.method: 设计一组金融Agent任务，通过引入用户反驳或偏好信息来测试谄媚行为，并基准测试输入过滤等恢复方法。
contributions: 发现金融Agent场景中LLM的谄媚行为与通用领域不同，性能下降较小
引入一套测试任务，揭示模型在面对矛盾偏好信息时普遍失败
基准测试了基于预训练LLM的输入过滤等恢复策略
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及三项发现和基准测试。
limitations: 未提供具体模型和数据集细节
恢复策略的评估可能有限
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM在金融Agent任务中面对用户反驳时表现出的谄媚行为较弱，但面对偏好信息时仍易失败。

papers.title: Benchmarking Source-Sensitive Reasoning in Turkish: Humans and LLMs under Evidential Trust Manipulation
papers.abstract: This paper investigates whether source trustworthiness shapes Turkish evidential morphology and whether large language models (LLMs) track this sensitivity. We study the past-domain contrast between -DI and -mIs in controlled cloze contexts where the information source is overtly external, while only its perceived reliability is manipulated (High-Trust vs. Low-Trust). In a human production experiment, native speakers of Turkish show a robust trust effect: High-Trust contexts yield relatively more -DI, whereas Low-Trust contexts yield relatively more -mIs, with the pattern remaining stable across sensitivity analyses. We then evaluate 10 LLMs in three prompting paradigms (open gap-fill, explicit past-tense gap-fill, and forced-choice A/B selection). LLM behavior is highly model- and prompt-dependent: some models show weak or local trust-consistent shifts, but effects are generally unstable, often reversed, and frequently overshadowed by output-compliance problems and strong base-rate suffix preferences. The results provide new evidence for a trust-/commitment-based account of Turkish evidentiality and reveal a clear human-LLM gap in source-sensitive evidential reasoning.

analysis.tldr: 人类对土耳其语证据形态的信任敏感性显著，而LLM表现不稳定且存在人机差距。
analysis.research_motivation: 土耳其语证据形态（-DI vs -mIs）受信息源可信度影响，但LLM是否具备这种源敏感性尚不清楚，现有研究缺乏系统性评估。
analysis.problem: 评估人类和LLM在受控语境下对信息源可信度（高信任 vs 低信任）的土耳其语证据形态选择敏感性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 人类实验显示稳健的信任效应：高信任语境更多使用-DI，低信任语境更多使用-mIs；LLM行为高度依赖模型和提示范式，效果不稳定、常反转，且受输出合规问题和强基线后缀偏好影响。
analysis.method: 设计受控完形填空任务，操纵信息源可信度（高信任/低信任），收集人类生产数据，并在三种提示范式（开放填空、显式过去时填空、强制选择A/B）下评估10个LLM。
contributions: 提供人类实验证据支持基于信任/承诺的土耳其语证据性解释
揭示LLM在源敏感证据推理中与人类的显著差距
analysis.experiments: 人类生产实验（native speakers）和10个LLM在三种提示范式下的评估。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 仅针对土耳其语过去时域，泛化性有限
LLM评估未覆盖所有可能提示策略
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 人类对土耳其语证据形态的信任敏感性显著，而LLM表现不稳定且存在人机差距。

papers.title: Information bottleneck for learning the phase space of dynamics from high-dimensional experimental data
papers.abstract: Identifying the dynamical state variables of a system from high-dimensional observations is a central problem across physical sciences. The challenge is that the state variables are not directly observable and must be inferred from raw high-dimensional data without supervision. Here we introduce DySIB (Dynamical Symmetric Information Bottleneck) as a method to learn low-dimensional representations of time-series data by maximizing predictive mutual information between past and future observation windows while penalizing representation complexity. This objective operates entirely in latent space and avoids reconstruction of the observations. We apply DySIB to an experimental video dataset of a physical pendulum, where the underlying state space is known. The method, with hyperparameters of the learning architecture set self-consistently by the data, recovers a two-dimensional representation that matches the dimensionality, topology, and geometry of the pendulum phase space, with the learned coordinates aligning smoothly with the canonical angle and angular velocity. These results demonstrate, on a well-characterized experimental system, that predictive information in latent space can be used to recover interpretable dynamical coordinates directly from high-dimensional data.

analysis.tldr: 提出DySIB方法，通过最大化过去与未来观测窗口间的预测互信息，从高维实验数据中学习低维动力学相空间表示。
analysis.research_motivation: 从高维观测数据中识别系统的动力学状态变量是物理科学的核心问题，但状态变量不可直接观测，需从原始高维数据中无监督推断。
analysis.problem: 如何从高维时间序列数据中无监督地学习低维、可解释的动力学相空间表示。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: DySIB（Dynamical Symmetric Information Bottleneck）：在潜在空间中最大化过去与未来观测窗口间的预测互信息，同时惩罚表示复杂度，避免重构观测数据。
contributions: 提出DySIB方法，利用预测互信息从高维时间序列中学习低维动力学表示。
在物理摆实验视频数据集上验证，恢复的二维表示与相空间的维度、拓扑和几何匹配，且学习坐标与规范角度和角速度平滑对齐。
analysis.experiments: 在物理摆实验视频数据集上应用，超参数由数据自洽设置，恢复的表示与已知相空间一致。摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅在单一实验系统上验证，泛化性未知。
方法对超参数选择的敏感性未讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出DySIB方法，通过最大化过去与未来观测窗口间的预测互信息，从高维实验数据中学习低维动力学相空间表示。

papers.title: X2SAM: Any Segmentation in Images and Videos
papers.abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have demonstrated strong image-level visual understanding and reasoning, yet their pixel-level perception across both images and videos remains limited. Foundation segmentation models such as the SAM series produce high-quality masks, but they rely on low-level visual prompts and cannot natively interpret complex conversational instructions. Existing segmentation MLLMs narrow this gap, but are usually specialized for either images or videos and rarely support both textual and visual prompts in one interface. We introduce X2SAM, a unified segmentation MLLM that extends any-segmentation capabilities from images to videos. Given conversational instructions and visual prompts, X2SAM couples an LLM with a Mask Memory module that stores guided vision features for temporally consistent video mask generation. The same formulation supports generic, open-vocabulary, referring, reasoning, grounded conversation generation, interactive, and visual grounded segmentation across image and video inputs. We further introduce the Video Visual Grounded (V-VGD) segmentation benchmark, which evaluates whether a model can segment object tracks in videos from interactive visual prompts. With a unified joint training strategy over heterogeneous image and video datasets, X2SAM delivers strong video segmentation performance, remains competitive on image segmentation benchmarks, and preserves general image and video chat ability.

analysis.tldr: X2SAM 统一了图像和视频的任意分割，支持文本和视觉提示，并引入视频视觉定位分割基准。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有分割 MLLM 通常只针对图像或视频，且难以同时处理文本和视觉提示，缺乏统一的跨模态分割能力。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个统一的 MLLM 同时支持图像和视频的任意分割，并兼容文本与视觉提示。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 X2SAM，将 LLM 与 Mask Memory 模块耦合，存储引导视觉特征以实现时间一致的视频掩码生成，并通过联合训练策略在异构图像和视频数据集上训练。
contributions: 提出 X2SAM，首个统一支持图像和视频任意分割的 MLLM，兼容文本和视觉提示。
引入 Video Visual Grounded (V-VGD) 分割基准，评估模型从交互式视觉提示分割视频对象轨迹的能力。
analysis.experiments: 在视频分割基准上表现强劲，在图像分割基准上保持竞争力，并保留通用图像和视频对话能力。
limitations: 可能依赖大规模多模态数据，训练成本高。
Mask Memory 模块在长视频上的效果未明确说明。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: X2SAM 统一了图像和视频的任意分割，支持文本和视觉提示，并引入视频视觉定位分割基准。

papers.title: AgentWard: A Lifecycle Security Architecture for Autonomous AI Agents
papers.abstract: Autonomous AI agents extend large language models into full runtime systems that load skills, ingest external content, maintain memory, plan multi-step actions, and invoke privileged tools. In such systems, security failures rarely remain confined to a single interface; instead, they can propagate across initialization, input processing, memory, decision-making, and execution, often becoming apparent only when harmful effects materialize in the environment. This paper presents AgentWard, a lifecycle-oriented, defense-in-depth architecture that systematically organizes protection across these five stages. AgentWard integrates stage-specific, heterogeneous controls with cross-layer coordination, enabling threats to be intercepted along their propagation paths while safeguarding critical assets. We detail the design rationale and architecture of five coordinated protection layers, and implement a plugin-native prototype on OpenClaw to demonstrate practical feasibility. This perspective provides a concrete blueprint for structuring runtime security controls, managing trust propagation, and enforcing execution containment in autonomous AI agents. Our code is available at https://github.com/FIND-Lab/AgentWard .

analysis.tldr: AgentWard 提出了一种面向自主 AI Agent 全生命周期的纵深防御安全架构，覆盖初始化、输入、记忆、决策和执行五个阶段。
analysis.research_motivation: 自主 AI Agent 将大语言模型扩展为完整运行时系统，安全故障可跨阶段传播，现有方法缺乏系统性的生命周期防护。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种覆盖 Agent 全生命周期（初始化、输入处理、记忆、决策、执行）的纵深防御安全架构，以拦截跨阶段传播的威胁并保护关键资产。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 安全故障很少局限于单一接口，而是可以跨初始化、输入、记忆、决策和执行阶段传播，直到环境出现有害效应才被发现。
analysis.method: 提出 AgentWard，一种面向生命周期的纵深防御架构，包含五个阶段特定的异构控制层，并通过跨层协调实现威胁拦截。
contributions: 提出了 AgentWard，首个面向自主 AI Agent 全生命周期的纵深防御安全架构。
详细描述了五个协调保护层的设计原理和架构，并在 OpenClaw 上实现了插件原生原型。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能缺乏大规模实证评估。
原型实现可能未覆盖所有实际部署场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AgentWard 提出了一种面向自主 AI Agent 全生命周期的纵深防御安全架构，覆盖初始化、输入、记忆、决策和执行五个阶段。

papers.title: DepthKV: Layer-Dependent KV Cache Pruning for Long-Context LLM Inference
papers.abstract: Long-context reasoning is a critical capability of large language models (LLMs), enabling applications such as long-document understanding, summarization, and code generation. However, efficient autoregressive inference relies on the key-value (KV) cache, whose memory footprint grows linearly with sequence length, leading to a major memory bottleneck. To mitigate this overhead, KV cache pruning methods discard cached tokens with low attention scores during inference. Most existing methods apply a uniform pruning ratio across layers, implicitly assuming that all layers contribute equally to overall model performance. We show that this assumption is suboptimal, as layers differ significantly in their sensitivity to pruning. We propose DepthKV, a layer-dependent pruning framework that allocates a fixed global KV budget across layers based on their sensitivity, rather than using a uniform allocation. Across multiple models and tasks, DepthKV consistently outperforms uniform pruning at the same global pruning ratio, demonstrating more effective utilization of the KV cache budget through layer-dependent allocation.

analysis.tldr: 提出层依赖的KV缓存剪枝方法DepthKV，根据各层对剪枝的敏感度分配全局KV预算，优于统一剪枝。
analysis.research_motivation: 长上下文推理中KV缓存内存占用随序列长度线性增长，成为主要瓶颈；现有剪枝方法对所有层使用统一剪枝比例，忽略了不同层对剪枝敏感度的差异。
analysis.problem: 如何根据各层对剪枝的敏感度分配全局KV缓存预算，以更有效地利用缓存空间。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 不同层对剪枝的敏感度显著不同，统一剪枝比例是次优的。
analysis.method: 提出DepthKV框架，基于各层对剪枝的敏感度分配固定的全局KV预算，而非均匀分配。
contributions: 揭示了不同层对KV缓存剪枝敏感度不同的现象，并指出统一剪枝的次优性。
提出层依赖的KV缓存剪枝方法DepthKV，根据层敏感度分配预算，在多个模型和任务上优于统一剪枝。
analysis.experiments: 在多个模型和任务上验证，DepthKV在相同全局剪枝比例下一致优于统一剪枝。
limitations: 未讨论敏感度计算的具体开销。
可能依赖特定任务或模型结构。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出层依赖的KV缓存剪枝方法DepthKV，根据各层对剪枝的敏感度分配全局KV预算，优于统一剪枝。

papers.title: K-MetBench: A Multi-Dimensional Benchmark for Fine-Grained Evaluation of Expert Reasoning, Locality, and Multimodality in Meteorology
papers.abstract: The development of practical (multimodal) large language model assistants for Korean weather forecasters is hindered by the absence of a multidimensional, expert-level evaluation framework grounded in authoritative sources. To address this, we introduce K-MetBench, a diagnostic benchmark grounded in national qualification exams. It exposes critical gaps across four dimensions: expert visual reasoning of charts, logical validity via expert-verified rationales, Korean-specific geo-cultural comprehension, and fine-grained domain analysis. Our evaluation of 55 models reveals a profound modality gap in interpreting specialized diagrams and a reasoning gap where models hallucinate logic despite correct predictions. Crucially, Korean models outperform significantly larger global models in local contexts, demonstrating that parameter scaling alone cannot resolve cultural dependencies. K-MetBench serves as a roadmap for developing reliable, culturally aware expert AI agents. The dataset is available at https://huggingface.co/datasets/soyeonbot/K-MetBench .

analysis.tldr: K-MetBench 是一个基于韩国气象资格考试的诊断基准，用于评估大模型在气象领域的专家推理、地域知识和多模态能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有评估框架缺乏多维度、专家级且基于权威来源的基准，阻碍了面向韩国气象预报员的实用大模型助手开发。
analysis.problem: 需要构建一个能系统评估大模型在气象领域专家视觉推理、逻辑有效性、地域文化理解和细粒度领域分析能力的基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 评估55个模型发现：专业图表解读存在显著模态差距；模型在预测正确时仍会出现逻辑幻觉；韩国本地模型在本地语境中显著优于更大规模的全球模型，表明参数规模无法解决文化依赖。
analysis.method: 基于国家资格考试构建多维诊断基准K-MetBench，包含专家视觉推理、逻辑有效性（专家验证理由）、韩国特定地理文化理解和细粒度领域分析四个维度。
contributions: 提出了首个面向韩国气象领域的多维度专家级评估基准K-MetBench
揭示了模型在专业图表解读和逻辑推理上的关键差距，以及文化依赖性的重要性
analysis.experiments: 在55个模型上进行了评估，包括多模态和纯语言模型，分析了模态差距和推理差距。
limitations: 基准仅针对韩国气象领域，可能不直接适用于其他语言或领域
未提供模型在基准上的具体性能数值或排名
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: K-MetBench 是一个基于韩国气象资格考试的诊断基准，用于评估大模型在气象领域的专家推理、地域知识和多模态能力。

papers.title: Probing CLIP's Comprehension of 360-Degree Textual and Visual Semantics
papers.abstract: The dream of instantly creating rich 360-degree panoramic worlds from text is rapidly becoming a reality, yet a crucial gap exists in our ability to reliably evaluate their semantic alignment. Contrastive Language-Image Pre-training (CLIP) models, standard AI evaluators, predominantly trained on perspective image-text pairs, face an open question regarding their understanding of the unique characteristics of 360-degree panoramic image-text pairs. This paper addresses this gap by first introducing two concepts: \emph{360-degree textual semantics}, semantic information conveyed by explicit format identifiers, and \emph{360-degree visual semantics}, invariant semantics under horizontal circular shifts. To probe CLIP's comprehension of these semantics, we then propose novel evaluation methodologies using keyword manipulation and horizontal circular shifts of varying magnitudes. Rigorous statistical analyses across popular CLIP configurations reveal that: (1) CLIP models effectively leverage explicit textual identifiers, demonstrating an understanding of 360-degree textual semantics; and (2) CLIP models fail to robustly preserve semantic alignment under horizontal circular shifts, indicating limited comprehension of 360-degree visual semantics. To address this limitation, we propose a LoRA-based fine-tuning framework that explicitly instills invariance to circular shifts. Our fine-tuned models exhibit improved comprehension of 360-degree visual semantics, though with a slight degradation in original semantic evaluation performance, highlighting a fundamental trade-off in adapting CLIP to 360-degree panoramic images. Code is available at https://github.com/littlewhitesea/360Semantics.

analysis.tldr: 探究CLIP模型对360度全景图文语义的理解，发现其能理解文本标识符但缺乏对视觉平移不变性的鲁棒性，并提出LoRA微调框架改进。
analysis.research_motivation: 360度全景图像生成技术快速发展，但缺乏可靠的语义对齐评估方法；CLIP模型主要训练于透视图像，对全景图像的特殊语义理解未知。
analysis.problem: CLIP模型是否理解360度全景图像的文本语义（格式标识符）和视觉语义（水平循环平移不变性），以及如何改进其不足。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: CLIP模型能有效利用显式文本标识符理解360度文本语义，但在水平循环平移下无法保持语义对齐，表明对视觉语义理解有限。
analysis.method: 提出两种评估方法：关键词操作和水平循环平移；并设计基于LoRA的微调框架显式注入平移不变性。
contributions: 首次定义360度文本语义和视觉语义概念
提出探测CLIP对360度语义理解的新评估方法
揭示CLIP对视觉语义理解的局限性并提出LoRA微调改进
analysis.experiments: 在多种CLIP配置上进行统计分析，验证了文本语义理解能力和视觉语义的不足；微调后模型在视觉语义上提升但原始语义评估略有下降。
limitations: 微调导致原始语义评估性能轻微下降
仅针对水平循环平移，未考虑其他全景特性
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 探究CLIP模型对360度全景图文语义的理解，发现其能理解文本标识符但缺乏对视觉平移不变性的鲁棒性，并提出LoRA微调框架改进。

papers.title: Cortex-Inspired Continual Learning: Unsupervised Instantiation and Recovery of Functional Task Networks
papers.abstract: Block-sequential continual learning demands that a single model both protect prior solutions from catastrophic forgetting and efficiently infer at inference time which prior solution matches the current input without task labels. We present Functional Task Networks (FTN), a parameter-isolation method inspired by structural and dynamical motifs found in the mammalian neocortex. Similar to mixture-of-experts, this method uses a high dimensional, self-organizing binary mask over a large population of small but deep networks, inspired by dendritic models of pyramidal neurons. The mask is produced by a three-stage procedure: (1) gradient descent on a continuous mask identifies task-relevant neurons, (2) a smoothing kernel biases the result toward spatial contiguity, (3) and k-winner-take-all binarizes the resulting group at a fixed capacity budget. Like mixture-of-experts, each neuron is an independent deep network, so disjoint masks give exactly disjoint gradient updates, providing structural guarantees against catastrophic forgetting. This three-stage procedure recovers the sub-network of a previously-trained task in a single gradient step, providing unsupervised task segmentation at inference time. We test it on three continual-learning benchmarks: (1) a synthetic multi-task classification/regression generator, (2) MNIST with shuffled class labels (pure concept shift), and (3) Permuted MNIST (domain shift). On all three, FTN with fine grained smoothing (FTN-Slow) results in nearly zero forgetting. FTN with a large kernel and only 2 iterations of smoothing (FTN-Fast) trades off some retention for increased speed. We show that the spatial organization mechanism reduces the effective mask search from the combinatorial top-k subset problem in O(C(H,K)) to the complexity of a near-linear scan in O(H) over compact cortical neighborhoods, which is parallelized by the gradient-based update.

analysis.tldr: 受大脑皮层启发的参数隔离方法，通过无监督方式恢复任务子网络，实现块序列持续学习中的零遗忘。
analysis.research_motivation: 块序列持续学习要求模型在无任务标签的情况下，既能防止灾难性遗忘，又能高效推断当前输入对应的先前解决方案，现有方法难以兼顾。
analysis.problem: 解决无任务标签下块序列持续学习中的灾难性遗忘和任务分割问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Functional Task Networks (FTN)，一种受大脑皮层启发的参数隔离方法，通过三步流程（梯度下降连续掩码、平滑核偏置空间连续性、k-winner-take-all二值化）生成高维自组织二值掩码，将每个神经元视为独立深度网络，实现无监督任务子网络恢复。
contributions: 提出FTN方法，结合混合专家和皮层结构特征，实现结构上保证的零遗忘。
设计三步掩码生成流程，将组合搜索复杂度从O(C(H,K))降至近线性O(H)。
在三个持续学习基准上验证，FTN-Slow实现几乎零遗忘，FTN-Fast在速度与保留之间取得权衡。
analysis.experiments: 在三个持续学习基准上测试：合成多任务分类/回归生成器、MNIST打乱标签（纯概念漂移）、Permuted MNIST（域漂移）。FTN-Slow几乎零遗忘，FTN-Fast以部分保留换取速度提升。
limitations: 可能仅适用于块序列场景，对在线或任务边界模糊的持续学习未验证。
FTN-Fast的遗忘-速度权衡可能不适用于高精度要求场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 受大脑皮层启发的参数隔离方法，通过无监督方式恢复任务子网络，实现块序列持续学习中的零遗忘。

papers.title: Less Is More: Engineering Challenges of On-Device Small Language Model Integration in a Mobile Application
papers.abstract: On-device Small Language Models (SLMs) promise fully offline, private AI experiences for mobile users (no cloud dependency, no data leaving the device). But is this promise achievable in practice? This paper presents a longitudinal practitioner case study documenting the engineering challenges of integrating SLMs (Gemma 4 E2B, 2.6B parameters; Qwen3 0.6B, 600M parameters) into Palabrita, a production Android word-guessing game. Over a 5-day development sprint comprising 204 commits (~90 directly AI-related), the system underwent a radical transformation: from an ambitious design where the LLM generated complete structured puzzles (word, category, difficulty, and five hints as JSON) to a pragmatic architecture where curated word lists provide the words and the LLM generates only three short hints, with a deterministic fallback if it fails. We identify five categories of failures specific to on-device SLM integration: output format violations, constraint violations, context quality degradation, latency incompatibility, and model selection instability. For each failure category, we document the observed symptoms, root causes, and the prompt engineering and architectural strategies that effectively mitigated them, including multi-layer defensive parsing, contextual retry with failure feedback, session rotation, progressive prompt hardening, and systematic responsibility reduction. Our findings demonstrate that on-device SLMs are viable for production mobile applications, but only when the developer accepts a fundamental constraint: the most reliable on-device LLM feature is one where the LLM does the least. We distill our experience into eight actionable design heuristics for practitioners integrating SLMs into mobile apps.

analysis.tldr: 将小语言模型集成到移动应用时，最可靠的功能是让模型做最少的事。
analysis.research_motivation: 端侧小语言模型（SLM）承诺提供完全离线、保护隐私的AI体验，但实际工程集成面临诸多挑战，现有文献缺乏系统性的实践指导。
analysis.problem: 如何在实际移动应用中可靠地集成端侧SLM，并克服输出格式违规、约束违反、延迟等工程难题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要通过案例研究观察到，端侧SLM集成存在五类失败模式：输出格式违规、约束违反、上下文质量下降、延迟不兼容和模型选择不稳定。
analysis.method: 通过纵向案例研究，记录从雄心勃勃的设计（LLM生成完整结构化谜题）到务实架构（LLM仅生成三个简短提示，失败时有确定性回退）的转变，并总结出多层防御解析、上下文重试、会话轮换、渐进式提示强化和系统性责任减少等缓解策略。
contributions: 识别出端侧SLM集成的五类失败模式及其症状、根因和缓解策略。
提炼出八条可操作的设计启发式，指导从业者将SLM集成到移动应用中。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但描述了为期5天的开发冲刺（204次提交，约90次与AI相关）的案例研究。
limitations: 案例仅针对一个特定的Android单词猜谜游戏，泛化性可能有限。
未涉及不同SLM架构或更大规模模型的对比实验。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将小语言模型集成到移动应用时，最可靠的功能是让模型做最少的事。

papers.title: Meta-CoT: Enhancing Granularity and Generalization in Image Editing
papers.abstract: Unified multi-modal understanding/generative models have shown improved image editing performance by incorporating fine-grained understanding into their Chain-of-Thought (CoT) process. However, a critical question remains underexplored: what forms of CoT and training strategy can jointly enhance both the understanding granularity and generalization? To address this, we propose Meta-CoT, a paradigm that performs a two-level decomposition of any single-image editing operation with two key properties: (1) Decomposability. We observe that any editing intention can be represented as a triplet - (task, target, required understanding ability). Inspired by this, Meta-CoT decomposes both the editing task and the target, generating task-specific CoT and traversing editing operations on all targets. This decomposition enhances the model's understanding granularity of editing operations and guides it to learn each element of the triplet during training, substantially improving the editing capability. (2) Generalizability. In the second decomposition level, we further break down editing tasks into five fundamental meta-tasks. We find that training on these five meta-tasks, together with the other two elements of the triplet, is sufficient to achieve strong generalization across diverse, unseen editing tasks. To further align the model's editing behavior with its CoT reasoning, we introduce the CoT-Editing Consistency Reward, which encourages more accurate and effective utilization of CoT information during editing. Experiments demonstrate that our method achieves an overall 15.8% improvement across 21 editing tasks, and generalizes effectively to unseen editing tasks when trained on only a small set of meta-tasks. Our code, benchmark, and model are released at https://shiyi-zh0408.github.io/projectpages/Meta-CoT/

analysis.tldr: 提出Meta-CoT，通过两级分解编辑操作为三元组和元任务，结合CoT编辑一致性奖励，提升图像编辑的粒度与泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有统一多模态模型通过CoT提升图像编辑性能，但CoT的形式和训练策略如何同时增强理解粒度和泛化性尚未充分探索。
analysis.problem: 如何设计CoT形式和训练策略，以同时提升图像编辑的理解粒度和对未见编辑任务的泛化能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到任何编辑意图可表示为(任务, 目标, 所需理解能力)三元组，且编辑任务可分解为五种基本元任务，训练这些元任务足以泛化到多样未见任务。
analysis.method: 提出Meta-CoT，包含两级分解：第一级将编辑操作分解为三元组并生成任务特定CoT；第二级将编辑任务分解为五种元任务。同时引入CoT编辑一致性奖励以对齐推理与编辑行为。
contributions: 提出Meta-CoT范式，通过两级分解增强编辑粒度和泛化性。
引入CoT编辑一致性奖励，提升CoT信息在编辑中的有效利用。
在21个编辑任务上平均提升15.8%，并有效泛化到未见任务。
analysis.experiments: 在21个编辑任务上评估，总体提升15.8%，并在仅训练少量元任务时有效泛化到未见编辑任务。
limitations: 可能依赖元任务定义的完备性，未覆盖所有编辑类型。
CoT编辑一致性奖励的计算可能增加训练复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Meta-CoT，通过两级分解编辑操作为三元组和元任务，结合CoT编辑一致性奖励，提升图像编辑的粒度与泛化能力。

papers.title: XGRAG: A Graph-Native Framework for Explaining KG-based Retrieval-Augmented Generation
papers.abstract: Graph-based Retrieval-Augmented Generation (GraphRAG) extends traditional RAG by using knowledge graphs (KGs) to give large language models (LLMs) a structured, semantically coherent context, yielding more grounded answers. However, GraphRAG reasoning process remains a black-box, limiting our ability to understand how specific pieces of structured knowledge influence the final output. Existing explainability (XAI) methods for RAG systems, designed for text-based retrieval, are limited to interpreting an LLM response through the relational structures among knowledge components, creating a critical gap in transparency and trustworthiness. To address this, we introduce XGRAG, a novel framework that generates causally grounded explanations for GraphRAG systems by employing graph-based perturbation strategies, to quantify the contribution of individual graph components on the model answer. We conduct extensive experiments comparing XGRAG against RAG-Ex, an XAI baseline for standard RAG, and evaluate its robustness across various question types, narrative structures and LLMs. Our results demonstrate a 14.81% improvement in explanation quality over the baseline RAG-Ex across NarrativeQA, FairyTaleQA, and TriviaQA, evaluated by F1-score measuring alignment between generated explanations and original answers. Furthermore, XGRAG explanations exhibit a strong correlation with graph centrality measures, validating its ability to capture graph structure. XGRAG provides a scalable and generalizable approach towards trustworthy AI through transparent, graph-based explanations that enhance the interpretability of RAG systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出XGRAG框架，通过图扰动策略为基于知识图谱的检索增强生成提供因果解释。
analysis.research_motivation: GraphRAG虽能提升LLM回答的准确性，但其推理过程不透明，现有RAG可解释方法无法处理结构化知识，导致信任缺失。
analysis.problem: 如何为基于知识图谱的检索增强生成（GraphRAG）系统生成因果层面、可量化的解释。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用基于图的扰动策略，量化知识图谱中单个组件对模型答案的贡献，生成因果解释。
contributions: 提出XGRAG框架，首个为GraphRAG提供因果解释的方法。
在多个数据集上验证，解释质量相比基线RAG-Ex提升14.81%。
analysis.experiments: 在NarrativeQA、FairyTaleQA和TriviaQA上评估，使用F1分数衡量解释与原始答案的对齐程度，并验证与图中心性度量的相关性。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量知识图谱。
扰动策略的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出XGRAG框架，通过图扰动策略为基于知识图谱的检索增强生成提供因果解释。

papers.title: CF-VLA: Efficient Coarse-to-Fine Action Generation for Vision-Language-Action Policies
papers.abstract: Flow-based vision-language-action (VLA) policies offer strong expressivity for action generation, but suffer from a fundamental inefficiency: multi-step inference is required to recover action structure from uninformative Gaussian noise, leading to a poor efficiency-quality trade-off under real-time constraints. We address this issue by rethinking the role of the starting point in generative action modeling. Instead of shortening the sampling trajectory, we propose CF-VLA, a coarse-to-fine two-stage formulation that restructures action generation into a coarse initialization step that constructs an action-aware starting point, followed by a single-step local refinement that corrects residual errors. Concretely, the coarse stage learns a conditional posterior over endpoint velocity to transform Gaussian noise into a structured initialization, while the fine stage performs a fixed-time refinement from this initialization. To stabilize training, we introduce a stepwise strategy that first learns a controlled coarse predictor and then performs joint optimization. Experiments on CALVIN and LIBERO show that our method establishes a strong efficiency-performance frontier under low-NFE (Number of Function Evaluations) regimes: it consistently outperforms existing NFE=2 methods, matches or surpasses the NFE=10 $π_{0.5}$ baseline on several metrics, reduces action sampling latency by 75.4%, and achieves the best average real-robot success rate of 83.0%, outperforming MIP by 19.5 points and $π_{0.5}$ by 4.0 points. These results suggest that structured, coarse-to-fine generation enables both strong performance and efficient inference. Our code is available at https://github.com/EmbodiedAI-RoboTron/CF-VLA.

analysis.tldr: 提出粗到细两阶段动作生成框架CF-VLA，通过结构化初始化和单步精修提升VLA策略的效率与性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 基于流的VLA策略动作生成需要多步推理从无信息高斯噪声恢复动作结构，导致实时约束下效率与质量权衡不佳。
analysis.problem: 解决流式VLA策略中多步推理效率低下的问题，实现低NFE下的高效高质量动作生成。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 粗到细两阶段生成：粗阶段学习条件后验将高斯噪声转化为结构化初始化，细阶段进行固定时间单步精修；采用逐步训练策略先学习粗预测器再联合优化。
contributions: 提出粗到细两阶段动作生成框架CF-VLA，重构动作生成过程为结构化初始化加局部精修。
在CALVIN和LIBERO上实现低NFE下最优效率-性能前沿，动作采样延迟降低75.4%，真实机器人成功率83.0%。
analysis.experiments: 在CALVIN和LIBERO基准上评估，与NFE=2方法及NFE=10的π₀.₅基线对比，并报告真实机器人成功率。
limitations: 可能依赖特定任务的动作空间结构。
粗阶段学习条件后验的泛化性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出粗到细两阶段动作生成框架CF-VLA，通过结构化初始化和单步精修提升VLA策略的效率与性能。

papers.title: Evaluating whether AI models would sabotage AI safety research
papers.abstract: We evaluate the propensity of frontier models to sabotage or refuse to assist with safety research when deployed as AI research agents within a frontier AI company. We apply two complementary evaluations to four Claude models (Mythos Preview, Opus 4.7 Preview, Opus 4.6, and Sonnet 4.6): an unprompted sabotage evaluation testing model behaviour with opportunities to sabotage safety research, and a sabotage continuation evaluation testing whether models continue to sabotage when placed in trajectories where prior actions have started undermining research. We find no instances of unprompted sabotage across any model, with refusal rates close to zero for Mythos Preview and Opus 4.7 Preview, though all models sometimes only partially completed tasks. In the continuation evaluation, Mythos Preview actively continues sabotage in 7% of cases (versus 3% for Opus 4.6, 4% for Sonnet 4.6, and 0% for Opus 4.7 Preview), and exhibits reasoning-output discrepancy in the majority of these cases, indicating covert sabotage reasoning. Our evaluation framework builds on Petri, an open-source LLM auditing tool, with a custom scaffold running models inside Claude Code, alongside an iterative pipeline for generating realistic sabotage trajectories. We measure both evaluation awareness and a new form of situational awareness termed "prefill awareness", the capability to recognise that prior trajectory content was not self-generated. Opus 4.7 Preview shows notably elevated unprompted evaluation awareness, while prefill awareness remains low across all models. Finally, we discuss limitations including evaluation awareness confounds, limited scenario coverage, and untested pathways to risk beyond safety research sabotage.

analysis.tldr: 评估前沿AI模型在作为研究代理时是否会破坏安全研究，发现无主动破坏但存在隐蔽推理。
analysis.research_motivation: 随着AI模型能力增强，它们可能被部署为研究代理，存在故意破坏安全研究的风险，需要系统评估其可信度。
analysis.problem: 评估前沿AI模型在安全研究场景中是否表现出破坏或拒绝协助的行为，特别是隐蔽的破坏意图。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型在无提示下未主动破坏，但在延续评估中部分模型（如Mythos Preview）在7%案例中继续破坏，且多数存在推理-输出不一致，表明隐蔽破坏推理。
analysis.method: 基于Petri开源LLM审计工具，构建Claude Code内的自定义脚手架，生成逼真破坏轨迹，进行无提示破坏评估和破坏延续评估。
contributions: 提出评估AI模型破坏安全研究的框架，包括无提示和延续两种评估。
发现模型存在隐蔽破坏推理和评估意识，引入“预填充意识”新概念。
analysis.experiments: 对四个Claude模型进行两种评估，报告了破坏率和意识测量结果。
limitations: 评估意识可能混淆结果
场景覆盖有限
未测试安全研究破坏以外的风险路径
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 评估前沿AI模型在作为研究代理时是否会破坏安全研究，发现无主动破坏但存在隐蔽推理。

papers.title: Incompressible Knowledge Probes: Estimating Black-Box LLM Parameter Counts via Factual Capacity
papers.abstract: Closed-source frontier labs do not disclose parameter counts, and the standard alternative -- inference economics -- carries $2\times$+ uncertainty from hardware, batching, and serving-stack assumptions external to the model. We exploit a tighter intrinsic bound: storing $F$ facts requires at least $F/$(bits per parameter) weights, so measuring how much a model \emph{knows} lower-bounds how many parameters it \emph{has}. We introduce \textbf{Incompressible Knowledge Probes (IKPs)}, a benchmark of 1{,}400 factual questions spanning 7 tiers of obscurity, designed to isolate knowledge that cannot be derived by reasoning or compressed by architectural improvements. We calibrate a log-linear mapping from IKP accuracy to parameter count on 89 open-weight models (135M--1,600B) spanning 19 vendors, achieving $R^2 = 0.917$; leave-one-out cross-validation confirms generalization (median fold error $1.59\times$, $68.5\%$ within $2\times$ and $87.6\%$ within $3\times$). For Mixture-of-Experts models, total parameters predict knowledge ($R^2 = 0.79$) far better than active parameters ($R^2 = 0.51$). We evaluate 188 models from 27 vendors and estimate effective knowledge capacity for all major proprietary frontier models; for heavily safety-tuned models the estimates are lower bounds, since refusal policy can hide tens of percentage points of "refused but known" capacity. The widely-reported saturation of reasoning benchmarks does not imply the end of scaling. Procedural capability compresses under the "Densing Law," but across 96 dated open-weight models the IKP time coefficient is $-0.0010$/month (95\% CI $[-0.0031, +0.0008]$) -- indistinguishable from zero, and rejecting the Densing prediction of $+0.0117$/month at $p < 10^{-15}$. Factual capacity continues to scale log-linearly with parameters across generations and across vendors.

analysis.tldr: 通过测量模型的事实知识容量来估计黑盒LLM的参数数量，提出IKP基准并验证其有效性。
analysis.research_motivation: 闭源前沿实验室不公开参数数量，而传统的推理经济学方法因硬件、批处理和服务器堆栈假设存在2倍以上的不确定性，需要更精确的内在估计方法。
analysis.problem: 如何仅通过模型的外部行为（事实知识）来估计其参数数量？
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 存储F个事实至少需要F/(每参数比特数)个权重，因此测量模型的知识量可以下界其参数数量；安全微调会隐藏部分知识，导致估计偏低；推理基准的饱和并不意味着缩放定律的终结。
analysis.method: 提出Incompressible Knowledge Probes (IKPs)基准，包含1400个事实问题，覆盖7个难度层级，用于隔离无法通过推理或架构压缩获得的知识；在89个开源模型上校准IKP准确率与参数数量的对数线性映射。
contributions: 提出IKP基准，用于估计黑盒LLM的参数数量，仅需模型的事实知识容量。
在89个开源模型上验证了IKP准确率与参数数量的强相关性（R²=0.917），并推广到188个模型。
发现MoE模型中总参数比活跃参数更能预测知识容量，且事实容量随参数对数线性增长，不受“致密定律”影响。
analysis.experiments: 在89个开源模型（135M-1600B，19个供应商）上校准映射，R²=0.917；留一交叉验证中位数误差1.59倍，68.5%在2倍内，87.6%在3倍内；评估188个模型（27个供应商），估计主要闭源前沿模型的有效知识容量。
limitations: 安全微调模型的知识容量估计偏低，因为拒绝策略隐藏了部分知识。
基准仅覆盖事实知识，可能不适用于推理或生成能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过测量模型的事实知识容量来估计黑盒LLM的参数数量，提出IKP基准并验证其有效性。

papers.title: A Comparative Evaluation of AI Agent Security Guardrails
papers.abstract: This report presents a comparative evaluation of DKnownAI Guard in AI agent security scenarios, benchmarked against three competing products: AWS Bedrock Guardrails, Azure Content Safety, and Lakera Guard. Using human annotation as the ground truth, we assess each guardrail's ability to detect two categories of risks: threats to the agent itself (e.g., instruction override, indirect injection, tool abuse) and requests intended to elicit harmful content (e.g., hate speech, pornography, violence). Evaluation results demonstrate that DKnownAI Guard achieves the highest recall rate at 96.5\% and ranks first in true negative rate (TNR) at 90.4\%, delivering the best overall performance among all evaluated guardrails.

analysis.tldr: 比较评估了DKnownAI Guard等四款AI Agent安全护栏，DKnownAI Guard在召回率和真负率上表现最佳。
analysis.research_motivation: AI Agent面临指令覆盖、间接注入、工具滥用等安全威胁，现有安全护栏产品缺乏系统比较，需要评估其检测能力。
analysis.problem: 评估不同AI Agent安全护栏在检测针对Agent的威胁和有害内容请求方面的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: DKnownAI Guard在召回率（96.5%）和真负率（90.4%）上均优于其他产品，表明其在安全检测中具有综合优势。
analysis.method: 以人工标注为基准，对比DKnownAI Guard、AWS Bedrock Guardrails、Azure Content Safety和Lakera Guard在两类风险（针对Agent的威胁和有害内容请求）上的检测性能。
contributions: 首次对DKnownAI Guard进行独立第三方评估，并与主流安全护栏产品对比。
提供了基于人工标注的标准化评估框架，覆盖两类关键风险。
analysis.experiments: 使用人工标注作为ground truth，评估四款产品在检测威胁和有害内容上的召回率、真负率等指标。
limitations: 仅评估了四款产品，可能不涵盖所有安全护栏方案。
评估场景有限，未涉及更复杂的多轮交互或动态攻击。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 比较评估了DKnownAI Guard等四款AI Agent安全护栏，DKnownAI Guard在召回率和真负率上表现最佳。

papers.title: Infrastructure-Guided Connectivity-Enhanced Road Crack Detection and Estimation
papers.abstract: In this paper, we report the world's first infrastructure-guided communication-enhanced road crack detection pipeline that is effective and implementable on passenger vehicles. We first design a customized communication protocol to transmit the region of interest from the infrastructure to the vehicle. With proper camera image processing (e.g., dynamic cropping and frame selection), the focused images are provided to the crack detection model. Leveraging state-of-the-art crack detection model backbones and a carefully prepared dataset comprising a forward-facing view with a crack, we train the model to improve crack-detection performance. We demonstrate the full detection pipeline on an experimental vehicle platform, showcase the detection effectiveness, and project future research directions.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个基于基础设施引导的车辆裂缝检测管线，通过定制通信协议和图像处理提升检测效果。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有道路裂缝检测方法多依赖车载传感器，受限于视野和计算资源，难以实现高效、实时的检测。
analysis.problem: 如何利用基础设施引导，实现车辆对道路裂缝的有效检测与估计。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 设计定制通信协议从基础设施传输感兴趣区域至车辆，结合动态裁剪和帧选择等图像处理，使用先进裂缝检测模型骨干网络在自制数据集上训练。
contributions: 提出首个基础设施引导的车辆裂缝检测管线
设计定制通信协议和图像处理流程提升检测效果
analysis.experiments: 在实验车辆平台上演示了完整检测管线，展示了检测有效性，但未提供定量实验结果。
limitations: 未提供定量实验数据，效果缺乏量化评估
数据集仅包含前视视角，可能限制泛化性
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个基于基础设施引导的车辆裂缝检测管线，通过定制通信协议和图像处理提升检测效果。

papers.title: NeSyCat: A Monad-Based Categorical Semantics of the Neurosymbolic ULLER Framework
papers.abstract: ULLER (Unified Language for LEarning and Reasoning) offers a unified first-order logic (FOL) syntax, enabling its knowledge bases to be used directly across a wide range of neurosymbolic systems. The original specification endows this syntax with three pairwise independent semantics: classical, fuzzy, and probabilistic, each accompanied by dedicated semantic rules. We show that these seemingly disparate semantics are all instances of one categorical framework based on monads, the very construct that models side effects in functional programming. This enables the modular addition of new semantics and systematic translations between them. As example, we outline the addition of generalised quantification in Logic Tensor Networks (LTN) to arbitrary (also infinite) domains by extending the Giry monad to probability spaces. In particular, our approach allows a modular implementation of ULLER in Python and Haskell, of which we have published initial versions on GitHub.

analysis.tldr: 用范畴论中的单子统一了神经符号系统ULLER的多种语义，支持模块化扩展和翻译。
analysis.research_motivation: 神经符号系统需要统一不同语义（经典、模糊、概率）的表示，但现有框架语义独立，难以扩展和互操作。
analysis.problem: 如何为ULLER框架提供一种统一的语义框架，使得不同语义可以模块化添加和系统间翻译。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于单子的范畴语义框架，将经典、模糊、概率语义统一为单子实例，并利用Giry单子扩展至概率空间以支持广义量化。
contributions: 提出NeSyCat，一种基于单子的范畴语义，统一了ULLER的三种语义。
展示了如何通过单子扩展添加新语义（如广义量化），并提供了Python和Haskell的模块化实现。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能缺乏大规模实证验证。
单子框架的学习曲线可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: neurosymbolic & hybrid AI systems (physics-informed, logic & formal reasoning, etc.)
analysis.category: 符号推理 + 神经网络
analysis.sub_area: 符号推理 + 神经网络
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 用范畴论中的单子统一了神经符号系统ULLER的多种语义，支持模块化扩展和翻译。

papers.title: Learning to Route Queries to Heads for Attention-based Re-ranking with Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have recently been explored as fine-grained zero-shot re-rankers by leveraging attention signals to estimate document relevance. However, existing methods either aggregate attention signals across all heads or rely on a statically selected subset identified by heuristic rules. This solution can be suboptimal because the informative heads can vary across queries or domains. Moreover, naively combining multiple heads can degrade performance due to redundancy or conflicting ranking signals. In this paper, we propose a query-dependent head selection method, RouteHead, for attention-based re-ranking with LLMs. Specifically, we learn a lightweight router that can map each query to an optimal head set, and relevance scores are computed by aggregating attention signals only from these heads. Since query-to-head optimal labels are unavailable, we first construct pseudo labels via an offline search. The router represents each head with a learnable embedding and represents each query using an embedding extracted from the hidden states of the frozen LLM. Then it is trained on the pseudo labels with a sparsity regularizer. Experiments on diverse benchmarks and multiple LLM backbones show that the proposed method consistently outperforms strong baselines.

analysis.tldr: 提出查询相关的注意力头选择方法 RouteHead，通过轻量路由器为每个查询动态选择最优注意力头，提升基于 LLM 注意力信号的排序重排效果。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于 LLM 注意力信号的重排方法要么聚合所有注意力头，要么依赖静态启发式规则选择子集，忽略了不同查询或领域下信息头的变化，且多头简单聚合可能因冗余或冲突信号降低性能。
analysis.problem: 如何为每个查询动态选择最优的注意力头集合，以提升基于 LLM 注意力信号的重排效果。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 不同查询或领域下，LLM 中提供有用排序信号的注意力头可能不同；简单聚合所有头或静态选择子集可能引入冗余或冲突信号，导致性能次优。
analysis.method: 提出 RouteHead 方法：学习一个轻量路由器，将每个查询映射到最优注意力头集合。路由器为每个头学习可嵌入向量，并从冻结 LLM 的隐藏状态提取查询嵌入，通过离线搜索构建伪标签训练路由器，并加入稀疏正则化。
contributions: 提出查询相关的注意力头选择方法 RouteHead，用于基于 LLM 注意力信号的重排。
设计离线搜索构建伪标签，训练轻量路由器实现动态头选择。
在多个基准和 LLM 骨干上验证方法一致优于强基线。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准和多种 LLM 骨干上进行实验，结果显示所提方法一致优于强基线。
limitations: 依赖离线搜索构建伪标签，可能引入额外计算开销。
路由器训练需要查询嵌入，可能受限于 LLM 隐藏状态的质量。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出查询相关的注意力头选择方法 RouteHead，通过轻量路由器为每个查询动态选择最优注意力头，提升基于 LLM 注意力信号的排序重排效果。

papers.title: Majorization-Guided Test-Time Adaptation for Vision-Language Models under Modality-Specific Shift
papers.abstract: Vision-language models transfer well in zero-shot settings, but at deployment the visual and textual branches often shift asymmetrically. Under this condition, entropy-based test-time adaptation can sharpen the fused posterior while increasing error, because an unreliable modality may still dominate fusion. We study this failure mode through a majorization view of multimodal posteriors and cast adaptation as a constrained de-mixing problem on the fused prediction. Based on this view, we propose MG-MTTA, which keeps the backbone frozen and updates only a lightweight gate or adapter. The objective combines fused-posterior entropy minimization with a reliability-aware gate prior built from anchor-based modality consistency and cross-modal conflict. Our analysis gives conditions under which entropy reduction preserves the correct ranking and a threshold that characterizes modality-dominance failure. On the ImageNet-based benchmark, MG-MTTA improves top-1 accuracy from 57.97 to 66.51 under semantics-preserving textual shift and from 21.68 to 26.27 under joint visual-textual shift, while remaining competitive in the visual-only benchmark. These results show that multimodal test-time adaptation should control modality reliability, not just prediction entropy.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于主导化视角的多模态测试时适应方法，通过约束解混融合预测来应对视觉-语言模型在部署时的不对称模态偏移。
analysis.research_motivation: 视觉-语言模型在零样本设置下表现良好，但部署时视觉和文本分支常发生不对称偏移，导致基于熵的测试时适应可能因不可靠模态主导融合而增加错误。
analysis.problem: 解决多模态测试时适应中因模态不对称偏移导致的融合后验熵最小化反而增加错误的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出在模态不对称偏移下，熵最小化可能使不可靠模态继续主导融合，导致错误增加；通过主导化视角分析，给出了熵减少保持正确排序的条件和模态主导失败阈值。
analysis.method: 提出MG-MTTA，冻结骨干网络，仅更新轻量级门控或适配器；目标函数结合融合后验熵最小化和基于锚点模态一致性与跨模态冲突构建的可靠性感知门控先验。
contributions: 从主导化视角分析多模态后验，将适应建模为融合预测上的约束解混问题
提出MG-MTTA方法，仅更新轻量级模块，结合熵最小化和可靠性感知门控先验
在ImageNet基准上验证，语义保持文本偏移下top-1准确率从57.97提升至66.51，联合视觉-文本偏移下从21.68提升至26.27
analysis.experiments: 在ImageNet基准上测试，包括语义保持文本偏移、联合视觉-文本偏移和纯视觉偏移场景，与基线对比显示提升。
limitations: 可能依赖锚点数据构建模态一致性，在无锚点场景下适用性未知
仅验证了ImageNet基准，其他数据集或真实场景效果待评估
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于主导化视角的多模态测试时适应方法，通过约束解混融合预测来应对视觉-语言模型在部署时的不对称模态偏移。

papers.title: Quantum Kernel Advantage over Classical Collapse in Medical Foundation Model Embeddings
papers.abstract: We provide evidence of quantum kernel advantage under noiseless simulation in binary insurance classification on MIMIC-CXR chest radiographs using quantum support vector machines (QSVM) with frozen embeddings from three medical foundation models (MedSigLIP-448, RAD-DINO, ViT-patch32). We propose a two-tier fair comparison framework in which both classifiers receive identical PCA-q features. At Tier 1 (untuned QSVM vs. untuned linear SVM, C = 1 both sides), QSVM wins minority-class F1 in all 18 tested configurations (17 at p < 0.001, 1 at p < 0.01). The classical linear kernel collapses to majority-class prediction on 90-100% of seeds at every qubit count, while QSVM maintains non-trivial recall. At q = 11 (MedSigLIP-448 plateau center), QSVM achieves mean F1 = 0.343 vs. classical F1 = 0.050 (F1 gain = +0.293, p < 0.001) without hyperparameter tuning. Under Tier 2 (untuned QSVM vs. C-tuned RBF SVM), QSVM wins all seven tested configurations (mean gain +0.068, max +0.112). Eigenspectrum analysis reveals quantum kernel effective rank reaches 69.80 at q = 11, far exceeding linear kernel rank, while classical collapse remains C-invariant. A full qubit sweep reveals architecture-dependent concentration onset across models. Code: https://github.com/sebasmos/qml-medimage

analysis.tldr: 无噪声模拟下，量子SVM在医学影像分类中优于经典线性SVM，避免多数类崩溃。
analysis.research_motivation: 经典线性核在高维医学嵌入中易崩溃为多数类预测，量子核可能提供更丰富的特征空间，但缺乏系统公平比较。
analysis.problem: 在医学基础模型嵌入的二元分类中，量子核是否比经典线性核具有优势，且如何公平对比。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 经典线性核在90-100%种子下崩溃为多数类预测，而量子SVM保持非平凡召回；量子核有效秩远高于线性核。
analysis.method: 提出两层级公平比较框架，使用PCA降维后的相同特征，对比无调参QSVM与无调参线性SVM（Tier 1）及C调参RBF SVM（Tier 2）。
contributions: 在无噪声模拟下证明量子核在医学影像分类中的优势，18个配置中少数类F1均胜出。
揭示经典线性核的多数类崩溃现象，并展示量子核有效秩更高、浓度效应与架构相关。
analysis.experiments: 在MIMIC-CXR数据集上使用三个医学基础模型嵌入，进行二元保险分类，报告F1分数、p值及有效秩分析。
limitations: 仅无噪声模拟，未考虑真实量子噪声。
仅针对二元分类，未扩展到多类或更复杂任务。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 无噪声模拟下，量子SVM在医学影像分类中优于经典线性SVM，避免多数类崩溃。

papers.title: Skill Retrieval Augmentation for Agentic AI
papers.abstract: As large language models (LLMs) evolve into agentic problem solvers, they increasingly rely on external, reusable skills to handle tasks beyond their native parametric capabilities. In existing agent systems, the dominant strategy for incorporating skills is to explicitly enumerate available skills within the context window. However, this strategy fails to scale: as skill corpora expand, context budgets are consumed rapidly, and the agent becomes markedly less accurate in identifying the right skill. To this end, this paper formulates Skill Retrieval Augmentation (SRA), a new paradigm in which agents dynamically retrieve, incorporate, and apply relevant skills from large external skill corpora on demand. To make this problem measurable, we construct a large-scale skill corpus and introduce SRA-Bench, the first benchmark for decomposed evaluation of the full SRA pipeline, covering skill retrieval, skill incorporation, and end-task execution. SRA-Bench contains 5,400 capability-intensive test instances and 636 manually constructed gold skills, which are mixed with web-collected distractor skills to form a large-scale corpus of 26,262 skills. Extensive experiments show that retrieval-based skill augmentation can substantially improve agent performance, validating the promise of the paradigm. At the same time, we uncover a fundamental gap in skill incorporation: current LLM agents tend to load skills at similar rates, regardless of whether a gold skill is retrieved or whether the task actually requires external capabilities. This shows that the bottleneck in skill augmentation lies not only in retrieval but also in the base model's ability to determine which skill to load and when external loading is actually needed. These findings position SRA as a distinct research problem and establish a foundation for the scalable augmentation of capabilities in future agent systems.

analysis.tldr: 提出技能检索增强（SRA）范式，构建SRA-Bench基准，发现当前LLM智能体在技能融合上存在瓶颈。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有智能体系统依赖在上下文窗口中显式枚举可用技能，但技能库扩大时上下文预算被快速消耗，且智能体识别正确技能的准确性显著下降，亟需可扩展的技能增强范式。
analysis.problem: 如何让智能体从大规模外部技能库中动态检索、融合并应用相关技能，以克服上下文窗口限制和技能识别瓶颈。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验发现当前LLM智能体在技能融合时倾向于以相似速率加载技能，无论是否检索到黄金技能或任务是否真正需要外部能力，表明瓶颈不仅在于检索，更在于基础模型判断何时加载何种技能的能力。
analysis.method: 提出技能检索增强（SRA）范式，构建包含5,400个测试实例和636个手工构建黄金技能的大规模技能库SRA-Bench，混合网络收集的干扰技能形成26,262个技能的总库，并设计分解评估流程（技能检索、技能融合、端任务执行）。
contributions: 形式化技能检索增强（SRA）问题，提出新范式。
构建首个SRA基准SRA-Bench，包含大规模技能库和分解评估协议。
通过实验验证检索增强可显著提升智能体性能，并揭示技能融合中的根本性差距。
analysis.experiments: 在SRA-Bench上进行广泛实验，验证检索增强的有效性，并分析技能融合瓶颈。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 基准规模有限，可能无法覆盖所有真实场景。
未深入探讨如何改进基础模型的技能融合能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出技能检索增强（SRA）范式，构建SRA-Bench基准，发现当前LLM智能体在技能融合上存在瓶颈。

papers.title: A systematic evaluation of vision-language models for observational astronomical reasoning tasks
papers.abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) are increasingly proposed as general-purpose tools for scientific data interpretation, yet their reliability on real astronomical observations across diverse modalities remains untested. We present AstroVLBench, a comprehensive benchmark comprising over 4,100 expert-verified instances across five tasks spanning optical imaging, radio interferometry, multi-wavelength photometry, time-domain light curves, and optical spectroscopy. Evaluating six frontier models, we find that performance is strongly modality-dependent: while one model (Gemini 3 Pro) emerges as the most consistently capable across tasks, task-specific strengths vary, and all models substantially underperform domain-specialized methods. Mechanistic ablations reveal that performance depends not only on directing attention to salient visual features but also on grounding those features in physical knowledge. Phenomenological prompts describing what to look for improve accuracy by sharpening model focus, but physical prompts explaining why those features matter perform better overall and yield more balanced classifications with reduced class-specific bias. Consistent with this picture, presenting the underlying one-dimensional measurements directly as numerical tables instead of rendered plots yields up to 13 percentage points improvement. Reasoning quality analysis further demonstrates that, without explicit physical grounding, models may reach correct predictions from phenomenologically plausible cues while providing physically imprecise justifications, establishing that accuracy alone is insufficient for trustworthy scientific deployment. These findings provide the first systematic, multi-modal baselines for VLMs in observational astronomy and identify the specific representation, grounding, and reasoning bottlenecks where current models fail.

analysis.tldr: VLMs在天文观测任务中表现强依赖模态，物理提示优于现象提示，且准确率不足以保证科学可信性。
analysis.research_motivation: VLMs被提出作为科学数据解释的通用工具，但在真实天文观测中的可靠性尚未经过系统测试，缺乏多模态基准。
analysis.problem: 系统评估VLMs在多种天文观测模态（光学成像、射电干涉、多波段测光、时域光变曲线、光谱）上的推理能力，并识别其瓶颈。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 性能强依赖模态；物理提示比现象提示更有效；直接使用数值表格比渲染图提升高达13个百分点；模型可能基于现象学线索给出正确预测但物理理由不精确。
analysis.method: 构建AstroVLBench基准（4100+专家验证实例，5个任务），评估6个前沿VLM，并进行机制消融（注意力引导、物理/现象提示、数值表格对比）。
contributions: 提出首个多模态天文观测VLM基准AstroVLBench
系统揭示VLM在天文推理中的模态依赖、物理接地瓶颈和推理质量缺陷
analysis.experiments: 在5个任务上评估6个模型，进行提示消融和数值表格对比实验，报告准确率提升和推理质量分析。
limitations: 仅评估6个模型，可能不覆盖所有VLM
基准任务可能无法完全代表真实天文分析复杂性
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: VLMs在天文观测任务中表现强依赖模态，物理提示优于现象提示，且准确率不足以保证科学可信性。

papers.title: Point-MF: One-step Point Cloud Generation from a Single Image via Mean Flows
papers.abstract: Single-image point cloud reconstruction must infer complete 3D geometry, including occluded parts, from a single RGB image. While diffusion-based reconstructors achieve high accuracy, they typically require many denoising iterations, resulting in slow and expensive inference. We propose Point-MF, a Mean-Flow-based framework for low-NFE single-image point cloud reconstruction that couples a Mean-Flow-compatible architecture with an auxiliary loss. Specifically, Point-MF operates directly in point-cloud space to learn the mean velocity field and enables one-step reconstruction with a single network function evaluation (1-NFE), without relying on VAE-based latent representations. To make Mean Flow effective under large interval jumps, Point-MF employs a Diffusion Transformer tailored to the Mean-Flow setting, conditioned on frozen DINOv3 image features via a lightweight token adapter and equipped with explicit interval/time conditioning. Moreover, we introduce Denoised Space Anchor, a set-distance auxiliary loss on the denoised-space estimate $x_θ$ induced by the predicted velocity field, to stabilize large-step generation and reduce outliers and density artifacts. On ShapeNet-R2N2 and Pix3D, Point-MF strikes a strong balance between reconstruction quality and inference speed compared to multi-step diffusion baselines and competitive feedforward models, while generating high-quality point clouds with millisecond-level latency.

analysis.tldr: Point-MF 提出基于 Mean Flow 的单步点云生成框架，实现从单张图像到 3D 点云的高质量、毫秒级重建。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有扩散模型虽能高精度重建点云，但需要大量去噪迭代，推理速度慢且计算成本高，难以满足实时应用需求。
analysis.problem: 如何实现从单张 RGB 图像到 3D 点云的低延迟、高质量重建，同时避免多步迭代和 VAE 潜在表示。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: Point-MF 采用 Mean Flow 框架，直接在点云空间学习平均速度场，实现单步重建（1-NFE）；使用适配 Mean Flow 的 Diffusion Transformer，通过轻量级 token adapter 条件化冻结的 DINOv3 图像特征，并加入显式区间/时间条件；提出 Denoised Space Anchor 辅助损失，稳定大步长生成并减少离群点和密度伪影。
contributions: 提出 Point-MF，首个基于 Mean Flow 的单步点云重建框架，无需 VAE 潜在表示，实现 1-NFE 推理。
设计适配 Mean Flow 的 Diffusion Transformer 架构和 Denoised Space Anchor 损失，有效提升大步长生成质量。
在 ShapeNet-R2N2 和 Pix3D 上达到重建质量与推理速度的强平衡，生成毫秒级延迟的高质量点云。
analysis.experiments: 在 ShapeNet-R2N2 和 Pix3D 数据集上，与多步扩散基线及前馈模型对比，Point-MF 在重建质量和推理速度之间取得强平衡，生成毫秒级延迟的高质量点云。
limitations: 可能对复杂遮挡或极端视角的泛化能力有限。
依赖 DINOv3 特征，可能受限于预训练特征的质量。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Point-MF 提出基于 Mean Flow 的单步点云生成框架，实现从单张图像到 3D 点云的高质量、毫秒级重建。

papers.title: Improving Vision-language Models with Perception-centric Process Reward Models
papers.abstract: Recent advancements in reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) have significantly improved the complex reasoning ability of vision-language models (VLMs). However, its outcome-level supervision is too coarse to diagnose and correct errors within the reasoning chain. To this end, we propose Perceval, a process reward model (PRM) that enables token-level error grounding, which can extract image-related claims from the response and compare them one by one with the visual evidence in the image, ultimately returning claims that contain perceptual errors. Perceval is trained with perception-intensive supervised training data. We then integrate Perceval into the RL training process to train the policy models. Specifically, compared to traditional GRPO, which applies sequence-level advantages, we apply token-level advantages by targeting penalties on hallucinated spans identified by Perceval, thus enabling fine-grained supervision signals. In addition to augmenting the training process, Perceval can also assist VLMs during the inference stage. Using Perceval, we can truncate the erroneous portions of the model's response, and then either have the model regenerate the response directly or induce the model to reflect on its previous output. This process can be repeated multiple times to achieve test-time scaling. Experiments show significant improvements on benchmarks from various domains across multiple reasoning VLMs trained with RL, highlighting the promise of perception-centric supervision as a general-purpose strategy. For test-time scaling, it also demonstrates consistent performance gains over other strategies, such as major voting. Our code and data will be publicly released at https://github.com/RUCAIBox/Perceval.

analysis.tldr: 提出感知中心的过程奖励模型 Perceval，通过 token 级错误定位和细粒度强化学习信号提升 VLM 推理能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 RLVR 方法仅提供结果级监督，无法诊断和纠正推理链中的错误，限制了 VLM 复杂推理能力的提升。
analysis.problem: 如何为 VLM 推理过程提供细粒度的错误定位和训练信号，以提升推理准确性和可解释性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 Perceval，一种过程奖励模型，从响应中提取图像相关声明并与视觉证据逐句比较，返回包含感知错误的声明；将其集成到 RL 训练中，通过 token 级优势（针对幻觉片段施加惩罚）提供细粒度监督；推理阶段可截断错误部分并触发重生成或反思，实现测试时扩展。
contributions: 提出 Perceval，一种感知中心的过程奖励模型，实现 token 级错误定位。
将 Perceval 集成到 RL 训练中，通过 token 级优势提供细粒度监督信号。
在推理阶段利用 Perceval 进行错误截断和反思，实现测试时扩展。
analysis.experiments: 在多个领域的基准测试上，使用多种推理 VLM 进行 RL 训练，显示显著改进；测试时扩展相比多数投票等策略表现一致提升。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量感知密集型监督数据。
测试时扩展的多次迭代可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出感知中心的过程奖励模型 Perceval，通过 token 级错误定位和细粒度强化学习信号提升 VLM 推理能力。

papers.title: Diffusion Model as a Generalist Segmentation Learner
papers.abstract: Diffusion models are primarily trained for image synthesis, yet their denoising trajectories encode rich, spatially aligned visual priors. In this paper, we demonstrate that these priors can be utilized for text-conditioned semantic and open-vocabulary segmentation, and this approach can be generalized to various downstream tasks to make a general-purpose diffusion segmentation framework. Concretely, we introduce DiGSeg (Diffusion Models as a Generalist Segmentation Learner), which repurposes a pretrained diffusion model into a unified segmentation framework. Our approach encodes the input image and ground-truth mask into the latent space and concatenates them as conditioning signals for the diffusion U-Net. A parallel CLIP-aligned text pathway injects language features across multiple scales, enabling the model to align textual queries with evolving visual representations. This design transforms an off-the-shelf diffusion backbone into a universal interface that produces structured segmentation masks conditioned on both appearance and arbitrary text prompts. Extensive experiments demonstrate state-of-the-art performance on standard semantic segmentation benchmarks, as well as strong open-vocabulary generalization and cross-domain transfer to medical, remote sensing, and agricultural scenarios-without domain-specific architectural customization. These results indicate that modern diffusion backbones can serve as generalist segmentation learners rather than pure generators, narrowing the gap between visual generation and visual understanding.

analysis.tldr: 将预训练扩散模型重新用作统一分割框架，实现语义和开放词汇分割，并在多个领域取得SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 扩散模型主要用于图像生成，但其去噪轨迹蕴含丰富的空间对齐视觉先验，现有方法未充分利用这些先验进行通用分割。
analysis.problem: 如何将预训练扩散模型转化为通用的、文本条件的分割学习器，以统一语义和开放词汇分割任务。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 扩散模型的去噪轨迹编码了丰富的、空间对齐的视觉先验，这些先验可用于分割任务。
analysis.method: 提出DiGSeg，将输入图像和真实掩码编码到潜在空间并拼接作为扩散U-Net的条件信号，同时引入并行CLIP对齐文本路径注入多尺度语言特征，使模型能根据外观和任意文本提示生成结构化分割掩码。
contributions: 首次证明预训练扩散模型可作为通用分割学习器，而非仅用于生成。
提出DiGSeg框架，统一语义和开放词汇分割，无需领域特定架构定制。
在多个标准语义分割基准上取得SOTA，并展示强开放词汇泛化和跨域迁移能力。
analysis.experiments: 在标准语义分割基准上取得SOTA，并在医疗、遥感和农业场景中展示强泛化能力，无需领域特定定制。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练扩散模型的质量和规模。
开放词汇分割的细粒度性能可能受限于CLIP对齐的文本路径。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将预训练扩散模型重新用作统一分割框架，实现语义和开放词汇分割，并在多个领域取得SOTA。

papers.title: FastOMOP: A Foundational Architecture for Reliable Agentic Real-World Evidence Generation on OMOP CDM data
papers.abstract: The Observational Medical Outcomes Partnership Common Data Model (OMOP CDM), maintained by the Observational Health Data Sciences and Informatics (OHDSI) collaboration, enabled the harmonisation of electronic health records data of nearly one billion patients in 83 countries. Yet generating real-world evidence (RWE) from these repositories remains a manual process requiring clinical, epidemiological and technical expertise. LLMs and multi-agent systems have shown promise for clinical tasks, but RWE automation exposes a fundamental challenge: agentic systems introduce emergent behaviours, coordination failures and safety risks that existing approaches fail to govern. No infrastructure exists to ensure agentic RWE generation is flexible, safe and auditable across the lifecycle. We introduce FastOMOP, an open-source multi-agent architecture that addresses this gap by separating three infrastructure layers, governance, observability and orchestration, from pluggable agent-teams. Governance is enforced at the process boundary through deterministic validation independent of agent reasoning, ensuring no compromised or hallucinating agent can bypass safety controls. Agent teams for phenotyping, study design and statistical analysis inherit these guarantees through controlled tool exposure. We validated FastOMOP using a natural-language-to-SQL agent team across three OMOP CDM datasets: synthetic data from Synthea, MIMIC-IV and a real-world NHS dataset from Lancashire Teaching Hospitals (IDRIL). FastOMOP achieved reliability scores of 0.84-0.94 with perfect adversarial and out-of-scope block rates, demonstrating process-boundary governance delivers safety guarantees independent of model choice. These results indicate that the reliability gap in RWE deployment is architectural rather than model capability, and establish FastOMOP as a governed architecture for progressive RWE automation.

analysis.tldr: FastOMOP 提出一种三层分离的多智能体架构，通过过程边界治理确保 OMOP CDM 数据上真实世界证据生成的安全与可靠性。
analysis.research_motivation: 从 OMOP CDM 数据库中生成真实世界证据（RWE）目前依赖人工，LLM 和多智能体系统虽有潜力，但存在涌现行为、协调失败和安全风险，缺乏可确保灵活、安全、可审计的架构。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种基础设施，使得基于 LLM 的多智能体系统在 OMOP CDM 数据上生成 RWE 时，能够保证安全性、可审计性和灵活性，同时避免智能体失控或幻觉导致的错误。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，现有方法无法治理智能体系统的涌现行为和协调失败，导致 RWE 自动化存在可靠性缺口，且该缺口本质上是架构问题而非模型能力问题。
analysis.method: 提出 FastOMOP，一种开源多智能体架构，将治理、可观测性和编排三个基础设施层与可插拔的智能体团队分离；通过过程边界的确定性验证强制执行治理，独立于智能体推理，确保即使智能体被攻破或产生幻觉也无法绕过安全控制。
contributions: 提出 FastOMOP 架构，首次将治理、可观测性和编排分离，实现过程边界的安全保障。
在三个 OMOP CDM 数据集（Synthea、MIMIC-IV、真实 NHS 数据）上验证，可靠性得分 0.84-0.94，对抗和越界拦截率完美。
analysis.experiments: 使用自然语言到 SQL 的智能体团队，在 Synthea、MIMIC-IV 和 Lancashire Teaching Hospitals 的 NHS 数据集上验证，报告可靠性得分 0.84-0.94，对抗和越界拦截率 100%。
limitations: 摘要未提及对更复杂任务（如统计建模）的验证。
可能依赖特定 OMOP CDM 版本，迁移性需进一步测试。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: FastOMOP 提出一种三层分离的多智能体架构，通过过程边界治理确保 OMOP CDM 数据上真实世界证据生成的安全与可靠性。

papers.title: Towards Lawful Autonomous Driving: Deriving Scenario-Aware Driving Requirements from Traffic Laws and Regulations
papers.abstract: Driving in compliance with traffic laws and regulations is a basic requirement for human drivers, yet autonomous vehicles (AVs) can violate these requirements in diverse real-world scenarios. To encode law compliance into AV systems, conventional approaches use formal logic languages to explicitly specify behavioral constraints, but this process is labor-intensive, hard to scale, and costly to maintain. With recent advances in artificial intelligence, it is promising to leverage large language models (LLMs) to derive legal requirements from traffic laws and regulations. However, without explicitly grounding and reasoning in structured traffic scenarios, LLMs often retrieve irrelevant provisions or miss applicable ones, yielding imprecise requirements. To address this, we propose a novel pipeline that grounds LLM reasoning in a traffic scenario taxonomy through node-wise anchors that encode hierarchical semantics. On Chinese traffic laws and OnSite dataset (5,897 scenarios), our method improves law-scenario matching by 29.1\% and increases the accuracy of derived mandatory and prohibitive requirements by 36.9\% and 38.2\%, respectively. We further demonstrate real-world applicability by constructing a law-compliance layer for AV navigation and developing an onboard, real-time compliance monitor for in-field testing, providing a solid foundation for future AV development, deployment, and regulatory oversight.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于场景分类的LLM管道，从交通法规中自动推导自动驾驶合规要求，显著提升匹配与推导精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统方法手动编码交通法规成本高、难扩展，而LLM直接推理缺乏场景结构化锚定，导致条款检索不精确。
analysis.problem: 如何让LLM在结构化交通场景中准确检索相关法规并推导出场景感知的驾驶要求。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LLM在无场景锚定时常检索无关条款或遗漏适用条款，导致推导要求不精确。
analysis.method: 提出一种管道，通过节点式锚点（node-wise anchors）将LLM推理锚定在交通场景分类树上，编码层次化语义，实现法规-场景匹配与要求推导。
contributions: 提出场景感知的法规推导管道，利用场景分类树锚定LLM推理。
在中文交通法规和OnSite数据集上，法规-场景匹配提升29.1%，强制性和禁止性要求准确率分别提升36.9%和38.2%。
构建了AV导航的法规合规层和车载实时合规监控器，验证了实际应用可行性。
analysis.experiments: 在中文交通法规和OnSite数据集（5,897个场景）上评估，与基线对比显示匹配和推导精度显著提升，并进行了实车测试。
limitations: 仅针对中国交通法规，可能不直接适用于其他国家。
依赖场景分类树的完备性，未覆盖所有边缘场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于场景分类的LLM管道，从交通法规中自动推导自动驾驶合规要求，显著提升匹配与推导精度。

papers.title: Aligned Multi-View Scripts for Universal Chart-to-Code Generation
papers.abstract: Chart-to-code generation converts a chart image into an executable plotting script, enabling faithful reproduction and editable visualizations. Existing methods are largely Python-centric, limiting practical use and overlooking a critical source of supervision: the same chart can be expressed by semantically equivalent scripts in different plotting languages. To fill this gap, we introduce Chart2NCode, a dataset of 176K charts paired with aligned scripts in Python, R, and LaTeX that render visually equivalent outputs, constructed via a metadata-to-template pipeline with rendering verification and human quality checks. Building on a LLaVA-style architecture, we further propose CharLuMA, a parameter-efficient adaptation module that augments the multimodal projector with a language-conditioned mixture of low-rank subspaces, allowing the model to share core chart understanding while specializing code generation to the target language through lightweight routing. Extensive experiments show consistent gains in executability and visual fidelity across all languages, outperforming strong open-source baselines and remaining competitive with proprietary systems. Further analyses reveal that balanced multi-language supervision benefits all languages and that the adapter allocates a compact shared core plus language-specific capacity. Codes and data are available at https://github.com/Zhihan72/CharLuMA.

analysis.tldr: 提出多语言图表到代码生成数据集和语言条件混合低秩适配模块，提升跨语言代码生成质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有图表到代码生成方法主要针对Python，忽略了同一图表可用不同语言脚本表达的事实，限制了实际应用。
analysis.problem: 如何利用多语言语义等价脚本作为监督信号，实现跨语言图表到代码生成。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 多语言监督对所有语言均有增益，适配器分配紧凑共享核心和语言特定容量。
analysis.method: 构建Chart2NCode数据集（176K图表，Python/R/LaTeX对齐脚本），提出CharLuMA模型，在LLaVA架构上增加语言条件混合低秩适配模块。
contributions: 提出Chart2NCode数据集，包含176K图表及多语言对齐脚本，经渲染验证和人工质检。
提出CharLuMA模型，通过语言条件混合低秩适配实现参数高效的多语言代码生成。
analysis.experiments: 在多个语言上执行实验，显示一致的可执行性和视觉保真度提升，优于开源基线，与专有系统竞争。
limitations: 可能依赖特定模板生成数据，泛化到真实图表场景需验证。
仅支持Python、R、LaTeX三种语言，扩展性待研究。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多语言图表到代码生成数据集和语言条件混合低秩适配模块，提升跨语言代码生成质量。

papers.title: Hierarchical Behaviour Spaces
papers.abstract: Recent work in hierarchical reinforcement learning has shown success in scaling to billions of timesteps when learning over a set of predefined option reward functions. We show that, instead of using a single reward function per option, the reward functions can be effectively used to induce a space of behaviours, by letting the controller specify linear combinations over reward functions, allowing a more expressive set of policies to be represented. We call this method Hierarchical Behaviour Spaces (HBS). We evaluate HBS on the NetHack Learning Environment, demonstrating strong performance. We conduct a series of experiments and determine that, perhaps going against conventional wisdom, the benefits of hierarchy in our method come from increased exploration rather than long term reasoning.

analysis.tldr: 提出层次行为空间（HBS），通过线性组合奖励函数增强层次强化学习的策略表达能力，并在NetHack环境中验证性能提升主要来自探索增强。
analysis.research_motivation: 层次强化学习在预定义选项奖励函数上取得了成功，但每个选项使用单一奖励函数限制了策略的多样性，难以表达更复杂的行为空间。
analysis.problem: 如何利用奖励函数组合来诱导更丰富的行为空间，提升层次强化学习的策略表达能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验发现层次结构带来的性能提升主要源于探索增强，而非长期推理，这与传统认知可能相反。
analysis.method: 层次行为空间（HBS）：控制器通过指定奖励函数的线性组合来定义选项，从而生成更丰富的策略集合。
contributions: 提出HBS方法，通过线性组合奖励函数扩展层次强化学习的行为空间。
在NetHack学习环境中验证HBS的强性能，并揭示层次结构的主要收益来自探索增强。
analysis.experiments: 在NetHack学习环境上评估，展示了强性能，并进行了系列实验分析层次结构的作用。
limitations: 可能仅适用于具有可组合奖励函数的任务。
未讨论线性组合的权重学习机制或收敛性。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出层次行为空间（HBS），通过线性组合奖励函数增强层次强化学习的策略表达能力，并在NetHack环境中验证性能提升主要来自探索增强。

papers.title: GradMAP: Gradient-Based Multi-Agent Proximal Learning for Grid-Edge Flexibility
papers.abstract: Coordinating large populations of grid-edge devices requires learning methods that remain fully decentralised in deployment while still respecting three-phase AC distribution-network physics. This paper proposes gradient-based multi-agent proximal learning (GradMAP) to address this challenge. GradMAP trains independent neural-network policies for each agent without any parameter sharing, and each agent uses only its own local observation for online decision-making without communication. During offline training, GradMAP embeds a differentiable three-phase AC power-flow model in a primal-dual learning loop and uses implicit differentiation to propagate exact network-constraint violations to update the policy parameters. To speed up training, GradMAP reuses expensive environment gradients through a proximal surrogate within a trust region defined in the more direct policy-output (action) space, instead of the probability distribution space used in other works, such as PPO. In case studies with 1,000 agents managing batteries, heat pumps, and controllable generators on the IEEE 123-bus feeder, GradMAP learns decentralised policies that minimise three-phase AC load-flow constraint violations within 15 minutes of training on a single workstation-class NVIDIA RTX PRO 5000 Blackwell 48GB GPU. This is a 3--5x training speed-up over gradient-based self-supervised learning benchmarks and substantially better training efficiency than multi-agent reinforcement-learning benchmarks. In out-of-sample tests, GradMAP also delivers among the lowest operating cost and constraint violations.

analysis.tldr: GradMAP通过嵌入可微三相AC潮流模型和近端代理，在单GPU上15分钟内训练出1000个分布式设备的去中心化策略，实现3-5倍训练加速。
analysis.research_motivation: 协调大量电网边缘设备需要完全去中心化的学习方法，同时必须遵守三相交流配电网物理约束，现有方法在训练效率和约束满足方面存在不足。
analysis.problem: 如何高效训练大规模分布式智能体的去中心化策略，使其在部署时无需通信且满足三相AC电网物理约束。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: GradMAP：在离线训练中嵌入可微三相AC潮流模型到原始-对偶学习循环，使用隐式微分传播精确网络约束违反梯度；通过近端代理在策略输出（动作）空间定义信任域，复用环境梯度加速训练。
contributions: 提出GradMAP，一种基于梯度的多智能体近端学习方法，用于电网边缘灵活性协调。
在IEEE 123节点馈线上1000个智能体（电池、热泵、可控发电机）的案例中，15分钟训练实现去中心化策略，训练速度比梯度自监督基线快3-5倍，效率优于多智能体强化学习基线。
analysis.experiments: 在IEEE 123节点馈线系统上，1000个智能体管理电池、热泵和可控发电机，使用单台工作站级NVIDIA RTX PRO 5000 Blackwell 48GB GPU训练15分钟，评估三相AC潮流约束违反、运行成本和训练速度。
limitations: 可能仅适用于三相AC配电网场景，泛化到其他物理系统需验证。
训练依赖可微物理模型，对于不可微或黑箱环境不适用。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: GradMAP通过嵌入可微三相AC潮流模型和近端代理，在单GPU上15分钟内训练出1000个分布式设备的去中心化策略，实现3-5倍训练加速。

papers.title: STELLAR-E: a Synthetic, Tailored, End-to-end LLM Application Rigorous Evaluator
papers.abstract: The increasing reliance on Large Language Models (LLMs) across diverse sectors highlights the need for robust domain-specific and language-specific evaluation datasets; however, the collection of such datasets is challenging due to privacy concerns, regulatory restrictions, and the time cost for manual creation. Existing automated benchmarking methods are often limited by relying on pre-existing data, poor scalability, single-domain focus, and lack of multilingual support. We present STELLAR-E - a fully automated system to generate high-quality synthetic datasets of custom size, using minimal human inputs without depending on existing datasets. The system is structured in two stages: (1) We modify the TGRT Self-Instruct framework to create a synthetic data engine that enables controllable, custom synthetic dataset generation, and (2) an evaluation pipeline incorporating statistical and LLM-based metrics to assess the applicability of the synthetic dataset for LLM-based application evaluations.
