The synthetic datasets reach an average difference of +5.7% in terms of LLM-as-a-judge scores against existing language-specific benchmarks, demonstrating comparable quality for comprehensive assessment of big and small LLMs. While real datasets remain slightly more challenging for LLMs especially for smaller models, this work establishes a scalable and domain-adaptable benchmarking framework that supports fair evaluation of LLM applications, offering a faster alternative to manual approaches and enabling high-efficiency automated quality assurance cycles.

analysis.tldr: 提出STELLAR-E全自动系统，用少量人工输入生成高质量合成评估数据集，解决领域/语言特定基准构建难题。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM应用评估依赖领域/语言特定数据集，但手动收集受隐私、法规和时间成本限制；现有自动化方法依赖已有数据、扩展性差、单领域且缺乏多语言支持。
analysis.problem: 如何自动生成高质量、可定制规模、多语言、领域自适应的合成数据集，用于LLM应用评估。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 合成数据集在LLM-as-a-judge评分上平均比现有语言特定基准高5.7%，但真实数据集对LLM（尤其小模型）仍更具挑战性。
analysis.method: 两阶段系统：1）修改TGRT Self-Instruct框架构建可控合成数据引擎；2）结合统计和基于LLM的指标评估合成数据集适用性。
contributions: 提出全自动合成数据集生成系统STELLAR-E，无需依赖现有数据集。
通过LLM-as-a-judge评估证明合成数据集质量与真实基准相当，平均差异+5.7%。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 合成数据集对小模型挑战性低于真实数据集，可能低估模型能力。
仅依赖LLM-as-a-judge评估，缺乏其他维度验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出STELLAR-E全自动系统，用少量人工输入生成高质量合成评估数据集，解决领域/语言特定基准构建难题。

papers.title: RACANet: Reliability-Aware Crowd Anchor Network for RGB-T Crowd Counting
papers.abstract: RGB-Thermal (T) crowd counting aims to integrate visible-spectrum and thermal infrared information to improve the robustness of crowd density estimation in complex scenes. Although existing studies generally improve counting accuracy through cross-modal feature fusion, most current methods rely on implicit cross-modal fusion strategies and lack explicit modeling of local spatial discrepancies as well as fine-grained characterization of modality reliability at the positional level, thereby limiting the accuracy and interpretability of the fusion process. To address these issues, this paper proposes a two-stage fusion framework, RACANet, a Reliability-Aware Crowd Anchor Network for RGB-T crowd counting. First, we introduce a lightweight cross-modal alignment pretraining stage, which explicitly learns cross-modal semantic correspondences through crowd-prior supervision and local bidirectional soft matching. Then, based on the priors learned during pretraining, a Local Anchor Fusion Module (LAFM) is introduced in the formal training stage. This module generates local semantic anchors by aggregating features from highly reliable regions and further enables adaptive pixel-level feature redistribution with a local attention mechanism. In addition, we propose a discrepancy-aware consistency constraint to dynamically coordinate the reliability of regions where modal representations are consistent. Experiments conducted on two widely used benchmark datasets, RGBT-CC and Drone-RGBT, demonstrate that RACANet outperforms existing methods. The anonymous code is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/RACANet-9985.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种显式建模局部空间差异和模态可靠性的两阶段融合框架RACANet，用于RGB-T人群计数。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有RGB-T人群计数方法依赖隐式跨模态融合，缺乏对局部空间差异的显式建模和位置级模态可靠性的细粒度刻画，限制了融合精度和可解释性。
analysis.problem: 如何显式建模局部空间差异和模态可靠性，提升RGB-T人群计数中跨模态融合的准确性和可解释性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出两阶段融合框架RACANet：第一阶段通过轻量级跨模态对齐预训练，利用人群先验监督和局部双向软匹配学习语义对应；第二阶段引入局部锚点融合模块（LAFM），聚合高可靠区域特征生成语义锚点，并通过局部注意力机制实现像素级特征重分配，同时提出差异感知一致性约束动态协调模态可靠性。
contributions: 提出显式建模局部空间差异和模态可靠性的两阶段RGB-T人群计数框架。
设计局部锚点融合模块（LAFM）和差异感知一致性约束，提升融合精度和可解释性。
analysis.experiments: 在RGBT-CC和Drone-RGBT两个基准数据集上，RACANet优于现有方法。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练阶段的人群先验，泛化到无先验场景需验证。
计算开销可能因两阶段训练而增加。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种显式建模局部空间差异和模态可靠性的两阶段融合框架RACANet，用于RGB-T人群计数。

papers.title: Layerwise Convergence Fingerprints for Runtime Misbehavior Detection in Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Large language models deployed at runtime can misbehave in ways that clean-data validation cannot anticipate: training-time backdoors lie dormant until triggered, jailbreaks subvert safety alignment, and prompt injections override the deployer's instructions. Existing runtime defenses address these threats one at a time and often assume a clean reference model, trigger knowledge, or editable weights, assumptions that rarely hold for opaque third-party artifacts. We introduce Layerwise Convergence Fingerprinting (LCF), a tuning-free runtime monitor that treats the inter-layer hidden-state trajectory as a health signal: LCF computes a diagonal Mahalanobis distance on every inter-layer difference, aggregates via Ledoit-Wolf shrinkage, and thresholds via leave-one-out calibration on 200 clean examples, with no reference model, trigger knowledge, or retraining. Evaluated on four architectures (Llama-3-8B, Qwen2.5-7B, Gemma-2-9B, Qwen2.5-14B) across backdoors, jailbreaks, and prompt injection (56 backdoor combinations, 3 jailbreak techniques, and BIPIA email + code-QA), LCF reduces mean backdoor attack success rate (ASR) below 1% on Qwen2.5-7B and Gemma-2 and to 1.3% on Qwen2.5-14B, detects 92-100% of DAN jailbreaks (62-100% for GCG and softer role-play), and flags 100% of text-payload injections across all eight (model, domain) cells, at 12-16% backdoor FPR and <0.1% inference overhead. A single aggregation score covers all three threat families without threat-specific tuning, positioning LCF as a general-purpose runtime safety layer for cloud-served and on-device LLMs.

analysis.tldr: 提出层间收敛指纹（LCF），无需微调即可在运行时检测LLM的后门、越狱和提示注入攻击。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在部署后可能因后门、越狱或提示注入而出现异常行为，现有运行时防御方法通常针对单一威胁且依赖干净参考模型、触发知识或可编辑权重，不适用于不透明的第三方模型。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖参考模型、触发知识或重训练的情况下，统一检测LLM运行时多种类型的恶意行为（后门、越狱、提示注入）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 层间收敛指纹（LCF）：计算每层隐藏状态差异的对角马氏距离，通过Ledoit-Wolf收缩聚合，并在200个干净样本上使用留一法校准阈值，无需参考模型、触发知识或重训练。
contributions: 提出一种无需微调的运行时监控方法LCF，可统一检测后门、越狱和提示注入三类威胁。
在四种架构和多种攻击组合上验证了有效性，后门攻击成功率降至1%以下，越狱检测率92-100%，提示注入检测率100%，推理开销低于0.1%。
analysis.experiments: 在Llama-3-8B、Qwen2.5-7B、Gemma-2-9B、Qwen2.5-14B上评估，涵盖56种后门组合、3种越狱技术和BIPIA邮件+代码QA注入，后门ASR降至1%以下，DAN越狱检测率92-100%，提示注入检测率100%，后门FPR 12-16%，推理开销<0.1%。
limitations: 可能对更复杂的自适应攻击效果有限。
需要200个干净样本进行校准，在某些场景下可能不易获取。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出层间收敛指纹（LCF），无需微调即可在运行时检测LLM的后门、越狱和提示注入攻击。

papers.title: Sure About That Line? Approaching Confidence-Based, Real-Time Line Assignment in Reading Gaze Data
papers.abstract: Remote and webcam-based eye tracking in multi-line reading suffers from various noise factors and layout ambiguity, precisely where real-time reading support needs reliable, per-fixation line assignment. Prior work largely addresses this challenge post hoc or by restricting behavior (e.g., disallowing re-reading), undermining interactive use. We propose CONF-LA (Confidence-score-based Online Fixation-to-Line Assignment), a principled, low-latency approach that integrates knowledge about reading behavior and Gaussian line likelihoods over fixations to compute a posterior-line-score and defers assignments when uncertainty is high. Evaluated on existing open-source data, CONF-LA demonstrates stable performance in post hoc analysis and closes the online-offline gap (1-2 %) with a mean per-fixation latency of 0.348 ms. Our approach exhibits particular invariance toward regressions, yielding significant improvement in ad hoc median accuracies on children data (approx. 95 %) over all tested algorithms. We encourage further research in this direction and discuss possibilities for future development.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于置信度的实时注视点行分配方法，在阅读眼动数据中实现低延迟、高鲁棒的行分配。
analysis.research_motivation: 远程和网络摄像头眼动追踪在多行阅读中受噪声和布局歧义影响，现有方法多为事后处理或限制行为（如禁止回读），无法满足实时交互需求。
analysis.problem: 实时阅读支持中，如何为每个注视点可靠地分配所属文本行，同时应对噪声、回读等挑战。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出CONF-LA方法，集成阅读行为知识和基于高斯分布的行似然度，计算后验行分数，在高不确定性时推迟分配。
contributions: 提出一种低延迟、基于置信度的实时注视点行分配方法CONF-LA。
在开源数据上验证，在线与离线性能差距缩小至1-2%，平均每注视点延迟0.348毫秒。
对回读行为具有不变性，在儿童数据上中位准确率提升至约95%。
analysis.experiments: 在现有开源数据上评估，进行事后分析和在线实验，报告了准确率和延迟指标。
limitations: 可能依赖特定阅读行为假设，泛化性需进一步验证。
未提及对极端噪声或低质量眼动数据的鲁棒性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于置信度的实时注视点行分配方法，在阅读眼动数据中实现低延迟、高鲁棒的行分配。

papers.title: Interoceptive machine framework: Toward interoception-inspired regulatory architectures in artificial intelligence
papers.abstract: This review proposes an integrative framework grounded on interoception and embodied AI-termed the interoceptive machine framework-that translates biologically inspired principles of internal-state regulation into computational architectures for adaptive autonomy. Interoception, conceived as the monitoring, integration, and regulation of internal signals, has proven relevant for understanding adaptive behavior in biological systems. The proposed framework organizes interoceptive contributions into three functional principles: homeostatic, allostatic, and enactive, each associated with distinct computational roles: internal viability regulation, anticipatory uncertainty-based re-evaluation, and active data generation through interaction. These principles are not intended as direct neurophysiological mappings, but as abstractions that inform the design of artificial agents with improved self-regulation and context-sensitive behavior. By embedding internal state variables and regulatory loops within these principles, AI systems can achieve more robust decision-making, calibrated uncertainty handling, and adaptive interaction strategies, particularly in uncertain and dynamic environments. This approach provides a concrete and testable pathway toward agents capable of functionally grounded self-regulation, with direct implications for human-computer interaction and assistive technologies. Ultimately, the interoceptive machine framework offers a unifying perspective on how internal-state regulation can enhance autonomy, adaptivity, and robustness in embodied AI systems

analysis.tldr: 提出内感受机器框架，将生物内感受原理转化为AI自适应调节架构。
analysis.research_motivation: 生物系统通过内感受实现自适应行为，而当前AI缺乏类似的内状态调节机制，导致在动态环境中决策鲁棒性不足。
analysis.problem: 如何将内感受的生物原理抽象为计算架构，以增强AI系统的自我调节和上下文敏感行为。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出内感受机器框架，包含稳态、应变和能动三个功能原则，分别对应内部生存力调节、基于不确定性的预期重评估和通过交互主动生成数据。
contributions: 提出内感受机器框架，将生物内感受原理系统化地映射到AI计算架构。
定义了三个功能原则（稳态、应变、能动）及其计算角色，为设计自适应智能体提供可测试路径。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 框架为概念性综述，缺乏实证验证。

analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs

papers.title: Understanding the Limits of Automated Evaluation for Code Review Bots in Practice
papers.abstract: Automated code review (ACR) bots are increasingly used in industrial software development to assist developers during pull request (PR) review. As adoption grows, a key challenge is how to evaluate the usefulness of bot-generated comments reliably and at scale. In practice, such evaluation often relies on developer actions and annotations that are shaped by contextual and organizational factors, complicating their use as objective ground truth. We examine the feasibility and limitations of automating the evaluation of LLM-powered ACR bots in an industrial setting. We analyze an industrial dataset from Beko comprising 2,604 bot-generated PR comments, each labeled by software engineers as fixed/wontFix. Two automated evaluation approaches, G-Eval and an LLM-as-a-Judge pipeline, are applied using both binary decisions and a 0-4 Likert-scale formulation, enabling a controlled comparison against developer-provided labels. Across Gemini-2.5-pro, GPT-4.1-mini, and GPT-5.2, both evaluation strategies achieve only moderate alignment with human labels. Agreement ratios range from approximately 0.44 to 0.62, with noticeable variation across models and between binary and Likert-scale formulations, indicating sensitivity to both model choice and evaluation design. Our findings highlight practical limitations in fully automating the evaluation of ACR bot comments in industrial contexts. Developer actions such as resolving or ignoring comments reflect not only comment quality, but also contextual constraints, prioritization decisions, and workflow dynamics that are difficult to capture through static artifacts. Insights from a follow-up interview with a software engineering director further corroborate that developer labeling behavior is strongly influenced by workflow pressures and organizational constraints, reinforcing the challenges of treating such signals as objective ground truth.

analysis.tldr: 工业环境下自动化评估代码审查机器人评论的可行性有限，开发者标签受组织因素影响，难以作为客观标准。
analysis.research_motivation: 自动化代码审查机器人被广泛使用，但如何可靠且大规模地评估其生成评论的有用性是一个关键挑战，现有依赖开发者行为或标注的方法受组织因素干扰。
analysis.problem: 评估LLM驱动的自动化代码审查机器人评论的自动化方法的可行性和局限性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 开发者对评论的修复/忽略行为不仅反映评论质量，还受上下文约束、优先级决策和工作流动态影响，难以作为客观真实标签。
analysis.method: 使用G-Eval和LLM-as-a-Judge两种自动化评估方法，采用二元决策和0-4 Likert量表，对比开发者标签。
contributions: 揭示了工业环境下自动化评估ACR机器人评论的实践局限性。
通过访谈证实开发者标注行为受工作流压力和组织约束影响。
analysis.experiments: 在Beko工业数据集上（2604条评论），使用Gemini-2.5-pro、GPT-4.1-mini和GPT-5.2进行评估，与开发者标签对比，一致性比率约0.44-0.62。
limitations: 仅基于单一工业数据集，可能不具普遍性。
自动化评估方法仅测试了两种，未涵盖所有可能方案。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 工业环境下自动化评估代码审查机器人评论的可行性有限，开发者标签受组织因素影响，难以作为客观标准。

papers.title: Point Cloud Registration for Fusion between SPECT MPI and CTA Images
papers.abstract: Clinical fusion of Single Photon Emission Computed Tomography Myocardial Perfusion Imaging (SPECT MPI) and Computed Tomography Angiography (CTA) remains limited by cross-modality misregistration and reliance on manual landmarks, which can hinder accurate ischemia localization and lesion-level functional assessment. To address this issue, we propose a registration and fusion framework for SPECT MPI and CTA that integrates functional and structural information for comprehensive cardiac evaluation. The proposed pipeline performs U-Net-based segmentation on both modalities. On SPECT MPI, only the left ventricle (LV) is extracted, and anatomical landmarks are automatically derived from characteristic LV structures. On CTA, both ventricles are segmented, and their spatial relationship is used to automatically define landmarks at the interventricular septal junction. Scale-space consistency preprocessing and landmark-driven coarse registration are applied to mitigate initial misalignment. Based on this initialization, multiple fine registration methods are evaluated on LV epicardial surface point clouds, including ICP, SICP, CPD, CluReg, FFD, and BCPD-plus-plus. The resulting transformations are then propagated to voxel-level resampling for high-precision SPECT-CTA fusion. In a retrospective cohort of 60 patients, the proposed framework preserved sub-millimeter coronary detail from CTA while accurately overlaying quantitative SPECT perfusion. Among the evaluated methods, BCPD-plus-plus achieved the highest accuracy with a mean point cloud distance of 1.7 mm. By combining robust initialization, comparative fine registration, and voxel-level fusion, the proposed approach provides a practical solution for myocardial ischemia localization and functional evaluation of coronary lesions, while remaining independent of any specific fine registration algorithm.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种结合U-Net分割、自动地标提取与多种精细配准方法的SPECT MPI与CTA图像配准融合框架，BCPD-plus-plus达到1.7mm平均点云距离。
analysis.research_motivation: SPECT MPI与CTA的临床融合受限于跨模态配准误差和依赖人工标记，影响缺血定位和病变功能评估的准确性。
analysis.problem: 解决SPECT MPI与CTA图像之间的跨模态配准问题，实现高精度融合以支持心肌缺血定位和冠状动脉病变功能评估。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 先对两种模态进行U-Net分割，从SPECT MPI提取左心室并自动获取解剖地标，从CTA分割双心室并基于室间隔交界定义地标；通过尺度空间一致性预处理和地标驱动粗配准初始化，再在左心室心外膜表面点云上评估多种精细配准方法（ICP、SICP、CPD、CluReg、FFD、BCPD-plus-plus），最后将变换传播到体素级重采样实现高精度融合。
contributions: 提出一个独立于特定精细配准算法的SPECT-CTA配准融合框架，结合自动地标提取和多种配准方法比较。
在60例患者回顾性队列中验证框架能保留CTA亚毫米冠脉细节并准确叠加SPECT灌注信息，BCPD-plus-plus达到1.7mm平均点云距离。
analysis.experiments: 在60例患者的回顾性队列中评估，BCPD-plus-plus达到最高精度（平均点云距离1.7mm）。
limitations: 仅基于左心室心外膜表面点云进行精细配准，可能忽略其他解剖结构信息。
依赖U-Net分割质量，分割误差可能影响配准精度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种结合U-Net分割、自动地标提取与多种精细配准方法的SPECT MPI与CTA图像配准融合框架，BCPD-plus-plus达到1.7mm平均点云距离。

papers.title: Why AI Harms Can't Be Fixed One Identity at a Time: What 5300 Incident Reports Reveal About Intersectionality
papers.abstract: AI risk assessment is the primary tool for identifying harms caused by AI systems. These include intersectional harms, which arise from the interaction between identity categories (e.g., class and skin tone) and which do not occur, or occur differently, when those categories are considered separately. Yet existing AI risk assessments are still built around isolated identity categories, and when intersections are considered, they focus almost exclusively on race and gender. Drawing on a large-scale analysis of documented AI incidents, we show that AI harms do not occur one identity category at a time. Using a structured rubric applied with a Large Language Model (LLM), we analyze 5,300 reports from 1,200 documented incidents in the AI Incident Database, the most curated source of incident data. From these reports, we identify 1,513 harmed subjects and their associated identity categories, achieving 98% accuracy. At the level of individual categories, we find that age and political identity appear in documented AI harms at rates comparable to race and gender. At the level of intersecting categories, harm is amplified up to three times at specific intersections: adolescent girls, lower-class people of color, and upper-class political elites. We argue that intersectionality should be a core component of AI risk assessment to more accurately capture how harms are produced and distributed across social groups.

analysis.tldr: 分析5300份AI事故报告发现，伤害在身份交叉处（如青少年女性、有色人种下层阶级）被放大三倍，呼吁将交叉性纳入AI风险评估。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有AI风险评估主要基于单一身份类别，忽略了交叉性伤害（如阶级与肤色的交互作用），导致对伤害的识别和缓解不准确。
analysis.problem: 如何系统性地证明AI伤害在身份交叉处被放大，并推动风险评估纳入交叉性视角。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通过大规模事故报告分析，发现年龄和政治身份在AI伤害中出现频率与种族和性别相当；在特定交叉类别（如青少年女性、有色人种下层阶级、上层政治精英）中，伤害被放大至三倍。
analysis.method: 利用结构化评分规则和大型语言模型（LLM）分析AI事故数据库中的5300份报告，识别1513名受害主体及其身份类别，准确率达98%。
contributions: 提供了大规模实证证据，证明AI伤害在身份交叉处显著放大。
呼吁将交叉性作为AI风险评估的核心组成部分。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提及分析了5300份报告，识别1513名受害主体，准确率98%。
limitations: 依赖AI事故数据库，可能遗漏未记录的事件。
LLM辅助分类可能存在偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 分析5300份AI事故报告发现，伤害在身份交叉处（如青少年女性、有色人种下层阶级）被放大三倍，呼吁将交叉性纳入AI风险评估。

papers.title: Beyond the Attention Stability Boundary: Agentic Self-Synthesizing Reasoning Protocols
papers.abstract: As LLM agents transition to autonomous digital coworkers, maintaining deterministic goal-directedness in non-linear multi-turn conversations emerged as an architectural bottleneck. We identify and formalize a systemic failure mode termed the Attention Latch in decoder-only autoregressive Transformers. This phenomenon, a behavioral manifestation of Information Over-squashing, occurs when the cumulative probabilistic weight of historical context overrides mid-task updates, causing agents to remain anchored to obsolete constraints despite explicit contradictory instructions. We propose Self-Synthesizing Reasoning Protocols (SSRP), a metacognitive framework that implements a discrete separation between high-level architectural planning (Architect) and turn-by-turn procedural execution (Executive). We evaluate SSRP across 9K trajectories using the MultiWOZ 2.2 dataset and the Aggregate Pivot Accuracy (APA), a novel metric we validate by mapping its scores to the U-shaped 'Lost in the Middle' curve. We present 3 experimental tiers: a shallow recency-based retrieval pilot, a high-entropy SOP, and a semantic hijacked 3-hop Multi-Fact Synthesis task. Our results empirically locate the Attention Stability Boundary, where stateless Vanilla ReAct baselines for GPT 5.4 collapse to 0.1% success while SSRP achieves a 715X Resilience Lift. We demonstrate statistically significant gains across Gemini 3.1 Pro, Claude Sonnet 4.6 and DeepSeek V3.2. Audits confirm SSRP necessity by proving attentional lapse via a recursive reflexion baseline (100% success); decoupling the latch from positional bias through equidistant stress testing (90% accuracy); and formalizing SSRP via the Information Bottleneck principle and granularity ablations. Procedural Integrity audit (98.8% adherence) reveals a Grounding Paradox where high-stability models fail by refusing to hallucinate under retrieval-reasoning contamination.

analysis.tldr: 提出自合成推理协议（SSRP）解决LLM Agent在长对话中的注意力锁定问题，实现715倍韧性提升。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM Agent向自主数字同事过渡时，非线性多轮对话中的确定性目标导向成为架构瓶颈，现有方法无法有效处理历史上下文对中途更新的覆盖问题。
analysis.problem: 解码器仅自回归Transformer中注意力锁定（Attention Latch）导致的系统故障，即历史上下文的累积概率权重覆盖中途任务更新，使Agent固守过时约束。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 注意力锁定是信息过度压缩的行为表现，通过注意力稳定性边界（Attention Stability Boundary）可定位该现象，且高稳定性模型在检索-推理污染下因拒绝幻觉而失败（接地悖论）。
analysis.method: 自合成推理协议（SSRP），一种元认知框架，将高层架构规划（Architect）与逐轮程序执行（Executive）离散分离。
contributions: 形式化并实证了注意力锁定故障模式及其与信息过度压缩的关系
提出SSRP元认知框架实现架构规划与执行分离
引入聚合枢轴准确率（APA）新指标并映射至'Lost in the Middle'曲线
在MultiWOZ 2.2上9K轨迹实验，SSRP在GPT 5.4上实现715倍韧性提升
analysis.experiments: 在MultiWOZ 2.2数据集上使用9K轨迹，包含三个实验层级：浅层基于近期性的检索试点、高熵SOP、语义劫持3跳多事实合成任务。评估了GPT 5.4、Gemini 3.1 Pro、Claude Sonnet 4.6和DeepSeek V3.2。
limitations: 仅基于MultiWOZ 2.2数据集，泛化性需更多验证
SSRP的元认知框架可能增加计算开销
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出自合成推理协议（SSRP）解决LLM Agent在长对话中的注意力锁定问题，实现715倍韧性提升。

papers.title: MIMIC: A Generative Multimodal Foundation Model for Biomolecules
papers.abstract: Biological function emerges from coupled constraints across sequence, structure, regulation, evolution, and cellular context, yet most foundation models in biology are trained within one modality or for a fixed forward task. We present MIMIC, a generative multimodal foundation model trained on our newly curated and aligned dataset, LORE, linking nucleic acid, protein, evolutionary, structural, regulatory, and semantic/contextual modalities within partially observed biomolecular states. MIMIC uses a split-track encoder-decoder architecture to condition on arbitrary subsets of observed modalities and reconstruct or generate missing components of molecular state across the genome, transcriptome, and proteome. Multimodal conditioning consistently improves MIMIC's sequence reconstruction relative to sequence-only inputs, while its learned representations enable state-of-the-art performance on RNA and protein downstream tasks. MIMIC achieves state-of-the-art splicing prediction, and its joint generative formulation enables isoform-aware inference that further improves performance. Beyond prediction, the same generative framework supports constrained design. For RNA, MIMIC identifies corrective edits in a clinically relevant HBB splice-disrupting mutation without reverting it by using evolutionary and structural signals. For proteins, jointly conditioning on shape and surface chemistry of PD-L1 and hACE2 binding sites produces diverse, high-confidence sequences with strong in silico support for target binding. Finally, MIMIC uses experimental context as semantic conditioning to model assay-dependent RNA chemical probing, rather than treating context as a fixed output. Together, these results position MIMIC's aligned multimodal generative modeling as a strong foundation for unifying representation learning, conditional prediction, and constrained biomolecular design within a single model.

analysis.tldr: MIMIC是一个生成式多模态基础模型，通过联合建模核酸、蛋白质、结构、调控、进化和语义模态，实现生物分子状态的重建、预测和约束设计。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有生物基础模型大多局限于单一模态或固定前向任务，无法捕捉序列、结构、调控、进化与细胞环境之间的耦合约束，限制了模型对生物功能的全面理解和生成能力。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个统一的生成式多模态模型，能够处理部分观测的生物分子状态，并支持跨模态重建、预测和约束设计。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 多模态条件一致地改善了序列重建性能，且联合生成公式支持异构体感知推理，进一步提升了剪接预测等下游任务的表现。
analysis.method: 提出MIMIC模型，采用分裂轨道编码器-解码器架构，在部分观测的生物分子状态下，以任意子集模态为条件，重建或生成缺失的分子状态组件；同时构建了多模态对齐数据集LORE。
contributions: 提出了首个生成式多模态生物分子基础模型MIMIC，统一了表示学习、条件预测和约束设计。
构建了多模态对齐数据集LORE，连接核酸、蛋白质、进化、结构、调控和语义模态。
在RNA和蛋白质下游任务上达到最先进性能，包括剪接预测和约束设计（如纠正致病突变、设计结合序列）。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提及在RNA和蛋白质下游任务上达到最先进性能，包括剪接预测和约束设计案例。
limitations: 可能依赖大规模多模态对齐数据，数据构建成本高。
生成序列的湿实验验证尚未在摘要中提及。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: MIMIC是一个生成式多模态基础模型，通过联合建模核酸、蛋白质、结构、调控、进化和语义模态，实现生物分子状态的重建、预测和约束设计。

papers.title: Salca: A Sparsity-Aware Hardware Accelerator for Efficient Long-Context Attention Decoding
papers.abstract: Long contexts improve capabilities of large language models but pose serious hardware challenges: compute and memory footprints grow linearly with sequence length. Particularly, the decoding phase continuously accesses massive KV cache, dramatically increasing bandwidth and computing pressure. Existing accelerators are primarily designed and evaluated for short contexts. They suffer from significant performance degradation when processing long contexts. To bridge this gap, we identify the major bottleneck and present a hardware accelerator for long context attention decoding via hardware-software co-design. On the software side, we propose dual-compression dynamic sparse attention. It combines ultra-low-precision quantization with feature sparsity to minimize prediction overhead. A hardware-friendly approximate Top-K selection further reduces filter complexity from $O(n \log k)$ to $O(n)$. On the hardware side, we deeply optimize compute and memory access to tackle bottlenecks from intricate interplay between sparse attention and long contexts, and establish a performance model to derive the optimal co-design scheme. The resulting hardware adopts a fully pipelined parallel architecture and achieves $O(n)$ efficiency even for long sequences. Experiments show that our design delivers $3.82\times$ speedup and $74.19\times$ energy efficiency over A100. Compared to SOTA accelerators, this is the first ASIC accelerator that efficiently supports long context inference, with at least $3.5\times$ higher throughput and $2.08\times$ better energy efficiency.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种软硬件协同设计的稀疏注意力加速器，实现长上下文解码的高吞吐和能效。
analysis.research_motivation: 长上下文场景下，现有硬件加速器因KV缓存和计算压力大而性能严重下降，亟需针对长上下文优化的专用加速方案。
analysis.problem: 长上下文注意力解码中计算和内存开销随序列长度线性增长，现有加速器无法高效处理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 软硬件协同设计：软件端提出双压缩动态稀疏注意力（超低精度量化+特征稀疏性）和近似Top-K选择（复杂度O(n)）；硬件端采用全流水线并行架构，并建立性能模型指导最优设计。
contributions: 提出首个支持长上下文推理的ASIC加速器，吞吐量比SOTA加速器高至少3.5倍。
实现3.82倍加速和74.19倍能效提升（对比A100），且复杂度为O(n)。
analysis.experiments: 在长上下文注意力解码任务上，与A100和SOTA加速器对比，报告了速度、能效和吞吐量指标。
limitations: 可能仅针对特定稀疏模式优化，通用性待验证。
近似Top-K选择可能引入精度损失。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种软硬件协同设计的稀疏注意力加速器，实现长上下文解码的高吞吐和能效。

papers.title: Programming with Data: Test-Driven Data Engineering for Self-Improving LLMs from Raw Corpora
papers.abstract: Reliably transferring specialized human knowledge from text into large language models remains a fundamental challenge in artificial intelligence. Fine-tuning on domain corpora has enabled substantial capability gains, but the process operates without feedback: when a model fails on a domain task, there is no method to diagnose what is deficient in the training data, and the only recourse is to add more data indiscriminately. Here we show that when a structured knowledge representation extracted from the source corpus serves as the shared foundation for both training data and evaluation, the complete data-engineering lifecycle maps onto the software development lifecycle in a precise and operative way: training data becomes source code specifying what the model should learn, model training becomes compilation, benchmarking becomes unit testing, and failure-driven data repair becomes debugging. Under this correspondence, model failures decompose into concept-level gaps and reasoning-chain breaks that can be traced back to specific deficiencies in the data and repaired through targeted patches, with each repair cycle producing consistent improvements across model scales and architectures without degrading general capabilities. We formalize this principle as Programming with Data and instantiate it across sixteen disciplines spanning the natural sciences, engineering, biomedicine, and the social sciences, releasing a structured knowledge base, benchmark suite, and training corpus as open resources. By demonstrating that the relationship between training data and model behaviour is structurally traceable and systematically repairable, this work establishes a principled foundation for the reliable engineering of human expertise into language models.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种将数据工程映射为软件工程的方法，使LLM训练数据可诊断、可修复，实现系统性能力提升。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前微调领域语料缺乏反馈机制，模型失败时无法诊断训练数据缺陷，只能盲目增加数据，效率低下且不可控。
analysis.problem: 如何将训练数据与模型行为之间的关联变得可追溯、可诊断、可修复，从而系统性地将人类专业知识可靠地注入LLM。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型失败可分解为概念级缺口和推理链断裂，这些可追溯到数据中的具体缺陷，通过针对性修补可带来一致改进。
analysis.method: 提出Programming with Data框架，将结构化知识表示作为训练数据和评估的共同基础，使数据工程生命周期与软件开发生命周期精确对应：训练数据=源代码，模型训练=编译，基准测试=单元测试，失败驱动数据修复=调试。
contributions: 形式化了Programming with Data原则，建立了数据工程与软件工程的精确映射。
在16个学科上实例化该方法，并开源结构化知识库、基准套件和训练语料。
证明训练数据与模型行为的关系是可结构追踪和系统修复的，为可靠工程化人类知识奠定基础。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提到在16个学科上实例化，并开源资源。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的结构化知识表示，构建成本较高。
修复效果可能受限于知识表示的完备性和粒度。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种将数据工程映射为软件工程的方法，使LLM训练数据可诊断、可修复，实现系统性能力提升。

papers.title: Self-Supervised Representation Learning via Hyperspherical Density Shaping
papers.abstract: Modern self-supervised representation learning methods often relies on empirical heuristics that are not theoretically grounded. In this study we propose HyDeS, a theoretically grounded method based on multi-view mutual information maximization within an hyperspherical space using Shannon differential entropy with a non-parametric von Mises-Fisher density estimator. We show that HyDeS bias the trained model towards focusing on foreground features of the images and perform well on segmentation tasks such as VOC PASCAL, while it lags in fine-grained classification. We provide a detailed analysis of the induced latent space geometry and learning dynamics, that can be used for designing other theoretically grounded self-supervised learning methods.

analysis.tldr: HyDeS通过超球面密度塑形实现自监督表征学习，理论驱动且在前景分割任务上表现优异。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有自监督表征学习方法多依赖经验启发式，缺乏理论支撑，导致设计不透明且泛化性受限。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个理论驱动的自监督表征学习方法，使其能够学习到关注前景特征的表征，并在下游任务中表现良好。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出HyDeS，基于多视角互信息最大化，在超球面空间中使用Shannon微分熵和非参数von Mises-Fisher密度估计器进行密度塑形。
contributions: 提出理论驱动的自监督学习方法HyDeS，基于超球面密度塑形。
揭示了诱导的潜在空间几何和学习动态，为设计其他理论驱动的自监督方法提供指导。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 在细粒度分类任务上表现不佳。
可能对超参数敏感，需要进一步调优。
analysis.primary_area_en: unsupervised, self-supervised, semi-supervised, and supervised representation learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: HyDeS通过超球面密度塑形实现自监督表征学习，理论驱动且在前景分割任务上表现优异。

papers.title: CA-IDD: Cross-Attention Guided Identity-Conditional Diffusion for Identity-Consistent Face Swapping
papers.abstract: Face swapping aims to optimize realistic facial image generation by leveraging the identity of a source face onto a target face while preserving pose, expression, and context. However, existing methods, especially GAN-based methods, often struggle to balance identity preservation and visual realism due to limited controllability and mode collapse. In this paper, we introduce CA-IDD (Cross-Attention Guided Identity-Conditional Diffusion), the first diffusion-based face swapping approach that integrates multi-modal guidance comprising gaze, identity, and facial parsing through multi-scale cross-attention. Precomputed identity embeddings are incorporated into the denoising process via hierarchical attention layers, resulting in accurate and consistent identity transfer. To improve semantic coherence and visual quality, we use expert-guided supervision, with facial parsing and gaze-consistency modules. Unlike GAN-based or implicit-fusion methods, our diffusion framework provides stable training, robust generalization, and spatially adaptive identity alignment, allowing for fine-grained regional control across pose and expression variations. CA-IDD achieves an FID of 11.73, exceeding established baselines such as FaceShifter and MegaFS. Qualitative results also reveal improved identity retention across diverse poses, establishing CA-IDD as a strong foundation for future diffusion-based face editing.

analysis.tldr: 首个基于扩散模型的换脸方法，通过交叉注意力引导身份条件实现高保真换脸。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于GAN的换脸方法在身份保持和视觉真实感之间难以平衡，且存在可控性差和模式崩溃问题。
analysis.problem: 如何实现身份一致且视觉真实的换脸，同时保持目标人脸的表情、姿态和背景。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: GAN方法在身份保持和视觉真实感上存在权衡，且训练不稳定、泛化能力弱。
analysis.method: 提出CA-IDD，一种基于扩散模型的换脸方法，通过多尺度交叉注意力融合凝视、身份和人脸解析等多模态引导，并在去噪过程中通过层次注意力层注入预计算的身份嵌入。
contributions: 首个基于扩散模型的换脸方法，实现身份一致且视觉真实的换脸。
提出多尺度交叉注意力机制，融合凝视、身份和人脸解析等多模态引导。
在FID指标上达到11.73，超越FaceShifter和MegaFS等基线方法。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集上评估，FID为11.73，定性结果展示跨姿态的身份保持能力。
limitations: 可能对极端姿态或遮挡的鲁棒性有限。
计算成本可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个基于扩散模型的换脸方法，通过交叉注意力引导身份条件实现高保真换脸。

papers.title: Deployment-Aligned Low-Precision Neural Architecture Search for Spaceborne Edge AI
papers.abstract: Designing deep networks that meet strict latency and accuracy constraints on edge accelerators increasingly relies on hardware-aware optimization, including neural architecture search (NAS) guided by device-level metrics. Yet most hardware-aware NAS pipelines still optimize architectures under full-precision assumptions and apply low-precision adaptation only after the search, leading to a mismatch between optimization-time behavior and deployment-time execution on low-precision hardware that can substantially degrade accuracy. We address this limitation by integrating deployment-aligned low-precision training directly into hardware-aware NAS. Candidate architectures are exposed to FP16 numerical constraints during fine-tuning and evaluation, enabling joint optimization of architectural efficiency and numerical robustness without modifying the search space or evolutionary strategy. We evaluate the proposed framework on vessel segmentation for spaceborne maritime monitoring, targeting the Intel Movidius Myriad X Visual Processing Unit (VPU). While post-training precision conversion reduces on-device performance from 0.85 to 0.78 mIoU, deployment-aligned low-precision training achieves 0.826 mIoU on-device for the same architecture (95,791 parameters), recovering approximately two-thirds of deployment-induced accuracy gap without increasing model complexity. These results demonstrate that incorporating deployment-consistent numerical constraints into hardware-aware NAS substantially improves robustness and alignment between optimization and deployment for resource-constrained edge Artificial Intelligence (AI).

analysis.tldr: 将低精度训练直接集成到硬件感知的神经架构搜索中，以缩小优化与部署之间的精度差距。
analysis.research_motivation: 边缘加速器上的深度网络设计依赖硬件感知优化，但现有NAS在搜索时假设全精度，部署时低精度适配导致精度显著下降。
analysis.problem: 解决硬件感知NAS中优化时全精度假设与部署时低精度执行之间的不匹配问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到后训练精度转换使mIoU从0.85降至0.78，而部署对齐的低精度训练可恢复约三分之二的精度损失。
analysis.method: 在硬件感知NAS中直接集成部署对齐的低精度训练，候选架构在微调和评估时暴露于FP16数值约束，实现架构效率与数值鲁棒性的联合优化。
contributions: 提出部署对齐的低精度NAS框架，无需修改搜索空间或进化策略。
在空间监视船舶分割任务上验证，恢复约三分之二的部署精度损失，参数仅95,791。
analysis.experiments: 在Intel Movidius Myriad X VPU上评估船舶分割任务，对比后训练精度转换（0.78 mIoU）与部署对齐训练（0.826 mIoU）。
limitations: 仅针对FP16数值约束，未探索其他低精度格式。
仅在单一任务和硬件平台上验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将低精度训练直接集成到硬件感知的神经架构搜索中，以缩小优化与部署之间的精度差距。

papers.title: Zero-to-CAD: Agentic Synthesis of Interpretable CAD Programs at Million-Scale Without Real Data
papers.abstract: Computer-Aided Design (CAD) models are defined by their construction history: a parametric recipe that encodes design intent. However, existing large-scale 3D datasets predominantly consist of boundary representations (B-Reps) or meshes, stripping away this critical procedural information. To address this scarcity, we introduce Zero-to-CAD, a scalable framework for synthesizing executable CAD construction sequences. We frame synthesis as an agentic search problem: by embedding a large language model (LLM) within a feedback-driven CAD environment, our system iteratively generates, executes, and validates code using tools and documentation lookup to promote geometric validity and operation diversity. This agentic approach enables the synthesis of approximately one million executable, readable, editable CAD sequences, covering a rich vocabulary of operations beyond sketch-and-extrude workflows. We also release a curated subset of 100,000 high-quality models selected for geometric diversity. To demonstrate the dataset's utility, we fine-tune a vision-language model on our synthetic data to reconstruct editable CAD programs from multi-view images, outperforming strong baselines, including GPT-5.2, and effectively bootstrapping sequence generation capabilities without real construction-history training data. Zero-to-CAD bridges the gap between geometric scale and parametric interpretability, offering a vital resource for the next generation of CAD AI.

analysis.tldr: 提出Zero-to-CAD框架，通过LLM智能体在CAD环境中迭代生成百万级可执行、可编辑的CAD程序，无需真实数据。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有大规模3D数据集（如B-Reps或网格）缺乏CAD模型的构造历史（参数化流程），限制了可解释性和编辑能力，而真实CAD构造序列数据稀缺且获取成本高。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖真实数据的情况下，大规模合成可执行、可读、可编辑的CAD构造序列。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将CAD序列合成建模为智能体搜索问题：将大语言模型嵌入反馈驱动的CAD环境，通过迭代生成、执行和验证代码，并利用工具和文档查找来保证几何有效性和操作多样性。
contributions: 提出Zero-to-CAD框架，无需真实数据即可合成约一百万条可执行、可读、可编辑的CAD构造序列。
发布一个包含10万高质量模型的子集，并展示其在下游任务（从多视图图像重建可编辑CAD程序）中的有效性，微调视觉语言模型后性能超越GPT-5.2等强基线。
analysis.experiments: 在从多视图图像重建CAD程序的任务上，使用合成数据微调视觉语言模型，性能超越GPT-5.2等强基线。
limitations: 合成数据与真实CAD构造序列之间可能存在分布差异，影响泛化性。
框架依赖LLM的代码生成能力，可能受限于LLM的推理和错误恢复能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Zero-to-CAD框架，通过LLM智能体在CAD环境中迭代生成百万级可执行、可编辑的CAD程序，无需真实数据。

papers.title: GAMMAF: A Common Framework for Graph-Based Anomaly Monitoring Benchmarking in LLM Multi-Agent Systems
papers.abstract: The rapid integration of Large Language Models (LLMs) into Multi-Agent Systems (MAS) has significantly enhanced their collaborative problem-solving capabilities, but it has also expanded their attack surfaces, exposing them to vulnerabilities such as prompt infection and compromised inter-agent communication. While emerging graph-based anomaly detection methods show promise in protecting these networks, the field currently lacks a standardized, reproducible environment to train these models and evaluate their efficacy. To address this gap, we introduce Gammaf (Graph-based Anomaly Monitoring for LLM Multi-Agent systems Framework), an open-source benchmarking platform. Gammaf is not a novel defense mechanism itself, but rather a comprehensive evaluation architecture designed to generate synthetic multi-agent interaction datasets and benchmark the performance of existing and future defense models. The proposed framework operates through two interdependent pipelines: a Training Data Generation stage, which simulates debates across varied network topologies to capture interactions as robust attributed graphs, and a Defense System Benchmarking stage, which actively evaluates defense models by dynamically isolating flagged adversarial nodes during live inference rounds. Through rigorous evaluation using established defense baselines (XG-Guard and BlindGuard) across multiple knowledge tasks (such as MMLU-Pro and GSM8K), we demonstrate Gammaf's high utility, topological scalability, and execution efficiency. Furthermore, our experimental results reveal that equipping an LLM-MAS with effective attack remediation not only recovers system integrity but also substantially reduces overall operational costs by facilitating early consensus and cutting off the extensive token generation typical of adversarial agents.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个用于LLM多智能体系统中基于图的异常监控基准测试的标准化开源框架Gammaf。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM多智能体系统面临提示感染和智能体间通信受损等安全威胁，但缺乏标准化、可复现的评估环境来训练和评估基于图的异常检测方法。
analysis.problem: 缺乏统一的基准平台来生成合成多智能体交互数据集并评估防御模型的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验表明，有效的攻击修复不仅能恢复系统完整性，还能通过促进早期共识、减少对抗性智能体的token生成来降低运营成本。
analysis.method: Gammaf框架包含两个管道：训练数据生成阶段（模拟不同拓扑结构的辩论，生成属性图）和防御系统基准测试阶段（动态隔离标记的对抗节点）。
contributions: 提出Gammaf，一个开源的LLM多智能体系统基于图异常监控的基准测试平台。
通过两个管道（数据生成和防御评估）提供标准化评估环境。
在多个知识任务上使用现有防御基线验证了框架的实用性、可扩展性和效率。
analysis.experiments: 使用XG-Guard和BlindGuard作为防御基线，在MMLU-Pro和GSM8K等任务上评估，展示了高实用性、拓扑可扩展性和执行效率。
limitations: 仅使用合成数据集，可能无法完全反映真实攻击场景。
防御基线有限，未来需纳入更多方法。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个用于LLM多智能体系统中基于图的异常监控基准测试的标准化开源框架Gammaf。

papers.title: Agentic clinical reasoning over longitudinal myeloma records: a retrospective evaluation against expert consensus
papers.abstract: Multiple myeloma is managed through sequential lines of therapy over years to decades, with each decision depending on cumulative disease history distributed across dozens to hundreds of heterogeneous clinical documents. Whether LLM-based systems can synthesise this evidence at a level approaching expert agreement has not been established. A retrospective evaluation was conducted on longitudinal clinical records of 811 myeloma patients treated at a tertiary centre (2001-2026), covering 44,962 documents and 1,334,677 laboratory values, with external validation on MIMIC-IV. An agentic reasoning system was compared against single-pass retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), iterative RAG, and full-context input on 469 patient-question pairs from 48 templates at three complexity levels. Reference labels came from double annotation by four oncologists with senior haematologist adjudication. Iterative RAG and full-context input converged on a shared ceiling (75.4% vs 75.8%, p = 1.00). The agentic system reached 79.6% concordance (95% CI 76.4-82.8), exceeding both baselines (+3.8 and +4.2 pp; p = 0.006 and 0.007). Gains rose with question complexity, reaching +9.4 pp on criteria-based synthesis (p = 0.032), and with record length, reaching +13.5 pp in the top decile (n = 10). The system error rate (12.2%) was comparable to expert disagreement (13.6%), but severity was inverted: 57.8% of system errors were clinically significant versus 18.8% of expert disagreements. Agentic reasoning was the only approach to exceed the shared ceiling, with gains concentrated on the most complex questions and longest records. The greater clinical consequence of residual system errors indicates that prospective evaluation in routine care is required before these findings translate into patient benefit.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于智能体推理的临床决策系统，在多发性骨髓瘤纵向病历上达到79.6%的专家共识一致性，超越传统RAG方法，但错误严重性更高。
analysis.research_motivation: 多发性骨髓瘤管理需整合多年跨文档的复杂病历，现有LLM系统能否达到专家级证据综合能力尚未明确。
analysis.problem: 如何设计LLM系统以在长序列、多源异构临床文档中实现接近专家共识的推理与决策。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 迭代RAG与全上下文输入收敛于相同性能上限（约75%），而智能体推理突破该上限；系统错误率与专家分歧率相近，但系统错误中临床显著比例更高。
analysis.method: 构建智能体推理系统，通过多步推理、工具调用和证据综合处理纵向病历，并与单次RAG、迭代RAG及全上下文输入对比。
contributions: 首次在大型多发性骨髓瘤纵向数据集上评估LLM临床推理能力，覆盖811名患者、44,962份文档。
提出智能体推理系统，在复杂问题和长记录上显著优于现有RAG方法，达到79.6%专家一致性。
揭示系统错误与专家分歧的严重性差异，强调前瞻性评估的必要性。
analysis.experiments: 在811名多发性骨髓瘤患者（44,962份文档、1,334,677项实验室值）及MIMIC-IV外部验证集上，对469个患者-问题对进行回顾性评估，参考标准由四位肿瘤学家双标注并由资深血液学家裁定。
limitations: 系统错误中临床显著比例更高，可能限制实际应用。
仅基于回顾性数据，未在前瞻性临床环境中验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于智能体推理的临床决策系统，在多发性骨髓瘤纵向病历上达到79.6%的专家共识一致性，超越传统RAG方法，但错误严重性更高。

papers.title: Modeling Behavioral Intensity and Transitions for Generative Recommendation
papers.abstract: Multi-behavior recommendation aims to predict user conversions by modeling various interaction types that carry distinct intent signals. Recently, generative sequence modeling methods have emerged as an important paradigm for multi-behavior recommendation by achieving flexible sequence generation. However, existing generative methods typically treat behaviors as auxiliary token features and feed them into unified attention mechanisms. These models implicitly assume uniform activation of dependencies among historical behaviors, thereby failing to discern differences in intensity or capture transition patterns. To address these limitations, we propose BITRec, a novel generative multi-behavior recommendation framework that introduces structured behavioral modeling through selective dependency activation. BITRec incorporates (i) Hierarchical Behavior Aggregation (HBA), which explicitly models behavioral intensity differences through separated exploration and commitment pathways, and (ii) Transition Relation Encoding (TRE), which encodes transition structures through explicit learnable relation matrices. Experiments on four large-scale datasets (RetailRocket, Taobao, Tmall, Insurance Dataset) with millions of interactions achieve consistent improvements of 15-23% across multiple metrics, with peak gains of 22.79% MRR on Tmall and 17.83% HR@10, 17.55% NDCG@10 on Taobao.

analysis.tldr: 提出BITRec，通过分层行为聚合和过渡关系编码建模行为强度与转换模式，显著提升生成式多行为推荐性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有生成式多行为推荐方法将行为视为统一特征，无法区分行为强度差异或捕获转换模式，限制了推荐效果。
analysis.problem: 如何显式建模多行为推荐中的行为强度差异和转换模式，以提升生成式序列推荐的准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出现有方法假设历史行为依赖均匀激活，忽略了行为强度差异和转换模式。
analysis.method: 提出BITRec框架，包含分层行为聚合（HBA）通过分离探索和承诺路径建模强度差异，以及过渡关系编码（TRE）通过可学习关系矩阵编码转换结构。
contributions: 提出BITRec，首个在生成式多行为推荐中显式建模行为强度和转换模式的方法。
设计HBA和TRE模块，分别捕获行为强度差异和转换关系。
在四个大规模数据集上取得15-23%的一致提升。
analysis.experiments: 在RetailRocket、Taobao、Tmall和Insurance Dataset四个数据集上进行实验，包含数百万交互，指标包括MRR、HR@10、NDCG@10等，峰值提升22.79% MRR（Tmall）和17.83% HR@10、17.55% NDCG@10（Taobao）。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的行为序列数据，对稀疏行为场景效果未知。
未讨论模型计算复杂度或训练效率。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出BITRec，通过分层行为聚合和过渡关系编码建模行为强度与转换模式，显著提升生成式多行为推荐性能。

papers.title: Geometric Analysis of Self-Supervised Vision Representations for Semantic Image Retrieval
papers.abstract: Content-based image retrieval (CBIR) systems enable users to search images based on visual content instead of relying on metadata. The text domain has benefited from vector search of representations created with unsupervised methods such as BERT. However, modern self-supervised learning methods for vision are mostly not reported in CBIR-related literature, instead relying on supervised models or multi-modal methods that align text and vision. We evaluate how the representations learned by modern self-supervised learning methods for vision perform under typical retrieval stacks that leverage vector databases and nearest neighbor search. Our evaluation reveals that the latent space geometry impacts approximate nearest neighbor (ANN) indexing. Specifically, highly anisotropic representations with high skewness produced by several modern SSL methods degrade the performance of partition-based and hashing-based search, even if their own linear probe or K-NN accuracy is not affected. In contrast, representations with higher isotropy and local purity better satisfy the distance-based assumptions of ANN indexes, leading to improved semantic retrieval performance.

analysis.tldr: 自监督视觉表征的各向异性会降低基于分区的近似最近邻检索性能，而各向同性更高的表征更有利于语义图像检索。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有CBIR系统多依赖监督或多模态方法，自监督视觉表征在检索场景下的表现未被充分研究，且其潜在空间几何特性对检索性能的影响尚不明确。
analysis.problem: 评估现代自监督视觉表征在基于向量数据库和最近邻搜索的典型检索流程中的表现，并分析潜在空间几何（各向异性）对近似最近邻索引的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 高度各向异性（高偏度）的自监督表征会降低基于分区和哈希的ANN检索性能，即使其线性探针或K-NN准确率不受影响；而各向同性更高、局部纯度更高的表征更符合ANN索引的距离假设，从而提升语义检索性能。
analysis.method: 使用多种自监督学习方法（如SimCLR、MoCo等）提取视觉表征，通过线性探针和K-NN评估表征质量，并分析表征的各向异性、偏度、局部纯度等几何属性与ANN检索性能（基于分区和哈希方法）的关系。
contributions: 首次系统评估现代自监督视觉表征在CBIR中的表现，揭示其潜在空间几何对ANN索引性能的关键影响。
发现各向异性是导致自监督表征在分区和哈希检索中性能下降的主要原因，而各向同性和局部纯度是更优检索性能的指标。
analysis.experiments: 在多个图像数据集上使用不同自监督方法（如SimCLR、MoCo、BYOL等）进行实验，评估线性探针准确率、K-NN准确率以及基于分区（如IVF）和哈希（如LSH）的ANN检索性能，并分析表征的几何属性。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 仅评估了部分自监督方法，可能未涵盖所有最新方法。
未深入探讨如何缓解各向异性以提升检索性能。
analysis.primary_area_en: unsupervised, self-supervised, semi-supervised, and supervised representation learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 自监督视觉表征的各向异性会降低基于分区的近似最近邻检索性能，而各向同性更高的表征更有利于语义图像检索。

papers.title: Measuring Successful Cooperation in Human-AI Teamwork: Development and Validation of the Perceived Cooperativity and Teaming Perception Scales
papers.abstract: As human-AI cooperation becomes increasingly prevalent, reliable instruments for assessing the subjective quality of cooperative human-AI interaction are needed. We introduce two theoretically grounded scales: the Perceived Cooperativity Scale (PCS), grounded in joint activity theory, and the Teaming Perception Scale (TPS), grounded in evolutionary cooperation theory. The PCS captures an agent's perceived cooperative capability and practice within a single interaction sequence; the TPS captures the emergent sense of teaming arising from mutual contribution and support. Both scales were adapted for human-human cooperation to enable cross-agent comparisons. Across three studies (N = 409) encompassing a cooperative card game, LLM interaction, and a decision-support system, analyses of dimensionality, reliability, and validity indicated that both scales successfully differentiated between cooperation partners of varying cooperative quality and showed construct validity in line with expectations. The scales provide a basis for empirical investigation and system evaluation across a wide range of human-AI cooperation contexts.

analysis.tldr: 开发并验证了感知合作性量表（PCS）和团队感知量表（TPS），用于评估人机合作质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 随着人机合作日益普遍，需要可靠的工具来评估合作交互的主观质量，但现有量表缺乏理论基础或跨场景验证。
analysis.problem: 缺乏基于理论、经过验证的标准化量表来测量人机合作中的感知合作性和团队感。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于联合活动理论和进化合作理论分别开发PCS和TPS，通过三项研究（N=409）在合作卡牌游戏、LLM交互和决策支持系统中验证量表的维度、信度和效度。
contributions: 提出了两个理论驱动的量表（PCS和TPS），分别测量感知合作性和团队感。
通过多项研究验证了量表的区分效度和构念效度，适用于多种人机合作场景。
analysis.experiments: 三项研究（N=409），涵盖合作卡牌游戏、LLM交互和决策支持系统，分析了维度、信度和效度，量表能区分不同质量的合作伙伴。
limitations: 样本量有限（N=409），可能影响泛化性。
量表仅基于主观报告，未结合客观行为指标。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 开发并验证了感知合作性量表（PCS）和团队感知量表（TPS），用于评估人机合作质量。

papers.title: TextGround4M: A Prompt-Aligned Dataset for Layout-Aware Text Rendering
papers.abstract: Despite recent advances in text-to-image generation, models still struggle to accurately render prompt-specified text with correct spatial layout -- especially in multi-span, structured settings. This challenge is driven not only by the lack of datasets that align prompts with the exact text and layout expected in the image, but also by the absence of effective metrics for evaluating layout quality. To address these issues, we introduce TextGround4M, a large-scale dataset of over 4 million prompt-image pairs, each annotated with span-level text grounded in the prompt and corresponding bounding boxes. This enables fine-grained supervision for layout-aware, prompt-grounded text rendering. Building on this, we propose a lightweight training strategy for autoregressive T2I models that appends layout-aware span tokens during training, without altering model architecture or inference behavior. We further construct a benchmark with stratified layout complexity to evaluate both open-source and proprietary models in a zero-shot setting. In addition, we introduce two layout-aware metrics to address the long-standing lack of spatial evaluation in text rendering. Our results show that models trained on TextGround4M outperform strong baselines in text fidelity, spatial accuracy, and prompt consistency, highlighting the importance of fine-grained layout supervision for grounded T2I generation.

analysis.tldr: 提出大规模布局感知文本渲染数据集TextGround4M及轻量训练策略，显著提升文本到图像生成中的文本保真度和空间准确性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有文本到图像生成模型难以准确渲染提示中指定的文本及其空间布局，尤其在多跨度、结构化场景中，主要缺乏对齐提示与布局的数据集和有效的布局质量评估指标。
analysis.problem: 文本到图像生成中提示文本的精确渲染和空间布局控制问题，以及缺乏相应数据集和评估指标。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出模型在渲染多跨度、结构化文本时表现不佳，原因是缺乏提示对齐的布局标注数据和布局质量评估指标。
analysis.method: 构建包含400万以上提示-图像对的数据集TextGround4M，每个样本标注跨度级文本和边界框；提出轻量训练策略，在自回归T2I模型训练时附加布局感知跨度标记，不改变模型架构或推理行为；引入两种布局感知指标。
contributions: 构建大规模布局感知文本渲染数据集TextGround4M，包含400万+提示-图像对及跨度级文本和边界框标注。
提出轻量训练策略，通过附加布局感知跨度标记实现布局感知训练，无需修改模型架构或推理。
构建分层布局复杂度基准，用于零样本评估；引入两种布局感知指标弥补空间评估缺失。
analysis.experiments: 在零样本设置下评估开源和闭源模型，结果显示在TextGround4M上训练的模型在文本保真度、空间准确性和提示一致性上优于强基线。
limitations: 数据集可能偏向特定文本布局类型，泛化性需进一步验证。
轻量训练策略可能不适用于非自回归T2I模型。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出大规模布局感知文本渲染数据集TextGround4M及轻量训练策略，显著提升文本到图像生成中的文本保真度和空间准确性。

papers.title: Skeleton-Based Posture Classification to Promote Safer Walker-Assisted Gait in Older Adults
papers.abstract: Falls among older adults are a significant public health concern, leading to severe injuries, loss of independence, and increased healthcare costs. This study evaluates the effectiveness of various models, including a Geometric approach, XGBoost, SVM, and several deep learning architectures, in classifying walker usage, standing vs. sitting, and posture for smart walkers used. Geometric and XGBoost were the top performers. XGBoost achieved near-perfect training accuracy in binary classification tasks, with 99.84% for walker choice and 99.69% for standing vs. sitting. For posture classification, Geometric approach attained 89.9% accuracy for 8 postures, and XGBoost obtained 99.24% during training for 17 postures. Deep learning models such as the 4-layer CNN and Encoder-Decoder CNN also demonstrated strong performance in binary classification, with accuracies above 98%. This study underscores the potential of machine learning to enhance human-robot interaction in smart walkers, particularly for fall prevention.

analysis.tldr: 基于骨架的姿态分类方法用于促进老年人助行器辅助步态安全。
analysis.research_motivation: 老年人跌倒是一个严重的公共健康问题，导致严重伤害、失去独立性和医疗成本增加，智能助行器需要有效的姿态分类来预防跌倒。
analysis.problem: 如何准确分类老年人使用助行器时的姿态（包括助行器使用、站立vs坐姿、多种姿态）以提升安全性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 比较了几何方法、XGBoost、SVM和多种深度学习架构（如4层CNN、编码器-解码器CNN）在骨架姿态分类上的表现。
contributions: 系统评估了多种模型在助行器相关姿态分类任务上的性能
展示了XGBoost和几何方法在分类准确率上的优势
analysis.experiments: 在二分类任务（助行器选择、站立vs坐姿）和多分类任务（8种姿态、17种姿态）上进行了实验，XGBoost在二分类训练准确率接近99.8%，几何方法在8姿态分类上达89.9%。
limitations: 摘要未提及模型在真实场景下的泛化能力
未讨论计算效率或实时性
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 基于骨架的姿态分类方法用于促进老年人助行器辅助步态安全。

papers.title: SPLIT: Separating Physical-Contact via Latent Arithmetic in Image-Based Tactile Sensors
papers.abstract: Training machine learning models for robotic tactile sensing requires vast amounts of data, yet obtaining realistic interaction data remains a challenge due to physical complexity and variability. Simulating tactile sensors is thus a crucial step in accelerating progress. This paper presents SPLIT, a novel method for simulating image-based tactile sensors, with a primary focus on the DIGIT sensor. Central to our approach is a latent space arithmetic strategy that explicitly disentangles contact geometry from sensor-specific optical properties. Unlike methods that require recalibration for every new unit, this disentanglement allows SPLIT to adapt to diverse DIGIT backgrounds and even transfer data to distinct sensors like the GelSight R1.5 without full model retraining. Beyond this adaptability, our approach achieves faster inference speeds than existing alternatives. Furthermore, we provide a calibrated finite element method (FEM) soft-body mesh simulation with variable resolution, offering a tunable trade-off between speed and fidelity. Additionally, our algorithm supports bidirectional simulation, allowing for both the generation of realistic images from deformation meshes and the reconstruction of meshes from tactile images. This versatility makes SPLIT a valuable tool for accelerating progress in robotic tactile sensing research.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于隐空间算术的图像触觉传感器仿真方法，解耦接触几何与光学属性，实现跨传感器迁移和双向仿真。
analysis.research_motivation: 机器人触觉感知需要大量真实交互数据，但物理复杂性和变异性使得获取数据困难，触觉传感器仿真成为加速研究的关键。
analysis.problem: 现有图像触觉传感器仿真方法需要针对每个传感器单元重新校准，且难以适应不同传感器或背景，同时存在速度与精度的权衡。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出SPLIT方法，采用隐空间算术策略显式解耦接触几何与传感器光学属性，结合可调分辨率的有限元法软体网格仿真，支持双向仿真（从变形网格生成图像和从触觉图像重建网格）。
contributions: 提出隐空间算术策略实现接触几何与光学属性的解耦，无需重新校准即可适应不同传感器背景和型号。
提供可调分辨率的有限元法软体网格仿真，平衡速度与精度，并支持双向仿真。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅针对DIGIT传感器进行了主要验证，对其他传感器的泛化性需进一步实验。
双向仿真的重建精度可能受限于隐空间解耦的质量。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于隐空间算术的图像触觉传感器仿真方法，解耦接触几何与光学属性，实现跨传感器迁移和双向仿真。

papers.title: Characterizing Vision-Language-Action Models across XPUs: Constraints and Acceleration for On-Robot Deployment
papers.abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models are promising for generalist robot control, but on-robot deployment is bottlenecked by real-time inference under tight cost and energy budgets. Most prior evaluations rely on desktop-grade GPUs, obscuring the trade-offs and opportunities offered by heterogeneous edge accelerators (GPUs/XPUs/NPUs). We present a systematic analysis for low-cost VLA deployment via model-hardware co-characterization. First, we build a cross-accelerator leaderboard and evaluate model-hardware pairs under CET (Cost, Energy, Time), showing that right-sized edge devices can be more cost-/energy-efficient than flagship GPUs while meeting control-rate constraints. Second, using in-depth profiling, we uncover a consistent two-phase inference pattern: a compute-bound VLM backbone followed by a memory-bound Action Expert, which induces phase-dependent underutilization and hardware inefficiency. Finally, guided by these insights, we propose DP-Cache and V-AEFusion to reduce diffusion redundancy and enable asynchronous pipeline parallelism, achieving up to 2.9x speedup on GPUs and 6x on edge NPUs with only marginal success degradation. The example leaderboard website is available at: https://vla-leaderboard-01.vercel.app/.

analysis.tldr: 系统分析VLA模型在异构边缘加速器上的部署瓶颈，提出DP-Cache和V-AEFusion实现最高6倍加速。
analysis.research_motivation: VLA模型在机器人上实时推理受限于成本和能耗，现有评估多基于桌面级GPU，忽略了异构边缘加速器的潜力。
analysis.problem: 如何通过模型-硬件协同表征，在低成本边缘设备上实现VLA模型的实时推理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现VLA推理存在两阶段模式：计算密集的VLM骨干和内存密集的Action Expert，导致阶段依赖的资源利用不足和硬件效率低下。
analysis.method: 提出DP-Cache减少扩散冗余，以及V-AEFusion实现异步流水线并行。
contributions: 构建跨加速器排行榜，在成本、能耗、时间三个维度评估模型-硬件组合。
揭示VLA推理的两阶段模式及硬件利用不足现象。
提出DP-Cache和V-AEFusion，在GPU和边缘NPU上分别实现2.9倍和6倍加速。
analysis.experiments: 在多种GPU和边缘NPU上评估，显示加速效果显著且成功率下降微小。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定VLA架构。
边缘NPU的通用性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 系统分析VLA模型在异构边缘加速器上的部署瓶颈，提出DP-Cache和V-AEFusion实现最高6倍加速。

papers.title: PhysNote: Self-Knowledge Notes for Evolvable Physical Reasoning in Vision-Language Model
papers.abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have demonstrated strong performance on textbook-style physics problems, yet they frequently fail when confronted with dynamic real-world scenarios that require temporal consistency and causal reasoning across frames. We identify two fundamental challenges underlying these failures: (1) spatio-temporal identity drift, where objects lose their physical identity across successive frames and break causal chains, and (2) volatility of inference-time insights, where a model may occasionally produce correct physical reasoning but never consolidates it for future reuse. To address these challenges, we propose PhysNote, an agentic framework that enables VLMs to externalize and refine physical knowledge through self-generated "Knowledge Notes." PhysNote stabilizes dynamic perception through spatio-temporal canonicalization, organizes self-generated insights into a hierarchical knowledge repository, and drives an iterative reasoning loop that grounds hypotheses in visual evidence before consolidating verified knowledge. Experiments on PhysBench demonstrate that PhysNote achieves 56.68% overall accuracy, a 4.96% improvement over the best multi-agent baseline, with consistent gains across all four physical reasoning domains.

analysis.tldr: PhysNote通过自生成知识笔记增强VLM在动态物理场景中的时空一致性和因果推理能力。
analysis.research_motivation: VLM在教科书式物理问题上表现良好，但在动态真实场景中常因时空身份漂移和推理洞察易变而失败，亟需一种能持续巩固和复用物理知识的框架。
analysis.problem: VLM在动态物理推理中面临物体跨帧身份丢失（时空身份漂移）和推理洞察无法固化复用（推理洞察易变性）两大挑战。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出VLM在动态场景中失败的两个根本原因：时空身份漂移导致因果链断裂，以及模型偶尔正确推理但无法巩固知识供后续使用。
analysis.method: PhysNote是一个智能体框架，通过自生成知识笔记实现物理知识的外化和精炼，包括时空规范化稳定动态感知、分层知识库组织自生成洞察、迭代推理循环在视觉证据上验证假设并巩固知识。
contributions: 提出PhysNote框架，通过知识笔记机制解决VLM在动态物理推理中的时空身份漂移和推理洞察易变问题。
在PhysBench上达到56.68%总体准确率，比最佳多智能体基线提升4.96%，并在所有四个物理推理领域取得一致提升。
analysis.experiments: 在PhysBench数据集上评估，PhysNote总体准确率56.68%，比最佳多智能体基线提升4.96%，四个物理推理领域均有提升。
limitations: 可能依赖预定义的知识笔记格式和迭代轮数，泛化性需进一步验证。
仅在单一基准上评估，未在更多真实动态场景中测试。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: PhysNote通过自生成知识笔记增强VLM在动态物理场景中的时空一致性和因果推理能力。

papers.title: AutoGUI-v2: A Comprehensive Multi-Modal GUI Functionality Understanding Benchmark
papers.abstract: Autonomous agents capable of navigating Graphical User Interfaces (GUIs) hold the potential to revolutionize digital productivity. However, achieving true digital autonomy extends beyond reactive element matching; it necessitates a predictive mental model of interface dynamics and the ability to foresee the "digital world state" resulting from interactions. Despite the perceptual capabilities of modern Vision-Language Models (VLMs), existing benchmarks remain bifurcated (focusing either on black-box task completion or static, shallow grounding), thereby failing to assess whether agents truly comprehend the implicit functionality and transition logic of GUIs. To bridge this gap, we introduce AutoGUI-v2, a comprehensive benchmark designed to evaluate deep GUI functionality understanding and interaction outcome prediction. We construct the benchmark using a novel VLM-human collaborative pipeline that recursively parses multi-platform screenshots into hierarchical functional regions to generate diverse evaluation tasks. Providing 2,753 tasks across six operating systems, AutoGUI-v2 rigorously tests agents on region and element-level semantics, grounding, and dynamic state prediction. Our evaluation reveals a striking dichotomy in VLMs: while open-source models fine-tuned on agent data (e.g., Qwen3-VL) excel at functional grounding, commercial models (e.g., Gemini-2.5-Pro-Thinking) dominate in functionality captioning. Crucially, all models struggle with complex interaction logic of uncommon actions, highlighting that deep functional understanding remains a significant hurdle. By systematically measuring these foundational capabilities, AutoGUI-v2 offers a new lens for advancing the next generation of GUI agents.

analysis.tldr: 提出AutoGUI-v2基准，系统评估VLM对GUI功能理解和交互结果预测的能力，揭示开源与商业模型在不同任务上的差异及共同短板。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有GUI基准要么聚焦黑箱任务完成，要么仅评估静态浅层定位，无法衡量智能体对GUI隐含功能和转换逻辑的深层理解，阻碍了真正数字自主性的实现。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个全面评估VLM对GUI功能理解（包括区域/元素语义、定位和动态状态预测）的基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 开源模型（如Qwen3-VL）在功能定位上表现优异，商业模型（如Gemini-2.5-Pro-Thinking）在功能描述上占优；所有模型在复杂交互逻辑（尤其是非常见操作）上表现困难。
analysis.method: 提出VLM-人类协作流水线，递归解析多平台截图为层次化功能区域，生成多样化评估任务；构建包含2,753个任务、覆盖6个操作系统的基准AutoGUI-v2。
contributions: 提出AutoGUI-v2基准，系统评估GUI功能理解和交互结果预测能力。
揭示开源与商业VLM在功能定位与描述上的能力差异，以及所有模型在复杂交互逻辑上的共同短板。
analysis.experiments: 在6个操作系统上评估了多个VLM，包括开源和商业模型，测试了区域/元素级语义、定位和动态状态预测。
limitations: 基准任务可能未覆盖所有GUI交互场景。
评估主要针对静态截图和预定义交互，未涉及实时动态环境。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出AutoGUI-v2基准，系统评估VLM对GUI功能理解和交互结果预测的能力，揭示开源与商业模型在不同任务上的差异及共同短板。

papers.title: Kwai Summary Attention Technical Report
papers.abstract: Long-context ability, has become one of the most important iteration direction of next-generation Large Language Models, particularly in semantic understanding/reasoning, code agentic intelligence and recommendation system. However, the standard softmax attention exhibits quadratic time complexity with respect to sequence length. As the sequence length increases, this incurs substantial overhead in long-context settings, leading the training and inference costs of extremely long sequences deteriorate rapidly. Existing solutions mitigate this issue through two technique routings: i) Reducing the KV cache per layer, such as from the head-level compression GQA, and the embedding dimension-level compression MLA, but the KV cache remains linearly dependent on the sequence length at a 1:1 ratio. ii) Interleaving with KV Cache friendly architecture, such as local attention SWA, linear kernel GDN, but often involve trade-offs among KV Cache and long-context modeling effectiveness. Besides the two technique routings, we argue that there exists an intermediate path not well explored: {Maintaining a linear relationship between the KV cache and sequence length, but performing semantic-level compression through a specific ratio $k$}. This $O(n/k)$ path does not pursue a ``minimum KV cache'', but rather trades acceptable memory costs for complete, referential, and interpretable retention of long distant dependency. Motivated by this, we propose Kwai Summary Attention (KSA), a novel attention mechanism that reduces sequence modeling cost by compressing historical contexts into learnable summary tokens.

analysis.tldr: 提出 Kwai Summary Attention (KSA)，通过可学习摘要令牌压缩历史上下文，在保持线性KV缓存与序列长度关系的同时实现语义级压缩。
analysis.research_motivation: 长上下文场景下标准softmax注意力二次复杂度导致训练和推理成本急剧上升，现有方法要么压缩KV缓存但保持线性依赖，要么采用KV缓存友好架构但牺牲长上下文建模效果，缺乏中间路径。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持KV缓存与序列长度线性关系的前提下，通过语义级压缩降低长上下文注意力计算成本，同时保留完整的长距离依赖信息。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 Kwai Summary Attention (KSA)，将历史上下文压缩为可学习的摘要令牌，实现 O(n/k) 的序列建模成本，其中 k 为压缩比。
contributions: 提出一种新的注意力机制 KSA，通过可学习摘要令牌实现语义级压缩，平衡内存开销与长距离依赖保留。
探索了介于完全压缩和线性依赖之间的中间路径，为长上下文注意力设计提供新思路。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 摘要未提及压缩比 k 的自适应选择或对下游任务的影响。
可能需要在特定长上下文任务上验证有效性。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 Kwai Summary Attention (KSA)，通过可学习摘要令牌压缩历史上下文，在保持线性KV缓存与序列长度关系的同时实现语义级压缩。

papers.title: SWE-QA: A Dataset and Benchmark for Complex Code Understanding
papers.abstract: In this paper, we introduce SWE-QA, a text and code corpus aimed at benchmarking multi-hop code comprehension, addressing the gap between simplified evaluation tasks and the complex reasoning required in real-world software development. While existing code understanding benchmarks focus on isolated snippets, developers must routinely connect information across multiple dispersed code segments. The dataset comprises 9,072 multiple-choice questions systematically generated from 12 Python repositories of SWE-bench, evaluating several recurrent reasoning patterns like Declaration-and-Call questions that link entity definitions to their usage, and Interacting-Entity questions that examine the dynamic relationships among multiple collaborating components. Generated through parsing-based entity extraction and Large Language Model assisted question construction with carefully validated distractors, the benchmark distinguishes genuine comprehension from superficial pattern matching. Evaluation of 15 language models (360M to 671B parameters) reveals significant challenges in multi-hop reasoning, with best performance reaching 74.41% accuracy. Dense architectures consistently outperform mixture-of-experts models by 10-14 percentage points, while reasoning-enhanced variants show inconsistent benefits.

analysis.tldr: SWE-QA 是一个用于评估多跳代码理解能力的数据集和基准，包含从真实仓库生成的 9072 道选择题，揭示了现有模型在多步推理上的显著挑战。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有代码理解基准多基于孤立代码片段，无法反映真实软件开发中需要跨多个分散代码段进行多跳推理的复杂需求。
analysis.problem: 缺乏能够评估模型在真实软件工程场景下进行多跳代码理解能力的基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出：密集架构模型一致优于混合专家模型 10-14 个百分点，而推理增强变体带来的收益不一致。
analysis.method: 基于 SWE-bench 中 12 个 Python 仓库，通过解析实体提取和 LLM 辅助问题构建，生成 9072 道多选题，涵盖声明-调用和交互实体等推理模式。
contributions: 提出了 SWE-QA 数据集，包含 9072 道多跳代码理解选择题，覆盖多种推理模式。
系统评估了 15 个语言模型，揭示了多跳推理的显著挑战和不同架构的性能差异。
analysis.experiments: 在 15 个语言模型（360M 到 671B 参数）上评估，最佳准确率为 74.41%，密集架构优于 MoE 模型 10-14 个百分点。
limitations: 数据集仅基于 Python 仓库，可能不适用于其他语言。
问题生成依赖 LLM，可能存在噪声或偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SWE-QA 是一个用于评估多跳代码理解能力的数据集和基准，包含从真实仓库生成的 9072 道选择题，揭示了现有模型在多步推理上的显著挑战。

papers.title: BandRouteNet: An Adaptive Band Routing Neural Network for EEG Artifact Removal
papers.abstract: Electroencephalography (EEG) is highly susceptible to artifact contamination, such as electrooculographic (EOG) and electromyographic (EMG) interference, which severely degrades signal quality and hinders reliable interpretation in applications including neurological diagnosis, brain-computer interfaces (BCIs), etc. Effective EEG denoising remains challenging because different artifact sources exhibit diverse and temporally varying distributions, together with distinct spectral characteristics across frequency bands. To address these issues, we propose BandRouteNet, an adaptive frequency-aware neural network for EEG denoising that jointly exploits band-specific processing and full-band contextual modeling. The proposed model performs band-wise denoising to explicitly capture frequency-dependent artifact patterns. Within this framework, we introduce a routing mechanism that adaptively determines where and to what extent denoising should be applied across temporal locations within each frequency band. In parallel, a full-band conditioner directly processes the original noisy EEG to extract global temporal context, producing both conditional parameters for modulating the band-wise pathway and a coarse-grained signal-level refinement to supplement the final reconstruction. Extensive experiments on the EEGDenoiseNet benchmark dataset demonstrate that BandRouteNet outperforms other methods under EOG, EMG, and mixed-artifact conditions in terms of Relative Root Mean Square Error (RRMSE) and Signal-to-Noise Ratio Improvement (SNR$_{\text{imp}}$) under unified experimental settings, while remaining highly parameter-efficient with only 0.2M trainable parameters. These results highlight its strong potential for high-performance EEG artifact removal in resource-constrained applications.

analysis.tldr: 提出自适应频带路由网络BandRouteNet，通过频带专用处理与全带上下文建模联合去除EEG伪影。
analysis.research_motivation: EEG信号易受EOG、EMG等伪影污染，不同伪影源具有时变分布和频带特异性，现有方法难以有效联合建模。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个能自适应处理不同频带伪影且保持参数高效的EEG去噪网络。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 不同伪影源在频域和时域上分布差异大，且随时间变化，需要频带专用处理与全局上下文结合。
analysis.method: 提出BandRouteNet，包含频带专用去噪路径（带路由机制自适应决定去噪位置和强度）和全带条件器（提取全局上下文并生成条件参数），两者联合优化。
contributions: 提出频带路由机制，自适应控制各频带内不同时间位置的去噪程度。
设计全带条件器，提供全局上下文和粗粒度信号级精炼。
在EEGDenoiseNet上以0.2M参数取得优于现有方法的RRMSE和SNRimp。
analysis.experiments: 在EEGDenoiseNet基准数据集上，针对EOG、EMG和混合伪影条件，使用RRMSE和SNRimp指标评估，统一实验设置下BandRouteNet优于其他方法。
limitations: 仅在单一基准数据集上验证，泛化性需更多测试。
路由机制的计算开销未详细分析。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出自适应频带路由网络BandRouteNet，通过频带专用处理与全带上下文建模联合去除EEG伪影。

papers.title: DYMAPIA: A Multi-Domain Framework for Detecting AI-based Video Manipulation
papers.abstract: AI-generated media are advancing rapidly, raising pressing concerns for content authenticity and digital trust. We introduce DYMAPIA, a multi-domain Deepfake detection framework that fuses spatial, spectral, and temporal cues to capture subtle traces of manipulation in visual data. The system builds dynamic anomaly masks by combining evidence from Fourier spectra, local texture descriptors, edge irregularities, and optical flow consistency, which highlight tampered regions with fine spatial accuracy. These masks guide DistXCNet, a lightweight classifier distilled from Xception and optimized with depthwise separable convolutions for fast, region-focused classification. This joint design achieves state-of-the-art results, with accuracy and F1-scores exceeding 99\% on FF++, Celeb-DF, and VDFD benchmarks, while keeping the model compact enough for real-time use. Beyond outperforming existing full-frame and multidomain detectors, DYMAPIA demonstrates deployment readiness for time-critical forensic tasks, including media verification, misinformation defense, and secure content filtering.

analysis.tldr: DYMAPIA 是一个融合空间、频谱和时间线索的多域深度伪造视频检测框架，在多个基准上达到 99%+ 准确率且轻量可实时。
analysis.research_motivation: AI 生成媒体快速进步，威胁内容真实性和数字信任，现有检测方法在泛化性和效率上存在不足。
analysis.problem: 如何高效、准确地检测 AI 生成的视频伪造痕迹，并实现轻量级实时部署。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 融合空间、频谱和时间线索（傅里叶谱、局部纹理、边缘不规则性、光流一致性）生成动态异常掩码，引导轻量级分类器 DistXCNet（基于 Xception 蒸馏和深度可分离卷积）进行区域聚焦分类。
contributions: 提出多域融合的动态异常掩码生成方法，结合空间、频谱和时间特征。
设计轻量级分类器 DistXCNet，通过蒸馏和深度可分离卷积实现高效实时检测。
analysis.experiments: 在 FF++、Celeb-DF 和 VDFD 基准上，准确率和 F1 分数超过 99%，优于现有全帧和多域检测器。
limitations: 可能对未见过的伪造类型泛化能力有限。
动态掩码生成的计算开销在极端资源受限场景下可能仍需优化。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: DYMAPIA 是一个融合空间、频谱和时间线索的多域深度伪造视频检测框架，在多个基准上达到 99%+ 准确率且轻量可实时。

papers.title: BMD-45: A Large-Scale CCTV Vehicle Detection Dataset for Urban Traffic in Developing Cities
papers.abstract: Robust vehicle detection from fixed CCTV cameras is critical for Intelligent Transportation Systems. Yet existing benchmarks predominantly feature relatively homogeneous, highly organized traffic patterns captured from ego-centric driving perspectives or controlled aerial views. This regional and sensor view bias creates a significant gap. Models trained on datasets such as UA-DETRAC and COCO struggle to generalize to the dense, heterogeneous, disorganized traffic conditions observed in rapidly developing urban centers in emerging economies. To address this limitation, we introduce BMD-45, a large-scale dataset comprising 480K bounding boxes annotated over 45K images captured from over 3.6K operational Safe City CCTV cameras. BMD-45 contains 14 fine-grained vehicle categories, including region-specific modes such as auto-rickshaws and tempo travellers, which are not present in existing benchmarks. The dataset captures real-world deployment challenges, including extreme viewpoint variation, occlusion, and vehicle density . We establish comprehensive baselines using state-of-the-art detectors and reveal a striking domain gap: models fine-tuned on UA-DETRAC achieve only 33.6% mAP@0.50:0.95, compared to 83.8% when trained in-domain on BMD-45, representing a 2.5x improvement that persists even when accounting for novel vehicle classes. This performance gap underscores the critical need for geographically diverse traffic benchmarks and establishes BMD-45 as a baseline for developing robust perception systems in underrepresented urban environments worldwide. The dataset is available at: https://huggingface.co/datasets/iisc-aim/BMD-45.

analysis.tldr: BMD-45是一个大规模CCTV车辆检测数据集，填补了发展中国家城市交通场景的空白，揭示了现有模型在异构、无序交通中的显著域差距。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有车辆检测基准（如UA-DETRAC、COCO）主要来自发达国家的结构化交通场景，缺乏对发展中国家城市中密集、异构、无序交通的覆盖，导致模型泛化能力不足。
analysis.problem: 解决现有数据集在发展中国家城市交通场景中的域偏差问题，提供大规模、多样化的CCTV视角车辆检测基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建包含480K边界框、45K图像、14个细粒度车辆类别（含区域特有车型如auto-rickshaws）的大规模数据集，数据来自3.6K+个安全城市CCTV摄像头，覆盖极端视角、遮挡和高密度场景。
contributions: 提出了BMD-45，一个大规模、多样化的CCTV车辆检测数据集，填补了发展中国家城市交通场景的空白。
通过实验揭示了显著的域差距：在UA-DETRAC上微调的模型mAP仅33.6%，而在BMD-45上域内训练达到83.8%，性能提升2.5倍。
analysis.experiments: 使用最先进的检测器建立了基线，并比较了域内训练与跨域微调的性能，显示域差距显著。
limitations: 数据集仅包含CCTV视角，可能不适用于其他传感器（如车载摄像头）。
未提供模型在真实部署中的计算效率分析。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: BMD-45是一个大规模CCTV车辆检测数据集，填补了发展中国家城市交通场景的空白，揭示了现有模型在异构、无序交通中的显著域差距。

papers.title: Scaling Properties of Continuous Diffusion Spoken Language Models
papers.abstract: Speech-only spoken language models (SLMs) lag behind text and text-speech models in performance, with recent discrete autoregressive (AR) SLMs indicating significant computational and data demands to match text models. Since discretizing continuous speech for AR creates bottlenecks, we explore whether continuous diffusion (CD) SLM is more viable. To quantify the SLMs linguistic quality, we introduce the phoneme Jensen-Shannon divergence (pJSD) metric. Our analysis reveals CD SLMs, mirroring AR behavior, exhibit scaling laws for validation loss and pJSD, and show optimal token-to-parameter ratios decreasing as compute scales. However, for the latter, loss becomes insensitive to choice of data and model sizes, showing potential for fast inference. Scaling CD SLMs to 16B parameters with tens of millions of hours of conversational data enables generation of emotive, prosodic, multi-speaker, multilingual speech, though achieving long-form coherence remains a significant challenge.

analysis.tldr: 连续扩散语音语言模型展现出与自回归模型类似的缩放定律，但损失对数据与模型大小不敏感，支持快速推理，扩展到16B参数可生成情感化多语言语音，但长程连贯性仍是挑战。
analysis.research_motivation: 语音语言模型性能落后于文本模型，离散自回归方法存在计算和数据瓶颈，探索连续扩散模型是否更可行。
analysis.problem: 量化连续扩散语音语言模型的缩放特性及其与自回归模型的对比，并评估其扩展能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 连续扩散语音语言模型展现出与自回归模型类似的缩放定律（验证损失和pJSD），且最优token-参数比随计算量增加而下降；但损失对数据与模型大小不敏感，有利于快速推理。
analysis.method: 引入音素Jensen-Shannon散度（pJSD）度量，分析连续扩散语音语言模型的缩放定律，并扩展到16B参数规模。
contributions: 提出pJSD指标用于量化语音语言模型的语言质量
揭示连续扩散语音语言模型存在缩放定律，且损失对数据与模型大小不敏感
扩展到16B参数模型，展示生成情感化、多说话人、多语言语音的能力
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及扩展到16B参数和数千万小时对话数据。
limitations: 长程连贯性仍是显著挑战
未与离散自回归模型进行直接性能对比
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 连续扩散语音语言模型展现出与自回归模型类似的缩放定律，但损失对数据与模型大小不敏感，支持快速推理，扩展到16B参数可生成情感化多语言语音，但长程连贯性仍是挑战。

papers.title: Phase-Separated Complex Hilbert PCA on Markerless 3D Pose Estimation Data: A Global Phase Network and Its Extension to a Continuous Field on the Body Surface
papers.abstract: Quantitative analysis of the kinematic chain in sports motion is essential for performance evaluation and injury prevention. Conventional methods such as the kinematic-sequence (KS) and continuous relative phase (CRP) are confined to adjacent joint pairs and lack a unified framework for whole-body coordination, while segmental power-flow analysis requires force plates and inertial parameters that restrict it to laboratory environments. We apply Complex Hilbert Principal Component Analysis (CHPCA) separately to each motion phase (backswing and downswing) on markerless 3D pose estimation data, extracting the dominant whole-body phase pattern as a single complex eigenvector. The pipeline further includes a fully automatic signal-based phase segmentation (no priors on strike count or rest location) and an extension to 1,079 body-surface mesh vertices, so that the kinematic chain is represented as a continuous phase field across the body.
