On 14 hammer-striking trials of a single subject, the framework reveals (i) a trunk-anchored global phase architecture, (ii) a functional asymmetry between preparation and execution phases quantified by Mode-1 contribution (45.5% vs. 70.5%) and inter-trial Spearman consistency (0.38 vs. 0.58), and (iii) a consistent reorganisation across both skeletal joints and mesh vertices ($p < 10^{-10}$ on 1,079 vertices). As a methodological consistency check, pairwise phase differences from the Mode-1 eigenvector are compared against CRP on all 190 joint pairs by a permutation test ($ρ= 0.473$, $p = 0.0005$). A correspondence analysis between Mode-1 amplitude and kinetic-energy mobilisation variance further shows a strong positive correlation in the downswing ($ρ\approx 0.71$ on both skeleton and mesh) and no correlation in the backswing, indicating that the proposed framework bridges kinematic and kinetic descriptions of coordination through phase structure.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于复希尔伯特主成分分析（CHPCA）的相位分离方法，从无标记3D姿态数据中提取全身协调的全局相位模式，并扩展至体表连续场。
analysis.research_motivation: 运动生物力学中，传统方法如运动链（KS）和连续相对相位（CRP）局限于相邻关节对，缺乏全身协调的统一框架；而节段功率流分析依赖力板和惯性参数，仅限实验室环境。因此需要一种能从无标记3D姿态数据中提取全身协调相位模式的方法。
analysis.problem: 如何从无标记3D姿态估计数据中，自动分离运动相位并提取全身协调的全局相位模式，同时将相位表示扩展至体表连续场。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在14次锤击试验中，观察到（i）躯干锚定的全局相位架构；（ii）准备阶段和执行阶段之间的功能不对称性，由Mode-1贡献率（45.5% vs. 70.5%）和试验间Spearman一致性（0.38 vs. 0.58）量化；（iii）骨骼关节和网格顶点上一致的重组（1079个顶点上p<10^{-10}）。
analysis.method: 对每个运动相位（后摆和下摆）分别应用复希尔伯特主成分分析（CHPCA），提取主导全身相位模式作为单一复特征向量；包括全自动基于信号的相位分割（无先验），并扩展至1079个体表网格顶点，将运动链表示为跨身体的连续相位场。
contributions: 提出一种相位分离的复希尔伯特PCA方法，从无标记3D姿态数据中提取全身协调的全局相位模式。
将相位表示扩展至体表连续场，实现全身运动链的连续相位场表示。
通过锤击运动实验验证了方法的有效性，揭示了相位架构和功能不对称性，并建立了与动能动员的相关性。
analysis.experiments: 在单名受试者的14次锤击试验上评估，比较了Mode-1特征向量与CRP在所有190个关节对上的相位差（置换检验ρ=0.473, p=0.0005），并分析了Mode-1振幅与动能动员方差的相关性（下摆时ρ≈0.71）。
limitations: 仅基于单名受试者的14次试验，样本量小，泛化性有待验证。
方法依赖于无标记3D姿态估计的准确性，误差可能传播。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于复希尔伯特主成分分析（CHPCA）的相位分离方法，从无标记3D姿态数据中提取全身协调的全局相位模式，并扩展至体表连续场。

papers.title: On the explainability of max-plus neural networks
papers.abstract: We investigate the explanability properties of the recently proposed linear-min-max neural networks. At initialization, they can be interpreted as k-medoids with the infinity norm as a distance. Then, they are trained using subgradient descent to better fit the data. The model has been shown to be a universal approximator. Yet, we can trace the decision process because a single most activated neuron is responsible for the value of the output. Using this property, we designed a pixel fragility measure that determines whether changes to a single pixel may be responsible to a change in the classification output. Experiments on the PneumoniaMnist dataset show that this explanation for the output of the neural network compares favorably to SHAP and Integrated Gradient.

analysis.tldr: 最大加神经网络在初始化时可解释为k-medoids，利用单神经元激活特性设计像素脆弱性度量，在肺炎MNIST上解释性优于SHAP和积分梯度。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有神经网络可解释性方法（如SHAP、积分梯度）计算成本高或解释不够直观，而最大加神经网络的结构特性可能提供更简洁、可追踪的解释途径。
analysis.problem: 如何利用最大加神经网络的单神经元激活特性来设计高效且可解释的归因方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 最大加神经网络在初始化时可解释为基于无穷范数距离的k-medoids，且训练后单个最活跃神经元决定输出值，这为决策追踪提供了结构基础。
analysis.method: 提出像素脆弱性度量，通过分析单个像素变化对分类输出的影响来生成解释，利用最大加神经网络中单神经元主导输出的特性。
contributions: 揭示了最大加神经网络在初始化时与k-medoids的等价性，提供了可解释性基础。
设计了基于单神经元激活的像素脆弱性度量，用于解释分类决策。
analysis.experiments: 在PneumoniaMnist数据集上，所提解释方法与SHAP和积分梯度进行比较，结果显示更优。
limitations: 仅针对最大加神经网络，通用性有限。
实验仅在单一医学图像数据集上验证，泛化性待考。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 最大加神经网络在初始化时可解释为k-medoids，利用单神经元激活特性设计像素脆弱性度量，在肺炎MNIST上解释性优于SHAP和积分梯度。

papers.title: AD-Relight: Training-Free Banner Relighting via Illumination Translation with Diffusion Priors
papers.abstract: The recent surge in content consumption through streaming services has driven a growing demand for personalized content. Personalized advertisements (ads) play a crucial role in enhancing both user engagement and ad effectiveness. A key aspect of ad personalization involves replacing existing regions in a frame with custom, Photoshop-generated banners. However, existing ad-placement pipelines typically rely on simple geometric warping, ignoring the scene's underlying lighting conditions. Similarly, state-of-the-art diffusion-based object insertion and relighting models struggle to accurately relight these newly inserted banners, as they are not trained on ad-banner data, and training such a model for ad banners would require millions of images. This highlights the need for an effective relighting framework that enables seamless integration of custom banners into the original scene. Motivated by this, we present AD-Relight, a novel multi-stage training-free framework that adapts a diffusion-based relighting model at test time to relight newly added Photoshop-generated ad banners. Through extensive evaluation, we demonstrate that AD-Relight outperforms both relighting baselines and existing ad-placement methods based on simple warping. User studies further show that participants consistently prefer the outputs of AD-Relight over those of prior approaches.

analysis.tldr: AD-Relight 提出一种无需训练的多阶段框架，利用扩散先验在测试时对广告横幅进行重光照，实现与场景光照一致的无缝嵌入。
analysis.research_motivation: 个性化广告中需要将自定义横幅嵌入视频帧，但现有方法仅依赖几何扭曲忽略光照条件，而扩散模型因缺乏广告横幅训练数据难以准确重光照，且收集百万级训练数据成本过高。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖大规模广告横幅训练数据的情况下，对插入的自定义横幅进行与场景光照一致的重光照。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 AD-Relight，一种多阶段、无需训练的测试时适应框架，利用扩散先验进行光照翻译，实现横幅重光照。
contributions: 提出首个无需训练的广告横幅重光照框架 AD-Relight，利用扩散先验在测试时适应。
通过多阶段光照翻译实现与场景光照一致的重光照，优于现有重光照和广告嵌入方法。
analysis.experiments: 在广告横幅重光照任务上进行了评估，与重光照基线和基于扭曲的广告嵌入方法比较，并通过用户研究验证偏好。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖扩散模型的质量和多样性，对极端光照场景泛化能力未知。
多阶段框架可能增加计算开销，实时性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AD-Relight 提出一种无需训练的多阶段框架，利用扩散先验在测试时对广告横幅进行重光照，实现与场景光照一致的无缝嵌入。

papers.title: All That Glitters Is Not Audio: Rethinking Text Priors and Audio Reliance in Audio-Language Evaluation
papers.abstract: Large Audio-Language Models show consistent performance gains across speech and audio benchmarks, yet high scores may not reflect true auditory perception. If a model can answer questions without processing the acoustic signal, the benchmark fails as a measure of auditory understanding. We present a diagnostic framework using two axes: text prior, which measures answerability from text and general knowledge alone, and audio reliance, which assesses actual dependency on the acoustic signal. Evaluating eight LALMs across three benchmarks, we find that models retain 60-72% of their full audio scores even without any audio input. Moreover, among items that require audio, only 3.0-4.2% need the complete audio clip; the majority can be resolved using localized fragments. These findings challenge the assumption that benchmark performance equals robust audio understanding, and we conclude with practical guidelines for improving evaluation reliability and benchmark design.

analysis.tldr: 音频语言模型在无音频输入时仍能保留60-72%的分数，揭示现有基准无法真实衡量听觉理解能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有音频语言模型基准分数高，但可能不反映真实的听觉感知能力，存在文本先验和音频依赖不足的问题，导致评估不可靠。
analysis.problem: 如何诊断和量化音频语言模型评估中文本先验和音频依赖的影响，以改进基准设计。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型在无音频输入时仍能保留60-72%的分数；需要音频的项目中，仅3.0-4.2%需要完整音频片段，多数可通过局部片段解决。
analysis.method: 提出一个诊断框架，包含两个轴：文本先验（仅从文本和常识回答问题的能力）和音频依赖（对声学信号的实际依赖程度）。
contributions: 提出诊断框架量化文本先验和音频依赖，揭示现有基准的缺陷。
通过实验发现模型在无音频时仍能获得高分，且多数音频问题可通过局部片段解决。
提供改进评估可靠性和基准设计的实用指南。
analysis.experiments: 在三个基准上评估八个LALM，摘要未提供具体实验结果数值。
limitations: 诊断框架可能无法覆盖所有类型的音频理解任务。
实验仅针对特定模型和基准，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 音频语言模型在无音频输入时仍能保留60-72%的分数，揭示现有基准无法真实衡量听觉理解能力。

papers.title: Global Context or Local Detail? Adaptive Visual Grounding for Hallucination Mitigation
papers.abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) are frequently undermined by object hallucination--generating content that contradicts visual reality--due to an over-reliance on linguistic priors. We introduce Positive-and-Negative Decoding (PND), a training-free inference framework that intervenes directly in the decoding process to enforce visual fidelity. PND is motivated by our key finding of a critical attention deficit in VLMs, where visual features are empirically under-weighted. Our framework corrects this via a dual-path contrast: The positive path amplifies salient visual evidence using multi-layer attention to encourage faithful descriptions, directly counteracting the attention deficit. Simultaneously, the negative path identifies and degrades the core object's features to create a strong counterfactual, which penalizes ungrounded, prior-dominant generation. By contrasting the model's outputs from these two perspectives at each step, PND steers generation towards text that is not just linguistically probable, but visually factual. Extensive experiments on benchmarks like POPE, MME, and CHAIR show that PND achieves state-of-the-art performance with up to 6.5% accuracy improvement, substantially reducing object hallucination while also enhancing descriptive detail--all without requiring any model retraining. The method generalizes effectively across diverse VLM architectures including LLaVA, InstructBLIP, InternVL, and Qwen-VL.

analysis.tldr: 提出无需训练的PND框架，通过正负对比解码纠正VLM注意力缺陷，有效缓解物体幻觉。
analysis.research_motivation: VLM常因过度依赖语言先验而产生物体幻觉，现有方法需重训练或计算成本高，亟需轻量高效的推理时干预方案。
analysis.problem: VLM解码过程中视觉特征被低估（注意力缺陷）导致生成内容与视觉事实不符的物体幻觉问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现VLM存在关键注意力缺陷：视觉特征在解码时被系统性地低估，导致模型过度依赖语言先验。
analysis.method: Positive-and-Negative Decoding (PND)：正路径通过多层注意力放大显著视觉证据，负路径退化核心物体特征构建反事实，每步对比两者输出以惩罚无根据的生成。
contributions: 揭示VLM注意力缺陷是物体幻觉的关键原因
提出无需训练的PND推理框架，通过正负对比解码提升视觉忠实度
在多个VLM架构和基准上实现SOTA，准确率提升达6.5%
analysis.experiments: 在POPE、MME、CHAIR等基准上评估，覆盖LLaVA、InstructBLIP、InternVL、Qwen-VL等架构，取得SOTA性能。
limitations: 仅针对物体幻觉，对其他类型幻觉（如属性、关系）效果未知
负路径退化策略可能影响细粒度描述质量
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无需训练的PND框架，通过正负对比解码纠正VLM注意力缺陷，有效缓解物体幻觉。

papers.title: Aligning with Your Own Voice: Self-Corrected Preference Learning for Hallucination Mitigation in LVLMs
papers.abstract: Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) frequently suffer from hallucinations. Existing preference learning-based approaches largely rely on proprietary models to construct preference datasets. We identify that this reliance introduces a distributional mismatch between the proprietary and target models that hinders efficient alignment. To address this, we propose Alignment via VErified Self-correction DPO (AVES-DPO), a framework that aligns LVLMs using in-distribution data derived from the model's intrinsic knowledge. Our approach employs a consensus-based verification mechanism to diagnose diverse hallucinations and guides the model to self-correct, thereby generating preference pairs strictly compatible with its internal distribution. Extensive experiments demonstrate that AVES-DPO surpasses existing baselines in hallucination mitigation while requiring only 5.2k samples.

analysis.tldr: AVES-DPO利用模型自身知识通过自校正生成偏好数据，有效缓解LVLM幻觉。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有偏好学习方法依赖专有模型构建偏好数据集，导致分布不匹配，影响对齐效率。
analysis.problem: 如何利用模型自身知识构建分布内偏好数据以缓解LVLM幻觉。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 依赖专有模型构建偏好数据会导致分布不匹配，阻碍有效对齐。
analysis.method: 提出AVES-DPO框架，通过共识验证机制诊断幻觉并引导模型自校正，生成与模型内部分布兼容的偏好对。
contributions: 识别出依赖专有模型构建偏好数据导致的分布不匹配问题。
提出AVES-DPO框架，利用模型自身知识通过自校正生成分布内偏好数据。
实验表明仅需5.2k样本即可超越现有基线。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准上评估，AVES-DPO在幻觉缓解方面超越现有基线。
limitations: 可能依赖自校正质量，若模型初始幻觉严重可能影响效果。
仅验证了5.2k样本规模，更大规模数据效果未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AVES-DPO利用模型自身知识通过自校正生成偏好数据，有效缓解LVLM幻觉。

papers.title: Complexity of Linear Regions in Self-supervised Deep ReLU Networks
papers.abstract: There has been growing interest in studying the complexity of Rectified Linear Unit (ReLU) based activation networks. Recent work investigates the evolution of the number of piecewise-linear partitions (linear regions) that are formed during training. However, current research is limited to examining the complexity of models trained in a supervised way. Self-Supervised Learning (SSL) differs in that it directly optimises the representation space using a loss function to enhance the model's performance across multiple downstream tasks. This study investigates the local distribution of linear regions produced by SSL models. We demonstrate that the evolution of linear regions correlates with the representation quality by utilising SplineCam to extract two-dimensional polytopes near the data distribution. We track the number, area, eccentricity, and boundaries of regions throughout training. The study compares supervised, contrastive, and self-distillation methods over two standard benchmark datasets, MNIST and FashionMNIST. The analysis of the experimental results shows that self-supervised methods create substantially fewer regions to achieve comparable accuracy to supervised models. Contrastive methods rapidly expand regions over time, whereas self-distillation methods tend to consolidate by merging neighbouring regions. Lastly, we can detect representation collapse early within the geometric space of linear regions. Our analysis suggests that polytopal metrics can serve as reliable indicators of representation quality and model performance.

analysis.tldr: 自监督ReLU网络的线性区域复杂度与表征质量相关，且自监督方法比监督方法用更少区域达到相近精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有研究仅关注监督训练下ReLU网络线性区域复杂度的演化，缺乏对自监督学习（SSL）中线性区域复杂度的理解，而SSL直接优化表征空间以提升多下游任务性能，其几何复杂度与表征质量的关系尚不明确。
analysis.problem: 探究自监督深度ReLU网络中线性区域的局部分布及其与表征质量的关系，并对比监督、对比学习和自蒸馏方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 自监督方法比监督方法用更少线性区域达到可比精度；对比方法随时间快速扩展区域，自蒸馏方法倾向于合并相邻区域；线性区域的几何度量可早期检测表征崩溃。
analysis.method: 利用SplineCam提取数据分布附近的二维多面体，跟踪训练过程中线性区域的数量、面积、离心率和边界，对比监督、对比学习和自蒸馏方法在MNIST和FashionMNIST上的表现。
contributions: 首次系统研究自监督ReLU网络中线性区域的局部分布及其与表征质量的关系。
发现自监督方法用更少线性区域达到与监督方法相当的精度，并揭示对比与自蒸馏方法不同的区域演化模式。
提出多面体度量可作为表征质量和模型性能的可靠指标，并能早期检测表征崩溃。
analysis.experiments: 在MNIST和FashionMNIST数据集上对比监督、对比学习和自蒸馏方法，跟踪线性区域的数量、面积、离心率和边界。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 实验仅基于MNIST和FashionMNIST两个简单数据集，未在更大规模或更复杂数据集上验证。
仅分析二维多面体，可能无法完全反映高维表征空间的复杂性。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning theory
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 自监督ReLU网络的线性区域复杂度与表征质量相关，且自监督方法比监督方法用更少区域达到相近精度。

papers.title: Certified geometric robustness -- Super-DeepG
papers.abstract: Safety-critical applications are required to perform as expected in normal operations. Image processing functions are often required to be insensitive to small geometric perturbations such as rotation, scaling, shearing or translation. This paper addresses the formal verification of neural networks against geometric perturbations on their image dataset. Our method Super-DeepG improves the reasoning used in linear relaxation techniques and Lipschitz optimization, and provides an implementation that leverages GPU hardware. By doing so, Super-DeepG achieves both precision and computational efficiency of robustness certification, to an extent that outperforms prior work. Super-DeepG is shared as an open-source tool on GitHub.

analysis.tldr: 提出Super-DeepG方法，通过改进线性松弛和Lipschitz优化，实现神经网络对几何扰动的鲁棒性认证，兼顾精度与效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 安全关键应用要求图像处理对几何扰动（如旋转、缩放）不敏感，但现有神经网络鲁棒性认证方法在几何扰动场景下精度或效率不足。
analysis.problem: 如何高效且精确地形式化验证神经网络对几何扰动的鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 改进线性松弛技术和Lipschitz优化，并利用GPU硬件加速实现。
contributions: 提出Super-DeepG方法，提升几何扰动鲁棒性认证的精度和计算效率。
提供开源工具，便于复现和进一步研究。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的几何扰动。
GPU硬件依赖可能限制通用性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Super-DeepG方法，通过改进线性松弛和Lipschitz优化，实现神经网络对几何扰动的鲁棒性认证，兼顾精度与效率。

papers.title: SeaEvo: Advancing Algorithm Discovery with Strategy Space Evolution
papers.abstract: Large Language Model (LLM)-guided evolutionary search is increasingly used for automated algorithm discovery, yet most current methods track search progress primarily through executable programs and scalar fitness. Even when natural-language reasoning is used through heuristic descriptions or reflection, it typically remains transient mutation context or unstructured memory, rather than organized as persistent population-level state over strategic directions. As a result, evolutionary search can struggle to distinguish syntactically different implementations of the same idea, preserve lower-fitness but strategically promising directions, or detect when an entire family of strategies has saturated. We introduce \model, a modular strategy-space layer that turns language-level strategic reasoning into first-class population-level evolutionary state in LLM-driven program search. \model represents each candidate program with an explicit natural-language strategy, clusters the archive by strategy semantics, retrieves behaviorally complementary inspirations, and periodically navigates the strategy landscape to avoid saturated directions. Without modifying the underlying evolutionary algorithms, \model improves existing evolutionary backbones across algorithm discovery, systems optimization, and agent-scaffold design tasks in most settings. Across four systems benchmarks, \model achieves a 20.6% average relative improvement, with the best single run on Prism scoring 3$\times$ higher. These results suggest that persistent strategy representations provide a practical mechanism for improving the effectiveness and cost-efficiency of LLM-guided evolutionary search, pointing toward compound AI systems whose search capabilities benefit from the structured accumulation and reuse of algorithmic strategies.

analysis.tldr: SeaEvo通过将自然语言策略作为一等公民纳入进化搜索状态，提升了LLM引导的算法发现效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前LLM引导的进化搜索主要依赖可执行程序和标量适应度跟踪进展，缺乏对策略语义的组织和利用，导致难以区分相同思想的不同实现、保留低适应度但有前景的方向，或检测策略饱和。
analysis.problem: 如何将语言层面的策略推理转化为持久的种群级进化状态，以提升LLM驱动程序搜索的效果和成本效率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，现有方法中自然语言推理仅作为瞬态变异上下文或非结构化记忆，而非组织化的策略方向种群级状态，导致进化搜索难以区分语法不同但语义相同的实现，且容易丢失低适应度但策略上有前途的方向。
analysis.method: SeaEvo是一个模块化策略空间层，为每个候选程序生成显式的自然语言策略，按策略语义聚类存档，检索行为互补的灵感，并定期导航策略景观以避免饱和方向。
contributions: 提出将自然语言策略作为一等公民的种群级进化状态表示，提升LLM引导进化搜索的效果。
在算法发现、系统优化和智能体框架设计等多个任务上，SeaEvo在现有进化算法基础上实现平均20.6%的相对改进。
analysis.experiments: 在四个系统基准测试上，SeaEvo平均相对改进20.6%，最佳单次运行在Prism上得分高出3倍。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的自然语言策略生成，对LLM能力有要求。
策略聚类和导航的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SeaEvo通过将自然语言策略作为一等公民纳入进化搜索状态，提升了LLM引导的算法发现效率。

papers.title: PathMoG: A Pathway-Centric Modular Graph Neural Network for Multi-Omics Survival Prediction
papers.abstract: Cancer survival prediction from multi-omics data remains challenging because prognostic signals are high-dimensional, heterogeneous, and distributed across interacting genes and pathways. We propose PathMoG, a pathway-centric modular graph neural network for multi-omics survival prediction. PathMoG reorganizes genome-scale inputs into 354 KEGG-informed pathway modules, introduces a Hierarchical Omics Modulation module to condition gene-expression representations on mutation, copy number variation, pathway, and clinical context, and uses dual-level attention to capture both intra-pathway driver signals and inter-pathway clinical relevance. We evaluated PathMoG on 5,650 patients across 10 TCGA cancer types and observed consistent improvements over representative survival baselines. The framework further provides gene-level, pathway-level, and patient-level interpretability, supporting biologically grounded and clinically relevant risk stratification.

analysis.tldr: PathMoG 提出基于通路模块的图神经网络，利用多组学数据提升癌症生存预测性能与可解释性。
analysis.research_motivation: 癌症生存预测中多组学数据维度高、异质性强，且信号分布在相互作用的基因和通路中，传统方法难以有效建模。
analysis.problem: 如何从高维、异质的多组学数据中提取与生存相关的通路级和基因级特征，并实现可解释的预测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将基因组输入重组为354个KEGG通路模块，设计层次化组学调制模块以条件化基因表达表示，并采用双层注意力机制捕获通路内驱动信号和通路间临床相关性。
contributions: 提出PathMoG框架，结合通路模块化与图神经网络实现多组学生存预测。
引入层次化组学调制和双层注意力机制，提升预测性能和可解释性。
analysis.experiments: 在10个TCGA癌症类型的5650名患者上评估，相比代表性生存基线方法取得一致改进。
limitations: 依赖KEGG通路先验知识，可能遗漏未知通路。
仅在TCGA数据集上验证，泛化性需进一步测试。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: PathMoG 提出基于通路模块的图神经网络，利用多组学数据提升癌症生存预测性能与可解释性。

papers.title: Multispectral airborne laser scanning dataset for tree species classification: MS-ALS-SPECIES
papers.abstract: The shift from stand-level to individual-tree-level forest assessments supports improved biodiversity mapping, particularly in boreal ecosystems where tree species like aspen (Populus tremula L.) play a keystone role. While airborne laser scanning (ALS) is the standard for such inventories, a major limitation is the small number of publicly available ALS datasets containing high-quality, field-validated reference data. Furthermore, open multispectral ALS datasets with high-quality field reference data are completely lacking despite the potential of multispectral ALS data for tree species classification. This paper presents and details an open multispectral ALS dataset used in a recent international benchmarking study of machine learning and deep learning methods for tree species classification by Taher et al. (2026). The dataset comprises 6326 segment-level point clouds of individual trees representing nine species in Southern Finland. The point cloud data has been acquired using two multispectral laser scanning systems each operating at three laser wavelengths: a helicopter-borne system (HeliALS) with a point density exceeding 1000 points/m$^2$ and an Optech Titan system with approximately 35 points/m$^2$. We provide a detailed description of field data collection techniques developed in the study to facilitate the collection of high-quality ground truth data in an efficient and scalable manner. Additionally, our article presents new analyses on species classification using multispectral data building upon the initial findings of Taher et al. (2026). Furthermore, we study the relation between classification accuracy and tree height to highlight the versatility of the open dataset and to demonstrate the advantage of the point transformer model for small trees and minority species.

analysis.tldr: 公开多光谱ALS数据集MS-ALS-SPECIES，含6326棵单树点云，用于树种分类研究。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有公开ALS数据集缺乏高质量实地验证的多光谱数据，限制了树种分类研究。
analysis.problem: 缺乏公开的多光谱ALS数据集及高效可扩展的实地数据采集方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建包含6326个单树点云的多光谱ALS数据集，使用两种多光谱激光扫描系统（HeliALS和Optech Titan），并开发高效可扩展的实地数据采集技术。
contributions: 公开了首个多光谱ALS树种分类数据集MS-ALS-SPECIES
提供了高效可扩展的实地数据采集方法
analysis.experiments: 基于数据集进行树种分类分析，并研究分类精度与树高的关系，展示点Transformer模型对小树和少数物种的优势。
limitations: 数据集仅覆盖芬兰南部地区，物种多样性有限
点密度差异可能影响模型泛化性
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 公开多光谱ALS数据集MS-ALS-SPECIES，含6326棵单树点云，用于树种分类研究。

papers.title: Selective Correlation Based Knowledge Distillation for Ground Reaction Force Estimation
papers.abstract: Wearable sensor-based human gait analysis holds great promise in healthcare, rehabilitation, clinical diagnosis and monitoring, and sports activities. Specifically, ground reaction force (GRF) provides essential insights into the body's interaction with the ground during movement and is typically measured using instrumented treadmills equipped with force plates. However, such equipment is expensive and restricted to laboratory environments. To enable a more portable solution, wearable insole sensors have been used to measure GRF. These sensors, however, are prone to noise and external interference, which reduces measurement accuracy. Deep learning methodologies could be adopted to address these issues, but they often require significant computing resources to achieve high accuracy, limiting their applicability for real-time analysis on portable devices. To overcome these limitations, we propose Selective Correlation Based Knowledge Distillation (SCKD) for estimating GRF from data collected by insole sensors. Our proposed method utilizes selected features considering temporal characteristics in the process of extracting correlation maps for knowledge transfer, enhancing interpretability and mitigating issues in high dimensional data processing. We demonstrate the effectiveness of the compact models generated by our distillation framework through comparison with existing methods. Various configurations of teacher-student architectures and training approaches are examined based on multiple evaluation criteria, utilizing data collected at different walking speeds and with different window sizes. Experimental results confirm that our approach outperforms existing methods in estimating GRF from wearable insole sensor data. Therefore, our approach offers a reliable and resource-efficient solution for human gait analysis.

analysis.tldr: 提出选择性相关知识蒸馏方法，从鞋垫传感器数据高效估计地面反作用力。
analysis.research_motivation: 地面反作用力（GRF）测量依赖昂贵的测力台，便携式鞋垫传感器虽可替代但易受噪声干扰，而深度学习模型计算成本高，难以在便携设备上实时分析。
analysis.problem: 如何从噪声较大的鞋垫传感器数据中准确估计GRF，同时保持模型轻量化以适应实时便携应用。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出选择性相关知识蒸馏（SCKD），在知识迁移过程中利用时间特征选择相关性图，增强可解释性并缓解高维数据处理问题。
contributions: 提出SCKD方法，通过选择性相关特征实现从教师到学生模型的知识蒸馏。
在多个行走速度和窗口大小下验证了紧凑模型优于现有方法。
analysis.experiments: 使用不同行走速度和窗口大小的鞋垫传感器数据，对比多种师生架构和训练方法，实验结果表明所提方法优于现有方法。
limitations: 可能仅在特定传感器和行走条件下验证。
未讨论跨受试者泛化能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出选择性相关知识蒸馏方法，从鞋垫传感器数据高效估计地面反作用力。

papers.title: DPRM: A Plug-in Doob h transform-induced Token-Ordering Module for Diffusion Language Models
papers.abstract: Diffusion language models generate without a fixed left-to-right order, making token ordering a central algorithmic choice: which tokens should be revealed, retained, revised or verified at each step? Existing systems mainly use random masking or confidence-driven ordering. Random masking creates train--test mismatch, while confidence-only rules are efficient but can be myopic and suppress useful exploration. We introduce DPRM (Doob h-transform Process Reward Model), a plug-in token-ordering module for diffusion language models. DPRM keeps the host architecture, denoising objective and supervision unchanged, and changes only the ordering policy. It starts from confidence-driven progressive ordering and gradually shifts to Doob h transform Process Reward guided ordering through online estimates. We characterize the exact DPRM policy as a reward-tilted Gibbs reveal law, prove O(1/N) convergence of the stagewise Soft-BoN approximation, and show that the online bucketized controller tracks the exact DPRM score at empirical-Bernstein rates. Under tractable optimization assumptions, DPRM also yields a sample-complexity advantage over random and confidence-only ordering. DPRM improves over confidence-based baselines in pretraining, post-training, test-time scaling, and single-cell masked diffusion, with particularly strong gains on harder reasoning subsets. In protein, molecular generation and DNA design, the effect is more multi-objective: ordering-aware variants significantly improve selected structural or fragment-constrained metrics while not uniformly dominating the host baseline on every quality metric. These results identify token ordering as a fundamental control axis in diffusion language models and establish DPRM as a general-purpose module for improving it. Code is available at https://github.com/DakeBU/DPRM-DLLM.

analysis.tldr: DPRM 是一个即插即用的令牌排序模块，通过 Doob h 变换过程奖励模型改进扩散语言模型的生成顺序。
analysis.research_motivation: 扩散语言模型缺乏固定的生成顺序，现有随机掩码和置信度驱动排序存在训练-测试不匹配或短视问题，限制了模型性能。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个通用的令牌排序策略，以提升扩散语言模型在多种任务上的生成质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 随机掩码排序导致训练-测试不匹配；置信度驱动排序高效但短视，抑制有用探索。
analysis.method: 提出 DPRM 模块，从置信度驱动渐进排序开始，通过在线估计逐步过渡到 Doob h 变换过程奖励引导的排序，并采用分桶控制器跟踪精确分数。
contributions: 提出 DPRM，一种即插即用的令牌排序模块，不改变模型架构和训练目标。
理论证明了 DPRM 策略的收敛性和样本复杂度优势。
在预训练、后训练、测试时扩展和单细胞掩码扩散任务上超越置信度基线，尤其在困难推理子集上提升显著。
analysis.experiments: 在蛋白质、分子生成和 DNA 设计任务上评估，DPRM 在选定的结构或片段约束指标上显著提升，但并非在所有质量指标上一致优于基线。
limitations: 在部分质量指标上未完全主导基线，多目标优化效果不均衡。
依赖在线估计，可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: DPRM 是一个即插即用的令牌排序模块，通过 Doob h 变换过程奖励模型改进扩散语言模型的生成顺序。

papers.title: ARETE: Attention-based Rasterized Encoding for Topology Estimation using HSV-transformed Crowdsourced Vehicle Fleet Data
papers.abstract: The continuous advancement of autonomous driving (AD) introduces challenges across multiple disciplines to ensure safe and efficient driving. One such challenge is the generation of High-Definition (HD) maps, which must remain up to date and highly accurate for downstream automotive tasks. One promising approach is the use of crowdsourced data from a vehicle fleet, representing road topology and lane-level features. This work focuses on the generation of centerlines and lane dividers from crowdsourced vehicle trajectories. We adopt a Detection Transformer (DETR)-based approach, where a rasterized representation of vehicle trajectories is used as input to predict vectorized lane representations. Each lane consists of a centerline with an associated direction and corresponding lane dividers that are geometrically constrained by the centerline. Our method includes the extraction of local tiles, from which crowdsourced vehicle trajectories are aggregated. Each tile undergoes a transformation into a rasterized representation encoding both the presence and direction of each trajectory, enabling the prediction of vectorized directed lanes. Experiments are conducted on an internal dataset as well as on the public datasets nuScenes and nuPlan.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于DETR的注意力栅格化编码方法，利用HSV变换的众包车辆轨迹数据估计道路拓扑，生成中心线和车道分隔线。
analysis.research_motivation: 高精地图需要持续更新且高度准确，众包车辆数据是一种有前景的方案，但如何从轨迹中高效提取车道拓扑仍具挑战。
analysis.problem: 从众包车辆轨迹数据中生成车道中心线和车道分隔线，实现道路拓扑估计。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用DETR架构，将车辆轨迹栅格化并经过HSV变换编码轨迹存在和方向，作为输入预测向量化车道表示，每个车道包含中心线、方向及几何约束的车道分隔线。
contributions: 提出一种基于注意力机制的栅格化编码方法，利用HSV变换编码轨迹方向信息。
在内部数据集和nuScenes、nuPlan公共数据集上验证了方法的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在内部数据集以及nuScenes和nuPlan公共数据集上进行实验，但摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖众包数据的质量和覆盖度。
未提及对复杂道路场景（如交叉口）的处理能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于DETR的注意力栅格化编码方法，利用HSV变换的众包车辆轨迹数据估计道路拓扑，生成中心线和车道分隔线。

papers.title: Diffusion Templates: A Unified Plugin Framework for Controllable Diffusion
papers.abstract: Controllable diffusion methods have substantially expanded the practical utility of diffusion models, but they are typically developed as isolated, backbone-specific systems with incompatible training pipelines, parameter formats, and runtime hooks. This fragmentation makes it difficult to reuse infrastructure across tasks, transfer capabilities across backbones, or compose multiple controls within a single generation pipeline. We present Diffusion Templates, a unified and open plugin framework that decouples base-model inference from controllable capability injection. The framework is organized around three components: Template models that map arbitrary task-specific inputs to an intermediate capability representation, a Template cache that functions as a standardized interface for capability injection, and a Template pipeline that loads, merges, and injects one or more Template caches into the base diffusion runtime. Because the interface is defined at the systems level rather than tied to a specific control architecture, heterogeneous capability carriers such as KV-Cache and LoRA can be supported under the same abstraction. Based on this design, we build a diverse model zoo spanning structural control, brightness adjustment, color adjustment, image editing, super-resolution, sharpness enhancement, aesthetic alignment, content reference, local inpainting, and age control. These case studies show that Diffusion Templates can unify a broad range of controllable generation tasks while preserving modularity, composability, and practical extensibility across rapidly evolving diffusion backbones. All resources will be open sourced, including code, models, and datasets.

analysis.tldr: 提出统一插件框架Diffusion Templates，解耦基础扩散模型与可控能力注入，支持多种控制任务和异构能力载体。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有可控扩散方法通常是孤立、特定于骨干网络的系统，训练流程、参数格式和运行时钩子不兼容，导致基础设施难以复用、能力难以跨骨干迁移、多个控制难以组合。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个统一、开放的插件框架，将基础模型推理与可控能力注入解耦，实现跨任务、跨骨干、可组合的可控扩散生成。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Diffusion Templates框架，包含三个组件：Template模型（将任务特定输入映射到中间能力表示）、Template缓存（标准化接口用于能力注入）、Template流水线（加载、合并、注入一个或多个Template缓存到基础扩散运行时）。支持KV-Cache和LoRA等异构能力载体。
contributions: 提出统一插件框架Diffusion Templates，解耦基础模型与可控能力注入，支持多种控制任务和异构能力载体。
构建包含10种控制任务（结构控制、亮度调整、颜色调整、图像编辑、超分辨率、锐度增强、美学对齐、内容参考、局部修复、年龄控制）的模型库，验证框架的模块化、可组合性和可扩展性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能未在极大规模或实时性要求高的场景下验证性能。
框架的通用性可能受限于特定骨干网络或能力载体的兼容性。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出统一插件框架Diffusion Templates，解耦基础扩散模型与可控能力注入，支持多种控制任务和异构能力载体。

papers.title: Unveiling the Backdoor Mechanism Hidden Behind Catastrophic Overfitting in Fast Adversarial Training
papers.abstract: Fast Adversarial Training (FAT) has attracted significant attention due to its efficiency in enhancing neural network robustness against adversarial attacks. However, FAT is prone to catastrophic overfitting (CO), wherein models overfit to the specific attack used during training and fail to generalize to others. While existing methods introduce diverse hypotheses and propose various strategies to mitigate CO, a systematic and intuitive explanation of CO remains absent. In this work, we innovatively interpret CO through the lens of backdoor. Through validations on pathway division, diverse feature predictions, and universal class distinguishable triggers in CO, we conceptualize CO as a weak trigger variant of unlearnable tasks, unifying CO, backdoor attacks, and unlearnable tasks under a common theoretical framework. Guided by this, we leverage several backdoor inspired strategies to mitigate CO: (i) Recalibrate CO affected model parameters using vanilla fine tuning, linear probing, or reinitialization-based techniques; (ii) Introduce a weight outlier suppression constraint to regulate abnormal deviations in model weights. Extensive experiments support our interpretation of CO and show the efficacy of the proposed mitigation strategies.

analysis.tldr: 将快速对抗训练中的灾难性过拟合解释为一种弱触发器后门机制，并提出后门启发的缓解策略。
analysis.research_motivation: 快速对抗训练（FAT）效率高但易出现灾难性过拟合（CO），现有方法缺乏系统直观的解释，理解CO机制有助于设计更鲁棒的训练方法。
analysis.problem: 解释快速对抗训练中灾难性过拟合的根本原因，并基于该解释设计有效的缓解策略。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通过路径划分、多样特征预测和通用类可区分触发器验证，将CO视为不可学习任务的弱触发器变体，统一了CO、后门攻击和不可学习任务的理论框架。
analysis.method: 提出后门启发的缓解策略：(i) 使用微调、线性探测或重初始化技术重新校准受CO影响的模型参数；(ii) 引入权重异常值抑制约束以调节模型权重的异常偏差。
contributions: 首次从后门视角系统解释灾难性过拟合，统一了CO、后门攻击和不可学习任务的理论框架。
提出两种后门启发的缓解策略（参数重校准和权重异常值抑制），实验验证其有效性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 缓解策略可能增加额外计算开销。
理论框架在更复杂攻击场景下的泛化性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将快速对抗训练中的灾难性过拟合解释为一种弱触发器后门机制，并提出后门启发的缓解策略。

papers.title: Semantic Segmentation for Histopathology using Learned Regularization based on Global Proportions
papers.abstract: In pathology, the spatial distribution and proportions of tissue types are key indicators of disease progression, and are more readily available than fine-grained annotations. However, these assessments are rarely mapped to pixel-wise segmentation. The task is fundamentally underdetermined, as many spatially distinct segmentations can satisfy the same global proportions in the absence of pixel-wise constraints. To address this, we introduce Variational Segmentation from Label Proportions (VSLP), a two-stage framework that infers dense segmentations from global label proportions, without any pixel-level annotations. This framework first leverages a pre-trained transformer model with test-time augmentation to produce a pixel-wise confidence estimate. In the second stage, these estimates are fused by solving a variational optimization problem that incorporates a Wasserstein data fidelity term alongside a learned regularizer. Unlike end-to-end networks, our variational method can visualize the fidelity-regularization energy, resulting in more interpretable segmentation. We validate our approach on two public datasets, achieving superior performance over existing weakly supervised and unsupervised methods. For one of these datasets, proportions have been estimated by an experienced pathologist to provide a realistic benchmark to the community. Furthermore, the method scales to an in-house dataset with noisy pathologist labels, severely outperforming state-of-the-art methods, thereby demonstrating practical applicability. The code and data will be made publicly available upon acceptance at https://github.com/xiaoliangpi/VSLP.

analysis.tldr: 提出VSLP框架，利用全局组织比例和变分优化实现病理图像语义分割，无需像素级标注。
analysis.research_motivation: 病理学中组织类型的空间分布和比例是疾病进展的关键指标，但像素级标注难以获取；现有方法无法从全局比例推断密集分割，且任务本身欠定。
analysis.problem: 如何仅从全局标签比例（无像素级标注）推断出像素级语义分割结果。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 两阶段框架：第一阶段使用预训练transformer模型结合测试时增强生成像素级置信度估计；第二阶段通过变分优化问题融合这些估计，包含Wasserstein数据保真项和学习正则化器。
contributions: 提出VSLP框架，首次从全局标签比例推断密集分割，无需像素级标注。
变分方法可可视化保真度-正则化能量，提高分割可解释性。
在多个数据集上超越现有弱监督和无监督方法，包括病理学家估计比例的基准。
analysis.experiments: 在两个公开数据集和一个内部数据集上验证，与现有弱监督和无监督方法比较，性能更优；其中一个数据集由经验病理学家估计比例作为基准。
limitations: 依赖预训练模型的质量和测试时增强策略。
变分优化可能计算开销较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出VSLP框架，利用全局组织比例和变分优化实现病理图像语义分割，无需像素级标注。

papers.title: SycoPhantasy: Quantifying Sycophancy and Hallucination in Small Open Weight VLMs for Vision-Language Scoring of Fantasy Characters
papers.abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) are increasingly deployed as evaluators in tasks requiring nuanced image understanding, yet their reliability in scoring alignment between images and text descriptions remains underexplored. We investigate whether small, open-weight VLMs exhibit \emph{sycophantic} behavior when evaluating image-text alignment: assigning high scores without grounding their judgments in visual evidence. To quantify this phenomenon, we introduce the \emph{Bluffing Coefficient} (\bc), a metric that measures the mismatch between a model's score and its evidence recall. We evaluate six open-weight VLMs ranging from 450M to 8B parameters on a benchmark of 173,810 AI-generated character portraits paired with detailed textual descriptions. Our analysis reveals a significant inverse correlation between model size and sycophancy rate ($r = -0.96$, $p = 0.002$), with smaller models exhibiting substantially higher rates of unjustified high scores. The smallest model tested (LFM2-VL, 450M) produced sycophantic evaluations in 22.3\% of cases, compared to 6.0\% for the largest (LLaVA-1.6, 7B). These findings have direct implications for the deployment of small, open-weight VLMs as automated evaluators within attribute-rich, synthetic image evaluation tasks, where the gap between assigned scores and cited visual evidence is both measurable and consequential.

analysis.tldr: 提出Bluffing Coefficient量化小模型在图像-文本对齐评分中的谄媚行为，发现模型越小谄媚率越高。
analysis.research_motivation: VLM被用作评估器，但小模型在评分时可能不基于视觉证据，导致可靠性问题，现有研究缺乏对此现象的量化分析。
analysis.problem: 量化小规模开源VLM在图像-文本对齐评分中的谄媚行为（即给出高分但缺乏视觉证据支持）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型大小与谄媚率呈显著负相关（r=-0.96, p=0.002），最小模型（450M）谄媚率22.3%，最大模型（7B）仅6.0%。
analysis.method: 提出Bluffing Coefficient（BC）指标，衡量模型评分与证据召回之间的不匹配程度；构建包含173,810个AI生成角色肖像及详细文本描述的基准。
contributions: 首次量化小规模开源VLM在图像-文本对齐评分中的谄媚行为。
提出Bluffing Coefficient指标用于检测评分与视觉证据的偏差。
揭示模型大小与谄媚率的强负相关关系。
analysis.experiments: 在6个开源VLM（450M-8B参数）上评估，使用173,810个AI生成角色肖像基准。
limitations: 仅针对AI生成的角色肖像，泛化性未知。
仅评估开源小模型，未涉及闭源或更大模型。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Bluffing Coefficient量化小模型在图像-文本对齐评分中的谄媚行为，发现模型越小谄媚率越高。

papers.title: See Further, Think Deeper: Advancing VLM's Reasoning Ability with Low-level Visual Cues and Reflection
papers.abstract: Recent advances in Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have benefited from Reinforcement Learning (RL) for enhanced reasoning. However, existing methods still face critical limitations, including the lack of low-level visual information and effective visual feedback. To address these problems, this paper proposes a unified multimodal interleaved reasoning framework \textbf{ForeSight}, which enables VLMs to \textbf{See Further} with low-level visual cues and \textbf{Think Deeper} with effective visual feedback. First, it introduces a set of low-level visual tools to integrate essential visual information into the reasoning chain, mitigating the neglect of fine-grained visual features. Second, a mask-based visual feedback mechanism is elaborated to incorporate visual reflection into the thinking process, enabling the model to dynamically re-examine and update its answers. Driven by RL, ForeSight learns to autonomously decide on tool invocation and answer verification, with the final answer accuracy as the reward signal. To evaluate the performance of the proposed framework, we construct a new dataset, Character and Grounding SalBench (CG-SalBench), based on the SalBench dataset. Experimental results demonstrate that the ForeSight-7B model significantly outperforms other models with the same parameter scale, and even surpasses the current SOTA closed-source models on certain metrics.

analysis.tldr: 提出ForeSight框架，通过低层视觉线索和视觉反馈增强VLM推理能力，在CG-SalBench上超越同规模模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有VLM在推理时缺乏低层视觉信息和有效视觉反馈，限制了其细粒度视觉理解与自我修正能力。
analysis.problem: 如何让VLM在推理过程中利用低层视觉线索并引入视觉反馈机制以提升推理准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出当前VLM推理方法忽略细粒度视觉特征，且缺乏动态重检答案的反馈机制。
analysis.method: 提出ForeSight框架，包含低层视觉工具集成和基于掩码的视觉反馈机制，通过强化学习训练模型自主决定工具调用和答案验证。
contributions: 提出统一的多模态交错推理框架ForeSight，结合低层视觉线索和视觉反馈。
构建基于SalBench的新数据集CG-SalBench用于评估。
实验表明ForeSight-7B在多项指标上超越同规模模型及部分闭源SOTA模型。
analysis.experiments: 在自建CG-SalBench数据集上评估，ForeSight-7B显著优于同参数规模模型，并在某些指标上超越当前SOTA闭源模型。
limitations: 可能依赖特定低层视觉工具集，泛化性需进一步验证。
CG-SalBench数据集规模与多样性未明确说明。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ForeSight框架，通过低层视觉线索和视觉反馈增强VLM推理能力，在CG-SalBench上超越同规模模型。

papers.title: An Affordable, Wearable Stereo-Eye-Tracking Platform
papers.abstract: Research on video-based eye-tracking has long explored stereo and glint-based methods, yet existing wearable eye trackers - both commercial and open-source - offer limited flexibility for algorithm development and comparative evaluation. We present an affordable, wearable stereo eye-tracking platform built from off-the-shelf and 3D-printable components that explicitly targets this gap. The system combines four infrared eye cameras, infrared illumination, an optional scene camera, and software support for calibration and synchronized data acquisition. By design, the platform supports multiple eye-tracking paradigms, including stereo, glint-based, and binocular approaches, within a single hardware configuration. Rather than optimizing for end-user robustness, the platform prioritizes modularity and extensibility for research use. This paper focuses on the hardware architecture and calibration pipeline and demonstrates the feasibility of the approach using a prototype implementation. All hardware designs and documentation are made openly available.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种低成本、可穿戴的立体眼动追踪平台，支持多种眼动追踪范式，并开源硬件设计。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有可穿戴眼动追踪设备（商业和开源）在算法开发和比较评估方面灵活性有限，缺乏一个模块化、可扩展的研究平台。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个低成本、可穿戴、支持多种眼动追踪范式（立体、角膜反射、双目）的硬件平台，并实现校准和数据采集。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用现成组件和3D打印部件构建硬件，包括四个红外眼摄像头、红外照明、可选场景摄像头，并配套校准和同步数据采集软件。
contributions: 设计并实现了一个低成本、可穿戴的立体眼动追踪平台，支持多种眼动追踪范式。
开源所有硬件设计和文档，促进研究社区的可重复性和扩展性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 原型实现可能未进行大规模用户测试或精度评估。
平台优先模块化而非终端用户鲁棒性，可能影响实际应用中的稳定性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种低成本、可穿戴的立体眼动追踪平台，支持多种眼动追踪范式，并开源硬件设计。

papers.title: Monocular Depth Estimation via Neural Network with Learnable Algebraic Group and Ring Structures
papers.abstract: Monocular depth estimation (MDE) has witnessed remarkable progress driven by Convolutional Neural Networks and transformer-based architectures. However, these approaches typically treat the problem as a generic image-to-image regression on Euclidean grids, thereby overlooking the intrinsic algebraic and geometric structures induced by perspective projection. To address this limitation, we propose LAGRNet, a novel framework that fundamentally grounds MDE in algebraic geometry by explicitly embedding learnable group, ring, and sheaf structures into the deep learning pipeline. Modeling feature maps as sections of a sheaf over an approximated image manifold, our method first establishes a Group-defined Feature Manifold (GFM) parameterized by a learned algebraic group action to enforce projective equivariance and robustness against view changes. To facilitate algebraically consistent cross-scale interactions, we subsequently introduce a Ring Convolution Layer (RCL) that formulates feature fusion as a graded ring homomorphism. Furthermore, to ensure global topological consistency, a Sheaf-based Module (SM) aggregates local depth cues via Čech nerve on the image topology. Extensive zero-shot evaluations across the KITTI, NYU-Depth V2, and ETH3D benchmarks demonstrate that LAGRNet significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods in both accuracy and generalization capabilities.

analysis.tldr: 提出LAGRNet，通过嵌入可学习的代数群、环和层结构，将单目深度估计建立在代数几何基础上，显著提升精度和泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有单目深度估计方法通常将问题视为欧几里得网格上的通用图像到图像回归，忽略了透视投影固有的代数和几何结构，导致性能受限。
analysis.problem: 如何将代数几何结构（群、环、层）显式嵌入深度学习框架，以提升单目深度估计的准确性和泛化能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出LAGRNet，包含三个核心模块：1) 群定义特征流形（GFM），通过学习代数群作用实现投影等变性和视角变化鲁棒性；2) 环卷积层（RCL），将特征融合形式化为分次环同态；3) 层模块（SM），通过图像拓扑上的Čech神经聚合局部深度线索。
contributions: 首次将可学习的群、环和层结构嵌入单目深度估计网络，实现代数几何引导的深度预测。
在KITTI、NYU-Depth V2和ETH3D基准上零样本评估，显著超越现有方法。
analysis.experiments: 在KITTI、NYU-Depth V2和ETH3D基准上进行零样本评估，结果表明LAGRNet在准确性和泛化能力上均显著优于现有方法。
limitations: 可能对复杂场景的拓扑结构建模不够精细。
计算开销可能较大，实时性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出LAGRNet，通过嵌入可学习的代数群、环和层结构，将单目深度估计建立在代数几何基础上，显著提升精度和泛化能力。

papers.title: X-NegoBox: An Explainable Privacy-Budget Negotiation Framework for Secure Peer-to-Peer Energy Data Exchange
papers.abstract: The decentralization of modern energy systems is transforming consumers into prosumers who continuously exchange data with aggregators, peers, and market operators. While such data is essential for peer-to-peer trading, demand response, and distributed forecasting, it can reveal sensitive household patterns and introduce privacy risks. Existing data sharing mechanisms rely on fixed policies or predefined differential privacy budgets, limiting their ability to adapt to variations in reliability, data sensitivity, and request purpose. As a result, prosumers rarely receive explanations for why a request is accepted, rejected, or modified, reducing trust and participation. To address these limitations, we propose X-NegoBox, an explainable negotiation framework for adaptive privacy budgeting and transparent decision making. Each prosumer data is managed locally within a private DataBox, where raw data remain confined. Incoming requests are processed by an Autonomous Privacy Budget Negotiation Protocol (APBNP), which determines an appropriate privacy budget based on trust, feature sensitivity, declared purpose, historical behavior, and risk-aware pricing. When needed, APBNP generates privacy-preserving counter-offers, such as reduced resolution or duration. An Explainable Agreement Layer (X-Contract) produces human- and machine-readable justifications for each decision. After agreement, requester code executes locally in a sandbox, and only sanitized outputs are shared. Experiments on realistic energy market settings show reduced privacy leakage, higher acceptance rates, and improved interpretability.

analysis.tldr: 提出可解释的隐私预算协商框架X-NegoBox，用于安全点对点能源数据交换。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有数据共享机制依赖固定策略或预定义差分隐私预算，无法适应数据敏感性、请求目的等变化，且缺乏解释性，降低用户信任和参与度。
analysis.problem: 如何实现自适应、可解释的隐私预算协商，以平衡能源数据交换中的隐私保护与数据效用。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出X-NegoBox框架，包含本地DataBox管理原始数据、自主隐私预算协商协议(APBNP)基于信任、特征敏感性等确定预算并生成反提案，以及可解释协议层(X-Contract)提供决策理由。
contributions: 提出自适应隐私预算协商协议APBNP，动态调整差分隐私预算。
设计可解释协议层X-Contract，生成人类和机器可读的决策理由。
analysis.experiments: 在现实能源市场设置中实验，显示隐私泄露减少、接受率提高和可解释性改善。
limitations: 可能依赖假设的信任模型和定价机制。
实验规模未明确，可能未覆盖所有实际场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出可解释的隐私预算协商框架X-NegoBox，用于安全点对点能源数据交换。

papers.title: Generative Design of a Gas Turbine Combustor Using Invertible Neural Networks
papers.abstract: The need to burn 100% H2 in high efficient gas turbines featuring low NOx combustion in premix mode require the complete redesign of the combustion system to ensure stable operation without any flashback. Since all engine frames featuring a power range from 4 MW up to 600 MW are affected, a huge design effort is expected. To reduce this effort, especially to transfer knowledge between the different engine classes, generative design methods using latest AI technology will provide promising potential. In this work, this challenge is approached utilizing the current advances in generative artificial intelligence. We train an Invertible Neural Network (INN) on an expandable database of geometrically parameterized combustor designs with simulated performance labels. Utilizing the INN in its inverse direction, multiple design proposals are generated which fulfill specified performance labels.

analysis.tldr: 利用可逆神经网络生成满足性能标签的燃气轮机燃烧室设计方案。
analysis.research_motivation: 100%氢气燃烧需要重新设计燃烧系统以避免回火，传统方法工作量大，亟需高效的设计生成方法。
analysis.problem: 如何高效生成满足特定性能指标（如低NOx、无回火）的燃气轮机燃烧室几何设计方案。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 训练可逆神经网络（INN）在几何参数化燃烧室设计及其模拟性能标签的数据集上，利用INN的反向生成满足指定性能标签的多个设计方案。
contributions: 提出使用可逆神经网络进行燃气轮机燃烧室生成式设计的方法
构建了可扩展的几何参数化燃烧室设计与性能标签数据库
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 依赖模拟性能标签，可能无法完全反映真实工况
生成设计的可制造性和实际验证未提及
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用可逆神经网络生成满足性能标签的燃气轮机燃烧室设计方案。

papers.title: Don't Pause! Every prediction matters in a streaming video
papers.abstract: Streaming video models should respond the moment an event unfolds, not after the moment has passed. Yet existing online VideoQA benchmarks remain largely retrospective. They pause the video at fixed timestamps, pose questions about current or past events, and score models only at those moments. This protocol leaves streaming predictions untested. To close this gap, we introduce SPOT-Bench, featuring multi-turn proactive queries that evaluate general streaming perception and assistive capabilities required by an always-on, real-time assistant. SPOT-Bench comes with Timeliness-F1, a consolidated metric that measures streaming predictions by their temporal precision and balanced coverage across the entire video. Our benchmark reveals: (i) offline models detect events reliably but spam predictions unprompted; (ii) post-training for silence reduces spamming but induces unresponsiveness; (iii) half of the streaming video expects no response, which we term dead-time - compute spent here does not affect response latency. These findings motivate AsynKV, a training-free streaming adaptation of offline models, that retains their event perception while improving their streaming behavior. AsynKV features a long-short term memory, utilized efficiently by scaling compute during dead-time. It serves as a strong baseline on SPOT-Bench, outperforming existing streaming models, and achieves state-of-the-art on retrospective benchmarks.

analysis.tldr: 提出流式视频问答基准SPOT-Bench和训练无关的流式适配方法AsynKV，揭示离线模型在流式场景中的预测行为问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有在线视频问答基准大多在固定时间戳暂停视频并回顾性问题，无法测试流式预测能力，而实际流式视频模型需要在事件发生时立即响应。
analysis.problem: 缺乏评估流式视频模型实时预测能力的基准和指标，以及离线模型在流式场景中预测行为不佳（如无提示时乱发预测、沉默导致不响应）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：(i) 离线模型能可靠检测事件但无提示时乱发预测；(ii) 训练后抑制乱发会导致不响应；(iii) 一半流式视频不需要响应（死时间），此处的计算不影响响应延迟。
analysis.method: 提出SPOT-Bench基准（多轮主动查询+Timeliness-F1指标）和AsynKV方法（训练无关的流式适配，利用长短期记忆并在死时间高效缩放计算）。
contributions: 提出SPOT-Bench，首个评估流式视频模型实时感知和辅助能力的多轮主动查询基准，并引入Timeliness-F1指标。
揭示离线模型在流式场景中的预测行为问题（乱发预测、不响应、死时间）。
提出AsynKV，一种训练无关的流式适配方法，在SPOT-Bench上超越现有流式模型，并在回顾性基准上达到SOTA。
analysis.experiments: 摘要提到在SPOT-Bench上AsynKV超越现有流式模型，并在回顾性基准上达到SOTA，但未提供具体数值。
limitations: AsynKV可能依赖特定离线模型架构，泛化性未验证。
SPOT-Bench的查询设计可能未覆盖所有流式场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出流式视频问答基准SPOT-Bench和训练无关的流式适配方法AsynKV，揭示离线模型在流式场景中的预测行为问题。

papers.title: Self-Abstraction Learning for Effective and Stable Training of Deep Neural Networks
papers.abstract: Training large-scale deep neural networks effectively and stably is essential for applying deep learning across various fields. However, conventional methods, which rely on training a single large network, often encounter challenges such as gradient vanishing, overfitting and unstable learning. To overcome these limitations, we introduce Self-Abstraction Learning (SAL), a hierarchical framework. In SAL, networks are arranged by structural complexity, where the simplest topmost network is trained first and its hidden and output layers serve as guidance for the successively more complex networks below. This top-down sequential guidance effectively mitigates optimization issues, enabling stable training of deep architectures. Various experiments across MLP, CNN, and RNN architectures demonstrate that SAL consistently outperforms conventional methods, ensuring robust generalization even in data-scarce and complex network regimes.

analysis.tldr: 提出自抽象学习（SAL）框架，通过按结构复杂度排列网络并逐层引导训练，有效缓解梯度消失和过拟合，提升深度网络训练的稳定性和泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统单一大网络训练面临梯度消失、过拟合和不稳定学习等问题，限制了深度学习的应用效果。
analysis.problem: 如何实现深度神经网络的有效且稳定训练，克服优化困难。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出自抽象学习（SAL），将网络按结构复杂度分层，先训练最简单的顶层网络，其隐藏层和输出层作为后续更复杂网络的引导，实现自上而下的顺序训练。
contributions: 提出SAL框架，通过层次化引导训练解决深度网络优化问题。
在MLP、CNN和RNN架构上验证SAL优于传统方法，尤其在数据稀缺和复杂网络场景下泛化能力强。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能增加训练时间或计算开销。
引导机制的设计可能依赖特定网络结构。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出自抽象学习（SAL）框架，通过按结构复杂度排列网络并逐层引导训练，有效缓解梯度消失和过拟合，提升深度网络训练的稳定性和泛化能力。

papers.title: Unconstrained Multi-view Human Pose Estimation with Algebraic Priors
papers.abstract: Recovering 3D human pose from multi-view imagery typically relies on precise camera calibration, which is often unavailable in real-world scenarios, thereby severely limiting the applicability of existing methods. To overcome this challenge, we propose an unconstrained framework that synergizes deep neural networks, algebraic priors, and temporal dynamics for uncalibrated multi-view human pose estimation. First, we introduce the Triangulation with Transformer Regressor (TTR), which reformulates classical triangulation into a data-driven token fusion process to bypass the dependency on explicit camera parameters. Second, to explicitly embed the inherent algebraic relations of the multi-view variety into the learning process, we propose the Gröbner basis Corrector (GC). This pioneering loss formulation enforces constraints derived from the multi-view variety to ensure the neural predictions strictly adhere to the laws of projective geometry. Finally, we devise the Temporal Equivariant Rectifier (TER), which exploits the equivariance property of human motion to impose temporal coherence and structural consistency, effectively mitigating scale ambiguity in uncalibrated settings. Extensive evaluations on standard benchmarks demonstrate that our framework establishes a new state-of-the-art for uncalibrated multi-view human pose estimation. Notably, our approach significantly closes the performance gap between calibration-free methods and fully calibrated oracles.

analysis.tldr: 提出无约束多视角人体姿态估计框架，利用代数先验和时序动态，无需相机标定即达SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法依赖精确相机标定，在真实场景中难以获取，限制了应用范围。
analysis.problem: 无相机标定条件下的多视角3D人体姿态估计。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出TTR（三角化Transformer回归器）替代经典三角化，GC（Gröbner基校正器）嵌入多视角代数约束，TER（时序等变整流器）利用运动等变性保证时序一致性。
contributions: 提出TTR将经典三角化转化为数据驱动的token融合过程，摆脱对显式相机参数的依赖。
提出GC损失函数，利用多视角簇的代数关系约束神经预测符合射影几何。
提出TER利用人体运动等变性施加时序和结构一致性，缓解尺度模糊。
analysis.experiments: 在标准基准上评估，未校准方法达到新SOTA，显著缩小与全标定方法的差距。
limitations: 可能对极端遮挡或快速运动鲁棒性不足。
代数先验的泛化性可能受限于多视角几何假设。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无约束多视角人体姿态估计框架，利用代数先验和时序动态，无需相机标定即达SOTA。

papers.title: BIMStruct3D: A Fully Automated Hybrid Learning Scan-to-BIM Pipeline with Integrated Topology Refinement
papers.abstract: Automatic generation of Building Information Models (BIM) from building scans is a key challenge in architecture and construction. We present a modular pipeline for generating IFC-compliant BIM from 3D point clouds. The hybrid approach combines learning-based semantic segmentation with topology-aware geometric reconstruction to model structural elements accurately. We propose vIoU, adapting voxel-based overlap evaluation to Scan-to-BIM by enabling holistic, instance-matching-free comparison of reconstructed and ground-truth models. We release the German Hospital dataset (DeKH), including high-resolution point clouds, ground truth BIMs, and semantic annotations. Experiments on DeKH and CV4AEC datasets show significant improvements over a RANSAC-based baseline, demonstrating robustness and scalability.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种混合学习管道，从3D点云自动生成IFC兼容的BIM模型，并引入vIoU评估指标和德国医院数据集。
analysis.research_motivation: 从建筑扫描自动生成BIM是建筑行业的关键挑战，现有方法在拓扑准确性和实例级评估上存在不足。
analysis.problem: 如何从3D点云全自动生成拓扑精确、IFC兼容的BIM模型，并实现无实例匹配的评估。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 模块化管道：基于学习的语义分割 + 拓扑感知几何重建，结合vIoU评估指标。
contributions: 提出全自动混合学习Scan-to-BIM管道，集成拓扑细化。
提出vIoU指标，实现无实例匹配的整体评估。
发布德国医院数据集（DeKH），含高分辨率点云、真实BIM和语义标注。
analysis.experiments: 在DeKH和CV4AEC数据集上实验，相比RANSAC基线有显著改进，展示了鲁棒性和可扩展性。
limitations: 可能依赖特定建筑结构类型。
vIoU指标可能对点云密度敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种混合学习管道，从3D点云自动生成IFC兼容的BIM模型，并引入vIoU评估指标和德国医院数据集。

papers.title: SolarTformer: A Transformer Based Deep Learning Approach for Short Term Solar Power Forecasting
papers.abstract: Accurate forecasting of solar power output is essential for efficient integration of renewable energy into the grid. In this study, an attention-based deep learning model, inspired by transformer architecture, is used for short-term solar power forecasting. Our proposed model, "SolarTformer", is designed to predict solar power output from meteorological data. Unlike traditional models, SolarTformer leverages self-attention mechanisms to effectively capture temporal dependencies and spatial variability in solar irradiance. In addition, the proposed methodology includes feeding power station-specific metadata into the model, which helps to generalize between power stations located at different locations and with different panel configurations and in different seasons. Our experiments demonstrate that SolarTformer significantly outperforms previous models on the same data set. In particular, the model exhibits strong performance on both clear and cloudy days, indicating high robustness and generalizability. These findings highlight the potential of attention-based architectures in enhancing the accuracy of solar forecasting, contributing to a more reliable management of renewable energy.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于Transformer的SolarTformer模型，利用自注意力机制和电站元数据进行短期太阳能功率预测，在晴/阴天均表现优异。
analysis.research_motivation: 太阳能功率的准确预测对可再生能源并网至关重要，但传统模型难以有效捕捉时间依赖性和空间变异性。
analysis.problem: 如何利用气象数据和电站元数据实现高精度、鲁棒的短期太阳能功率预测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于Transformer架构，使用自注意力机制捕捉时间依赖性和空间变异性，并融入电站特定元数据以增强跨电站泛化能力。
contributions: 提出SolarTformer模型，将Transformer架构应用于太阳能功率预测。
引入电站元数据提升模型在不同电站和季节间的泛化性能。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量气象数据，数据缺失时性能下降。
未提及模型计算效率及实时部署可行性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于Transformer的SolarTformer模型，利用自注意力机制和电站元数据进行短期太阳能功率预测，在晴/阴天均表现优异。

papers.title: ReVSI: Rebuilding Visual Spatial Intelligence Evaluation for Accurate Assessment of VLM 3D Reasoning
papers.abstract: Current evaluations of spatial intelligence can be systematically invalid under modern vision-language model (VLM) settings. First, many benchmarks derive question-answer (QA) pairs from point-cloud-based 3D annotations originally curated for traditional 3D perception. When such annotations are treated as ground truth for video-based evaluation, reconstruction and annotation artifacts can miss objects that are clearly visible in the video, mislabel object identities, or corrupt geometry-dependent answers (e.g., size), yielding incorrect or ambiguous QA pairs. Second, evaluations often assume full-scene access, while many VLMs operate on sparsely sampled frames (e.g., 16-64), making many questions effectively unanswerable under the actual model inputs. We improve evaluation validity by introducing ReVSI, a benchmark and protocol that ensures each QA pair is answerable and correct under the model's actual inputs. To this end, we re-annotate objects and geometry across 381 scenes from 5 datasets to improve data quality, and regenerate all QA pairs with rigorous bias mitigation and human verification using professional 3D annotation tools. We further enhance evaluation controllability by providing variants across multiple frame budgets (16/32/64/all) and fine-grained object visibility metadata, enabling controlled diagnostic analyses. Evaluations of general and domain-specific VLMs on ReVSI reveal systematic failure modes that are obscured by prior benchmarks, yielding a more reliable and diagnostic assessment of spatial intelligence.

analysis.tldr: 提出 ReVSI 基准，通过重新标注和严格验证 QA 对，修复现有 VLM 3D 空间推理评估中的系统性失效问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有空间智能评估在现代 VLM 设置下存在系统性无效：基于点云标注的 QA 对在视频评估中因重建伪影导致错误或歧义，且全场景访问假设与 VLM 实际稀疏帧输入不匹配。
analysis.problem: 解决 VLM 3D 空间推理评估中 QA 对不可答或错误的问题，提升评估的有效性和可控性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出：1) 点云标注用于视频评估时，重建伪影导致漏标、错标或几何相关答案错误；2) 全场景访问假设使许多问题在稀疏帧输入下不可答。
analysis.method: 重新标注 5 个数据集的 381 个场景中的物体和几何，通过专业 3D 标注工具和人工验证生成高质量 QA 对，并提供多帧预算（16/32/64/all）和细粒度可见性元数据以增强可控性。
contributions: 提出 ReVSI 基准，确保每个 QA 对在模型实际输入下可答且正确。
通过重新标注和严格验证提升数据质量，揭示先前基准掩盖的系统性失败模式。
analysis.experiments: 评估了通用和领域特定 VLM，揭示了先前基准掩盖的系统性失败模式。摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅覆盖 5 个数据集 381 个场景，规模有限。
依赖人工标注，可能引入主观偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 ReVSI 基准，通过重新标注和严格验证 QA 对，修复现有 VLM 3D 空间推理评估中的系统性失效问题。

papers.title: Latent-Hysteresis Graph ODEs: Modeling Coupled Topology-Feature Evolution via Continuous Phase Transitions
papers.abstract: Graph neural ordinary differential equations (Graph ODEs) extend graph learning from discrete message-passing layers to continuous-time representation flows. While it supports adaptive long-range propagation, we show that Graph ODEs with strictly positive irreducible mixing operators face an inherent \emph{monostability trap}: in the long-time regime, information leakage is unavoidable and the dynamics converge to a single global consensus attractor. We propose the \textbf{Hysteresis Graph ODE (HGODE)}, which couples feature evolution with a latent topological potential driven by a learned pairwise force. A double-well edge potential and bipolarized gate allow edge states to polarize into connected or insulated phases while preserving differentiability. We provide asymptotic analysis of the collapse mechanism and the proposed hysteretic topology dynamics, and validate HGODE on theory-driven synthetic diagnostics and real-world graph benchmarks.

analysis.tldr: 提出滞后图ODE，通过耦合拓扑与特征演化解决图ODE的单调陷阱问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 图神经网络常受限于过平滑和长程传播困难，图ODE虽能实现连续时间表示流，但存在信息泄露和收敛到全局共识吸引子的固有缺陷。
analysis.problem: 图ODE在长期演化中因严格正不可约混合算子导致信息泄露和单调收敛，缺乏拓扑自适应能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出图ODE存在单调陷阱：长期演化中信息泄露不可避免，动力学收敛到单一全局共识吸引子。
analysis.method: 提出HGODE，将特征演化与由学习成对力驱动的潜在拓扑势耦合，通过双阱边势和双极化门实现边状态极化（连接或绝缘），同时保持可微性。
contributions: 揭示图ODE的单调陷阱并理论分析其崩溃机制
提出滞后图ODE，首次实现特征-拓扑耦合演化且保持可微性
analysis.experiments: 在理论驱动的合成诊断和真实图基准上验证，摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能对大规模图计算开销较高
滞后机制的理论分析可能仅适用于特定假设
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on graphs and other geometries & topologies
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出滞后图ODE，通过耦合拓扑与特征演化解决图ODE的单调陷阱问题。

papers.title: SparseContrast: Dynamic Sparse Attention for Efficient and Accurate Contrastive Learning in Medical Imaging
papers.abstract: We propose SparseContrast, a new framework that merges dynamic sparse attention with contrastive learning for medical imaging, with a focus on chest X-ray disease detection in low-data settings. Traditional contrastive learning methods rely on dense attention mechanisms, which are computationally expensive and often process redundant regions in medical images. To resolve this, SparseContrast introduces a sparse attention mechanism that selectively concentrates on diagnostically pertinent areas, markedly decreasing computational burden without compromising accuracy. The framework adaptively trims attention maps in the training phase, directed by a compact saliency predictor which concurrently optimizes sparsity and feature quality. This method not only speeds up training and inference by as much as 40% relative to dense attention benchmarks but also boosts diagnostic accuracy by focusing on areas of clinical importance. Moreover, the approach remains indifferent to the selection of backbone architecture, which permits its application to both convolutional and transformer-based models. Experiments show SparseContrast attains comparable or better performance in disease identification tasks with greater efficiency relative to current approaches. The proposed framework delivers a practical approach for implementing contrastive learning in medical imaging settings with limited resources, where computational efficiency and diagnostic accuracy are paramount.

analysis.tldr: SparseContrast通过动态稀疏注意力机制，在医学影像对比学习中实现高效且准确的疾病检测。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统对比学习依赖密集注意力机制，计算成本高且处理医学图像中的冗余区域，在资源受限场景下难以应用。
analysis.problem: 如何在低数据量的医学影像（如胸部X光）中实现高效且准确的对比学习。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 密集注意力机制处理冗余区域导致计算浪费，而稀疏注意力可聚焦诊断相关区域，提升效率。
analysis.method: 提出SparseContrast框架，结合动态稀疏注意力与对比学习，通过紧凑的显著性预测器自适应修剪注意力图，同时优化稀疏性和特征质量。
contributions: 提出动态稀疏注意力机制，显著降低计算负担（训练和推理加速达40%）。
框架与骨干架构无关，可应用于卷积和Transformer模型。
analysis.experiments: 在胸部X光疾病检测任务上，SparseContrast在低数据设置下达到与现有方法相当或更优的诊断精度，同时效率更高。
limitations: 可能仅针对特定医学影像模态（如胸部X光）验证。
稀疏注意力可能丢失某些罕见病变的细微特征。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SparseContrast通过动态稀疏注意力机制，在医学影像对比学习中实现高效且准确的疾病检测。

papers.title: RAS: a Reliability Oriented Metric for Automatic Speech Recognition
papers.abstract: Automatic speech recognition systems often produce confident yet incorrect transcriptions under noisy or ambiguous conditions, which can be misleading for both users and downstream applications. Standard evaluation based on Word Error Rate focuses solely on accuracy and fails to capture transcription reliability. We introduce an abstention-aware transcription framework that enables ASR models to explicitly abstain from uncertain segments. To evaluate reliability under abstention, we propose RAS, a reliability-oriented metric that balances transcription informativeness and error aversion, with its trade-off parameter calibrated by human preference. We then train an abstention-aware ASR model through supervised bootstrapping followed by reinforcement learning. Our experiments demonstrate substantial improvements in transcription reliability while maintaining competitive accuracy.

analysis.tldr: 提出面向ASR的可靠性指标RAS，通过允许模型对不确定片段弃权来提升转录可靠性。
analysis.research_motivation: 标准ASR评估仅关注词错误率，忽略了转录可靠性，导致模型在噪声条件下输出自信但错误的转录，误导用户和下游应用。
analysis.problem: 现有ASR评估指标无法衡量转录可靠性，且模型缺乏对不确定片段进行弃权的能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: ASR系统在噪声或模糊条件下常产生自信但错误的转录，标准指标无法反映这种不可靠性。
analysis.method: 提出弃权感知转录框架，允许模型对不确定片段弃权；设计可靠性指标RAS，平衡信息量和错误厌恶，并通过人类偏好校准权衡参数；采用监督引导训练结合强化学习训练弃权感知ASR模型。
contributions: 提出弃权感知转录框架，使ASR模型能显式弃权不确定片段。
设计可靠性导向指标RAS，平衡转录信息量和错误厌恶。
通过监督引导和强化学习训练弃权感知ASR模型，提升可靠性同时保持竞争力。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量人类偏好数据来校准权衡参数。
弃权策略可能降低转录信息量，需进一步优化。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出面向ASR的可靠性指标RAS，通过允许模型对不确定片段弃权来提升转录可靠性。

papers.title: Instance Awareness of Multi-class Semantic Segmentation Loss Functions
papers.abstract: Instance-sensitive losses for semantic segmentation such as blob loss and CC loss were designed to address instance imbalance, ensuring small lesions generate the same gradient as large ones, but operate only on single-class segmentation. In multi-class settings, class imbalance poses an additional problem: rare classes with few instances receive a disproportionately small share of the training signal. We show that extending instance-sensitive losses to multi-class segmentation via a one-vs-rest class decomposition repurposes them to also address class imbalance, as uniform averaging over classes ensures each class contributes equally regardless of frequency. We further show that inverse-size weighting, which destabilizes training when applied globally due to weight imbalances across rare and common classes, becomes effective when integrated within the per-component loss, confining the reweighting to each component's spatial context. On the BraTS-METS 2025 dataset (260 test cases), multi-class CC loss improves foreground Dice (0.64 +/- 0.26 vs. 0.59 +/- 0.27 baseline) and rare-class Dice, while maintaining Panoptic Quality at DSC threshold 0.5. Multi-class blob loss achieves the best Panoptic Quality at threshold 0.5 (0.40 +/- 0.24 vs. 0.38 +/- 0.25 baseline) and recognition quality (0.53 +/- 0.29 vs. 0.49 +/- 0.30). Integrating inverse-size weighting within the per-component loss increases rare-class Dice to 0.44 +/- 0.36 at the cost of reduced detection quality.

analysis.tldr: 将实例敏感损失扩展到多类分割，通过逐类平均和逐组件加权缓解类别不平衡，在BraTS-METS 2025上提升罕见类Dice。
analysis.research_motivation: 多类语义分割中，类别不平衡导致罕见类训练信号不足，而现有实例敏感损失仅针对单类分割设计。
analysis.problem: 如何将实例敏感损失（如blob loss、CC loss）扩展到多类分割，同时解决实例不平衡和类别不平衡问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 直接扩展实例敏感损失到多类（如一对多分解）可缓解类别不平衡；全局逆尺寸加权会因权重失衡导致训练不稳定，但限制在逐组件损失内则有效。
analysis.method: 提出多类CC损失和多类blob损失，采用一对多类分解实现逐类平均；在逐组件损失中集成逆尺寸加权，限制重加权于各组件空间上下文。
contributions: 将实例敏感损失扩展到多类分割，通过逐类平均解决类别不平衡。
提出在逐组件损失内集成逆尺寸加权，避免全局加权的不稳定性。
在BraTS-METS 2025数据集上验证了多类CC损失和blob损失的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在BraTS-METS 2025数据集（260个测试样本）上评估，多类CC损失提升前景Dice（0.64 vs 0.59）和罕见类Dice，多类blob损失提升全景质量（0.40 vs 0.38）和识别质量（0.53 vs 0.49）。
limitations: 仅在一个医学数据集上验证，泛化性未知。
逆尺寸加权在提升罕见类Dice的同时降低了检测质量。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将实例敏感损失扩展到多类分割，通过逐类平均和逐组件加权缓解类别不平衡，在BraTS-METS 2025上提升罕见类Dice。

papers.title: Deep Learning-Enabled Dissolved Oxygen Sensing in Biofouling Environments for Ocean Monitoring
papers.abstract: The escalating climate crisis and ecosystem degradation demand intelligent, low-cost sensors capable of robust, long-term monitoring in real-world environments. Absolute dissolved oxygen (DO) concentration is a key parameter for predicting climate tipping points. Inexpensive optoelectronic sensors based on microstructured polymer films doped with phosphorescent dyes could be readily deployable; however, signal drift and marine biofouling remain major challenges. Here, we introduce a sensing paradigm that combines camera-based DO sensors with a visual transformer (ViT)-based physics-informed neural network (PINN) for high-fidelity sensing under biofouling conditions. Training and testing data were obtained from an algae-laden water tank over 14 days to capture accelerated biofouling. The ViT-PINN, which embeds the Stern-Volmer (SV) equation into the loss function, reduces mean average error (MAE) by 92% and 89% compared to classical statistical and ML approaches, achieving ~2 umol/L absolute error. A deep ensemble further quantifies predictive uncertainty, enabling self-diagnostic sensing.

analysis.tldr: 结合视觉Transformer与物理信息神经网络，在生物污损环境下实现高精度溶解氧传感。
analysis.research_motivation: 气候危机和生态退化需要低成本、鲁棒的长期海洋监测传感器，但现有光学传感器存在信号漂移和生物污损问题。
analysis.problem: 在生物污损条件下实现高保真度的绝对溶解氧浓度传感。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出基于相机和视觉Transformer的物理信息神经网络（ViT-PINN），将Stern-Volmer方程嵌入损失函数，并采用深度集成量化不确定性。
contributions: 首次将ViT-PINN用于生物污损环境下的溶解氧传感，显著降低误差。
通过深度集成实现自诊断传感，量化预测不确定性。
analysis.experiments: 在含藻类水槽中采集14天数据模拟加速生物污损，ViT-PINN相比经典统计和ML方法MAE降低92%和89%，绝对误差约2 μmol/L。
limitations: 仅在实验室加速污损条件下验证，真实海洋环境长期性能未知。
依赖相机和ViT，可能增加计算和功耗成本。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 结合视觉Transformer与物理信息神经网络，在生物污损环境下实现高精度溶解氧传感。

papers.title: Touchless Intraoperative Image Access System Based on Vision-Based Hand Tracking
papers.abstract: Touchless interaction with medical images is becoming increasingly important in the surgical field, where sterility and continuity of the operational workflow are essential requirements. This work presents a vision-based system for intraoperative navigation of medical images through hand gestures acquired using a single RGB camera. Unlike many existing solutions, the system does not require additional hardware or user-specific training. Hand tracking is performed in real time using MediaPipe Hands, which provides a 2.5D estimation of hand landmarks. Simple and intuitive gestures are then mapped into translation, rotation, and zoom commands, enabling continuous and natural interaction with the image viewer. The system architecture is independent from the visualization software and, for implementation simplicity, in this study it was integrated with PyVista. Performance was evaluated through frame-level logging and quantitative analysis of latency, stability, and interaction robustness metrics. Experimental results highlight real-time behavior, with reduced latencies and stable control, in line with the requirements of fluid interaction. The system demonstrates the feasibility of a low-cost touchless solution for intraoperative access to medical images, laying the groundwork for future clinical evaluations.

analysis.tldr: 基于单目RGB摄像头的手势追踪系统，实现术中无接触医学图像导航。
analysis.research_motivation: 手术中需要无菌操作和连续工作流，传统接触式交互不适用，现有无接触方案多依赖额外硬件或用户训练。
analysis.problem: 如何仅用单目RGB摄像头实现低延迟、稳定、无需用户训练的手势控制医学图像系统。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用MediaPipe Hands进行实时手部追踪，将手势映射为平移、旋转、缩放命令，集成PyVista可视化。
contributions: 提出一种低成本、无需额外硬件的无接触医学图像交互系统
通过帧级日志和定量分析验证了系统的实时性、低延迟和稳定性
analysis.experiments: 通过帧级日志和定量分析评估延迟、稳定性和交互鲁棒性，结果显示实时行为且延迟低。
limitations: 仅在PyVista上集成，未测试其他可视化软件
缺乏临床环境下的用户研究和评估
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 基于单目RGB摄像头的手势追踪系统，实现术中无接触医学图像导航。

papers.title: Graph-augmented Segmentation of Complex Shapes in Laser Powder bed Fusion for Enhanced In Situ Inspection
papers.abstract: The technological maturity of in situ inspection and monitoring methods in additive manufacturing is steadily increasing, enabling more efficient and practical qualification procedures. In this context, image segmentation of powder bed images in Laser Powder Bed Fusion (L-PBF) has been investigated by various authors, leveraging both edge detection and machine learning approaches to identify deviations from nominal geometry. Despite these developments, several challenges remain, including the sensitivity of segmentation performance to industrial illumination conditions and layer-to-layer variability in pixel intensity patterns. The study addresses these limitations by proposing a graph-augmented segmentation approach. The underlying principle consists of preserving the geometrical information at a global level rather than at pixel-wise level, modeling dependencies and relational information among spatial regions with a Graph Neural Network bottleneck embedded into a U-Net architecture. This allows enhancing the consistency and accuracy of the geometry reconstruction in the presence of spatial and layer-wise photometric variability systematically faced in real data. The method is evaluated against benchmark techniques for the in situ reconstruction of lattice structures produced by L-PBF, demonstrating its potential as a scalable solution for robust in situ inspection and geometric verification in industrial environments.

analysis.tldr: 提出图增强分割方法，利用图神经网络嵌入U-Net提升激光粉末床熔融增材制造中复杂形状的原位检测鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 增材制造中原位检测技术日益成熟，但图像分割性能易受工业光照条件和层间像素强度变化影响，现有方法难以应对这些挑战。
analysis.problem: 解决激光粉末床熔融过程中粉末床图像分割对光照和层间光度变化的敏感性，提高几何重建的一致性和准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出图增强分割方法，在U-Net架构中嵌入图神经网络瓶颈，建模空间区域间的依赖和关系信息，保留全局几何信息而非像素级信息。
contributions: 提出图增强分割方法，通过图神经网络建模空间区域关系，提升分割对光照和层间变化的鲁棒性。
在激光粉末床熔融晶格结构原位重建任务上验证了方法优于基准技术，展示了工业环境中的可扩展性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能对图结构构建敏感，需要合理定义空间区域。
计算复杂度可能高于纯CNN方法。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出图增强分割方法，利用图神经网络嵌入U-Net提升激光粉末床熔融增材制造中复杂形状的原位检测鲁棒性。

papers.title: Radiomics- and Clinical Feature-Driven Prediction of Volumetric Response in Skull-Base Meningioma after CyberKnife Radiosurgery
papers.abstract: Skull-base meningiomas are often characterized by favorable long-term prognosis, yet their anatomical complexity and proximity to critical neurovascular structures make treatment selection challenging. Stereotactic radiosurgery with CyberKnife represents an effective therapeutic option when surgical resection is not feasible; however, not all patients benefit equally from this treatment. Early identification of patients likely to respond to radiosurgery remains an open clinical problem. In this study, we propose a radiomics- and clinical feature-driven framework for predicting volumetric response in skull-base meningiomas treated with CyberKnife. Unlike most existing approaches that focus on progression-free survival or recurrence, our method targets volumetric response as an indicator of treatment efficacy. Pre-treatment MRI images from 104 patients were processed to extract radiomic features, which were combined with clinical variables and analyzed using six models. To ensure methodological rigor, the entire modeling process was implemented within a nested cross-validation scheme. Among the evaluated models, TabPFN achieved the best overall performance, with an AUC of 0.81 and consistently favorable classification metrics.
