Extensive experiments demonstrate that IDaS-SR outperforms state-of-the-art methods, seamlessly transitioning from a rigorous structural restorer to a sophisticated texture hallucinator in a single inference step.

analysis.tldr: 提出IDaS-SR框架，通过单步扩散桥接恢复与生成流形，实现真实世界超分辨率。
analysis.research_motivation: 真实世界图像超分辨率（Real-ISR）中，预训练扩散模型虽有效但迭代采样计算成本高；单步蒸馏虽加速但面临感知-失真权衡，源于刚性时间步初始化、分布轨迹不匹配和脆弱随机调制。
analysis.problem: 解决单步扩散模型在Real-ISR中因初始化、轨迹和随机调制问题导致的感知-失真权衡。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出单步蒸馏存在感知-失真权衡，具体表现为刚性时间步初始化、分布轨迹不匹配和脆弱随机调制。
analysis.method: 提出IDaS-SR框架，包含Manifold Inversion Noise Estimator (MINE) 预测严重感知时间步和反演噪声，以及CHARIOT连续生成引导机制，通过重调度轨迹和插值噪声显式导航感知-失真边界。
contributions: 提出MINE解决初始化与轨迹不匹配，通过预测时间步和反演噪声锚定低质量潜码到扩散轨迹。
提出CHARIOT连续生成引导机制，实现感知-失真边界的显式导航而不牺牲结构先验。
在单步推理中实现从严格结构恢复器到精细纹理幻觉器的无缝过渡，超越现有方法。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖特定预训练扩散模型，泛化性需验证。
单步推理在极端退化下可能仍有限制。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出IDaS-SR框架，通过单步扩散桥接恢复与生成流形，实现真实世界超分辨率。

papers.title: Leveraging Human Feedback for Semantically-Relevant Skill Discovery
papers.abstract: Unsupervised skill discovery in reinforcement learning aims to intrinsically motivate agents to discover diverse and useful behaviours. However, unconstrained approaches can produce unsafe, unethical, or misaligned behaviours. To mitigate these risks and improve the practical desireability of discovered skills, recent work grounds the discovery process by leveraging human preference feedback. However, preference-based approaches are feedback-inefficient and inherently ill-equipped to deal with skill spaces composed of a variety of different skills such as running, jumping, walking, etc. To overcome this limitation, we introduce semantic labelling, a novel and feedback-efficient approach that leverages human cognitive strengths to identify and label semantically meaningful behaviours. Based on semantic labelling, we propose Semantically Relevant Skill Discovery (SRSD), a novel human-in-the-loop approach that collects semantic labels from human feedback and learns a reward function to encourage skills to be more semantically diverse and relevant. Through our experiments in a 2D navigation environment and four locomotion environments, we demonstrate that SRSD can improve semantic diversity and discover relevant behaviours while scaling effectively to a large variety of behaviours.

analysis.tldr: 提出语义标签方法，利用人类反馈引导强化学习技能发现，提升语义多样性和相关性。
analysis.research_motivation: 无监督技能发现可能产生不安全、不道德或不对齐的行为，现有基于偏好的方法反馈效率低且难以处理多种技能混合的技能空间。
analysis.problem: 如何高效利用人类反馈，引导强化学习代理发现语义多样且相关的有用技能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 偏好反馈方法在技能空间包含多种不同技能（如跑、跳、走）时效率低下且效果不佳。
analysis.method: 提出语义标签（semantic labelling）和语义相关技能发现（SRSD），通过人类反馈收集语义标签，学习奖励函数以鼓励技能在语义上更多样和相关。
contributions: 提出语义标签方法，利用人类认知优势识别和标记语义有意义的行为。
提出SRSD框架，结合人类反馈学习奖励函数，提升技能发现的语义多样性和相关性。
analysis.experiments: 在2D导航环境和四个运动环境中实验，表明SRSD能提升语义多样性并发现相关行为，且能有效扩展到大量行为。
limitations: 依赖人类标注，可能受标注者主观性影响。
未在更复杂或高维任务中验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出语义标签方法，利用人类反馈引导强化学习技能发现，提升语义多样性和相关性。

papers.title: Open-Vocabulary Semantic Segmentation Network Integrating Object-Level Label and Scene-Level Semantic Features for Multimodal Remote Sensing Images
papers.abstract: Semantic segmentation of multi-modal remote sensing imagery plays a pivotal role in land use/land cover (LULC) mapping, environmental monitoring, and precision earth observation. Current multi-modal approaches mainly focus on integrating complementary visual modalities, yet neglect the incorporating of non-visual textual data - a rich source of knowledge that can bridge semantic gaps between visual patterns and real-world concepts. To address this limitation, we propose TSMNet, a text supervised multi-modal open vocabulary semantic segmentation network that synergistically integrates textual supervision with visual representation for open-vocabulary semantic segmentation. Unlike conventional multi-modal segmentation frameworks, TSMNet introduces a dual-branch text encoder to extract both scene-level semantic and object-level label information from various textual data, enabling dynamic cross-modal fusion. These text-derived features dynamically interact with visual embeddings through the proposed text-guided visual semantic fusion module, enabling domain-aware feature refinement and human-interpretable decision-making. To verify our method, we innovatively construct two new multi-modal datasets, and carry out extensive experiments to make a comprehensive comparison between the proposed method and other state-of-the-art (SOTA) semantic segmentation models. Results demonstrate that TSMNet achieves superior segmentation accuracy while exhibiting robust generalization capabilities across diverse geographical and sensor-specific scenarios. This work establishes a new paradigm for explainable remote sensing analysis, demonstrating that textual knowledge integration significantly enhances model generalizability. The source code will be available at https://github.com/yeyuanxin110/TSMNet

analysis.tldr: 提出文本监督的多模态遥感图像开放词汇语义分割网络TSMNet，通过融合场景级和对象级文本特征提升分割精度与泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有多模态遥感分割方法主要关注视觉模态互补，忽略了非视觉文本数据这一丰富知识源，难以弥合视觉模式与真实世界概念之间的语义鸿沟。
analysis.problem: 如何有效整合文本监督信息（场景级语义和对象级标签）与视觉表示，实现遥感图像的开放词汇语义分割。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出TSMNet，包含双分支文本编码器（提取场景级和对象级文本特征）和文本引导的视觉语义融合模块，实现动态跨模态融合与领域感知特征细化。
contributions: 首次将文本监督引入多模态遥感开放词汇语义分割，提出TSMNet框架。
构建了两个新的多模态遥感数据集用于验证。
实验表明TSMNet在分割精度和跨场景泛化能力上优于现有SOTA方法。
analysis.experiments: 在自建的两个多模态遥感数据集上与多种SOTA语义分割模型进行对比，TSMNet取得更优分割精度和泛化性能。
limitations: 依赖文本数据的可用性和质量，可能限制在无文本标注场景的应用。
双分支文本编码器可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出文本监督的多模态遥感图像开放词汇语义分割网络TSMNet，通过融合场景级和对象级文本特征提升分割精度与泛化能力。

papers.title: FDIM: A Feature-distance-based Generic Video Quality Metric for Versatile Codecs
papers.abstract: Video technology is advancing toward Ultra High Definition (UHD) and High Dynamic Range (HDR), which intensifies the need for higher compression efficiency for these high-specification videos. Beyond advances in traditional codecs, neural video codecs (NVCs) have attracted significant research attention and have evolved rapidly over the past few years. The coding artifacts of NVCs often exhibit content-varying and generative characteristics, which differ from those of conventional codecs and are challenging for traditional video quality assessment (VQA) methods to capture. Therefore, VQA metrics are required to generalize across different codecs, content types, and dynamic ranges to better support video codec research and evaluation. In this paper, we propose FDIM, a feature-distance-based generic video quality metric for both traditional and neural video codecs across SDR and HDR formats. FDIM employs a hybrid architecture that integrates deep and hand-crafted features. The deep feature component learns multi-scale representations to capture distortions ranging from structural and textural fidelity degradation to high-level semantic deviations, while the hand-crafted feature component provides stable complementary cues to improve overall generalization. We trained FDIM on a large-scale subjective quality assessment dataset (DCVQA) consisting of over 16k video sequences encoded by traditional block-based hybrid video codecs and end-to-end perceptually optimized neural video codecs. Extensive experiments on ten SDR/HDR VQA datasets containing diverse, previously unseen codecs demonstrate that FDIM achieves strong generalization and high correlation with subjective assessment. The source code for FDIM and the DCVQA validation set will be released at https://github.com/MCL-ZJU/FDIM.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于特征距离的通用视频质量评价指标FDIM，适用于传统和神经视频编解码器。
analysis.research_motivation: 随着UHD/HDR视频发展及神经视频编解码器(NVC)的快速演进，传统VQA方法难以捕捉NVC内容变化且具生成特性的编码伪影，需要跨编解码器、内容类型和动态范围的通用质量指标。
analysis.problem: 现有视频质量评估方法对神经视频编解码器的编码伪影泛化能力不足，无法同时适用于传统和神经编解码器以及SDR/HDR格式。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 神经视频编解码器的编码伪影具有内容变化和生成特性，与传统编解码器不同，传统VQA方法难以有效捕捉。
analysis.method: 提出FDIM，采用混合架构融合深度特征和手工特征：深度特征学习多尺度表征以捕捉结构、纹理保真度退化及高层语义偏差，手工特征提供稳定互补线索以提升泛化性。
contributions: 提出一种基于特征距离的通用视频质量指标FDIM，适用于传统和神经视频编解码器及SDR/HDR格式。
构建了包含超过1.6万视频序列的大规模主观质量评估数据集DCVQA，涵盖传统块混合编解码器和端到端感知优化神经编解码器。
在10个SDR/HDR VQA数据集上验证了FDIM的强泛化能力和与主观评估的高相关性。
analysis.experiments: 在10个包含多种未见编解码器的SDR/HDR VQA数据集上进行实验，FDIM表现出强泛化性和与主观评估的高相关性。
limitations: 可能对极端编码参数或新型编解码器的泛化性有待进一步验证。
依赖大规模主观数据集训练，数据收集成本较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于特征距离的通用视频质量评价指标FDIM，适用于传统和神经视频编解码器。

papers.title: TopoHR: Hierarchical Centerline Representation for Cyclic Topology Reasoning in Driving Scenes with Point-to-Instance Relations
papers.abstract: Topology reasoning is crucial for autonomous driving. Current methods primarily focus on instance-level learning for centerline detection, followed by a sequential module for topology reasoning that relies on simplified MLP layers. Moreover, they often neglect the importance of \textit{point-to-instance} (P2I) relationships in topology reasoning. To address these limitations, we present TopoHR (Topological Hierarchical Representation), a novel end-to-end framework that establishes cyclic interaction between centerline detection and topology reasoning, allowing them to iteratively enhance each other. Specifically, we introduce a hierarchical centerline representation including point queries, instance queries, and semantic representations. These multi-level features are seamlessly integrated and fused within a hierarchical centerline decoder. Furthermore, we design a hierarchical topology reasoning module that captures both fine-grained P2I relationships and global instance-to-instance (I2I) connections within a unified architecture. With these novel components, TopoHR ensures accurate and robust topology reasoning. On the OpenLane-V2 benchmark, TopoHR refreshes state-of-the-art performance with significant improvements. Notably, compared with previous best results, TopoHR achieves +3.8 in $\mathrm{DET}_{\text{l}}$, +5.4 in $\mathrm{TOP}_{\text{ll}}$ on $\text{subset_A}$ and +11.0 in $\mathrm{DET}_{\text{l}}$, +7.9 in $\mathrm{TOP}_{\text{ll}}$ on $\text{subset_B}$, validating the effectiveness of the proposed components. The code will be shared publicly at https://github.com/Yifeng-Bai/TopoHR.git.

analysis.tldr: TopoHR通过层次化中心线表示和点-实例关系实现驾驶场景中循环拓扑推理，在OpenLane-V2上刷新SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有拓扑推理方法主要关注实例级中心线检测，使用简化MLP进行拓扑推理，忽略了点-实例（P2I）关系的重要性，导致检测与推理分离，性能受限。
analysis.problem: 如何建立中心线检测与拓扑推理之间的循环交互，并有效利用点-实例关系提升拓扑推理的准确性和鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出TopoHR端到端框架，包含层次化中心线表示（点查询、实例查询、语义表示）和层次化拓扑推理模块（同时捕获细粒度P2I关系和全局I2I连接），通过层次化中心线解码器融合多级特征，实现检测与推理的循环增强。
contributions: 提出层次化中心线表示，整合点、实例和语义多级特征。
设计层次化拓扑推理模块，统一建模P2I和I2I关系。
在OpenLane-V2上取得显著性能提升，代码开源。
analysis.experiments: 在OpenLane-V2基准上评估，subset_A上DET_l提升3.8，TOP_ll提升5.4；subset_B上DET_l提升11.0，TOP_ll提升7.9。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量中心线标注。
循环交互机制可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: TopoHR通过层次化中心线表示和点-实例关系实现驾驶场景中循环拓扑推理，在OpenLane-V2上刷新SOTA。

papers.title: An Analysis of the Coordination Gap between Joint and Modular Learning for Job Shop Scheduling with Transportation Resources
papers.abstract: Efficient job-shop scheduling with transportation resources is critical for high-performance manufacturing. With the rise of "decentralized factories", multi-agent reinforcement learning has emerged as a promising approach for the combined scheduling of production and transportation tasks. Prior work has largely focused on developing novel cooperative architectures while overlooking the question of when joint training is necessary. Joint training denotes the simultaneous training of job and automatic guided vehicle scheduling agents, whereas modular training involves independently training each agent followed by post-hoc integration. In this study, we systematically investigate the conditions under which joint training is essential for optimal performance in the job-shop scheduling problem with transportation resources. Through a rigorous sensitivity analysis of resource scarcity and temporal dominance, we quantify the coordination gap -- the performance difference between these two training modalities. In our evaluation, the joint training can produce superior performance compared to the best-performing combinations of dispatching rules and modular training. However, the coordination gap advantage diminishes in bottleneck environments, particularly under severe transport and processing constraints. These findings indicate that modular training represents a viable alternative in environments where a single scheduling task dominates. Overall, our work provides practical guidance for selecting between training modalities based on environmental conditions, enabling decision-makers to optimize reinforcement learning-based scheduling performance.

analysis.tldr: 系统分析联合训练与模块化训练在带运输资源的作业车间调度中的协调差距，发现联合训练在非瓶颈环境下优势显著，但在瓶颈环境下差距缩小。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有研究多关注新型协作架构，却忽略了何时需要联合训练这一关键问题，导致实际应用中训练模态选择缺乏理论指导。
analysis.problem: 量化联合训练与模块化训练在带运输资源的作业车间调度问题中的性能差异（协调差距），并揭示其依赖的环境条件。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 联合训练在非瓶颈环境下优于模块化训练，但在运输或加工资源严重受限的瓶颈环境中，协调差距优势减弱，模块化训练成为可行替代方案。
analysis.method: 通过资源稀缺性和时间主导性的敏感性分析，系统比较联合训练与模块化训练的性能差异，量化协调差距。
contributions: 首次系统量化了联合训练与模块化训练在作业车间调度中的协调差距。
揭示了瓶颈环境（严重运输或加工约束）下协调差距减小的关键现象。
为基于环境条件选择训练模态提供了实用指导。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提及通过敏感性分析评估了资源稀缺性和时间主导性，并比较了联合训练与最优调度规则及模块化训练的组合。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的作业车间调度问题，泛化性需进一步验证。
未讨论联合训练的计算开销或实际部署成本。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 系统分析联合训练与模块化训练在带运输资源的作业车间调度中的协调差距，发现联合训练在非瓶颈环境下优势显著，但在瓶颈环境下差距缩小。

papers.title: ITAS: A Multi-Agent Architecture for LLM-Based Intelligent Tutoring
papers.abstract: Large language model tutors are easy to build in a notebook and hard to run in a real course. We describe ITAS (Intelligent Teaching Assistant System), a multi-agent tutoring system that a graduate quantum computing course used for a semester at Old Dominion University. The system has three layers. The teaching layer is a Spoke-and-Wheel of three parallel specialist agents (Video, Code, Guidance) followed by a Synthesizer, plus a separate autograder that evaluates both the correctness and the approach of checkpoint submissions. The operational layer is four Cloud Run microservices with session state in Cloud SQL and interaction events streamed through Pub/Sub to BigQuery. The feedback layer is a narrow-scope conversational agent that answers instructor questions over per-lesson pseudonymized event streams, addressing what we call the Blind Instructor Problem: LLM tutors accumulate more data about students than the instructor can reach through routine channels. The architecture is a direct response to specific failures of an earlier prototype, and we describe which of those fixes carried forward and which were dropped for this iteration. We report on a pilot deployment (five students, one course, one semester) interpreted as system-behavior evidence rather than learning-outcome evidence: the teaching layer handled 334 chat turns without the task-boundary hallucinations that domain consolidation would have risked, the operational layer captured 10,628 events across five modules, and the feedback layer surfaced two findings the instructor acted on mid-semester. We do not claim the pilot generalizes. We do claim that the system as described is one workable answer to the question of what an LLM-based ITS needs to look like end-to-end to run in a real course.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种三层多智能体架构ITAS，用于在真实课程中部署LLM驱动的智能辅导系统，并通过一学期量子计算课程试点验证其可行性。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM辅导系统在原型中容易构建，但在真实课程中难以运行，存在任务边界幻觉、数据孤岛等问题，且教师无法直接获取学生与系统交互的丰富数据（盲教师问题）。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个端到端的多智能体架构，使LLM辅导系统能在真实课程中稳定运行，并解决任务边界幻觉、数据收集与反馈等问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析，但指出早期原型存在特定失败模式，本架构直接针对这些失败进行修复。
analysis.method: 提出ITAS三层架构：教学层采用轮辐式结构（三个并行专家智能体：视频、代码、指导，后接合成器）和独立自动评分器；操作层使用四个Cloud Run微服务，会话状态存储在Cloud SQL，事件流通过Pub/Sub传输到BigQuery；反馈层提供窄范围对话智能体，回答教师关于每节课匿名事件流的问题。
contributions: 提出ITAS三层多智能体架构，解决LLM辅导系统在真实课程中的部署问题
定义并解决盲教师问题，通过反馈层为教师提供学生交互数据洞察
analysis.experiments: 在研究生量子计算课程中进行一学期试点（5名学生），教学层处理334次聊天轮次无任务边界幻觉，操作层捕获10628个事件，反馈层发现两个教师可操作的结果。摘要强调这是系统行为证据而非学习成果证据。
limitations: 试点规模小（5名学生），结论可能不具泛化性
未提供与传统方法或基线系统的定量对比
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种三层多智能体架构ITAS，用于在真实课程中部署LLM驱动的智能辅导系统，并通过一学期量子计算课程试点验证其可行性。

papers.title: Latency and Cost of Multi-Agent Intelligent Tutoring at Scale
papers.abstract: Multi-agent LLM tutoring systems improve response quality through agent specialization, but each student query triggers several concurrent API calls whose latencies compound through a parallel-phase maximum effect that single-agent systems do not face. We instrument ITAS, a four-agent tutoring system built on Gemini 2.5 Flash and Google Vertex AI, across three throughput tiers (Standard PayGo, Priority PayGo, and Provisioned Throughput) and eleven concurrency levels up to 50 simultaneous users, producing over 3,000 requests drawn from a live graduate STEM deployment. Priority PayGo maintains flat sub-4-second response times across the full load range; Standard PayGo degrades substantially under classroom-scale concurrency; and Provisioned Throughput delivers the lowest latency at low concurrency but saturates its reserved capacity above approximately 20 concurrent users. Cost analysis places both pay-per-token tiers well below the price of a STEM textbook per student per semester under a worst-case usage ceiling. Provisioned Throughput, expensive under continuous provisioning, becomes cost-competitive for institutions that can predict and concentrate their traffic toward high utilization. These results provide concrete tier-selection guidance across deployment scales from a single seminar to a university-wide rollout.

analysis.tldr: 多智能体LLM辅导系统在并发请求下存在延迟叠加问题，实验对比三种吞吐量层级，发现Priority PayGo在50并发下仍保持4秒内响应，而Standard PayGo在课堂规模并发下显著退化。
analysis.research_motivation: 多智能体LLM辅导系统通过智能体专业化提升响应质量，但每个学生查询会触发多个并发API调用，其延迟通过并行阶段的最大值效应叠加，这是单智能体系统不面临的问题。随着系统部署规模扩大，延迟和成本成为关键瓶颈，需要为不同规模的教育机构提供部署层级选择指导。
analysis.problem: 多智能体LLM辅导系统在并发请求下的延迟叠加问题，以及不同吞吐量层级（Standard PayGo、Priority PayGo、Provisioned Throughput）在成本和延迟上的权衡。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: Priority PayGo在50并发下保持亚4秒响应时间；Standard PayGo在课堂规模并发下显著退化；Provisioned Throughput在低并发下延迟最低，但在约20并发以上时饱和其预留容量。成本方面，按token付费层级远低于每学期每学生一本STEM教科书的价格；Provisioned Throughput在持续预配下昂贵，但在可预测高利用率场景下具有成本竞争力。
analysis.method: 对基于Gemini 2.5 Flash和Google Vertex AI构建的四智能体辅导系统ITAS进行仪器化，在三种吞吐量层级（Standard PayGo、Priority PayGo、Provisioned Throughput）和11个并发级别（最高50个并发用户）下进行实验，收集超过3000个请求，数据来自真实研究生STEM部署。
contributions: 首次系统性地测量多智能体LLM辅导系统在不同吞吐量层级和并发级别下的延迟和成本。
提供了从单个研讨会到大学范围部署的层级选择指导。
analysis.experiments: 在三种吞吐量层级和11个并发级别下进行实验，收集超过3000个请求，数据来自真实研究生STEM部署。摘要未提供具体实验结果数值。
limitations: 实验基于单一系统（ITAS）和单一模型（Gemini 2.5 Flash），可能不适用于其他架构。
成本分析基于特定定价模型，可能因云服务商或地区而异。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 多智能体LLM辅导系统在并发请求下存在延迟叠加问题，实验对比三种吞吐量层级，发现Priority PayGo在50并发下仍保持4秒内响应，而Standard PayGo在课堂规模并发下显著退化。

papers.title: SemiSAM-O1: How far can we push the boundary of annotation-efficient medical image segmentation?
papers.abstract: Semi-supervised learning (SSL) has become a promising solution to alleviate the annotation burden of deep learning-based medical image segmentation models. While recent advances in foundation model-driven SSL have pushed the boundary to extremely limited annotation scenarios, they fail to maintain robust competitive performance in complex imaging modalities. In this paper, we propose SemiSAM-O1, an annotation-efficient framework using only one annotated template image for segmentation. SemiSAM-O1 extends the specialist-generalist collaborative learning framework to the extreme one-label setting by fully exploiting the foundation model's feature representation capability beyond its prompting interface. SemiSAM-O1 operates in two stages. In the first stage, the foundation model's encoder extracts dense features from all volumes, and class prototypes derived from the single annotated template are propagated to the unlabeled pool via feature similarity to produce coarse initial pseudo-labels. In the second stage, an iterative training-and-refinement loop progressively improves both the segmentation model and the pseudo-labels over multiple rounds, where each round trains the model from scratch on current pseudo-labels and generates updated predictions with voxel-wise uncertainty estimates. An uncertainty-guided refinement step further leverages the foundation model's global feature space to correct high-uncertainty regions by aggregating labels from their most similar confident neighbors, establishing a virtuous cycle of mutual improvement. Extensive experiments on a wide range of segmentation tasks across different modalities and anatomical targets demonstrate that SemiSAM-O1 significantly narrows the performance gap between one-label semi-supervised learning and full supervision, while significantly reducing the computational overhead of online foundation model inference.

analysis.tldr: SemiSAM-O1 仅用一张标注模板实现医学图像分割，通过基础模型特征传播和迭代自训练大幅缩小与全监督的差距。
analysis.research_motivation: 医学图像分割依赖大量标注数据，获取成本高；现有半监督方法在极低标注场景下性能不足，尤其对复杂成像模态鲁棒性差。
analysis.problem: 如何在仅有一张标注模板的极端条件下，实现高效且鲁棒的医学图像分割。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 两阶段框架：第一阶段利用基础模型编码器提取密集特征，通过特征相似性将单标注模板的类原型传播到未标注池生成粗伪标签；第二阶段迭代训练-精炼循环，每轮从零训练模型并生成带体素不确定性估计的预测，利用基础模型全局特征空间对高不确定区域进行标签修正。
contributions: 提出 SemiSAM-O1，仅需一张标注模板即可实现半监督医学图像分割。
将专家-通才协作学习框架扩展到极端单标签设置，充分利用基础模型特征表示能力。
在多种模态和解剖目标上显著缩小半监督与全监督的性能差距，并降低在线推理计算开销。
analysis.experiments: 在多种分割任务（不同模态和解剖目标）上进行了大量实验，表明 SemiSAM-O1 显著缩小了单标签半监督与全监督的性能差距，并降低了计算开销。
limitations: 可能对模板标注质量敏感，低质量模板会影响初始伪标签。
迭代训练过程可能增加训练时间，尽管推理开销降低。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SemiSAM-O1 仅用一张标注模板实现医学图像分割，通过基础模型特征传播和迭代自训练大幅缩小与全监督的差距。

papers.title: From Prototype to Classroom: An Intelligent Tutoring System for Quantum Education
papers.abstract: Quantum computing instructors face a compounding problem: the concepts are counterintuitive, the mathematical formalism is dense, and qualified faculty are scarce outside a small number of well-resourced institutions. Our prior work introduced a knowledge-graph-augmented tutoring prototype with two specialized LLM agents: a Teaching Agent for dynamic interaction and a Lesson Planning Agent for lesson generation. Validated on simulated runs rather than in a real course, that prototype left open whether more aggressive agent specialization would be needed to handle the full range of quantum education tasks under real student load. This paper answers the three questions that the prototype could not answer. Can agent specialization solve the reliability problem in a domain as technically demanding as quantum information science? Can the system run in a real course, not a demonstration? Does the instructor gain actionable intelligence from the deployment? We present ITAS (Intelligent Teaching Assistant System), a multi-agent tutoring system built around four contributions: a five-module QIS curriculum grounded in Watrous's information-first framework, a Spoke-and-Wheel teaching architecture with quantum-specialized agents, a cloud infrastructure designed for production use and regulatory compliance, and a conversational analytics layer for instructors and content developers. Piloted in a quantum computing course at Old Dominion University, the system supports all three answers: deployment evidence is consistent with specialization addressing the task-boundary failures observed in the prototype, cloud infrastructure supports classroom-scale concurrency at sub-textbook cost, and the analytics agent surfaces curriculum gaps the instructor could not otherwise see.

analysis.tldr: 提出多智能体量子教学系统ITAS，通过专业化智能体解决量子教育中的可靠性问题，并在真实课程中验证。
analysis.research_motivation: 量子计算教学面临概念反直觉、数学形式化密集、合格教师稀缺等挑战，现有原型系统仅在模拟中验证，未解决真实课程中的可靠性、部署可行性和教学洞察问题。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个能在真实量子计算课程中可靠运行、提供教学洞察的多智能体辅导系统。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 原型系统在模拟运行中表现出任务边界失败，需要更激进的智能体专业化来应对真实学生负载下的全范围量子教育任务。
analysis.method: 提出ITAS系统，包含五模块QIS课程、Spoke-and-Wheel教学架构（量子专用智能体）、生产级云基础设施和会话分析层。
contributions: 提出基于Watrous信息优先框架的五模块QIS课程
设计Spoke-and-Wheel教学架构，包含量子专用智能体
构建生产级云基础设施，满足合规要求
开发会话分析层，为教师提供课程洞察
analysis.experiments: 在Old Dominion大学的量子计算课程中试点，系统支持了专业化解决任务边界失败、云基础设施支持课堂规模并发且成本低于教科书、分析智能体揭示教师无法看到的课程缺口。
limitations: 试点规模可能有限，未提及学生数量或课程时长
未与其他教学系统进行定量对比
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多智能体量子教学系统ITAS，通过专业化智能体解决量子教育中的可靠性问题，并在真实课程中验证。

papers.title: SemML 2.0: Synthesizing Controllers for LTL
papers.abstract: Synthesizing a reactive system from specifications given in linear temporal logic (LTL) is a classical problem, finding its applications in safety-critical systems design. These systems are typically represented using either Mealy machines or AIGER circuits. We present the second version of SemML, which outperforms all state-of-the-art tools for finding either solution. Aside from implementing the classical automata-theoretic approach, our tool utilizes partial exploration and machine-learning guidance for obtaining solutions efficiently, and numerous heuristics and improvements of classic algorithms for extracting small representations of these solutions. We evaluate our tool against the existing state-of-the-art tools (in particular Strix, LtlSynt, and the previous version of SemML) on the dataset of the synthesis competition SYNTCOMP. We show that we solve significantly more instances and do so much faster than other tools, while maintaining state-of-the-art solution quality.

analysis.tldr: SemML 2.0 通过机器学习引导和部分探索，在 LTL 控制器合成任务上显著超越现有工具。
analysis.research_motivation: 从线性时序逻辑（LTL）规范合成反应式系统是安全关键系统设计中的经典问题，现有工具在求解效率和表示紧凑性上仍有提升空间。
analysis.problem: 如何高效地从 LTL 规范合成控制器，并得到紧凑的表示（如 Mealy 机或 AIGER 电路）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 结合经典自动机理论方法、部分探索、机器学习引导以及多种启发式策略和算法改进，以快速获得紧凑解。
contributions: 提出 SemML 2.0，在 SYNTCOMP 数据集上比 Strix、LtlSynt 等工具求解更多实例且速度更快。
引入部分探索和机器学习引导，提升合成效率，同时保持解的质量。
analysis.experiments: 在 SYNTCOMP 竞赛数据集上与 Strix、LtlSynt 及 SemML 旧版对比，SemML 2.0 求解实例更多、速度更快，且解质量达到当前最优。
limitations: 可能依赖特定 LTL 子集或问题结构。
机器学习引导的泛化性未在摘要中讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SemML 2.0 通过机器学习引导和部分探索，在 LTL 控制器合成任务上显著超越现有工具。

papers.title: LiteVLA-H: Dual-Rate Vision-Language-Action Inference for Onboard Aerial Guidance and Semantic Perception
papers.abstract: Vision-language-action (VLA) models have shown strong semantic grounding and task generalization in manipulation, but aerial deployment remains difficult because drones require low-latency closed-loop guidance under strict onboard compute and communication constraints. We present LiteVLA-H, a compact 256M-parameter VLA system designed for dual-rate operation on an NVIDIA Jetson AGX Orin: a fast outer-loop guidance mode for short action-token outputs and a slower semantic mode for scene understanding, hazard description, and operator-facing narration. The central empirical observation is that, in this compact edge regime, end-to-end latency is dominated by multimodal pre-fill rather than by the marginal cost of decoding a few extra tokens. This motivates a scheduler that issues reactive action tokens at 50.65,ms (19.74,Hz) while still supporting sentence-level semantic outputs at 149.90--164.57\ms (6.08--6.67,Hz) on the same embedded platform. To specialize the model without collapsing its descriptive competence, we use a knowledge-preserving fine-tuning recipe that mixes reactive flight data, aerial semantic data, and generic caption/VQA supervision. Beyond reporting current latency measurements, we position the system against recent state-of-the-art architectures, including AnywhereVLA, FutureVLA, and ReMem-VLA, showing that the measured action branch reaches a higher edge inference rate under our deployment conditions while retaining periodic semantic awareness.

analysis.tldr: LiteVLA-H 是一个紧凑的 VLA 系统，通过双速率调度在无人机边缘平台上实现快速动作推理与慢速语义感知。
analysis.research_motivation: 无人机部署 VLA 模型面临低延迟闭环控制与严格计算通信约束的挑战，现有方法难以兼顾快速动作与语义理解。
analysis.problem: 如何在边缘嵌入式平台上实现 VLA 模型的双速率推理，同时保持动作响应速度和语义描述能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在紧凑边缘模型中，端到端延迟主要由多模态预填充主导，而非解码少量额外 token 的边际成本。
analysis.method: 提出 LiteVLA-H，一个 256M 参数的 VLA 系统，采用双速率调度器：快速外环引导模式（短动作 token 输出）和慢速语义模式（场景理解、危险描述）。使用知识保留微调策略，混合反应式飞行数据、空中语义数据和通用字幕/VQA 监督。
contributions: 设计并实现了首个面向无人机边缘部署的双速率 VLA 推理系统 LiteVLA-H。
揭示了紧凑边缘模型中延迟主要由多模态预填充主导的现象，并据此设计调度策略。
提出知识保留微调方法，在保持语义能力的同时实现动作专业化。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅报告了延迟测量值：动作分支 50.65ms (19.74Hz)，语义分支 149.90-164.57ms (6.08-6.67Hz)，并与 AnywhereVLA、FutureVLA、ReMem-VLA 对比，显示动作分支在部署条件下达到更高边缘推理率。
limitations: 可能仅在特定硬件平台（Jetson AGX Orin）上验证，泛化性未知。
语义模式延迟仍较高，可能影响实时交互体验。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LiteVLA-H 是一个紧凑的 VLA 系统，通过双速率调度在无人机边缘平台上实现快速动作推理与慢速语义感知。

papers.title: Versioned Late Materialization for Ultra-Long Sequence Training in Recommendation Systems at Scale
papers.abstract: Modern Deep Learning Recommendation Models (DLRMs) follow scaling laws with sequence length, driving the frontier toward ultra-long User Interaction History (UIH). However, the industry-standard "Fat Row" paradigm, which pre-materializes these sequences into every training example, creates a storage and I/O wall where data infrastructure usage exceeds GPU training capacity due to data redundancy that is amplified in multi-tenant environments where models with vastly different sequence length requirements share a union dataset. We present a \emph{versioned late materialization} paradigm that eliminates this redundancy by storing UIH once in a normalized, immutable tier and reconstructing sequences just-in-time during training via lightweight versioned pointers. The system ensures Online-to-Offline (O2O) consistency through a bifurcated protocol that prevents future leakage across both streaming and batch training, while a read-optimized immutable storage layer provides multi-dimensional projection pushdown for heterogeneous model tenants. Disaggregated data preprocessing with pipelined I/O prefetching and data-affinity optimizations masks the latency of training-time sequence reconstruction, keeping training throughput compute-bound by GPUs. Deployed on production DLRMs, the system reduces training data infrastructure resource usage while enabling aggressive sequence length scaling that delivers significant model quality gains, serving as the foundational data infrastructure for modern recommendation model architectures, including HSTU and ULTRA-HSTU.

analysis.tldr: 提出版本化延迟物化范式，消除推荐系统中超长序列训练的数据冗余，实现存储和I/O效率大幅提升。
analysis.research_motivation: 现代深度学习推荐模型（DLRM）遵循序列长度的缩放定律，需要超长用户交互历史（UIH），但行业标准的“Fat Row”范式因数据冗余导致存储和I/O成为瓶颈，尤其在多租户环境中问题加剧。
analysis.problem: 解决“Fat Row”范式中因预物化序列导致的数据冗余问题，以及由此引发的存储/I/O墙和训练效率下降。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，在共享数据集的场景下，不同模型对序列长度需求差异巨大，Fat Row范式导致数据冗余被放大，数据基础设施资源消耗超过GPU训练能力。
analysis.method: 版本化延迟物化：将UIH存储为归一化、不可变的单份数据，训练时通过轻量级版本指针即时重建序列；采用分叉协议保证在线到离线一致性；通过只读存储层支持多维投影下推；利用解耦数据预处理和流水线I/O预取掩盖重建延迟。
contributions: 提出版本化延迟物化范式，消除数据冗余，使训练吞吐量受限于GPU计算而非I/O。
设计分叉协议保证在线到离线一致性，防止未来信息泄露。
实现只读不可变存储层，支持异构模型租户的多维投影下推。
在生产DLRM（包括HSTU和ULTRA-HSTU）上部署，显著降低数据基础设施资源消耗并支持更长的序列长度，带来模型质量提升。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提及在生产DLRM上部署并观察到资源降低和模型质量提升。
limitations: 可能对实时性要求极高的场景存在延迟挑战。
版本化指针管理可能增加系统复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出版本化延迟物化范式，消除推荐系统中超长序列训练的数据冗余，实现存储和I/O效率大幅提升。

papers.title: Meta-Ensemble Learning with Diverse Data Splits for Improved Respiratory Sound Classification
papers.abstract: Training reliable respiratory sound classification models remains challenging due to the limited size and subject diversity of datasets. Ensemble methods can improve robustness, but when base models are trained on identical data, models tend to overfit and produce highly correlated predictions, thereby reducing the effectiveness of ensembling. In this work, we investigate a meta-ensemble learning methodology that enhances prediction diversity by training base models on diverse data splits and combining their outputs through a trained meta-model. Specifically, we train base models on the ICBHI dataset using two data split settings: fixed 80-20% split and five-fold cross-validation split, under two data granularity settings: patient- and sample-level. The resulting diversity in base model predictions enables the meta-model to better generalize. Our approach achieves new state-of-the-art performance on the ICBHI benchmark, reaching a Score of 66.49% and showing improved generalization on two out-of-distribution datasets, indicating its potential applicability to real-world clinical data.

analysis.tldr: 通过元集成学习结合多样数据划分，提升呼吸音分类的泛化性能并达到新SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 呼吸音分类数据集规模小且受试者多样性不足，集成方法中基模型在相同数据上训练易过拟合且预测高度相关，降低集成效果。
analysis.problem: 如何通过增强基模型预测多样性来提升集成模型在呼吸音分类任务上的泛化能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 元集成学习方法：在ICBHI数据集上使用固定80-20%划分和五折交叉验证两种数据划分，以及患者级和样本级两种数据粒度训练基模型，再通过元模型组合其输出。
contributions: 提出一种元集成学习框架，通过多样数据划分增强基模型预测多样性。
在ICBHI基准上达到新SOTA（Score 66.49%），并在两个分布外数据集上展现更好的泛化能力。
analysis.experiments: 在ICBHI数据集上评估，报告Score为66.49%，并在两个分布外数据集上测试泛化性。
limitations: 仅基于ICBHI单一数据集训练基模型，可能限制多样性。
元模型复杂度未讨论，可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过元集成学习结合多样数据划分，提升呼吸音分类的泛化性能并达到新SOTA。

papers.title: TACO: Efficient Communication Compression of Intermediate Tensors for Scalable Tensor-Parallel LLM Training
papers.abstract: Handling communication overhead in large-scale tensor-parallel training remains a critical challenge due to the dense, near-zero distributions of intermediate tensors, which exacerbate errors under frequent communication and introduce significant computational overhead during compression. To this end, we propose TACO (Tensor-parallel Adaptive COmmunication compression), a robust FP8-based framework for compressing TP intermediate tensors. First, we employ a data-driven reshaping strategy combined with an Adaptive Scale-Hadamard Transform to enable high-fidelity FP8 quantization, while its Dual-Scale Quantization mechanism ensures numerical stability throughout training. Second, we design a highly fused compression operator to reduce memory traffic and kernel launch overhead, allowing efficient overlap with communication. Finally, we integrate TACO with existing state-of-the-art methods for Data and Pipeline Parallelism to develop a compression-enabled 3D-parallel training framework. Detailed experiments on GPT models and Qwen model demonstrate up to 1.87X end-to-end throughput improvement while maintaining near-lossless accuracy, validating the effectiveness and efficiency of TACO in large-scale training.

analysis.tldr: TACO通过FP8量化和自适应变换压缩张量并行中的中间张量，实现近无损精度下1.87倍吞吐提升。
analysis.research_motivation: 大规模张量并行训练中，中间张量的密集近零分布导致通信开销巨大，现有压缩方法在频繁通信下误差累积且计算开销高。
analysis.problem: 如何高效压缩张量并行训练中的中间张量，减少通信开销同时保持训练精度和数值稳定性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 中间张量具有密集近零分布，在频繁通信下压缩误差易累积，且现有压缩算子引入额外计算开销。
analysis.method: 提出TACO框架，包括数据驱动重塑与自适应尺度Hadamard变换实现高保真FP8量化，双尺度量化机制保证数值稳定性，以及高度融合的压缩算子减少内存流量和内核启动开销。
contributions: 提出基于FP8的张量并行中间张量压缩框架TACO，结合自适应尺度Hadamard变换和双尺度量化。
设计高度融合的压缩算子，降低内存流量和内核启动开销，支持与通信高效重叠。
将TACO与数据并行和流水线并行方法集成，构建支持压缩的3D并行训练框架。
analysis.experiments: 在GPT模型和Qwen模型上进行实验，实现高达1.87倍的端到端吞吐提升，同时保持近无损精度。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定模型架构（如GPT和Qwen），泛化性需进一步验证。
FP8量化可能对某些超低精度场景仍存在精度损失。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.one_sentence_summary: TACO通过FP8量化和自适应变换压缩张量并行中的中间张量，实现近无损精度下1.87倍吞吐提升。

papers.title: AsyncShield: A Plug-and-Play Edge Adapter for Asynchronous Cloud-based VLA Navigation
papers.abstract: While Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have been demonstrated possessing strong zero-shot generalization for robot control, their massive parameter sizes typically necessitate cloud-based deployment. However, cloud deployment introduces network jitter and inference latency, which can induce severe spatiotemporal misalignment in mobile navigation under continuous displacement, so that the stale intents expressed in past ego frames may become spatially incorrect in the current frame and lead to collisions. To address this issue, we propose AsyncShield, a plug-and-play asynchronous control framework. AsyncShield discards traditional black-box time-series prediction in favor of a deterministic physical white-box spatial mapping. By maintaining a temporal pose buffer and utilizing kinematic transformations, the system accurately converts temporal lag into spatial pose offsets to restore the VLA's original geometric intent. To balance intent restoration fidelity and physical safety, the edge adaptation is formulated as a constrained Markov decision process (CMDP). Solved via the PPO-Lagrangian algorithm, a reinforcement learning adapter dynamically trades off between tracking the VLA intent and responding to high-frequency LiDAR obstacle avoidance hard constraints. Furthermore, benefiting from a standardized universal sub-goal interface, domain randomization, and perception-level adaptation via Collision Radius Inflation, AsyncShield operates as a lightweight, plug-and-play module. Simulation and real-world experiments demonstrate that, without fine-tuning any cloud-based foundation models, the framework exhibits zero-shot and robust generalization capabilities, effectively improving the success rate and physical safety of asynchronous navigation.

analysis.tldr: 提出AsyncShield，一种即插即用的边缘适配器，通过物理白盒空间映射和强化学习解决云部署VLA导航中的异步时空错位问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 云部署的VLA模型因网络抖动和推理延迟导致移动导航中时空错位，使过时的意图在当前帧中空间错误，引发碰撞。
analysis.problem: 云部署VLA模型在连续位移导航中因异步性导致的时空错位问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出网络抖动和推理延迟导致过去帧的意图在当前帧空间不正确，引发碰撞。
analysis.method: 提出AsyncShield，包含时间位姿缓冲和运动学变换的物理白盒空间映射，以及基于PPO-Lagrangian的强化学习适配器，在意图恢复保真度和物理安全之间权衡。
contributions: 提出AsyncShield即插即用异步控制框架，无需微调云模型即可解决时空错位。
将边缘适配建模为约束马尔可夫决策过程，通过PPO-Lagrangian算法动态平衡意图跟踪和避障安全。
analysis.experiments: 仿真和真实世界实验表明，AsyncShield具有零样本和鲁棒泛化能力，有效提高异步导航的成功率和物理安全性。
limitations: 可能依赖精确的运动学模型和位姿估计。
强化学习适配器的训练可能需针对不同场景调整。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出AsyncShield，一种即插即用的边缘适配器，通过物理白盒空间映射和强化学习解决云部署VLA导航中的异步时空错位问题。

papers.title: The Kerimov-Alekberli Model: An Information-Geometric Framework for Real-Time System Stability
papers.abstract: This study introduces the Kerimov-Alekberli model, a novel information-geometric framework that redefines AI safety by formally linking non-equilibrium thermodynamics to stochastic control for the ethical alignment of autonomous systems. By establishing a formal isomorphism between non-equilibrium thermodynamics and stochastic control, we define systemic anomalies as deviations from a Riemannian manifold. The model utilizes the Kullback-Leibler divergence as the primary metric, governed by a dynamic threshold derived from the Fisher Information Metric. We further ground this framework in the Landauer Principle, proving that adversarial perturbations perform measurable physical work by increasing the system's informational entropy. Validation on the NSL-KDD dataset and unmanned aerial vehicle trajectory simulations demonstrated that our model achieves effective real-time detection via the FPT trigger, with strong performance metrics (e.g., high accuracy and low FPR) on benchmark datasets. This study provides a rigorous physical foundation for AI safety, transitioning from heuristic, rule-based ethical frameworks to a thermodynamics-based stability paradigm by grounding ethical violations in quantifiable physical work and entropic information.

analysis.tldr: 提出Kerimov-Alekberli模型，将非平衡热力学与随机控制结合，为AI安全提供信息几何框架，实现实时系统稳定性检测。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有AI安全方法多基于启发式规则，缺乏严格的物理基础，难以应对复杂动态系统中的实时稳定性问题。
analysis.problem: 如何将AI安全从启发式规则转向基于热力学的稳定性范式，实现实时系统异常检测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 建立非平衡热力学与随机控制之间的形式同构，将系统异常定义为黎曼流形上的偏离，以KL散度为主要度量，基于Fisher信息度量设定动态阈值，并依据Landauer原理证明对抗扰动通过增加信息熵做可测量的物理功。
contributions: 提出Kerimov-Alekberli模型，为AI安全提供严格的热力学物理基础。
将伦理违规与可量化的物理功和信息熵联系起来，实现从启发式规则到热力学稳定性范式的转变。
analysis.experiments: 在NSL-KDD数据集和无人机轨迹模拟上验证，模型通过FPT触发器实现有效实时检测，在基准数据集上取得高准确率和低假阳性率。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的系统异常检测，泛化性需进一步验证。
实际部署中计算复杂度可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Kerimov-Alekberli模型，将非平衡热力学与随机控制结合，为AI安全提供信息几何框架，实现实时系统稳定性检测。

papers.title: Jailbreaking Frontier Foundation Models Through Intention Deception
papers.abstract: Large (vision-)language models exhibit remarkable capability but remain highly susceptible to jailbreaking. Existing safety training approaches aim to have the model learn a refusal boundary between safe and unsafe, based on the user's intent. It has been found that this binary training regime often leads to brittleness, since the user intent cannot reliably be evaluated, especially if the attacker obfuscates their intent, and also makes the system seem unhelpful. In response, frontier models, such as GPT-5, have shifted from refusal-based safeguards to safe completion, that aims to maximize helpfulness while obeying safety constraints. However, safe completion could be exploited when a user pretends their intention is benign. Specifically, this intent inversion would be effective in multi-turn conversation, where the attacker has multiple opportunities to reinforce their deceptively benign intent. In this work, we introduce a novel multi-turn jailbreaking method that exploits this vulnerability. Our approach gradually builds conversational trust by simulating benign-seeming intentions and by exploiting the consistency property of the model, ultimately guiding the target model toward harmful, detailed outputs. Most crucially, our approach also uncovered an additional class of model vulnerability that we call para-jailbreaking that has been unnoticed up to now. Para-jailbreaking describes the situation where the model may not reveal harmful direct reply to the attack query, however the information that it reveals is nevertheless harmful. Our contributions are threefold. First, it achieves high success rates against frontier models including GPT-5-thinking and Claude-Sonnet-4.5. Second, our approach revealed and addressed para-jailbreaking harmful output. Third, experiments on multimodal VLM models showed that our approach outperformed state-of-the-art models.

analysis.tldr: 通过多轮对话中的意图欺骗，利用模型的一致性属性实现越狱，并发现了一种新的“副越狱”漏洞。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有安全训练基于二元拒绝边界，但用户意图难以可靠评估，且攻击者可通过混淆意图绕过；前沿模型转向安全补全策略，但可能被伪装成良性意图的恶意用户利用。
analysis.problem: 如何利用多轮对话中的意图反转和一致性属性，欺骗模型生成有害输出，并揭示未被注意的副越狱漏洞。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，安全补全策略在多轮对话中易被利用，攻击者通过逐步建立信任和强化欺骗性良性意图，可引导模型输出有害内容；此外，模型可能不直接回复有害内容，但间接透露的信息仍有害（副越狱）。
analysis.method: 提出一种多轮越狱方法，通过模拟良性意图逐步建立对话信任，利用模型的一致性属性，最终引导模型输出详细的有害内容。
contributions: 提出一种多轮越狱方法，利用意图欺骗和一致性属性，对GPT-5-thinking和Claude-Sonnet-4.5等前沿模型取得高成功率。
发现并定义了副越狱（para-jailbreaking）漏洞，即模型间接透露有害信息。
在多模态VLM模型上的实验表明，该方法优于现有最先进方法。
analysis.experiments: 摘要提到在GPT-5-thinking、Claude-Sonnet-4.5等前沿模型上取得高成功率，并在多模态VLM模型上优于现有方法，但未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能仅适用于多轮对话场景，单轮攻击效果未知。
副越狱的检测和防御机制尚未充分讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过多轮对话中的意图欺骗，利用模型的一致性属性实现越狱，并发现了一种新的“副越狱”漏洞。

papers.title: The Pragmatic Persona: Discovering LLM Persona through Bridging Inference
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) reveal inherent and distinctive personas through dialogue. However, most existing persona discovery approaches rely on surface-level lexical or stylistic cues, treating dialogue as a flat sequence of tokens and failing to capture the deeper discourse-level structures that sustain persona consistency. To address this limitation, we propose a novel analytical framework that interprets LLM dialogue through bridging inference -- implicit conceptual relations that connect utterances via shared world knowledge and discourse coherence. By modeling these relations as structured knowledge graphs, our approach captures latent semantic links that govern how LLMs organize meaning across turns, enabling persona discovery at the level of discourse coherence rather than surface realizations. Experimental results across multiple reasoning backbones and target LLMs, ranging from small-scale models to 80B-parameter systems, demonstrate that bridging-inference graphs yield significantly stronger semantic coherence and more stable persona identification than frequency or style-based baselines. These results show that persona traits are consistently encoded in the structural organization of discourse rather than isolated lexical patterns. This work presents a systematic framework for probing, extracting, and visualizing latent LLM personas through the lens of Cognitive Discourse Theory, bridging computational linguistics, cognitive semantics, and persona reasoning in large language models. Codes are available at https://github.com/JiSoo-Yang/Persona_Bridging.git

analysis.tldr: 通过桥接推理构建话语知识图谱，从深层话语结构而非表层词汇发现LLM人格。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM人格发现方法仅依赖表层词汇或风格线索，将对话视为扁平词序列，无法捕捉维持人格一致性的深层话语结构。
analysis.problem: 如何从LLM对话中挖掘基于话语连贯性而非表面实现的潜在人格特征。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出基于桥接推理的分析框架，将对话中隐含的概念关系建模为结构化知识图谱，从而在话语连贯层面发现人格。
contributions: 提出基于桥接推理的话语级LLM人格发现框架
通过知识图谱捕获跨轮次的潜在语义链接，实现更稳定的人格识别
analysis.experiments: 在多个推理骨干和目标LLM（从小模型到80B参数系统）上实验，桥接推理图在语义连贯性和人格识别稳定性上优于频率或风格基线。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的话语标注或外部知识库
桥接推理的计算开销可能较大
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过桥接推理构建话语知识图谱，从深层话语结构而非表层词汇发现LLM人格。

papers.title: An Information-Geometric Framework for Stability Analysis of Large Language Models under Entropic Stress
papers.abstract: As large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in high-stakes and operational settings, evaluation strategies based solely on aggregate accuracy are often insucient to characterize system reliability. This study proposes a thermodynamic inspired modeling framework for analyzing the stability of LLM outputs under conditions of uncertainty and perturbation. The framework introduces a composite stability score that integrates task utility, entropy as a measure of external uncertainty, and two internal structural proxies: internal integration and aligned reective capacity. Rather than interpreting these quantities as physical variables, the formulation is intended as an interpretable abstraction that captures how internal structure may modulate the impact of disorder on model behavior. Using the IST-20 benchmarking protocol and associated metadata, we analyze 80 modelscenario observations across four contemporary LLMs. The proposed formulation consistently yields higher stability scores than a reduced utilityentropy baseline, with a mean improvement of 0.0299 (95% CI: 0.02470.0351). The observed gain is more pronounced under higher entropy conditions, suggesting that the framework captures a form of nonlinear attenuation of uncertainty. We do not claim a fundamental physical law or a complete theory of machine ethics. Instead, the contribution of this work is a compact and interpretable modeling perspective that connects uncertainty, performance, and internal structure within a unied evaluation lens. The framework is intended to complement existing benchmarking approaches and to support ongoing discussions in AI safety, reliability, and governance.

analysis.tldr: 提出信息几何框架，用热力学启发指标分析LLM在熵应力下的稳定性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM评估仅依赖聚合准确率，不足以刻画高风险场景下的系统可靠性，需要更细粒度的稳定性分析工具。
analysis.problem: 如何量化LLM在不确定性扰动下的输出稳定性，并整合内部结构代理指标。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出热力学启发的稳定性评分，融合任务效用、外部熵、内部整合与对齐反思能力，通过IST-20协议在4个LLM上验证。
contributions: 提出一个可解释的稳定性评估框架，将不确定性、性能与内部结构统一在单一视角下。
在80个模型-场景观测上验证，框架比简化基线平均提升0.0299，高熵条件下增益更明显。
analysis.experiments: 使用IST-20基准协议和元数据，分析4个当代LLM的80个模型-场景观测，框架稳定性评分平均提升0.0299（95% CI: 0.0247-0.0351）。
limitations: 未声称发现物理定律或完整的机器伦理理论。
框架的通用性和跨模型泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出信息几何框架，用热力学启发指标分析LLM在熵应力下的稳定性。

papers.title: FreeScale: Distributed Training for Sequence Recommendation Models with Minimal Scaling Cost
papers.abstract: Modern industrial Deep Learning Recommendation Models typically extract user preferences through the analysis of sequential interaction histories, subsequently generating predictions based on these derived interests. The inherent heterogeneity in data characteristics frequently result in substantial under-utilization of computational resources during large-scale training, primarily due to computational bubbles caused by severe stragglers and slow blocking communications. This paper introduces FreeScale, a solution designed to (1) mitigate the straggler problem through meticulously load balanced input samples (2) minimize the blocking communication by overlapping prioritized embedding communications with computations (3) resolve the GPU resource competition during computation and communication overlapping by communicating through SM-Free techniques. Empirical evaluation demonstrates that FreeScale achieves up to 90.3% reduction in computational bubbles when applied to real-world workloads running on 256 H100 GPUs.

analysis.tldr: FreeScale通过负载均衡、通信计算重叠和SM-Free技术，在256块H100 GPU上将序列推荐模型训练的计算气泡减少90.3%。
analysis.research_motivation: 工业级深度学习推荐模型在大规模训练中因数据异构性导致计算资源利用率低，主要受拖后腿节点和阻塞通信造成的计算气泡影响。
analysis.problem: 序列推荐模型分布式训练中计算气泡导致的资源利用率低下问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 数据异构性导致严重拖后腿节点和阻塞通信，产生大量计算气泡。
analysis.method: FreeScale包含三种技术：1) 通过精细负载均衡输入样本缓解拖后腿问题；2) 通过优先嵌入通信与计算重叠减少阻塞通信；3) 通过SM-Free技术解决计算与通信重叠时的GPU资源竞争。
contributions: 提出FreeScale框架，通过负载均衡、通信计算重叠和SM-Free技术减少计算气泡。
在256块H100 GPU的真实工作负载上实现90.3%的计算气泡减少。
analysis.experiments: 在256块H100 GPU上对真实工作负载进行实证评估，计算气泡减少90.3%。
limitations: 可能仅适用于序列推荐模型，泛化性未验证。
未讨论对模型精度的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.one_sentence_summary: FreeScale通过负载均衡、通信计算重叠和SM-Free技术，在256块H100 GPU上将序列推荐模型训练的计算气泡减少90.3%。

papers.title: Distilling Self-Consistency into Verbal Confidence: A Pre-Registered Negative Result and Post-Hoc Rescue on Gemma 3 4B
papers.abstract: Small instruct-tuned LLMs produce degenerate verbal confidence under minimal elicitation: ceiling rates above 95%, near-chance Type-2 AUROC, and Invalid validity profiles. We test whether confidence-conditioned supervised fine-tuning (CSFT) with self-consistency-derived targets can close the gap between internal information and verbal readout. A pre-registered Phase 0 protocol on Gemma 3 4B-it with a modal filter restricting training to items with correct modal answers produced a negative result: AUROC2 dropped from 0.554 to 0.509 due to label-entropy collapse in the training targets. An exploratory rescue removed the filter, training on all 2,000 calibration items. This produced a binary verbal correctness discriminator with AUROC2 = 0.774 on held-out TriviaQA, compressing a 10-sample self-consistency signal (AUROC2 = 0.999) into a single-pass readout exceeding logit entropy (0.701). The shuffled-target control showed no improvement (0.501). On MMLU, accuracy improved from 54.2% to 77.4% with the shuffled model at baseline (56.1%), supporting a target-dependent interpretation. The result is exploratory, binary rather than continuously calibrated, and observed at a single scale. It identifies two design lessons: confidence training requires label entropy, and correct targets regularise output format.

analysis.tldr: 将自一致性蒸馏为口头置信度在Gemma 3 4B上预注册结果为负，但后验补救通过去除模态过滤器实现了AUROC2从0.554到0.774的提升。
analysis.research_motivation: 小型指令微调LLM在最小提示下产生退化的口头置信度（>95%天花板率、接近随机的Type-2 AUROC和无效的有效性分布），需要弥合内部信息与口头输出之间的差距。
analysis.problem: 如何通过自一致性蒸馏将内部置信度信号有效转化为口头置信度表达，避免标签熵崩溃和退化输出。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 预注册阶段使用模态过滤器（仅保留正确模态答案的样本）导致训练目标标签熵崩溃，AUROC2从0.554降至0.509；去除过滤器后，训练所有2000个校准样本，AUROC2提升至0.774。
analysis.method: 置信度条件监督微调（CSFT），以自一致性（10样本）为软目标，先预注册使用模态过滤器，后验补救去除过滤器并在所有校准样本上训练。
contributions: 报告了置信度蒸馏的预注册负结果，揭示模态过滤器导致标签熵崩溃的失败模式。
提出后验补救方法，通过去除过滤器实现二进制口头正确性判别器，AUROC2达0.774，超过logit熵（0.701）。
通过打乱目标控制实验（AUROC2=0.501）和MMLU准确率提升（54.2%→77.4%）支持目标依赖性解释。
analysis.experiments: 在Gemma 3 4B-it上使用TriviaQA和MMLU数据集，预注册阶段2000个校准样本（模态过滤），后验阶段全部2000个样本；评估指标包括AUROC2、准确率；打乱目标作为控制。
limitations: 结果为探索性，二进制而非连续校准。
仅在单一尺度（4B模型）上观察。
口头置信度仅为二进制判别，未实现连续概率校准。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将自一致性蒸馏为口头置信度在Gemma 3 4B上预注册结果为负，但后验补救通过去除模态过滤器实现了AUROC2从0.554到0.774的提升。

papers.title: Grounding Before Generalizing: How AI Differs from Humans in Causal Transfer
papers.abstract: Extracting abstract causal structures and applying them to novel situations is a hallmark of human intelligence. While Large Language Models (LLMs) and Vision Language Models (VLMs) have shown strong performance on a wide range of reasoning tasks, their capacity for interactive causal learning -- inducing latent structures through sequential exploration and transferring them across contexts -- remains uncharacterized. Human learners accomplish such transfer after minimal exposure, whereas classical Reinforcement Learning (RL) agents fail catastrophically. Whether state-of-the-art Artificial Intelligence (AI) models possess human-like mechanisms for abstract causal structure transfer is an open question. Using the OpenLock paradigm requiring sequential discovery of Common Cause (CC) and Common Effect (CE) structures, here we show that models exhibit fundamentally delayed or absent transfer: even successful models require initial environmental-specific mapping -- what we term environmental grounding -- before efficiency gains emerge, whereas humans leverage prior structural knowledge from the very first solution attempt. In the text-only condition, models matched or exceeded human discovery efficiency. In contrast, visual information -- in both the image-only and text-and-image conditions -- overall degraded rather than enhanced performance, revealing a broad reliance on symbolic processing rather than integrated multimodal reasoning. Models further exhibited systematic CC/CE asymmetries absent in humans, suggesting heuristic biases rather than direction-neutral causal abstraction. These findings reveal that large-scale statistical learning does not produce the decontextualized causal schemas underpinning human analogical reasoning, establishing grounding-dependent transfer as a fundamental limitation of current LLMs and VLMs.

analysis.tldr: LLM/VLM在因果结构迁移中需要环境锚定，而人类能直接利用抽象因果知识，揭示当前AI缺乏类人因果推理能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 人类能从少量交互中提取抽象因果结构并迁移到新情境，而经典RL和当前AI模型是否具备类似能力尚不清楚，这限制了AI在需要因果推理的复杂任务中的应用。
analysis.problem: 评估LLM和VLM在交互式因果学习中的抽象结构迁移能力，并与人类表现对比。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型在因果迁移前需要环境锚定（先学习特定环境映射），而人类从第一次尝试就利用先验结构知识；视觉信息（图像或图文）反而降低模型性能，表明模型依赖符号处理而非多模态推理；模型表现出系统性的CC/CE不对称性，而人类没有。
analysis.method: 使用OpenLock范式，要求模型通过顺序探索发现共因（CC）和共果（CE）结构，并在不同情境中迁移；比较文本、图像、图文三种条件下的模型与人类表现。
contributions: 首次系统评估LLM/VLM在交互式因果学习中的抽象结构迁移能力，发现其需要环境锚定才能迁移。
揭示视觉信息对模型性能的负面影响，表明模型依赖符号处理而非多模态推理。
发现模型存在CC/CE不对称性，表明其使用启发式偏差而非方向中性的因果抽象。
analysis.experiments: 使用OpenLock范式，在文本、图像、图文条件下测试多个LLM/VLM，并与人类表现对比。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 仅测试了CC和CE两种因果结构，可能不覆盖更复杂的因果模式。
未详细说明模型的具体架构和训练数据，可能影响泛化性。
analysis.primary_area_en: causal reasoning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM/VLM在因果结构迁移中需要环境锚定，而人类能直接利用抽象因果知识，揭示当前AI缺乏类人因果推理能力。

papers.title: Light 'em Up: Enabling Few-Shot Low-Light 3D Gaussian Splatting with Multi-Scale Explicit Retinex Illumination Decoupling
papers.abstract: Full 360$^\circ$ novel view synthesis under low-light conditions remains challenging. Insufficient illumination, noise amplification, and view-dependent photometric inconsistencies prevent existing methods from jointly preserving geometric consistency and photorealism. Unsupervised approaches often exhibit color drift under large viewpoint variations, while supervised low-light enhancement models, though effective for 2D tasks, struggle to generalize to new scenes and typically require retraining. To address this issue, we propose MERID-GS, a Multi-Scale Explicit Retinex Illumination-Decoupled Gaussian framework for low-light 360$^\circ$ synthesis. Based on Retinex theory, the method explicitly separates illumination and reflectance, and suppresses noise propagation while enhancing dark-region structures via a learnable gain and Illumination-State-Guided Frequency Gating. Combined with lightweight Reflection Head and 3D Gaussian Splatting, MERID-GS adapts to new scenes with only a few shots and enables stable low-light novel view synthesis from sparse-view observations. In addition, we construct a low-light multi-view dataset covering full 360$^\circ$ scenes for joint evaluation. Thorough experiments across multiple datasets in this area demonstrate that MERID-GS achieves SOTA performance, exhibiting superior cross-scene generalization and view consistency. The source code and pre-trained models are available at https://github.com/YhuoyuH/MERID-GS..

analysis.tldr: 提出MERID-GS框架，基于Retinex理论显式分离光照与反射，实现低光照下少样本360°新视角合成。
analysis.research_motivation: 低光照条件下全360°新视角合成面临光照不足、噪声放大和视角依赖的光度不一致性，现有无监督方法在大视角变化下存在颜色漂移，监督方法难以泛化到新场景且需重训练。
analysis.problem: 解决低光照360°新视角合成中几何一致性与真实感难以同时保持的问题，并实现少样本跨场景泛化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出低光照下现有方法无法同时保持几何一致性和真实感，无监督方法在大视角变化下颜色漂移，监督方法泛化性差。
analysis.method: 基于Retinex理论显式分离光照和反射，通过可学习增益和光照状态引导的频率门控抑制噪声并增强暗区结构，结合轻量反射头和3D高斯泼溅实现少样本适应。
contributions: 提出MERID-GS，首个基于Retinex显式光照解耦的低光照360°新视角合成框架，支持少样本泛化。
构建低光照多视图数据集，覆盖全360°场景，用于联合评估。
analysis.experiments: 在多个低光照数据集上进行了全面实验，达到SOTA性能，展示了优越的跨场景泛化和视角一致性。
limitations: 可能依赖Retinex分解的准确性，极端低光照下分解可能不稳定。
少样本场景下对光照估计的鲁棒性有待进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MERID-GS框架，基于Retinex理论显式分离光照与反射，实现低光照下少样本360°新视角合成。

papers.title: QEVA: A Reference-Free Evaluation Metric for Narrative Video Summarization with Multimodal Question Answering
papers.abstract: Video-to-text summarization remains underexplored in terms of comprehensive evaluation methods. Traditional n-gram overlap-based metrics and recent large language model (LLM)-based approaches depend heavily on human-written reference summaries, limiting their practicality and sensitivity to nuanced semantic aspects. In this paper, we propose QEVA, a reference-free metric evaluating candidate summaries directly against source videos through multimodal question answering. QEVA assesses summaries along three clear dimensions: Coverage, Factuality, and Chronology. We also introduce MLVU(VS)-Eval, a new annotated benchmark derived from the MLVU dataset, comprising 800 summaries generated from 200 videos using state-of-the-art video-language multimodal models. This dataset establishes a transparent and consistent framework for evaluation. Experimental results demonstrate that QEVA shows higher correlation with human judgments compared to existing approaches, as measured by Kendall's $τ_b$, $τ_c$, and Spearman's $ρ$. We hope that our benchmark and metric will facilitate meaningful progress in video-to-text summarization research and provide valuable insights for the development of future evaluation methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出无参考摘要评估指标QEVA，通过多模态问答直接评估视频摘要的覆盖度、事实性和时序性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频摘要评估方法依赖人工参考摘要，缺乏实用性和对语义细微差别的敏感性。
analysis.problem: 缺乏无需参考摘要、能全面评估视频摘要质量的自动评估指标。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出QEVA指标，通过多模态问答直接比较候选摘要与源视频，从覆盖度、事实性和时序性三个维度评估。
contributions: 提出无参考评估指标QEVA，通过多模态问答评估视频摘要。
构建MLVU(VS)-Eval基准数据集，包含800个摘要，用于透明一致的评估。
analysis.experiments: 在MLVU(VS)-Eval上实验，QEVA与人类判断的相关性（Kendall's τ_b, τ_c, Spearman's ρ）高于现有方法。
limitations: 可能仅适用于叙事视频摘要，泛化性待验证。
多模态问答模型的质量可能影响评估准确性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无参考摘要评估指标QEVA，通过多模态问答直接评估视频摘要的覆盖度、事实性和时序性。

papers.title: Generalising maximum mean discrepancy: kernelised functional Bregman divergences
papers.abstract: Bregman divergences play a pivotal role in statistics, machine learning and computational information geometry. Particularly in the context of machine learning, they are central to clustering, exponential families, parameter estimation and optimisation, among other things. Despite this, the full toolkit of Hilbert spaces and in particular reproducing kernel Hilbert spaces have not been systematically developed and applied to functional Bregman divergences, where points are functions rather than finite-dimensional parameter vectors. While other types of functional Bregman divergences have been studied, these are typically in a Banach space rather than more directly aligned with kernel methods and Hilbert-space geometry commonly used in machine learning. We consider functional Bregman divergences on a Hilbert space, where the self-dual pairing and Riesz representer afford us particularly convenient calculus. Further specialising Bregman generators as a composition involving a kernel mean embedding makes such divergences easy to estimate. We discuss applications in clustering, universal estimation, robust estimation and generative modelling, and contrast our approach with other types of Bregman divergences.

analysis.tldr: 将Bregman散度推广到希尔伯特空间中的函数版本，并通过核均值嵌入实现便捷估计。
analysis.research_motivation: Bregman散度在机器学习中至关重要，但现有函数版本多在巴拿赫空间，缺乏与核方法和希尔伯特空间几何的直接对齐，限制了其在聚类、生成建模等任务中的应用。
analysis.problem: 如何系统地将Bregman散度推广到希尔伯特空间中的函数版本，并使其易于估计。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在希尔伯特空间上定义函数Bregman散度，利用自对偶配对和Riesz表示简化微积分；通过将Bregman生成器特化为核均值嵌入的组合，使散度易于估计。
contributions: 提出了希尔伯特空间上的函数Bregman散度框架，与核方法自然对齐。
通过核均值嵌入实现散度的便捷估计，并展示了在聚类、鲁棒估计和生成建模中的应用。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的核和生成器。
高维或大规模数据下的计算效率未讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将Bregman散度推广到希尔伯特空间中的函数版本，并通过核均值嵌入实现便捷估计。

papers.title: CLLAP: Contrastive Learning-based LiDAR-Augmented Pretraining for Enhanced Radar-Camera Fusion
papers.abstract: Accurate 3D object detection is critical for autonomous driving, necessitating reliable, cost-effective sensors capable of operating in adverse weather conditions. Camera and millimeter-wave radar fusion has emerged as a promising solution; however, these methods often rely on finely annotated radar data, which is scarce and labor-intensive to produce. To address this challenge, we present CLLAP, a Contrastive Learning-based LiDAR-Augmented Pretraining framework that enhances the performance of existing radar-camera fusion methods for 3D object detection. CLLAP leverages abundant LiDAR data to generate pseudo-radar data using the proposed L2R (LiDAR-to-Radar) Sampling method. Then, it incorporates this data into a novel dual-stage, dual-modality contrastive learning strategy, enabling effective self-supervised learning from paired pseudo-radar and image data. This approach facilitates effective pretraining of existing radar-camera fusion models in a plug-and-play manner, enhancing their feature extraction capabilities and improving detection accuracy and robustness. Experimental results using NuScenes and Lyft Level 5 datasets demonstrate significant performance improvements across three baseline models, highlighting CLLAP's effectiveness in advancing radar-camera fusion for autonomous driving applications.

analysis.tldr: 提出CLLAP框架，利用LiDAR数据生成伪雷达数据，通过对比学习预训练增强雷达-相机融合的3D目标检测性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 雷达-相机融合在自动驾驶中具有成本效益和恶劣天气适应性，但依赖稀缺且标注昂贵的雷达数据，限制了方法的发展。
analysis.problem: 如何利用丰富的LiDAR数据提升雷达-相机融合模型的检测性能，减少对精细标注雷达数据的依赖。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出CLLAP框架，包含L2R采样方法从LiDAR生成伪雷达数据，以及双阶段双模态对比学习策略，对雷达-相机融合模型进行自监督预训练。
contributions: 提出L2R采样方法，利用LiDAR数据生成伪雷达数据，缓解雷达数据稀缺问题。
设计双阶段双模态对比学习策略，实现有效的自监督预训练，提升特征提取能力。
在NuScenes和Lyft Level 5数据集上验证，显著提升三种基线模型的检测性能。
analysis.experiments: 在NuScenes和Lyft Level 5数据集上评估，使用三种基线模型，显示显著性能提升。
limitations: 伪雷达数据与真实雷达数据可能存在分布差异，影响泛化。
方法依赖LiDAR数据，在无LiDAR场景下无法直接应用。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CLLAP框架，利用LiDAR数据生成伪雷达数据，通过对比学习预训练增强雷达-相机融合的3D目标检测性能。

papers.title: A2DEPT: Large Language Model-Driven Automated Algorithm Design via Evolutionary Program Trees
papers.abstract: Designing heuristics for combinatorial optimization problems (COPs) is a fundamental yet challenging task that traditionally requires extensive domain expertise. Recently, Large Language Model (LLM)-based Automated Heuristic Design (AHD) has shown promise in autonomously generating heuristic components with minimal human intervention. However, most existing LLM-based AHD methods enforce fixed algorithmic templates to ensure executability, which confines the search to component-level tuning and limits system-level algorithmic expressiveness. To enable open-ended solver synthesis beyond rigid templates, we propose Automated Algorithm Design via Evolutionary Program Trees (A2DEPT), which treats LLMs as system-level algorithm architects. A2DEPT explores the vast program space via a tree-structured evolutionary search with hybrid selection and hierarchical operators, enabling iterative refinement of complete algorithms. To make open-ended generation practical, we enforce executability with a lightweight program-maintenance loop that performs feedback-driven repair. In experiments, A2DEPT consistently outperforms representative LLM-based baselines on both standard and highly constrained benchmarks. On the standard benchmarks, it reduces the mean normalized optimality gap by 9.8% relative to the strongest competing AHD baseline.

analysis.tldr: 提出A2DEPT，利用LLM通过进化程序树自动设计组合优化启发式算法，突破固定模板限制。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统启发式算法设计依赖领域专家，耗时且成本高；现有LLM驱动的自动设计方法受限于固定算法模板，只能调优组件而无法探索系统级算法空间。
analysis.problem: 如何让LLM自动生成完整的、可执行的组合优化算法，而不受预定义模板的约束。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出A2DEPT，将LLM作为系统级算法架构师，通过树结构进化搜索（混合选择与层次化算子）迭代优化完整算法，并采用轻量级程序维护循环进行反馈驱动修复以保证可执行性。
contributions: 提出A2DEPT框架，实现LLM驱动的开放式算法自动设计，突破固定模板限制。
在标准和高约束基准上，A2DEPT优于现有LLM基线，平均归一化最优性差距降低9.8%。
analysis.experiments: 在标准和高约束组合优化基准上测试，与代表性LLM基线对比，A2DEPT在标准基准上平均归一化最优性差距相对降低9.8%。
limitations: 可能依赖LLM的生成质量，对复杂问题可能产生不可执行算法。
树结构搜索的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出A2DEPT，利用LLM通过进化程序树自动设计组合优化启发式算法，突破固定模板限制。

papers.title: End-to-End Learning for Partially-Observed Time Series with PyPOTS
papers.abstract: Partially-observed time series (POTS) is ubiquitous in real-world applications, yet most existing toolchains separate missing-value handling from downstream learning, which limits reproducibility and overall performance. This tutorial introduces PyPOTS, an open-source Python ecosystem for end-to-end data mining and machine learning on POTS. We present practical workflows spanning missingness simulation, data preprocessing, model training, and evaluation across core tasks, including imputation, forecasting, classification, clustering, and anomaly detection. The tutorial consists of two parts: Part I emphasizes hands-on application for practitioners through unified APIs and benchmark-oriented experiments. Part II targets developers and researchers, focusing on extending PyPOTS with custom models, domain-specific constraints, and contribution-ready engineering practices. Participants will gain both conceptual understanding and implementation experience for building robust, transparent, and reusable POTS pipelines in research and production settings. PyPOTS is publicly available at https://github.com/WenjieDu/PyPOTS

analysis.tldr: PyPOTS 是一个面向部分观测时间序列的端到端开源 Python 工具库，统一了缺失值处理与下游学习流程。
analysis.research_motivation: 现实应用中部分观测时间序列普遍存在，但现有工具链将缺失值处理与下游学习分离，限制了可复现性和整体性能。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个统一、端到端的开源工具库来支持部分观测时间序列的数据挖掘与机器学习全流程。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: PyPOTS 是一个开源 Python 生态系统，提供统一的 API 和基准实验，覆盖缺失模拟、数据预处理、模型训练与评估，支持插补、预测、分类、聚类和异常检测等核心任务。
contributions: 提出了 PyPOTS，一个面向部分观测时间序列的端到端开源工具库。
提供了统一的 API 和基准实验，便于实践者使用和研究者扩展。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅支持部分常见模型和任务，特定领域需求需自行扩展。
性能依赖于底层模型选择，工具本身不保证最优结果。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.one_sentence_summary: PyPOTS 是一个面向部分观测时间序列的端到端开源 Python 工具库，统一了缺失值处理与下游学习流程。

papers.title: Improving Robustness of Tabular Retrieval via Representational Stability
papers.abstract: Transformer-based table retrieval systems flatten structured tables into token sequences, making retrieval sensitive to the choice of serialization even when table semantics remain unchanged. We show that semantically equivalent serializations, such as $\texttt{csv}$, $\texttt{tsv}$, $\texttt{html}$, $\texttt{markdown}$, and $\texttt{ddl}$, can produce substantially different embeddings and retrieval results across multiple benchmarks and retriever families. To address this instability, we treat serialization embedding as noisy views of a shared semantic signal and use its centroid as a canonical target representation. We show that centroid averaging suppresses format-specific variation and can recover the semantic content common to different serializations when format-induced shifts differ across tables. Empirically, centroid representations outrank individual formats in aggregate pairwise comparisons across $\texttt{MPNet}$, $\texttt{BGE-M3}$, $\texttt{ReasonIR}$, and $\texttt{SPLADE}$. We further introduce a lightweight residual bottleneck adapter on top of a frozen encoder that maps single-serialization embeddings towards centroid targets while preserving variance and enforcing covariance regularization. The adapter improves robustness for several dense retrievers, though gains are model-dependent and weaker for sparse lexical retrieval. These results identify serialization sensitivity as a major source of retrieval variance and show the promise of post hoc geometric correction for serialization-invariant table retrieval.

analysis.tldr: 通过质心平均和残差瓶颈适配器提升表格检索对序列化方式的鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 基于Transformer的表格检索系统将结构化表格展平为token序列，导致检索结果对序列化方式（如csv、tsv等）敏感，即使表格语义不变，不同序列化方式也会产生显著不同的嵌入和检索结果，影响系统可靠性。
analysis.problem: 表格检索中不同序列化方式导致的嵌入不稳定和检索结果不一致问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到，语义等价的序列化方式（csv、tsv、html、markdown、ddl）在多个基准和检索器族上产生显著不同的嵌入和检索结果，表明序列化敏感性是检索方差的主要来源。
analysis.method: 将序列化嵌入视为共享语义信号的噪声视图，使用其质心作为规范目标表示；进一步引入轻量级残差瓶颈适配器，将单序列化嵌入映射向质心目标，同时保留方差并施加协方差正则化。
contributions: 识别并量化了表格检索中序列化敏感性作为检索方差的主要来源。
提出质心平均和残差瓶颈适配器方法，提升检索鲁棒性。
analysis.experiments: 在MPNet、BGE-M3、ReasonIR和SPLADE等多个检索器上评估，质心表示在成对比较中优于单个格式；适配器提升了多个密集检索器的鲁棒性，但对稀疏词汇检索效果较弱。
limitations: 适配器增益依赖于模型，对稀疏检索器效果较弱。
方法基于后验几何校正，可能无法完全消除序列化偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过质心平均和残差瓶颈适配器提升表格检索对序列化方式的鲁棒性。

papers.title: AgenticCache: Cache-Driven Asynchronous Planning for Embodied AI Agents
papers.abstract: Embodied AI agents increasingly rely on large language models (LLMs) for planning, yet per-step LLM calls impose severe latency and cost. In this paper, we show that embodied tasks exhibit strong plan locality, where the next plan is largely predictable from the current one. Building on this, we introduce AgenticCache, a planning framework that reuses cached plans to avoid per-step LLM calls. In AgenticCache, each agent queries a runtime cache of frequent plan transitions, while a background Cache Updater asynchronously calls the LLM to validate and refine cached entries. Across four multi-agent embodied benchmarks, AgenticCache improves task success rate by 22% on average across 12 configurations (4 benchmarks x 3 models), reduces simulation latency by 65%, and lowers token usage by 50%. Cache-based plan reuse thus offers a practical path to low-latency, low-cost embodied agents. Code is available at https://github.com/hojoonleokim/MLSys26_AgenticCache.

analysis.tldr: 利用缓存复用规划，避免逐步骤调用LLM，实现低延迟、低成本的具身AI智能体。
analysis.research_motivation: 具身AI智能体依赖LLM进行规划，但每步调用LLM导致严重延迟和高成本，限制了实际部署。
analysis.problem: 如何减少具身AI智能体规划过程中对LLM的频繁调用，降低延迟和成本。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到具身任务具有强规划局部性，即下一步规划在很大程度上可从当前规划预测。
analysis.method: 提出AgenticCache框架，通过缓存频繁的规划转换，智能体查询运行时缓存，后台缓存更新器异步调用LLM验证和优化缓存条目。
contributions: 发现具身任务中规划局部性现象，即下一步规划可从当前规划预测。
提出AgenticCache框架，利用缓存复用避免逐步骤LLM调用，实现异步规划。
在多个多智能体具身基准上验证，任务成功率平均提升22%，延迟降低65%，token使用减少50%。
analysis.experiments: 在4个多智能体具身基准上，使用3种模型共12种配置进行实验，平均任务成功率提升22%，模拟延迟降低65%，token使用减少50%。
limitations: 缓存命中率可能受任务多样性影响，高度动态任务可能缓存失效。
后台异步更新可能引入缓存一致性问题，需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用缓存复用规划，避免逐步骤调用LLM，实现低延迟、低成本的具身AI智能体。

papers.title: AgentPulse: A Continuous Multi-Signal Framework for Evaluating AI Agents in Deployment
papers.abstract: Static benchmarks measure what AI agents can do at a fixed point in time but not how they are adopted, maintained, or experienced in deployment. We introduce AgentPulse, a continuous evaluation framework scoring 50 agents across 10 workload categories along four factors (Benchmark Performance, Adoption Signals, Community Sentiment, and Ecosystem Health) aggregated from 18 real-time signals across GitHub, package registries, IDE marketplaces, social platforms, and benchmark leaderboards. Three analyses ground the framework. The four factors capture largely complementary information (n=50; $ρ_{\max}=0.61$ for Adoption-Ecosystem, all others $|ρ| \leq 0.37$). A circularity-controlled test (n=35) shows the Benchmark+Sentiment sub-composite, which contains no GitHub-derived signals, predicts external adoption proxies it does not aggregate: GitHub stars ($ρ_s=0.52$, $p<0.01$) and Stack Overflow question volume ($ρ_s=0.49$, $p<0.01$), with VS Code installs ($ρ_s=0.44$, $p<0.05$) reported as illustrative given that only 11 of 35 agents have non-zero installs. On the n=11 subset with published SWE-bench scores, composite and benchmark-only rankings are nearly uncorrelated ($ρ_s=0.25$; 9 of 11 agents shift by at least 2 ranks), driven by a strong negative Adoption-Capability correlation among closed-source high-capability agents within this subset. This is precisely why we rest the framework's validity claim on the broader n=35 test rather than the SWE-bench overlap. AgentPulse surfaces deployment signal absent from benchmarks; it is a methodology, not a ground-truth ranking. The framework, all collected signals, scoring outputs, and evaluation harness are released under CC BY 4.0.

analysis.tldr: AgentPulse 是一个持续评估 AI Agent 部署表现的框架，通过 18 个实时信号从四个维度打分，发现基准排名与部署信号几乎不相关。
analysis.research_motivation: 静态基准只能衡量 AI Agent 在固定时间点的能力，无法反映它们在部署中的采用、维护和实际体验，因此需要一种持续评估框架来捕捉部署信号。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个持续、多信号的评估框架，以量化 AI Agent 在部署环境中的表现，弥补静态基准的不足。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 四个评估因素（基准性能、采用信号、社区情绪、生态系统健康）捕获的信息互补性高（最大相关系数 0.61）；基准+情绪子复合指标能显著预测外部采用代理（如 GitHub stars 和 Stack Overflow 问题量）；在 SWE-bench 子集上，复合排名与基准排名几乎不相关（ρ_s=0.25），且 9/11 的 Agent 排名变动至少 2 位，表明基准无法反映部署信号。
analysis.method: 提出 AgentPulse 框架，从 GitHub、包注册表、IDE 市场、社交平台和基准排行榜等来源聚合 18 个实时信号，按基准性能、采用信号、社区情绪和生态系统健康四个因素对 50 个 Agent 进行持续评分。
contributions: 提出 AgentPulse，首个持续、多信号的 AI Agent 部署评估框架，覆盖 50 个 Agent 和 10 个工作负载类别。
通过三项分析验证框架有效性，揭示基准排名与部署信号之间的低相关性，并开源所有数据、评分和评估工具。
analysis.experiments: 在 50 个 Agent 上收集 18 个实时信号，进行相关性分析（n=50）、循环性控制测试（n=35）和 SWE-bench 子集分析（n=11），验证框架的预测能力和基准-部署信号差异。
limitations: SWE-bench 子集样本量小（n=11），且其中闭源高能力 Agent 的采用-能力负相关可能影响泛化性。
VS Code 安装量作为采用代理时，仅 11/35 的 Agent 有非零值，统计效力有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AgentPulse 是一个持续评估 AI Agent 部署表现的框架，通过 18 个实时信号从四个维度打分，发现基准排名与部署信号几乎不相关。

papers.title: Robust Grounding with MLLMs Against Occlusion and Small Objects via Language-Guided Semantic Cues
papers.abstract: While Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have enhanced grounding capabilities in general scenes, their robustness in crowded scenes remains underexplored. Crowded scenes entail visual challenges (i.e., occlusion and small objects), which impair object semantics and degrade grounding performance. In contrast, language expressions are immune to such degradation and preserve object semantics. In light of these observations, we propose a novel method that overcomes such constraints by leveraging Language-Guided Semantic Cues (LGSCs). Specifically, our approach introduces a Semantic Cue Extractor (SCE) to derive semantic cues of objects from the visual pipeline of an MLLM. We then guide these cues using corresponding text embeddings to produce LGSCs as linguistic semantic priors. Subsequently, they are reintegrated into the original visual pipeline to refine object semantics. Extensive experiments and analyses demonstrate that incorporating LGSCs into an MLLM effectively improves grounding accuracy in crowded scenes.

analysis.tldr: 利用语言引导语义线索提升MLLM在遮挡和小物体场景下的定位鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有MLLM在拥挤场景（遮挡、小物体）中视觉语义受损，定位性能下降，而语言表达不受影响，因此利用语言线索增强视觉语义是可行的方向。
analysis.problem: MLLM在拥挤场景中因遮挡和小物体导致视觉语义退化，定位不准确。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 拥挤场景中视觉挑战（遮挡、小物体）会损害物体语义，而语言表达不受此类退化影响，能保留物体语义。
analysis.method: 提出语言引导语义线索（LGSCs）方法：通过语义线索提取器（SCE）从MLLM视觉管道中提取语义线索，并用对应文本嵌入引导生成LGSCs作为语言语义先验，再重新注入视觉管道以优化物体语义。
contributions: 首次系统研究MLLM在拥挤场景下的定位鲁棒性问题。
提出语言引导语义线索（LGSCs）方法，有效缓解遮挡和小物体带来的视觉语义退化。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量文本描述，在文本模糊时效果受限。
仅针对拥挤场景，泛化到其他退化场景（如光照变化）未验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用语言引导语义线索提升MLLM在遮挡和小物体场景下的定位鲁棒性。

papers.title: JSSFF: A Joint Structural-Semantic Fusion Framework for Remote Sensing Image Captioning
papers.abstract: The encoder-decoder framework has become widely popular nowadays. In this model, the encoder extracts informative visual features from an input image, and the decoder employs a sequence-to-sequence formulation to generate the corresponding textual description from these features. The existing models focus more on the decision part. However, extracting meaningful information from the image can help the decoder generate an accurate caption by providing information about the objects and their relationship. Remote sensing images are highly complex. One major challenge is detecting objects that extend beyond their visible boundaries due to occlusion, overlapping structures, and unclear edges. Hence, there is a need to design an approach that can effectively capture both high-level semantics and low-level spatial details for accurate caption generation. In this work, we have proposed an edge-aware fusion method by incorporating the original image and its edge-aware version into the encoder to enhance feature representation and boundary awareness. We used a comparison-based beam search (CBBS) to generate captions to achieve a balanced trade-off between quantitative metrics and qualitative caption relevance through fairness-based comparison of candidate captions.
